papers.title: Benchmarking ResNet Backbones in RT-DETR: Impact of Depth and Regularization under environmental conditions
papers.abstract: Visual perception plays a central role in competitive robotics, where environmental variations can directly affect real-time detection performance. The related literature on transformer-based detectors lack information regarding the impact of backbone scale and environmental settings on model performance. This work presents a comparative evaluation of RT-DETR for detecting round objects under environmental and hyperparameter variations relevant to competitive robotics. Four ResNet backbones (ResNet18, ResNet34, ResNet50, and ResNet101) were compared using dropout rates, analyzing their effect on confidence and accuracy. All models were trained under the same configuration and evaluated under changes in lighting and background contrast. Environmental conditions primarily impact prediction confidence, while inference latency remains largely unaffected and classification accuracy stays consistently high, approaching or above 1.00 in most cases. Two distinct behaviors were observed. Under illumination variation, ResNet50 achieves the best trade-off, combining near-perfect accuracy, confidence values up to approximately 0.869 and latency around 0.058-0.059 ms. Under background variation, ResNet34 provides the most balanced performance, reaching near-perfect accuracy and higher confidence values up to approximately 0.887. These results indicate that the optimal architecture depends on the type of environmental variation, with intermediate-depth models offering the best balance between performance and efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 在RT-DETR中对比不同深度ResNet骨干网络，发现环境变化主要影响预测置信度，中等深度模型（ResNet50/34）在不同环境下表现最佳。
analysis.research_motivation: 竞争性机器人中视觉感知受环境变化影响，但现有基于Transformer的检测器缺乏关于骨干网络规模和环境设置对性能影响的系统研究。
analysis.problem: 评估RT-DETR在不同环境条件（光照、背景对比度）和超参数（dropout率）下，使用不同深度ResNet骨干网络检测圆形物体的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 环境条件主要影响预测置信度，推理延迟几乎不受影响，分类准确率始终很高（接近或超过1.00）。光照变化下ResNet50最佳，背景变化下ResNet34最佳。
analysis.method: 在RT-DETR框架下，使用四种ResNet骨干网络（18/34/50/101），在相同配置下训练，并改变dropout率，在光照和背景变化下评估。
contributions: 系统比较了不同深度ResNet骨干在RT-DETR中受环境变化的影响
发现环境变化主要影响置信度而非延迟或准确率，并确定了不同环境下的最优骨干网络
analysis.experiments: 在光照和背景对比度变化下评估，报告了准确率、置信度和延迟指标。摘要未提供具体数据集或完整实验细节。
limitations: 仅针对圆形物体检测，泛化性未知
未涉及更复杂的环境变化或真实机器人场景
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 工作聚焦于特定场景下的骨干网络对比，创新性和技术深度一般，但为机器人视觉选择提供参考。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在RT-DETR中对比不同深度ResNet骨干网络，发现环境变化主要影响预测置信度，中等深度模型（ResNet50/34）在不同环境下表现最佳。

papers.title: Governing What the EU AI Act Excludes: Accountability for Autonomous AI Agents in Smart City Critical Infrastructure
papers.abstract: When a traffic signal controller adjusts green phases and a grid manager curtails power on the same corridor, each system may comply with its own obligations. The resident who suffers the combined effect has no single authority to hold accountable and, under the EU AI Act, limited means to obtain an explanation. Annex III, point 2 excludes safety-component AI in critical infrastructure from Article 86 explanation rights and Article 27 fundamental-rights impact assessment. Provider and deployer duties under Articles 9-15 still apply, and residual pathways under the GDPR, NIS2, and tortious liability offer partial coverage. The Act's principal resident-facing accountability instruments are nonetheless narrowed for the autonomous infrastructure systems most likely to interact across agencies. The paper traces this accountability deficit through four residual pathways (GDPR Article 22, GDPR transparency obligations, tortious liability, and NIS2) and shows that each is structurally bounded by individual-controller, individual-decision scope. As a governance response, it presents AgentGov-SC, a three-layer architecture (Agent, Orchestration, City) specifying 25 governance measures with bidirectional traceability to the EU AI Act, ISO/IEC 42001, and the NIST AI Risk Management Framework. Five conflict resolution rules and an autonomy-calibrated activation model complete the design. A scenario analysis traces governance activation through a multi-agent corridor cascade involving three documented UAE smart-city systems, with a contrasting single-system scenario confirming proportional activation. The paper contributes a regulatory gap analysis and governance architecture for an increasingly important class of urban AI deployment that existing frameworks treat as bounded and isolated.

analysis.tldr: 针对欧盟AI法案对自主AI智能体在智慧城市关键基础设施中的问责缺口，提出三层治理架构AgentGov-SC。
analysis.research_motivation: 欧盟AI法案排除了关键基础设施中安全组件AI的某些问责条款，导致多智能体系统协同故障时居民无法追责，现有治理框架将此类系统视为孤立和边界明确的，无法应对跨机构交互的自主基础设施。
analysis.problem: 解决欧盟AI法案下自主AI智能体在智慧城市关键基础设施中部署时的问责赤字问题，即多智能体系统协同故障时缺乏单一问责主体和解释途径。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，但分析了四种残余问责路径（GDPR第22条、GDPR透明度义务、侵权责任、NIS2）的结构性局限，指出它们受限于个体控制者和个体决策范围。
analysis.method: 提出AgentGov-SC三层治理架构（Agent层、Orchestration层、City层），包含25项治理措施，与欧盟AI法案、ISO/IEC 42001、NIST AI风险管理框架双向可追溯；设计五种冲突解决规则和自主校准激活模型。
contributions: 识别并分析了欧盟AI法案对自主AI智能体在关键基础设施中问责缺口的监管漏洞
提出了AgentGov-SC治理架构，包含25项可追溯的治理措施和冲突解决规则
analysis.experiments: 通过场景分析验证：一个涉及阿联酋三个智慧城市系统的多智能体走廊级联场景，以及一个对比的单系统场景，确认了按比例激活。
limitations: 治理架构尚未在实际系统中部署验证
冲突解决规则可能需要在不同法律体系下调整
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 针对欧盟AI法案的监管缺口提出系统治理架构，场景分析验证了有效性，但缺乏实证实验。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 针对欧盟AI法案对自主AI智能体在智慧城市关键基础设施中的问责缺口，提出三层治理架构AgentGov-SC。

papers.title: Patient-Specific Optimization for Mandibular Reconstruction Planning with Enhanced Bone Union
papers.abstract: Mandibular reconstruction with vascularized bone grafts is complicated by donor-host nonunion, and current virtual surgical planning produces a geometric plan rather than a configuration that explicitly promotes bone union. We present OsteoOpt++, an image-to-decision planning loop for patient-specific mandibular reconstruction. A pre-operative computed tomography (CT) is converted into a personalized digital twin through template-to-patient registration and CT-derived updates of the muscle and temporomandibular-joint parameters. Bayesian optimization with an expected-improvement-plus acquisition rule then searches six clinically controllable cut-plane and donor-positioning variables under an apposition-driven objective and a safety-factor-regularized variant. The workflow was evaluated on three generic defects (body, symphysis, and ramus-body) and a total of 3+1 patient-specific cases, with 3 used for optimization and 1 for validation. In the generic cases, against a common surgical approach, cycle-averaged donor-mandible apposition increased by up to 29 percentage points (329% relative); in the patient-specific cases, against the surgeon-implemented day-5 post-operative configuration, by up to 26 percentage points. A 10% sensitivity analysis over eleven modeling parameters capped the change in the apposition-driven objective at 3% for generic cases and 4% for patient-specific cases, and the longitudinal case showed Dice overlap of 0.70 and 0.76 between predicted apposition and year-1 bone formation. Clinically, this provides surgeons with a pre-operative, image-driven recommendation for cut-plane orientation and donor placement that is predicted to improve union conditions over the configurations currently delivered in the operating room. The optimization and patient-specific modeling code is open source at https://github.com/hamidreza-aftabi/OsteoOpt.

analysis.tldr: 提出OsteoOpt++，一种用于下颌骨重建的术前图像到决策优化框架，通过贝叶斯优化提高骨愈合条件。
analysis.research_motivation: 下颌骨重建中供体-宿主骨不愈合是常见并发症，当前虚拟手术规划仅生成几何方案，未主动促进骨愈合，缺乏患者特异性优化。
analysis.problem: 如何为每位患者术前优化截骨平面和供体位置，以最大化骨接触面积并提高骨愈合概率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将术前CT转换为个性化数字孪生，通过贝叶斯优化（期望改进+采集规则）搜索六个临床可控变量（截骨平面和供体定位），目标函数基于骨接触面积并加入安全因子正则化。
contributions: 提出OsteoOpt++，一个完整的图像到决策优化循环，用于患者特异性下颌骨重建规划。
在通用和患者特异性病例上验证，骨接触面积显著提升（最高29个百分点），且对模型参数敏感度低。
analysis.experiments: 在3个通用缺损（体部、联合部、升支-体部）和3+1个患者特异性病例上评估，3例用于优化，1例用于验证。通用病例中骨接触面积平均提升29个百分点（相对329%），患者特异性病例中比术后第5天配置提升26个百分点。10%敏感性分析显示目标函数变化不超过4%。纵向病例中预测接触与一年后骨形成的Dice重叠为0.70和0.76。
limitations: 仅基于有限病例（3+1）验证，泛化性需更大规模临床研究。
优化目标仅考虑骨接触面积，未纳入生物力学或血管化等因素。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新（图像到决策优化循环）且实验显示显著提升，但病例数有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出OsteoOpt++，一种用于下颌骨重建的术前图像到决策优化框架，通过贝叶斯优化提高骨愈合条件。

papers.title: WILD SAM: A Simulated-and-Real Data Augmentation for Autonomous Driving Perception under Challenging Weather
papers.abstract: The performance of state-of-the-art object detectors degrades significantly under adverse weather, causing a safety-critical domain shift problem for autonomous vehicles. Recent efforts address this problem by relying on synthetic data to train the object detectors, which limits their real-world applicability. Meanwhile, pseudo-labeling is widely used for cross-dataset domain adaptation problems. However, these methods have not been exploited by weather-based domain adaptation approaches due to the noisy nature of such labels generated under harsh weather conditions. In this paper, we propose two new approaches to mitigate this weather-induced domain shift. First, we propose a Weather-Induced pseudo Label Denoising (WILD) framework that filters noisy pseudo labels generated by real data captured under adverse weather conditions. Second, we develop a novel hybrid training methodology, WILD SAM, that exploits both pseudo-label denoising and simulation-based training solutions while using real-data from the target harsh-weather domain. We validate both proposed approaches, WILD and WILD SAM, on the recently released Four Seasons dataset across rainy and snowy scenarios. Experiments show that the proposed frameworks improve Average Precision (AP) up to 13\% and significantly reduce the weather-induced performance gap relative to the baseline. The code is available at: https://github.com/Kh-Hamed/WILD-SAM

analysis.tldr: 提出WILD SAM框架，结合伪标签去噪与仿真数据增强，提升恶劣天气下自动驾驶目标检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 恶劣天气导致目标检测器性能严重下降，造成安全关键的域偏移问题；现有方法依赖合成数据或伪标签，但伪标签在恶劣天气下噪声大，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何有效利用真实恶劣天气数据中的伪标签，并结合仿真数据，减少天气引起的域偏移，提升检测精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 恶劣天气下生成的伪标签噪声大，直接使用会损害模型性能；单纯依赖合成数据训练在真实场景中泛化有限。
analysis.method: 提出WILD框架用于过滤恶劣天气下伪标签中的噪声，并进一步提出WILD SAM混合训练方法，结合伪标签去噪与仿真数据增强，利用目标域真实数据。
contributions: 提出WILD伪标签去噪框架，有效过滤恶劣天气下的噪声伪标签。
提出WILD SAM混合训练方法，融合伪标签去噪与仿真数据增强，在Four Seasons数据集上提升AP达13%。
analysis.experiments: 在Four Seasons数据集的雨雪场景下进行验证，与基线相比平均精度（AP）提升高达13%，显著缩小天气导致的性能差距。
limitations: 方法在极端天气（如暴雪、大雾）下的效果未在摘要中明确。
依赖仿真数据的质量，可能引入新的域偏移。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法结合伪标签去噪与仿真数据，创新性中等，实验提升显著，但仅针对雨雪场景，推荐阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出WILD SAM框架，结合伪标签去噪与仿真数据增强，提升恶劣天气下自动驾驶目标检测性能。

papers.title: A Sentence Relation-Based Approach to Sanitizing Malicious Instructions
papers.abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation and tool-integrated LLM agents increasingly depend on external textual sources. This reliance broadens the available attack surface, allowing adversaries to insert malicious instructions that trigger unintended model behaviors. Current defensive measures often utilize LLM-based detectors to filter such content, but these approaches remain vulnerable to optimization-based attacks. Additionally, training-based methods frequently fail to generalize to novel data distributions. To resolve these issues, we introduce SONAR, a prompt sanitization framework that identifies and removes injected content using metrics from natural language inference. Specifically, SONAR constructs a sentence-level relational graph across the user query and external data. By using entailment and contradiction scores as edge weights, the system identifies sentences that deviate from the core task. It then employs connectivity-driven pruning to eliminate flagged injection seeds and their related neighbors while maintaining benign context. Rigorous evaluations across several models and datasets show that SONAR reduces the attack success rate to nearly zero, significantly outperforming nine established baseline defenses.

analysis.tldr: SONAR利用自然语言推理中的蕴含与矛盾分数构建句子关系图，通过连通性剪枝移除恶意指令，将攻击成功率降至接近零。
analysis.research_motivation: 检索增强生成和工具集成LLM代理依赖外部文本，攻击者可插入恶意指令触发非预期行为，现有基于LLM的检测器易受优化攻击，训练方法泛化性差。
analysis.problem: 如何有效识别并移除外部文本中的恶意注入指令，同时保持良性上下文。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SONAR框架，构建用户查询与外部数据的句子级关系图，以蕴含和矛盾分数作为边权重，识别偏离核心任务的句子，并通过连通性驱动剪枝移除标记的注入种子及其相关邻居。
contributions: 提出基于句子关系图的提示净化框架SONAR，利用自然语言推理指标检测恶意指令。
在多个模型和数据集上验证，SONAR将攻击成功率降至接近零，显著优于九种基线防御方法。
analysis.experiments: 在多个模型和数据集上评估，SONAR将攻击成功率降至接近零，优于九种基线防御。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的自然语言推理模型，在低资源语言上效果未知。
剪枝策略可能误删良性上下文，影响生成质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实验充分，对LLM安全有重要应用价值，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SONAR利用自然语言推理中的蕴含与矛盾分数构建句子关系图，通过连通性剪枝移除恶意指令，将攻击成功率降至接近零。

papers.title: Neighbor2Inverse: Self-Supervised Denoising for Low-Dose Region-of-Interest Phase Contrast CT
papers.abstract: Propagation-based X-ray phase-contrast imaging (PBI) enables high-contrast visualization of lung structures and holds strong medical potential. However, safe translation to the clinic will require a substantial radiation dose reduction, which inevitably increases image noise. Supervised convolutional-neural-network-based denoising can restore image quality but depends on paired low- and high-dose datasets, which are rarely available in practice. Self-supervised methods avoid this limitation, yet most are not well adapted to the inverse problem of PBI computed tomography (CT). We introduce Neighbor2Inverse, a self-supervised denoising framework designed for low-dose PBI-CT that generalizes to clinical CT. Building on the Neighbor2Neighbor principle, each noisy projection is subsampled into two variants that preserve structural information but contain independent noise realizations. These are reconstructed separately, and the resulting pairs are used to train a denoising network directly in the image domain. We benchmark the proposed method against established analytical and self-supervised denoising approaches. In region-of-interest PBI CT experiments, Neighbor2Inverse achieves superior noise suppression while preserving fine structural details, as demonstrated by improved contrast-to-noise ratio, spatial resolution, and composite image quality metrics. Competitive performance is also observed on clinical CT data under simulated low-dose conditions. This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication. Copyright may be transferred without notice, after which this version may no longer be accessible. Code, data, and interactive figures are available at https://github.com/J-3TO/Neighbor2Inverse.

analysis.tldr: 提出Neighbor2Inverse，一种自监督去噪框架，用于低剂量相衬CT，无需配对数据即可有效降噪。
analysis.research_motivation: 相衬CT在临床应用中需要大幅降低辐射剂量，但低剂量会增加图像噪声；监督去噪依赖难以获取的配对低-高剂量数据，而现有自监督方法不适用于PBI-CT的逆问题。
analysis.problem: 如何在无配对低-高剂量数据的情况下，对低剂量相衬CT投影数据进行有效去噪。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于Neighbor2Neighbor原理，将每个含噪投影子采样为两个保留结构但噪声独立的变体，分别重建后用于在图像域训练去噪网络。
contributions: 提出Neighbor2Inverse，首个针对低剂量PBI-CT的自监督去噪框架，并推广至临床CT。
在感兴趣区PBI-CT实验中，该方法在噪声抑制和细节保持上优于现有自监督方法，提升了对比度噪声比、空间分辨率和复合图像质量指标。
analysis.experiments: 在感兴趣区PBI-CT实验和模拟低剂量临床CT数据上进行了评估，展示了优越的噪声抑制和细节保持能力。
limitations: 可能对噪声模型假设敏感，需要噪声独立且结构信息保留。
子采样策略可能引入伪影或损失部分信息。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有创新但属于增量改进，实验在特定场景下进行，推荐阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Neighbor2Inverse，一种自监督去噪框架，用于低剂量相衬CT，无需配对数据即可有效降噪。

papers.title: GEODE: Angle-Adaptive OOD Detection with Universal Scorer Compatibility
papers.abstract: Outlier Exposure (OE) is among the strongest training-based OOD detectors on standard benchmarks but exhibits scorer-dependent tradeoffs (e.g., strong on MSP, weak on KNN) and requires curated auxiliary data. We show why OE works: its features sit at the same geometric locus as real near-OOD data, with the boundary-adjacent quartile driving nearly all of OE's gain. OE is boundary calibration, not OOD coverage. GEODE (GEOmetry-preserving DEtection) replicates this calibration synthetically through an angle-adaptive norm loss in which targets scale per-sample with cosine similarity to the nearest class mean, preserving feature geometry where boundary structure matters. Four theorems grounded in neural collapse justify the design. GEODE works across all seven standard scorers on CIFAR-10 (near-OOD AUROC 89.0-92.3, far-OOD reaching 93.05; no catastrophic failure on any scorer). Since the OOD regime is unknown at deployment, this is the test that matters. GEODE outperforms vanilla CE at matched epoch counts. Combined with OE, GEODE reaches 95.0 MSP / 94.8 KNN on CIFAR-10 and beats OE on every scorer on CIFAR-100. The gains hold on WRN-28-10 (+4.5 Energy, 3 seeds). Unlike methods that push OOD into the classifier null space (e.g., PFS, 14.38 KNN AUROC, worse than random), GEODE's adaptive target preserves the geometry that distance-based scorers depend on.

analysis.tldr: GEODE通过角度自适应范数损失合成异常暴露的边界校准效果，实现与评分器无关的OOD检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于异常暴露的OOD检测方法存在评分器依赖（如MSP强但KNN弱）且需要精心挑选辅助数据，限制了实际部署。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖真实异常数据的情况下，实现与多种评分器兼容且性能稳定的OOD检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 异常暴露的效果源于边界校准而非OOD覆盖，其特征位于与真实近OOD数据相同的几何位置，且边界邻近四分位数贡献了几乎所有增益。
analysis.method: 提出GEODE方法，通过角度自适应范数损失（根据样本与最近类均值的余弦相似度缩放目标）合成边界校准，保留特征几何结构，并由神经坍缩理论提供理论保证。
contributions: 揭示了异常暴露的本质是边界校准而非OOD覆盖，并定位了关键特征区域。
提出GEODE方法，无需真实异常数据即可实现与所有标准评分器兼容的OOD检测，理论证明其设计合理性。
analysis.experiments: 在CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100上使用7种评分器评估，近OOD AUROC 89.0-92.3，远OOD达93.05；与OE结合在CIFAR-10上MSP 95.0/KNN 94.8，CIFAR-100上全面超越OE；在WRN-28-10上验证了鲁棒性。
limitations: 可能对极端远OOD数据效果有限。
角度自适应损失的计算开销可能略高于简单损失函数。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，理论扎实，实验全面且性能显著，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GEODE通过角度自适应范数损失合成异常暴露的边界校准效果，实现与评分器无关的OOD检测。

papers.title: LEAP: Layer-wise Exit-Aware Pretraining for Efficient Transformer Inference
papers.abstract: Layer-aligned distillation and convergence-based early exit represent two predominant computational efficiency paradigms for transformer inference; yet we establish that they exhibit systematic incompatibility under standard deployment conditions for convergence-based early exit. Distillation objectives that align intermediate student layers to teacher representations suppress the representational convergence that early-exit mechanisms exploit, rendering such mechanisms ineffective on distilled models. We introduce LEAP (Layer-wise Exit-Aware Pretraining), an auxiliary training objective that reconciles this incompatibility. LEAP requires no architectural modifications; it augments standard distillation with a single constraint ensuring intermediate layers approximate final-layer representations. LEAP-MiniLM achieves 1.61$\times$ measured wall-clock speedup (batch=1, NVIDIA L4) at $θ$=0.95, with 91.9% of samples exiting by layer 7 and 1.80$\times$ theoretical layer reduction, where standard distilled models achieve zero effective speedup. We validate across sentence similarity (STS-B: 0.760 $\pm$ 0.006) and retrieval benchmarks (BEIR), providing operational guidance including latency measurements, decision thresholds, and deployment criteria.

analysis.tldr: 提出LEAP训练目标，解决蒸馏模型与早期退出机制不兼容的问题，实现高效推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 蒸馏和早期退出是Transformer推理加速的两种主流方法，但两者在标准部署条件下存在系统性不兼容：蒸馏使中间层表征趋同，抑制了早期退出所需的表征收敛，导致蒸馏模型上早期退出失效。
analysis.problem: 如何让蒸馏后的Transformer模型仍然支持有效的早期退出机制，从而兼顾模型压缩和推理加速。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 蒸馏目标使中间层对齐教师表征，抑制了早期退出依赖的层间表征收敛，导致蒸馏模型上早期退出无法加速。
analysis.method: 提出LEAP（Layer-wise Exit-Aware Pretraining），在标准蒸馏基础上增加一个辅助约束，强制中间层逼近最终层表征，从而恢复早期退出能力。无需修改模型架构。
contributions: 揭示了蒸馏与早期退出之间的系统性不兼容性。
提出LEAP训练目标，无需架构修改即可调和两者矛盾。
在多个基准上验证了LEAP的有效性，包括1.61倍实测加速和91.9%样本在7层前退出。
analysis.experiments: 在STS-B（语义相似度）和BEIR（检索）基准上评估，报告了延迟测量、决策阈值和部署准则。LEAP-MiniLM在batch=1、NVIDIA L4上实现1.61倍实测加速（θ=0.95），91.9%样本在7层前退出，理论层数减少1.80倍。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于收敛的早期退出机制，对其他早期退出策略的兼容性未知。
实验仅在特定模型（MiniLM）和任务（语义相似度、检索）上验证，泛化性需进一步探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实用，解决了蒸馏与早期退出的不兼容问题，实验充分，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LEAP训练目标，解决蒸馏模型与早期退出机制不兼容的问题，实现高效推理。

papers.title: Value Functions for Temporal Logic: Optimal Policies and Safety Filters
papers.abstract: While Bellman equations for basic reach, avoid, and reach-avoid problems are well studied, the relationship between value optimality and policy optimality becomes subtle in the undiscounted infinite-horizon setting, particularly for more complicated tasks. Greedily maximizing the Q-function can produce policies that indefinitely defer task completion for reach-avoid problems, or equivalently, Until specifications, even when the value function is optimal. Building upon recent results decomposing the value function for temporal logic (TL) into a graph of constituent value functions, we construct non-Markovian policies based on state history that avoid this pathology and prove their optimality with respect to the quantitative robustness score for nested Until, Globally, and Globally-Until specifications. We further show how the Q function can serve as a safety filter for complex TL specifications, extending prior results beyond simple avoid or reach-avoid tasks.

analysis.tldr: 针对时序逻辑任务，提出非马尔可夫策略避免Q函数贪婪最大化导致的无限延迟，并证明其最优性，同时扩展Q函数作为安全过滤器的适用范围。
analysis.research_motivation: 在无折扣无限时域设置下，复杂时序逻辑任务（如嵌套Until、Globally）的价值最优性与策略最优性关系微妙，贪婪最大化Q函数可能导致策略无限延迟任务完成，现有方法主要针对简单reach-avoid问题，缺乏对复杂规范的理论保证。
analysis.problem: 解决时序逻辑任务中，基于Q函数贪婪最大化产生的非最优策略（无限延迟）问题，并扩展安全过滤器到更复杂的时序逻辑规范。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，对于reach-avoid问题（即Until规范），即使价值函数最优，贪婪最大化Q函数也可能产生无限延迟任务完成的策略，这是一种病理现象。
analysis.method: 基于将时序逻辑价值函数分解为子价值函数图的最新成果，构造基于状态历史的非马尔可夫策略，避免贪婪最大化导致的延迟，并证明其在定量鲁棒性分数下的最优性；同时展示Q函数作为复杂TL规范安全过滤器的扩展方法。
contributions: 提出非马尔可夫策略，解决时序逻辑任务中贪婪最大化Q函数导致的无限延迟问题，并证明其最优性。
将Q函数作为安全过滤器的应用从简单avoid/reach-avoid扩展到嵌套Until、Globally和Globally-Until等复杂时序逻辑规范。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 非马尔可夫策略可能增加状态空间复杂度，实际部署时需考虑计算开销。
理论分析基于定量鲁棒性分数，可能不适用于其他奖励或代价函数。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，理论贡献扎实，但缺乏实验验证且应用范围较窄，适合精读理论部分。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 针对时序逻辑任务，提出非马尔可夫策略避免Q函数贪婪最大化导致的无限延迟，并证明其最优性，同时扩展Q函数作为安全过滤器的适用范围。

papers.title: LLM Ghostbusters: Surgical Hallucination Suppression via Adaptive Unlearning
papers.abstract: Hallucinations, outputs that sound plausible but are factually incorrect, remain an open challenge for deployed LLMs. In code generation, models frequently hallucinate non-existent software packages, recommending imports and installation commands for fictional libraries. This creates a critical supply-chain vulnerability: an attacker can proactively register such packages on public registries with malicious payloads that are subsequently installed and executed by developers or autonomous agents, a class of package confusion attack known as slopsquatting. Once a model is deployed, mitigating this failure mode is difficult: full retraining is costly, and existing approaches either cause severe degradation of model utility or rely on a pre-specified forget-set, an assumption that does not apply to the unbounded space of hallucinations. To address this problem, we present Adaptive Unlearning (AU), a post-deployment framework that surgically suppresses hallucinations while preserving general model utility. AU introduces a hybrid token-level objective that simultaneously reinforces valid outputs and suppresses hallucinated ones. Combined with an adaptive discovery loop that continuously surfaces new hallucination-inducing contexts without human supervision, AU enables generalization to unseen prompts and hallucinations. We demonstrate that AU reduces package hallucination rates by 81%, corresponding to a substantial reduction in slopsquatting attack surface, while maintaining performance on standard coding benchmarks. Our analysis shows that distributional changes are concentrated on package-related generations, leaving general coding behavior largely unaffected and confirming that AU's effect is isolated to the targeted distribution. AU operates entirely on model-generated data, requires no human annotation, and generalizes across domains.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应遗忘框架，在保持模型通用能力的同时，将代码生成中的包幻觉率降低81%。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在代码生成中会幻觉出不存在的软件包，导致供应链漏洞（slopsquatting攻击），而现有方法要么损害模型效用，要么依赖预定义的遗忘集，无法应对无限的幻觉空间。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重新训练且不损害模型通用能力的前提下，抑制已部署LLM中的包幻觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 自适应遗忘（Adaptive Unlearning, AU）：混合token级目标同时强化有效输出和抑制幻觉输出，结合自适应发现循环持续挖掘新幻觉上下文，无需人工标注。
contributions: 提出自适应遗忘框架，实现后部署阶段的幻觉抑制，无需重新训练或预定义遗忘集。
在代码生成任务中将包幻觉率降低81%，显著减少slopsquatting攻击面，且通用编码性能几乎不受影响。
analysis.experiments: 在标准编码基准上评估，包幻觉率降低81%，通用编码性能保持。
limitations: 可能仅针对代码生成中的包幻觉，对其他类型幻觉的泛化性未验证。
自适应发现循环的效率和覆盖范围可能受限于模型生成数据的质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实用，显著降低幻觉率，但仅针对代码包幻觉，通用性待验证。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应遗忘框架，在保持模型通用能力的同时，将代码生成中的包幻觉率降低81%。

papers.title: DARE: Diffusion Language Model Activation Reuse for Efficient Inference
papers.abstract: Diffusion Large Language Models (dLLMs) have emerged as a promising alternative to auto-regressive (AR) models, offering greater expressive capacity and potential for parallel generation and faster inference. However, open-source dLLMs remain immature, lagging behind AR models in both efficiency and quality. We identify an underexplored property of dLLMs: *token-wise redundancy* in bi-directional self-attention. Self-attention activations are highly correlated across tokens, and temporal changes in query representations can predict redundancy in corresponding key, value, and output activations. We introduce DARE, with two complementary mechanisms: DARE-KV, which reuses cached key-value (KV) activations, and DARE-O, which reuses output activations to reduce redundant computation while preserving quality. DARE achieves up to 1.20x per-layer latency reduction and reuses up to 87% of attention activations, with negligible degradation on reasoning and code-generation benchmarks. DARE-KV and DARE-O incur average performance drops of only 2.0% and 1.2%, respectively. Combined with techniques such as prefix caching and Fast-dLLM, DARE provides additive gains without retraining. These results establish token-wise reuse as an effective strategy for improving the efficiency of diffusion-based LLMs while preserving generation fidelity. Code: https://github.com/enyac-group/DARE

analysis.tldr: DARE通过复用扩散LLM中冗余的自注意力激活值，实现高效推理，延迟降低1.20倍且性能损失极小。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散大语言模型（dLLM）虽具并行生成潜力，但开源模型在效率和生成质量上仍落后于自回归模型，亟需优化推理效率。
analysis.problem: dLLM中双向自注意力的token级冗余导致大量重复计算，需在不显著影响质量的前提下减少计算开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现dLLM中自注意力激活值在token间高度相关，且查询表示的时间变化可预测键、值及输出激活的冗余。
analysis.method: 提出DARE框架，包含DARE-KV（复用键值缓存激活）和DARE-O（复用输出激活）两种互补机制，减少冗余计算。
contributions: 首次识别并利用dLLM中token级自注意力冗余进行激活复用
提出DARE-KV和DARE-O两种高效推理机制，无需重训练即可与现有技术叠加
analysis.experiments: 在推理和代码生成基准上测试，DARE实现每层延迟降低1.20倍，复用87%注意力激活，DARE-KV和DARE-O平均性能下降仅2.0%和1.2%。
limitations: 仅针对扩散LLM，未验证在其他架构（如自回归模型）上的有效性
复用策略可能对长序列或高精度任务有更大性能影响
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实用，实验充分，但仅针对扩散LLM，影响范围有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DARE通过复用扩散LLM中冗余的自注意力激活值，实现高效推理，延迟降低1.20倍且性能损失极小。

papers.title: Separation Assurance between Heterogeneous Fleets of Small Unmanned Aerial Systems via Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: In the envisioned future dense urban airspace, multiple companies will operate heterogeneous fleets of small unmanned aerial systems (sUASs), where each fleet includes several homogeneous aircraft with identical policies and configurations, e.g., equipage, sensing, and communication ranges, making tactical deconfliction highly complex for the aircraft. This paper aims to address two core questions: (1) Can tactical deconfliction policies converge or reach an equilibrium to ensure a conflict-free airspace when companies operate heterogeneous fleets of homogeneous aircraft? (2) If so, will the converged policies discriminate against companies operating sUASs with weaker configurations? We investigate a multi-agent reinforcement learning paradigm in which homogeneous aircraft within heterogeneous fleets operate concurrently to perform package delivery missions over Dallas, Texas, USA. An attention-enhanced Proximal Policy Optimization-based Advantage Actor-Critic (PPOA2C) framework is employed to resolve intra- and inter-fleet conflicts, with each fleet independently training its own policy while preserving privacy. Experimental results show that two fleets with distinct, shared PPOA2C policies can reach an equilibrium to maintain safe separation. While two PPOA2C policies outperform two strong rule-based baselines in terms of conflict resolution, a PPOA2C policy exhibits safer interaction with a rule-based policy, indicating adaptive capabilities of PPOA2C policies. Furthermore, we conducted extensive policy-configuration evaluations, which reveal that equilibria between similar policy types tend to favor fleets with stronger configurations. Even under similar configurations but different policy types, the equilibrium favors one of the heterogeneous policies, underscoring the need for fairness-aware conflict management in heterogeneous sUAS operations.

analysis.tldr: 用多智能体强化学习实现异构无人机机群间的安全间隔保持，发现均衡偏向配置更强的机群。
analysis.research_motivation: 未来密集城市空域中，多家公司运营异构无人机机群，战术冲突消解高度复杂，现有方法缺乏对异构性和公平性的考虑。
analysis.problem: 异构机群中同构无人机能否通过多智能体强化学习收敛到无冲突均衡，以及均衡是否歧视配置较弱的机群。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 均衡偏向配置更强的机群；即使配置相似，不同策略类型间的均衡也偏向其中一种策略，表明需要公平性感知的冲突管理。
analysis.method: 采用注意力增强的PPO-based Advantage Actor-Critic (PPOA2C)框架，每个机群独立训练自己的策略，同时保持隐私。
contributions: 首次研究异构机群中同构无人机的战术冲突消解均衡问题
发现均衡偏向配置更强的机群，揭示公平性需求
analysis.experiments: 在德克萨斯州达拉斯市上空进行包裹递送任务仿真，与两种强规则基线对比，PPOA2C在冲突解决上更优，且与规则策略交互时表现出适应性。
limitations: 仅考虑两个机群，未扩展到更多机群
未提供真实世界实验验证
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.reason: 方法创新适中，实验在仿真中进行，但揭示了公平性问题，有一定应用价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用多智能体强化学习实现异构无人机机群间的安全间隔保持，发现均衡偏向配置更强的机群。

papers.title: Certified Purity for Cognitive Workflow Executors: From Static Analysis to Cryptographic Attestation
papers.abstract: We present a certified purity architecture that converts governance enforcement in cognitive workflow systems from a runtime convention into a structural capability boundary. A prior three-layer governance architecture proves governance completeness, provenance completeness, and the impossibility of ungoverned effects, conditional on the pure module constraint: that step executors cannot perform effects. That constraint was enforced by module import graph analysis, which is insufficient against adversarial bypass on the BEAM virtual machine. This paper closes the gap through four mechanisms: (1) a restricted WebAssembly compilation target where effect-producing instructions are structurally absent; (2) purity certificates, cryptographically signed proofs binding executor binaries to their import classifications; (3) a runtime verification gate that rejects uncertified executors before they enter the governance pipeline; and (4) portable governance credentials via remote attestation for cross-organizational verification. We prove four theorems: structural purity by construction, bypass elimination for all five BEAM bypass classes, certificate integrity, and gate completeness. The guarantee holds relative to an explicit Trusted Computing Base. Evaluation on four implemented executors shows verification latency of 39--42 us, full plan cycle under 400 us, runtime overhead under 0.4% of a 100 ms HTTP request, and zero determinism divergences across repeated invocations.

analysis.tldr: 通过编译、密码学签名和运行时验证，为认知工作流执行器提供可证明的纯度保证。
analysis.research_motivation: 认知工作流系统中，执行器的副作用（如网络请求、文件写入）会破坏治理和溯源的完整性，而现有基于模块导入图分析的静态检查在对抗性攻击下（如BEAM虚拟机）不足以保证纯度。
analysis.problem: 如何从结构上保证认知工作流执行器不产生未授权的副作用，并抵御对抗性绕过。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，先前基于模块导入图分析的纯度约束在BEAM虚拟机上存在五种绕过类别，无法抵御对抗性攻击。
analysis.method: 提出四层机制：1) 限制性WebAssembly编译目标，消除副作用指令；2) 纯度证书，对执行器二进制进行密码学签名；3) 运行时验证门，拒绝未认证执行器；4) 远程证明实现跨组织验证。
contributions: 提出一种可证明的纯度架构，将治理从运行时约定转为结构性能力边界。
证明四个定理：结构纯度、绕过消除、证书完整性、门完备性。
实现并评估了四个执行器，验证延迟39-42微秒，完整计划周期低于400微秒，运行时开销低于0.4%。
analysis.experiments: 在四个实现执行器上评估，验证延迟39-42微秒，完整计划周期低于400微秒，运行时开销低于0.4%的100ms HTTP请求，零确定性分歧。
limitations: 依赖显式可信计算基（TCB），TCB的漏洞可能影响整体安全性。
仅针对BEAM虚拟机的绕过类别，其他平台或绕过方式未覆盖。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强（编译+密码学+运行时验证），技术深度高，但应用领域较窄（认知工作流治理），与主流ML方向相关性一般。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过编译、密码学签名和运行时验证，为认知工作流执行器提供可证明的纯度保证。

papers.title: InterPhys: Physics-aware Human Motion Synthesis in a Dynamic Scene
papers.abstract: This paper tackles the problem of physics-aware human motion synthesis in a dynamic scene. Unlike existing works which mainly tend to generate physically unrealistic motions due to limited contact modeling, typically restricted to hands, in this paper, we introduce a physics-aware human motion generation framework that explicitly models the full spectrum of human-related forces, including human-object, human-scene, and internal body dynamics.~Our method imposes soft physical constraints to maintain force and torque balance, ensuring physically grounded motion synthesis. We further propose a novel continuous distance-based force model that generalizes contact modeling to arbitrary surfaces, capturing interactions not only with static environments but also with dynamic, moving objects. Extensive experiments show that our approach significantly improves physical plausibility and generalizes well to complex scenes, setting a new benchmark for physically consistent human motion generation.

analysis.tldr: 提出物理感知框架，显式建模人体-物体-场景力交互，实现动态场景中物理合理的人体运动合成。
