papers.title: Algebraic Semantics of Governed Execution: Monoidal Categories, Effect Algebras, and Coterminous Boundaries
papers.abstract: We present an algebraic semantics for governed execution in which governance is axiomatized, compositional, and coterminous with expressibility. The framework, mechanized in 32 Rocq modules (~12,000 lines, 454 theorems, 0 admitted), is built on interaction trees and parameterized coinduction. A three-axiom GovernanceAlgebra record (safety, transparency, properness) induces a symmetric monoidal category with verified pentagon, triangle, and hexagon coherence, where every tensor composition preserves governance. An algebraic effect system constrains the handler algebra so that only governance-preserving handlers can be constructed in the safe fragment; programs in the empty capability set provably emit only observability directives. Capability-indexed composition bundles programs with machine-checked capability bounds, and a dual guarantee theorem establishes that within_caps and gov_safe hold simultaneously under all composition operators. The capstone result is the coterminous boundary: within our formal model, every program expressible via the four primitive morphism constructors is governed under interpretation, and every governed program is the image of such a program. Turing completeness is preserved inside governance; unmediated I/O is excluded from the governed fragment. Governance denial is modeled as safe coinductive divergence. The governance algebra is parametric: any system instantiating the three axioms inherits all derived properties, including convergence, compositional closure, and goal preservation. Extracted OCaml runs as a NIF in the BEAM runtime, with property-based testing (70,000+ random inputs, zero disagreements) confirming behavioral equivalence between the specification and the runtime interpreter.

analysis.tldr: 用范畴论和交互树为受管执行建立代数语义，证明可表达性与治理共延。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有治理机制缺乏形式化、组合性的代数基础，难以保证安全性和可组合性。
analysis.problem: 如何为受管执行（governed execution）提供公理化的、组合的代数语义，并确保可表达性与治理共延。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于交互树和参数化余归纳，定义三公理治理代数（安全性、透明性、恰当性），诱导对称幺半范畴，并构建代数效应系统约束处理器，实现能力索引的组合。
contributions: 提出治理代数的三公理形式化，并证明其诱导对称幺半范畴且张量积保持治理。
证明共延边界定理：可表达程序与受管程序一一对应，且图灵完备性在治理内保持。
analysis.experiments: 在Rocq中机械化（32个模块，~12000行，454个定理，0个admitted），提取OCaml在BEAM运行时运行，通过70,000+随机输入属性测试验证规范与运行时解释器行为等价。
limitations: 仅形式化模型，未讨论实际系统部署中的性能开销。
治理代数参数化，但实例化需要满足三公理，可能限制应用范围。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.reason: 理论贡献扎实，但与应用方向距离较远，适合形式化方法研究者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用范畴论和交互树为受管执行建立代数语义，证明可表达性与治理共延。

papers.title: Effect-Transparent Governance for AI Workflow Architectures: Semantic Preservation, Expressive Minimality, and Decidability Boundaries
papers.abstract: We present a machine-checked formalization of structurally governed AI workflow architectures and prove that effect-level governance can be imposed without reducing internal computational expressivity. Using Interaction Trees in Rocq 8.19, we define a governance operator G that mediates all effectful directives, including memory access, external calls, and oracle (LLM) queries. Our development compiles with 0 admitted lemmas and consists of 36 modules, ~12,000 lines of Rocq, and 454 theorems. We establishseven properties: (P1) governed Turing completeness, (P2) governed oracle expressivity, (P3) a decidability boundary in which governance predicates are total and closed under Boolean composition while semantic program properties remain non-trivial and undecidable by governance, (P4) goal preservation for permitted executions, (P5) expressive minimality of primitive capabilities (compute, memory, reasoning, external call, observability), (P6) subsumption asymmetry showing structural governance strictly subsumes content-level filtering, and (P7) semantic transparency: on all executions where governance permits, the governed interpretation is observationally equivalent (modulo governance-only events) to the ungoverned interpretation. Together, these results show that governance and computational expressivity are orthogonal dimensions: governance constrains the effect boundary of programs while remaining semantically transparent to internal computation.

analysis.tldr: 通过机器验证的形式化框架证明，AI工作流架构中的效应级治理可以在不牺牲计算表达能力的前提下实现语义透明。
analysis.research_motivation: AI工作流（如LLM代理）的安全治理通常依赖内容过滤或运行时监控，但这些方法可能限制系统的计算能力或引入语义不一致。需要一种形式化方法，在保证安全约束的同时不损害系统的表达能力和语义透明性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种治理机制，使其能够控制AI工作流中的效应（如内存访问、外部调用、LLM查询），同时保持计算完备性、语义透明性，并明确可判定性边界。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但通过形式化证明揭示了治理与计算表达力是正交维度：治理约束效应边界，但对内部计算语义透明。
analysis.method: 使用Rocq 8.19中的Interaction Trees定义治理算子G，对包括内存访问、外部调用和Oracle（LLM）查询在内的所有效应指令进行中介。通过36个模块、约12,000行Rocq代码和454个定理，机器验证了7个关键性质。
contributions: 提出了一个机器验证的形式化框架，证明效应级治理可以在不降低内部计算表达性的前提下实施。
建立了7个关键性质，包括治理下的图灵完备性、Oracle表达性、可判定性边界、目标保持、原始能力的表达最小性、结构治理对内容过滤的严格包含关系，以及语义透明性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 形式化框架可能仅适用于特定类型的AI工作流架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
实际部署中治理算子的实现可能引入额外开销，摘要未讨论效率问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 形式化方法创新性强，技术深度高，对AI安全治理有重要理论价值，但缺乏实验验证，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过机器验证的形式化框架证明，AI工作流架构中的效应级治理可以在不牺牲计算表达能力的前提下实现语义透明。

papers.title: EmoMM: Benchmarking and Steering MLLM for Multimodal Emotion Recognition under Conflict and Missingness
papers.abstract: Multimodal Emotion Recognition (MER) is critical for interpreting real-world interactions. While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLM) have shown promise in MER, their internal decision-making mechanisms under modality conflict and missingness remain largely underexplored. In this paper, to systematically investigate these behaviors, we introduce EmoMM, a comprehensive benchmark featuring modality-aligned, conflict, and missing subsets. Through extensive evaluation, we uncover a Video Contribution Collapse (VCC) phenomenon, where MLLM marginalize video evidence due to high token redundancy and modality preferences. To address this, we propose Conflict-aware Head-level Attention Steering (CHASE), a lightweight mechanism that detects modality conflicts and performs inference-time attention steering, effectively mitigating decision bias without retraining the backbone. Experimental results demonstrate that CHASE consistently improves performance across various settings, significantly enhancing the reliability of MLLM in complex affective scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出多模态情绪识别基准EmoMM，发现视频贡献坍塌现象，并设计轻量级注意力引导方法CHASE缓解决策偏差。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态情绪识别在现实交互中至关重要，但多模态大模型在模态冲突和缺失下的决策机制尚不明确，现有研究缺乏系统性评估和针对性改进方法。
analysis.problem: 多模态大模型在模态冲突和缺失场景下存在决策偏差，尤其是视频模态被边缘化的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现视频贡献坍塌现象：由于视频令牌冗余和模态偏好，多模态大模型在冲突和缺失场景下会边缘化视频证据。
analysis.method: 提出CHASE，一种轻量级推理时注意力引导机制，通过检测模态冲突并调整注意力头权重，无需重新训练骨干网络即可缓解决策偏差。
contributions: 构建了包含模态对齐、冲突和缺失子集的综合基准EmoMM，用于系统评估多模态大模型在复杂场景下的情绪识别能力。
揭示了视频贡献坍塌现象，并设计了CHASE方法，有效提升多模态大模型在冲突和缺失场景下的可靠性。
analysis.experiments: 在EmoMM基准上进行了广泛评估，实验结果表明CHASE在多种设置下均能持续提升性能。
limitations: CHASE仅针对视频模态的注意力引导，可能无法完全解决其他模态的类似问题。
基准EmoMM可能未覆盖所有现实中的模态冲突和缺失类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 针对多模态大模型在情绪识别中的关键问题，提出新基准和轻量级方法，实验充分，与VLM/MLLM方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多模态情绪识别基准EmoMM，发现视频贡献坍塌现象，并设计轻量级注意力引导方法CHASE缓解决策偏差。

papers.title: WildTableBench: Benchmarking Multimodal Foundation Models on Table Understanding In the Wild
papers.abstract: Using multimodal foundation models to analyze table images is a high-value yet challenging application in consumer and enterprise scenarios. Despite its importance, current evaluations rely largely on structured-text tables or clean rendered images, leaving the visual complexity of in-the-wild table images underexplored. Such images feature varied layouts and diverse domains that demand sophisticated structural perception and numerical reasoning. To bridge this gap, we introduce WildTableBench, the first question-answering benchmark for naturally occurring table images from real-world settings. WildTableBench comprises 402 high-information-density table images collected from online forums and websites across diverse domains, together with 928 manually annotated and verified questions spanning 17 subtypes across five categories. We evaluate 21 frontier proprietary and open-source multimodal foundation models on this benchmark. Only one model exceeds 50% accuracy, while all remaining models range from 4.1% to 49.9%. We further conduct diagnostic analyses to characterize model failures and reveal persistent weaknesses in structural perception and reasoning. These results and analyses provide useful insights into current model capabilities and establish WildTableBench as a valuable diagnostic benchmark for table image understanding.

analysis.tldr: 首个面向真实场景表格图像的多模态问答基准，揭示现有模型在结构感知与数值推理上的严重不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有表格理解评测多基于结构化文本或干净渲染图像，忽略了真实场景中表格图像的视觉复杂性（如多样布局、跨领域），导致模型在真实应用中的能力评估不足。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个能反映真实世界表格图像复杂性的多模态问答基准，以系统评估前沿多模态基础模型的结构感知与数值推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在402张高信息密度表格图像和928道人工标注问题上，21个前沿模型中仅1个准确率超过50%，其余模型准确率在4.1%至49.9%之间，诊断分析揭示模型在结构感知和推理方面存在持续弱点。
analysis.method: 构建WildTableBench基准：从在线论坛和网站收集402张真实表格图像，人工标注928道涵盖5大类17子类的问题，并评估21个多模态基础模型。
contributions: 提出首个面向真实场景表格图像的多模态问答基准WildTableBench，包含402张高信息密度图像和928道人工验证问题。
系统评估21个前沿多模态模型，揭示其在结构感知和数值推理上的显著不足，仅一个模型准确率超过50%。
analysis.experiments: 在WildTableBench上评估21个专有和开源多模态基础模型，进行诊断分析以刻画模型失败模式。
limitations: 基准规模相对较小（402张图像），可能无法覆盖所有真实场景表格类型。
仅关注问答任务，未涉及表格生成、编辑等其他重要应用。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 首个真实场景表格图像基准，实验揭示模型严重不足，对多模态模型评估有重要价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个面向真实场景表格图像的多模态问答基准，揭示现有模型在结构感知与数值推理上的严重不足。

papers.title: CLEAR: Revealing How Noise and Ambiguity Degrade Reliability in LLMs for Medicine
papers.abstract: Medical large language model (LLM) evaluations rely on simplified, exam-style benchmarks that rarely reflect the ambiguity of real-world medical inquiries. We introduce the CLinical Evaluation of Ambiguity and Reliability (CLEAR) framework, which assesses how decision-space presentation, ambiguity, and uncertainty affect LLMs' reasoning on medical benchmarks. CLEAR systematically perturbs (1) the number of plausible answer options, (2) the presence of a ground truth or abstention option, and (3) the semantic framing of answer options. Applying CLEAR on three benchmarks evaluated across 17 LLMs reveals three notable limitations of existing evaluation methods. First, increasing the number of plausible answers degrades a model's ability to identify the correct answer and abstain against incorrect ones. Second, this lack of caution intensifies as the framing of abstention shifts from assertive rejection like "None of the Above" to uncertainty admission like "I don't know" (IDK). Notably, just including IDK in the answer space increases incorrect answer selections. Lastly, we formalize the performance gap between identifying the correct answer and abstaining from incorrect ones as the humility deficit, which worsens with model scale. Our findings reveal limitations in standard medical benchmarks and underscore that scaling alone does not resolve LLM reliability issues.

analysis.tldr: CLEAR框架揭示噪声和歧义会显著降低医学LLM的可靠性，且模型规模扩大无法弥补这一缺陷。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有医学LLM评估依赖简化的考试式基准，无法反映真实医疗场景中的歧义性，导致可靠性评估失真。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估决策空间呈现、歧义性和不确定性对医学LLM推理可靠性的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 增加合理答案数量会降低模型正确识别和弃权能力；弃权措辞从'以上皆非'变为'我不知道'会加剧错误选择；模型规模扩大反而使'谦逊赤字'（正确识别与弃权之间的差距）恶化。
analysis.method: 提出CLEAR框架，通过扰动答案选项数量、真实答案/弃权选项存在性、答案语义措辞三个维度，系统评估LLM在医学基准上的可靠性。
contributions: 提出CLEAR评估框架，系统量化噪声和歧义对医学LLM可靠性的影响
发现并形式化'谦逊赤字'现象，揭示模型规模扩大无法提升可靠性
analysis.experiments: 在17个LLM上对三个医学基准应用CLEAR框架，验证了评估方法的有效性。
limitations: 仅针对医学领域，泛化性待验证
未深入探讨缓解可靠性问题的具体方法
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 针对医学LLM可靠性评估提出系统框架，发现重要现象，与安全对齐高度相关，但方法细节和解决方案未充分展开。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CLEAR框架揭示噪声和歧义会显著降低医学LLM的可靠性，且模型规模扩大无法弥补这一缺陷。

papers.title: Model Organisms Are Leaky: Perplexity Differencing Often Reveals Finetuning Objectives
papers.abstract: Finetuning can significantly modify the behavior of large language models, including introducing harmful or unsafe behaviors. To study these risks, researchers develop model organisms: models finetuned to exhibit specific known behaviors for controlled experimentation. Identifying these behaviors remains challenging. We show that a simple perplexity-based method can surface finetuning objectives from model organisms by leveraging their tendency to overgeneralize their finetuned behaviors beyond the intended context. First, we generate diverse completions from the finetuned model using short random prefills drawn from general corpora. Second, we rank completions by decreasing perplexity gap between reference and finetuned models. The top-ranked completions often reveal the finetuning objectives, without requiring model internals or prior assumptions about the behavior. We evaluate this on a diverse set of model organisms (N=76, 0.5 to 70B parameters), including backdoored models, models finetuned to internalize false facts via synthetic document finetuning, adversarially trained models with hidden concerning behaviors, and models exhibiting emergent misalignment. For the vast majority of model organisms tested, the method surfaces completions revealing finetuning objectives within the top-ranked results, with models trained via synthetic document finetuning or to produce exact phrases being particularly susceptible. We further show that the technique can be effective even without access to the exact pre-finetuning checkpoint: trusted reference models from different families can serve as effective substitutes. As the method requires only next-token probabilities from the finetuned model, it is compatible with API-gated models that expose token logprobs.

analysis.tldr: 通过困惑度差异排名，无需模型内部信息即可揭示微调目标。
analysis.research_motivation: 微调可能引入有害行为，但识别这些行为（尤其是模型生物中的隐藏目标）非常困难，现有方法通常需要模型内部信息或先验假设。
analysis.problem: 如何在不访问模型内部状态或预先假设行为的情况下，从微调后的语言模型中自动揭示其微调目标。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 微调模型倾向于将微调行为过度泛化到无关上下文中，导致其与参考模型的困惑度差异在特定完成上显著增大。
analysis.method: 从通用语料中采样随机前缀，让微调模型生成多样完成；然后按参考模型与微调模型之间的困惑度差异降序排列完成，排名靠前的完成往往揭示微调目标。
contributions: 提出一种基于困惑度差异的简单方法，无需模型内部信息即可揭示微调目标。
在76个模型生物（0.5B-70B参数）上验证，涵盖后门、虚假事实、对抗训练和新兴错位等场景，方法对大多数模型有效。
发现即使没有精确的微调前检查点，来自不同家族的信任参考模型也可作为有效替代。
analysis.experiments: 在76个模型生物上评估，包括后门模型、合成文档微调模型、对抗训练模型和新兴错位模型，参数范围0.5B-70B。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能对某些微调目标（如非过度泛化行为）不敏感。
依赖参考模型的可获得性，尽管实验表明不同家族模型可替代，但效果可能因模型差异而波动。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法简单有效，实验规模大，对安全评估有实用价值，但技术深度中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过困惑度差异排名，无需模型内部信息即可揭示微调目标。

papers.title: Democratizing the medieval English legal tradition
papers.abstract: The record of the beginning of the most widespread legal system in the world is contained in millions of pages of handwritten text. Most of the records of the first centuries of the Anglo-American legal system are hand-written in a highly abbreviated form of medieval Latin which only a few dozen scholars in the world are trained to read. In this interdisciplinary project, we construct a dataset of 4029 lines of text across 193 medieval criminal and civil cases. We then use the dataset to train an open-source end-to-end pipeline for transcribing these manuscripts. We first train standard neural network architectures for line segmentation and handwriting recognition (R-Blla and CNN+LSTM with CTC decoding, respectively) and show that they can already achieve 79% word accuracy, despite the relatively small training set and the challenge of expanding abbreviations. We then demonstrate that simple post-processing significantly boosts accuracy: adding an n-gram language model to the CTC decoder improves word accuracy to 82%, while asking Gemini Pro 3 to correct mistakes boosts accuracy to 88%. Finally, we compare the CNN+LSTM architecture with TrOCR, a transformer-based OCR architecture, demonstrating that TrOCR shows comparable word accuracy but worse character accuracy due to its over-willingness to guess, making it harder for humans to infer the correct reading. We incorporated our pipeline into a web portal (glyphmachina.com), opening up the English legal tradition to legal scholars, medievalists, and students.

analysis.tldr: 构建中世纪法律手稿数据集并训练OCR流水线，实现88%词准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 中世纪英国法律手稿数量庞大且仅少数专家能阅读，亟需自动化转录工具以降低研究门槛。
analysis.problem: 如何利用有限标注数据训练高精度手写文本识别模型，并处理缩写扩展等挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: TrOCR在词准确率上相当但字符准确率更差，因其过度猜测导致人类难以推断正确阅读。
analysis.method: 构建193个中世纪案件共4029行文本数据集，训练R-Blla行分割和CNN+LSTM+CTC手写识别模型，后接n-gram语言模型和Gemini Pro纠错后处理。
contributions: 构建了中世纪法律手稿数据集（4029行，193个案件）
开源端到端转录流水线，结合CNN+LSTM、n-gram语言模型和LLM纠错，词准确率达88%
analysis.experiments: 在自建数据集上评估，CNN+LSTM+CTC基线79%词准确率，加n-gram提升至82%，加Gemini Pro提升至88%；与TrOCR对比显示词准确率相当但字符准确率更差。
limitations: 数据集规模较小（4029行），可能限制泛化能力
依赖Gemini Pro API，存在成本和可重复性问题
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法组合较常规，但数据集和开源流水线对数字人文领域有价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 构建中世纪法律手稿数据集并训练OCR流水线，实现88%词准确率。

papers.title: Posterior Augmented Flow Matching
papers.abstract: Flow matching (FM) trains a time-dependent vector field that transports samples from a simple prior to a complex data distribution. However, for high-dimensional images, each training sample supervises only a single trajectory and intermediate point, yielding an extremely sparse and high-variance training signal. This under-constrained supervision can cause flow collapse, where the learned dynamics memorize specific source-target pairings, mapping diverse inputs to overly similar outputs, failing to generalize. We introduce Posterior-Augmented Flow Matching (PAFM), a theoretically grounded generalization of FM that replaces single-target supervision with an expectation over an approximate posterior of valid target completions for a given intermediate state and condition. PAFM factorizes this intractable posterior into (i) the likelihood of the intermediate under a hypothesized endpoint and (ii) the prior probability of that endpoint under the condition, and uses an importance sampling scheme to construct a mixture over multiple candidate targets. We prove that PAFM yields an unbiased estimator of the original FM objective while substantially reducing gradient variance during training by aggregating information from many plausible continuation trajectories per intermediate. Finally, we show that PAFM improves over FM by up to 3.4 FID50K across different model scales (SiT-B/2 and SiT-XL/2), different architectures (SiT and MMDiT), and in both class and text conditioned benchmarks (ImageNet and CC12M), with a negligible increase in the compute overhead. Code: https://github.com/gstoica27/PAFM.git.

analysis.tldr: 提出后验增强流匹配（PAFM），通过多目标期望监督降低训练方差，缓解流坍缩，提升生成质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 流匹配（FM）在高维图像生成中训练信号稀疏且方差大，导致流坍缩（flow collapse），模型记忆特定源-目标配对，泛化能力差。
analysis.problem: FM训练中每个样本仅监督单条轨迹和中间点，造成高方差和流坍缩问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出FM训练信号极其稀疏且方差大，导致流坍缩——学习到的动力学记忆特定源-目标配对，将多样输入映射到过于相似的输出，无法泛化。
analysis.method: PAFM将单目标监督替换为对给定中间状态和条件下有效目标完成的后验期望，通过重要性采样构建多候选目标混合，得到FM目标的无偏估计并降低梯度方差。
contributions: 提出PAFM，一种理论上有依据的FM泛化，通过后验期望降低训练方差。
证明PAFM是FM目标的无偏估计器，且显著降低梯度方差。
在ImageNet和CC12M上，PAFM在不同模型规模和架构下均提升FID（最高3.4 FID50K），计算开销可忽略。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet（类别条件）和CC12M（文本条件）上，使用SiT-B/2、SiT-XL/2和MMDiT架构，PAFM相比FM提升FID50K最高3.4。
limitations: 摘要未讨论PAFM在低维或非图像数据上的表现。
重要性采样方案可能引入额外超参数调优。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，理论扎实，实验提升显著且计算开销小，与生成模型方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出后验增强流匹配（PAFM），通过多目标期望监督降低训练方差，缓解流坍缩，提升生成质量。

papers.title: Persistent Visual Memory: Sustaining Perception for Deep Generation in LVLMs
papers.abstract: While autoregressive Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) demonstrate remarkable proficiency in multimodal tasks, they face a "Visual Signal Dilution" phenomenon, where the accumulation of textual history expands the attention partition function, causing visual attention to decay inversely with generated sequence length. To counteract this, we propose Persistent Visual Memory (PVM), a lightweight learnable module designed to strengthen sustained, on-demand access to visual evidence. Integrated as a parallel branch alongside the Feed-Forward Network (FFN) in LVLMs, PVM establishes a distance-agnostic retrieval pathway that directly provides visual embeddings for enhanced visual perception, thereby structurally mitigating the signal suppression inherent to deep generation. Extensive experiments on Qwen3-VL models demonstrate that PVM brings notable improvements with negligible parameter overhead, delivering consistent average accuracy gains across both 4B and 8B scales, particularly in complex reasoning tasks that demand persistent visual perception. Furthermore, in-depth analysis reveals that PVM shows improved robustness in longer generations and accelerates internal prediction convergence.

analysis.tldr: 提出轻量级模块PVM，通过距离无关的视觉检索路径缓解LVLM长文本生成中的视觉信号稀释问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 自回归LVLM在长文本生成中，历史文本累积导致视觉注意力衰减，即“视觉信号稀释”现象，影响需要持续视觉感知的复杂推理任务。
analysis.problem: LVLM中视觉信号随生成序列长度增加而衰减，导致视觉感知能力下降。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到“视觉信号稀释”现象：文本历史累积使注意力分配函数膨胀，视觉注意力与生成序列长度成反比衰减。
analysis.method: 提出Persistent Visual Memory (PVM)，作为轻量级可学习模块，并行集成于LVLM的前馈网络（FFN）旁，建立距离无关的检索路径，直接提供视觉嵌入以增强视觉感知。
contributions: 识别并形式化LVLM中的“视觉信号稀释”现象。
提出PVM模块，结构性地缓解深度生成中的视觉信号抑制。
在Qwen3-VL模型上验证，以极小参数开销带来一致准确率提升，尤其在复杂推理任务中。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen3-VL的4B和8B规模上进行实验，显示平均准确率提升，并在长生成中展现更好的鲁棒性和更快的内部预测收敛。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 仅在Qwen3-VL系列上验证，泛化性需更多模型测试。
未讨论PVM对推理速度的具体影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 针对LVLM长文本生成中的视觉衰减问题提出轻量级模块，实验验证有效，与VLM方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轻量级模块PVM，通过距离无关的视觉检索路径缓解LVLM长文本生成中的视觉信号稀释问题。

papers.title: Let ViT Speak: Generative Language-Image Pre-training
papers.abstract: In this paper, we present \textbf{Gen}erative \textbf{L}anguage-\textbf{I}mage \textbf{P}re-training (GenLIP), a minimalist generative pretraining framework for Vision Transformers (ViTs) designed for multimodal large language models (MLLMs). To better align vision encoders with the autoregressive nature of LLMs, GenLIP trains a ViT to predict language tokens directly from visual tokens using a standard language modeling objective, without contrastive batch construction or an additional text decoder. This design offers three key advantages: (1) \textbf{Simplicity}: a single transformer jointly models visual and textual tokens; (2) \textbf{Scalability}: it scales effectively with both data and model size; and (3) \textbf{Performance}: it achieves competitive or superior results across diverse multimodal benchmarks. Trained on 8B samples from Recap-DataComp-1B, GenLIP matches or surpasses strong baselines despite using substantially less pretraining data. After continued pretraining on multi-resolution images at native aspect ratios, GenLIP further improves on detail-sensitive tasks such as OCR and chart understanding, making it a strong foundation for vision encoders in MLLMs.

analysis.tldr: GenLIP通过让ViT直接预测语言token来对齐视觉与语言，实现简洁高效的生成式预训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉编码器与自回归LLM的对齐通常依赖对比学习或额外文本解码器，流程复杂且扩展性有限。
analysis.problem: 如何以生成式方式预训练ViT，使其直接预测语言token，从而更好地与LLM对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出GenLIP框架，使用标准语言建模目标训练ViT从视觉token直接预测语言token，无需对比批次或额外文本解码器。
contributions: 提出GenLIP，一种简洁的生成式预训练框架，仅用单一Transformer联合建模视觉和文本token。
在8B样本上训练后，GenLIP在多种多模态基准上达到或超越强基线，且在多分辨率继续预训练后进一步提升OCR和图表理解等细节敏感任务性能。
analysis.experiments: 在Recap-DataComp-1B的8B样本上预训练，并在多分辨率图像上继续预训练，在多种多模态基准上评估，结果匹配或超越强基线。
limitations: 可能对超大规模数据或极端长文本场景的扩展性未充分验证。
仅针对ViT架构，其他视觉编码器未测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法简洁有效，与MLLM强相关，实验充分，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GenLIP通过让ViT直接预测语言token来对齐视觉与语言，实现简洁高效的生成式预训练。

papers.title: Kernel Affine Hull Machines for Compute-Efficient Query-Side Semantic Encoding
papers.abstract: Transformer-based semantic retrieval is highly effective, yet in many deployments the dominant cost lies in online query encoding rather than corpus indexing. We study the fixed-teacher query-adaptation problem and ask whether repeated neural inference can be replaced by a lightweight, analytically explicit estimator without degrading decision-relevant retrieval quality. We propose Kernel Affine Hull Machines (KAHMs), which map inexpensive lexical features into a frozen semantic embedding space by estimating prototype-mixture weights in a rigorously specified RKHS and refining prototypes via normalized least-mean-squares, yielding a transparent decomposition of encoding error into posterior-approximation, generalization, and teacher-noise components. On a controlled Austrian-law benchmark (5,000 queries; 84 laws; 10,762 units), KAHM attains the strongest teacher-space reconstruction among matched learned adapters (MSE 0.000091, R^2 0.9071, cosine 0.9536) and consistently leads rank-sensitive metrics, including mean reciprocal rank at 20 (MRR@20, the average inverse rank of the first relevant result within the top 20), Hit rate at 20 (Hit@20, the fraction of queries with at least one relevant result in the top 20), and Top-1 accuracy (the fraction of queries whose correct item is ranked first), with scores of 0.504, 0.694, and 0.411, respectively. It also reduces per-query latency by a factor of 8.5 relative to direct transformer encoding. These results demonstrate that, in fixed-teacher regimes, lightweight geometric estimators can substitute for online neural encoding, preserving retrieval performance while substantially improving efficiency and interpretability.

analysis.tldr: 提出核仿射包机（KAHM），用轻量级几何估计替代Transformer在线查询编码，在保持检索质量的同时大幅降低延迟。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于Transformer的语义检索中，在线查询编码的计算成本远高于语料索引，成为部署瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何在固定教师模型场景下，用轻量级显式估计器替代重复的神经网络推理，且不降低检索质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: KAHM将廉价词法特征映射到冻结语义嵌入空间，通过RKHS中估计原型混合权重并利用归一化最小均方算法优化原型，将编码误差分解为后验近似、泛化和教师噪声分量。
contributions: 提出KAHM，一种轻量级、可解释的查询端语义编码方法。
在奥地利法律基准上，KAHM在重建质量和排序指标上均优于匹配的学习适配器，且延迟降低8.5倍。
analysis.experiments: 在包含5000个查询、84部法律、10762个单元的奥地利法律基准上，KAHM在教师空间重建中取得MSE 0.000091、R² 0.9071、余弦相似度0.9536，MRR@20为0.504，Hit@20为0.694，Top-1准确率为0.411。
limitations: 仅针对固定教师场景，未考虑教师模型更新或联合训练。
实验仅在一个法律领域基准上进行，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实验充分，但应用领域较窄，适合对检索效率感兴趣的研究者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出核仿射包机（KAHM），用轻量级几何估计替代Transformer在线查询编码，在保持检索质量的同时大幅降低延迟。

papers.title: Can Coding Agents Reproduce Findings in Computational Materials Science?
papers.abstract: Large language models are increasingly deployed as autonomous coding agents and have achieved remarkably strong performance on software engineering benchmarks. However, it is unclear whether such success transfers to computational scientific workflows, where tasks require not only strong coding ability, but also the ability to navigate complex, domain-specific procedures and to interpret results in the context of scientific claims. To address this question, we present AutoMat, a benchmark for evaluating LLM-based agents' ability to reproduce claims from computational materials science. AutoMat poses three interrelated challenges: recovering underspecified computational procedures, navigating specialized toolchains, and determining whether the resulting evidence supports a claim. By working closely with subject matter experts, we curate a set of claims from real materials science papers to test whether coding agents can recover and execute the end-to-end workflow needed to support (or undermine) such claims. We then evaluate multiple representative coding agent settings across several foundation models. Our results show that current LLM-based agents obtain low overall success rates on AutoMat, with the best-performing setting achieving a success rate of only 54.1%. Error analysis further reveals that agents perform worst when workflows must be reconstructed from paper text alone and that they fail primarily due to incomplete procedures, methodological deviations, and execution fragility. Taken together, these findings position AutoMat as both a benchmark for computational scientific reproducibility and a tool for diagnosing the current limitations of agentic systems in AI-for-science settings.

analysis.tldr: AutoMat基准测试表明，当前LLM编码代理在计算材料科学工作流复现中成功率仅54.1%，主要受限于程序不完整、方法偏差和执行脆弱性。
analysis.research_motivation: 尽管LLM编码代理在软件工程基准上表现优异，但它们在计算科学工作流中的能力尚不明确，这类任务不仅需要编码能力，还需处理领域特定流程和科学解释。
analysis.problem: 评估LLM代理能否复现计算材料科学论文中的科学发现，并识别其失败模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前LLM代理在AutoMat上整体成功率低（最佳54.1%），当工作流必须仅从论文文本重建时表现最差，失败主因是程序不完整、方法偏差和执行脆弱性。
analysis.method: 构建AutoMat基准，从真实材料科学论文中精选声明，要求代理恢复并执行端到端工作流以支持或反驳声明，评估多种代理设置和基础模型。
contributions: 提出AutoMat基准，用于评估LLM代理在计算材料科学中的可复现性。
揭示当前代理在科学工作流中的主要失败模式：程序不完整、方法偏差和执行脆弱性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基础模型和代理设置上评估，最佳成功率54.1%，摘要未提供更多实验细节。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖计算材料科学，可能不泛化到其他科学领域。
未探讨如何缓解已识别的失败模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 该基准针对AI for Science中LLM代理的复现能力，问题新颖且实验揭示关键失败模式，但技术深度中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AutoMat基准测试表明，当前LLM编码代理在计算材料科学工作流复现中成功率仅54.1%，主要受限于程序不完整、方法偏差和执行脆弱性。

papers.title: GMGaze: MoE-Based Context-Aware Gaze Estimation with CLIP and Multiscale Transformer
papers.abstract: Gaze estimation methods commonly use facial appearances to predict the direction of a person gaze. However, previous studies show three major challenges with convolutional neural network (CNN)-based, transformer-based, and contrastive language-image pre-training (CLIP)-based methods, including late fusion of image features, lack of factor-aware conditioning, and impractical capacity scaling. To address these challenges, we propose Globally-conditioned Multi-scale Gaze estimation (GMGaze), which leverages a multi-scale transformer architecture. Specifically, the model first introduces semantic prototype conditioning, which modulates the CLIP global image embedding using four learned prototype banks (i.e., illumination, background, head pose and appearance) to generate two complementary context-biased global tokens. These tokens, along with the CLIP patch and CNN tokens, are fused at the first layer. This early unified fusion prevents information loss common in late-stage merging. Finally, each token passes through sparse Mixture-of-Experts modules, providing conditional computational capacity without uniformly increasing dense parameters. For cross-domain adaptation, we incorporate an adversarial domain adaptation technique with a feature separation loss that encourages the two global tokens to remain de-correlated. Experiments using four public benchmarks (MPIIFaceGaze, EYEDIAP, Gaze360, and ETH-XGaze) show that GMGaze achieves mean angular errors of 2.49$^\circ$, 3.22$^\circ$, 10.16$^\circ$, and 1.44$^\circ$, respectively, outperforming previous baselines in all within-domain settings. In cross-domain evaluations, it provides state-of-the-art (SOTA) results on two standard transfer routes.

analysis.tldr: GMGaze 提出基于多尺度 Transformer 和 MoE 的上下文感知注视估计方法，在多个基准上达到 SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有注视估计方法（CNN、Transformer、CLIP）存在图像特征融合滞后、缺乏因子感知条件、容量扩展不实用等问题，限制了性能。
analysis.problem: 如何实现早期统一的多模态特征融合、因子感知的条件化以及可扩展的计算容量，以提升注视估计的准确性和跨域泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出 CNN、Transformer 和 CLIP 方法在注视估计中面临三大挑战：晚期融合导致信息丢失、缺乏对光照/背景等因子的显式建模、以及均匀增加密集参数不实用。
analysis.method: 提出 GMGaze，包含多尺度 Transformer 架构：1) 语义原型条件化，利用四个原型库（光照、背景、头部姿态、外观）调制 CLIP 全局嵌入生成两个互补上下文偏置全局 token；2) 早期统一融合 CLIP 全局 token、patch token 和 CNN token；3) 每个 token 通过稀疏 MoE 模块提供条件计算容量；4) 跨域适应采用对抗域适应和特征分离损失。
contributions: 提出语义原型条件化机制，利用原型库生成互补的上下文偏置全局 token，实现因子感知的条件化。
设计早期统一融合策略，在 Transformer 第一层融合多种 token，避免晚期融合的信息损失。
引入稀疏 MoE 模块，在不均匀增加密集参数的情况下提供条件计算容量。
在四个公开基准上取得 SOTA 结果，并在跨域评估中表现优异。
analysis.experiments: 在 MPIIFaceGaze、EYEDIAP、Gaze360 和 ETH-XGaze 四个基准上评估，域内平均角度误差分别为 2.49°、3.22°、10.16° 和 1.44°，均优于先前基线；跨域评估在两个标准迁移路径上达到 SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖多个原型库的预定义，泛化到新场景需重新设计。
MoE 模块可能增加推理复杂度，实际部署需权衡。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强（早期融合+MoE+原型条件化），实验充分且 SOTA，与视觉理解方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GMGaze 提出基于多尺度 Transformer 和 MoE 的上下文感知注视估计方法，在多个基准上达到 SOTA。

papers.title: When RAG Chatbots Expose Their Backend: An Anonymized Case Study of Privacy and Security Risks in Patient-Facing Medical AI
papers.abstract: Background: Patient-facing medical chatbots based on retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) are increasingly promoted to deliver accessible, grounded health information. AI-assisted development lowers the barrier to building them, but they still demand rigorous security, privacy, and governance controls. Objective: To report an anonymized, non-destructive security assessment of a publicly accessible patient-facing medical RAG chatbot and identify governance lessons for safe deployment of generative AI in health. Methods: We used a two-stage strategy. First, Claude Opus 4.6 supported exploratory prompt-based testing and structured vulnerability hypotheses. Second, candidate findings were manually verified using Chrome Developer Tools, inspecting browser-visible network traffic, payloads, API schemas, configuration objects, and stored interaction data. Results: The LLM-assisted phase identified a critical vulnerability: sensitive system and RAG configuration appeared exposed through client-server communication rather than restricted server-side. Manual verification confirmed that ordinary browser inspection allowed collection of the system prompt, model and embedding configuration, retrieval parameters, backend endpoints, API schema, document and chunk metadata, knowledge-base content, and the 1,000 most recent patient-chatbot conversations. The deployment also contradicted its privacy assurances: full conversation records, including health-related queries, were retrievable without authentication. Conclusions: Serious privacy and security failures in patient-facing RAG chatbots can be identified with standard browser tools, without specialist skills or authentication; independent review should be a prerequisite for deployment. Commercial LLMs accelerated this assessment, including under a false developer persona; assistance available to auditors is equally available to adversaries.

analysis.tldr: 患者面向的医疗RAG聊天机器人存在严重隐私与安全漏洞，普通浏览器工具即可获取系统配置、知识库内容和最近1000条对话记录。
analysis.research_motivation: 患者面向的医疗RAG聊天机器人被广泛推广，但安全、隐私和治理控制要求严格，而AI辅助开发降低了构建门槛，可能引入严重风险。
analysis.problem: 评估一个公开可访问的患者面向医疗RAG聊天机器人的安全性，并识别安全部署的治理教训。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段策略：首先使用Claude Opus 4.6进行探索性提示测试和结构化漏洞假设；然后通过Chrome开发者工具手动验证浏览器可见的网络流量、载荷、API模式、配置对象和存储的交互数据。
contributions: 通过匿名案例研究揭示了患者面向医疗RAG聊天机器人的严重隐私和安全漏洞。
证明了使用标准浏览器工具无需专业技能或认证即可发现这些漏洞。
提出了独立审查应作为部署前提条件的治理建议。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对单个聊天机器人案例，可能不具普遍性。
未提供漏洞修复后的验证或长期影响评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 案例研究揭示了重要隐私风险，但方法简单，创新性一般，适合关注AI安全与隐私的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 患者面向的医疗RAG聊天机器人存在严重隐私与安全漏洞，普通浏览器工具即可获取系统配置、知识库内容和最近1000条对话记录。

papers.title: Unsupervised Denoising of Real Clinical Low Dose Liver CT with Perceptual Attention Networks
papers.abstract: With the development of deep learning, medical image processing has been widely used to assist clinical research. This paper focuses on the denoising problem of low-dose computed tomography using deep learning. Although low-dose computed tomography reduces radiation exposure to patients, it also introduces more noise, which may interfere with visual interpretation by physicians and affect diagnostic results. To address this problem, inspired by Cycle-GAN for unsupervised learning, this paper proposes an end-to-end unsupervised low-dose computed tomography denoising framework. The proposed framework combines a U-Net structure for multi-scale feature extraction, an attention mechanism for feature fusion, and a residual network for feature transformation. It also introduces perceptual loss to improve the network for the characteristics of medical images. In addition, we construct a real low-dose computed tomography dataset and design a large number of comparative experiments to validate the proposed method, using both image-based evaluation metrics and medical evaluation criteria. Compared with classical methods, the main advantage of this paper is that it addresses the limitation that real clinical data cannot be directly used for supervised learning, while still achieving excellent performance. The experimental results are also professionally evaluated by imaging physicians and meet clinical needs.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于Cycle-GAN的无监督低剂量CT去噪框架，结合U-Net、注意力机制和感知损失，在真实临床数据集上表现优异。
analysis.research_motivation: 低剂量CT虽减少辐射但引入噪声，影响医生诊断；现有监督方法依赖配对数据，而真实临床数据难以获取配对样本。
analysis.problem: 如何在无配对真实临床数据条件下，有效去除低剂量CT图像中的噪声。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于Cycle-GAN的无监督框架，结合U-Net多尺度特征提取、注意力机制特征融合、残差网络特征变换，并引入感知损失以适应医学图像特性。
contributions: 提出一种端到端无监督低剂量CT去噪框架，克服真实临床数据无法用于监督学习的限制。
构建真实低剂量CT数据集，并通过图像指标和医学评估标准验证方法有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在自建真实低剂量CT数据集上进行大量对比实验，采用图像评价指标和医学评估标准，结果由影像医师专业评估并满足临床需求。
limitations: 可能依赖Cycle-GAN的生成质量，存在伪影风险。
未提及与其他无监督方法的详细对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法结合多种技术但创新性中等，实验在真实数据集上验证，与医学图像去噪方向相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于Cycle-GAN的无监督低剂量CT去噪框架，结合U-Net、注意力机制和感知损失，在真实临床数据集上表现优异。

papers.title: Make Your LVLM KV Cache More Lightweight
papers.abstract: Key-Value (KV) cache has become a de facto component of modern Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) for inference. While it enhances decoding efficiency in Large Language Models (LLMs), its direct adoption in LVLMs introduces substantial GPU memory overhead due to the large number of vision tokens processed during the prefill stage. To tackle this problem, we propose LightKV, a novel approach that reduces KV cache size by exploiting the redundancy among vision-token embeddings. Guided by text prompts, LightKV employs cross-modality message passing to aggregate informative messages across vision tokens and progressively compress them during prefill. This prompt-aware guidance distinguishes our method from prior vision-only compression strategies. We evaluate LightKV on eight open-source LVLMs across eight public benchmark datasets, e.g., MME and SeedBench. Experimental results demonstrate that with only 55% of the original vision tokens, LightKV (a) halves the vision-token KV cache size, (b) reduces computation by up to 40%, and (c) preserves general-purpose performance while significantly outperforming existing baselines.

analysis.tldr: LightKV通过跨模态消息传递压缩视觉token的KV缓存，在LVLM推理中减少显存占用并保持性能。
analysis.research_motivation: LVLM中大量视觉token导致KV缓存显存开销巨大，现有方法缺乏文本引导的压缩策略。
analysis.problem: LVLM推理时视觉token KV缓存占用过多GPU显存。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 视觉token嵌入存在冗余，可通过文本引导的跨模态消息传递进行压缩。
analysis.method: 提出LightKV，利用文本提示引导跨模态消息传递，在预填充阶段逐步压缩视觉token的KV缓存。
contributions: 提出一种文本引导的视觉token KV缓存压缩方法LightKV
在8个开源LVLM和8个基准数据集上验证有效性，仅用55%视觉token即减半KV缓存并降低40%计算量
analysis.experiments: 在8个开源LVLM和8个公开基准数据集（如MME、SeedBench）上评估，结果显示LightKV在保持通用性能的同时显著优于现有基线。
limitations: 可能依赖文本提示质量
压缩比例固定为55%，未探索自适应压缩
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 针对LVLM推理显存瓶颈提出创新压缩方法，实验充分且效果显著，与VLM方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LightKV通过跨模态消息传递压缩视觉token的KV缓存，在LVLM推理中减少显存占用并保持性能。

papers.title: Physiology-Aware Masked Cross-Modal Reconstruction for Biosignal Representation Learning
papers.abstract: Biosignals acquired from different locations on the body often provide temporally ordered views of the same underlying physiological process. However, most existing self supervised learning methods treat these signals as interchangeable views, overlooking the directional temporal dynamics that link them. A canonical example is the relationship between electrocardiography (ECG), which captures the electrical activation initiating each heartbeat, and photoplethysmography (PPG), which records the resulting peripheral pulse delayed by vascular dynamics. To capture this structured relationship, we introduce xMAE, a biosignal pretraining framework that leverages masked cross modal reconstruction across temporally ordered biosignals as a training time constraint to encourage physiologically meaningful timing structure in the learned representations. We show that pretraining with xMAE yields representations that outperform both unimodal and multimodal baselines on 15 of 19 downstream tasks, including cardiovascular outcome prediction, abnormal laboratory test detection, sleep staging, and demographic inference, while generalizing across devices, body locations, and acquisition settings. Further analysis suggests that the ECG PPG timing structure is reflected in the learned PPG representations. More broadly, xMAE demonstrates the effectiveness of incorporating temporal structure into multimodal pretraining when signals observe different stages of a shared underlying process. Code is available at https://github.com/hzhou3/xMAE.

analysis.tldr: 提出生理感知的跨模态重建框架xMAE，利用ECG和PPG的时序关系进行自监督预训练，提升下游任务性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自监督方法将不同位置采集的生物信号视为可互换视图，忽略了它们之间由生理过程决定的时序动态关系，导致表征缺乏生理意义。
analysis.problem: 如何利用生物信号之间的时序依赖关系（如ECG与PPG的延迟对应）来学习更具生理意义的表征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: ECG和PPG分别记录心跳的电活动和机械脉冲，两者存在固定的时序延迟，这种结构关系可用于约束表征学习。
analysis.method: 提出xMAE框架，通过掩码跨模态重建（masked cross-modal reconstruction）在时序对齐的生物信号对（如ECG-PPG）上进行预训练，强制模型学习生理时序结构。
contributions: 提出xMAE，一种利用时序有序生物信号间跨模态重建的自监督预训练方法。
在19个下游任务中的15个上超越单模态和多模态基线，涵盖心血管预测、睡眠分期等。
分析表明ECG-PPG时序结构被编码到PPG表征中，验证了方法的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在19个下游任务上评估，包括心血管结局预测、异常实验室检测、睡眠分期和人口统计推断，并跨设备、身体位置和采集设置进行泛化测试。
limitations: 仅验证了ECG-PPG这对信号，其他时序生物信号对（如脑电-肌电）的适用性未知。
未讨论掩码策略对性能的影响，可能依赖特定掩码比例。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高，利用生理时序约束进行跨模态重建，实验充分且开源，但技术细节较常规，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出生理感知的跨模态重建框架xMAE，利用ECG和PPG的时序关系进行自监督预训练，提升下游任务性能。

papers.title: Toward a Scientific Discovery Engine for Weather and Climate Data: A Visual Analytics Workbench for Embedding-Based Exploration
papers.abstract: Earth system science is producing increasingly large, high-dimensional datasets from physics based Earth system models to AI-based weather and climate models. Embedding-based representations can make these data searchable through similarity search and analog retrieval, but nearest neighbors in latent space are not automatically scientifically meaningful: it may reflect real weather structure, or preprocessing, geography, or model bias. Researchers therefore need ways to inspect how embeddings organize meteorological data, compare representation models, develop retrieval strategies, and verify results against physical evidence. We present an open-source visual analytics workbench for each of these steps. The system links embedding experiments to source data, metadata, spatial context, and model configurations, so latent-space results can be traced back to the physics. Users can explore latent spaces for different models, issue global or localized queries, and inspect analogs through familiar meteorological views. This enables a discovery workflow in which scientists characterize a phenomenon of interest in a well-understood dataset, identifying its signature in latent space, and then use that signature to probe larger, less-labeled archives or ensembles for similar events. We demonstrate the workbench through tropical-cyclone retrieval using ERA5-derived embeddings and IBTrACS metadata, and evaluate its out-of-core retrieval backend to show that large embedding collections can be searched beyond in-memory limits on commodity workstation hardware.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个开源可视化分析工作台，用于基于嵌入的天气气候数据探索，支持相似性检索和科学验证。
analysis.research_motivation: 地球系统科学产生大量高维数据，嵌入表示可通过相似性搜索实现数据检索，但潜在空间中的最近邻不一定具有科学意义，可能反映预处理、地理或模型偏差，研究人员需要工具来检查嵌入如何组织气象数据、比较表示模型、开发检索策略并验证结果。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个可视化分析系统，帮助科学家在嵌入空间中探索天气气候数据，确保检索结果具有物理意义，并支持大规模数据的高效检索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 开发一个开源可视化分析工作台，将嵌入实验与源数据、元数据、空间上下文和模型配置链接，支持用户探索不同模型的潜在空间、执行全局或局部查询，并通过气象视图检查相似案例。
contributions: 提出一个集成嵌入实验、数据溯源和可视化分析的工作台，支持科学发现工作流。
通过热带气旋检索案例和离核检索后端评估，证明系统在商品硬件上可处理超出内存限制的大规模嵌入集合。
analysis.experiments: 使用ERA5衍生的嵌入和IBTrACS元数据进行热带气旋检索，并评估离核检索后端，显示大嵌入集合可在商品工作站硬件上搜索。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定气候现象（如热带气旋）进行了验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
离核检索性能可能受限于硬件配置，未与分布式系统对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 工作台设计有实际应用价值，但方法创新性一般，实验规模有限，与核心方向关联较弱。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个开源可视化分析工作台，用于基于嵌入的天气气候数据探索，支持相似性检索和科学验证。

papers.title: Reconstruction Interval Z-Phase Dependence of AI Detection Sensitivity in CT Lung Nodule Screening
papers.abstract: Background: Sensitivity of AI-assisted lung nodule detection systems is known to vary with CT acquisition parameters including radiation dose, reconstruction kernel, and slice thickness. However, the dependence of detection probability on nodule position within the reconstruction cycle -- the z-phase -- has not, to the author's knowledge, been characterized for deep learning-based detection systems. Methods: A retrospective analysis was performed using the LIDC-IDRI dataset. Detection results from a previously validated 154-case perturbation study were re-analyzed. For each consensus nodule (>=4-reader agreement), z-phase was defined as the fractional position of the nodule center within the reconstruction cycle, folded to [0, 0.5]. Detection sensitivity was stratified by z-phase bin, reconstruction interval (1mm, 3mm, 5mm), and by the ratio of reconstruction interval to nodule diameter (d/D). Results: At 5mm reconstruction interval, sensitivity was 71.6% vs 84.8% at 1mm baseline. Within the 5mm condition, sensitivity varied by 17.6 percentage points across z-phase bins. Stratified by d/D ratio, sensitivity was 92.4% for d/D < 0.5, 78.0% for 0.5 <= d/D < 1.0, and 61.4% for d/D >= 1.0, with a systematic z-phase effect present only in the d/D >= 1.0 stratum. Conclusions: AI detection sensitivity depends on the ratio of reconstruction interval to nodule diameter. When this ratio approaches or exceeds 1.0 -- as occurs for 3-6mm nodules at 5mm reconstruction -- z-phase becomes the dominant source of per-study detection variance. This stochastic effect is invisible to protocol-level quality metrics and not reflected in AI confidence scores.

analysis.tldr: CT重建间隔与结节直径之比影响AI检测灵敏度，当比值≥1时，结节在重建周期中的z相位成为主要变异来源。
analysis.research_motivation: AI肺结节检测系统对CT采集参数（如辐射剂量、重建核、层厚）的敏感性已有研究，但结节在重建周期内的位置（z相位）对深度学习检测系统的影响尚未被表征，这可能导致检测性能的未解释变异。
analysis.problem: 量化CT重建间隔与结节直径之比以及z相位对AI检测灵敏度的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当重建间隔与结节直径之比≥1时（如5mm重建间隔下3-6mm结节），z相位成为检测灵敏度的主导变异源，灵敏度在z相位区间内变化达17.6个百分点，且该效应在协议级质量指标和AI置信度分数中不可见。
analysis.method: 基于LIDC-IDRI数据集，对154例扰动研究中的检测结果进行回顾性分析，定义z相位为结节中心在重建周期内的分数位置（折叠至[0,0.5]），按z相位区间、重建间隔（1mm,3mm,5mm）和重建间隔与结节直径之比（d/D）分层分析检测灵敏度。
contributions: 首次表征了z相位对深度学习肺结节检测系统灵敏度的影响
揭示了重建间隔与结节直径之比（d/D）是决定z相位效应强度的关键因素
指出该随机效应在协议级质量指标和AI置信度分数中不可见，对临床部署有重要警示
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅描述了方法学和分析结果。
limitations: 仅基于LIDC-IDRI数据集，可能需在其他数据集上验证
仅分析了一种AI检测系统，泛化性未知
未探讨z相位效应的机制或缓解方法
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 该研究揭示了AI检测中一个未被充分认识的重要变异源，对医学图像AI部署有实际意义，但方法相对简单，实验规模有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CT重建间隔与结节直径之比影响AI检测灵敏度，当比值≥1时，结节在重建周期中的z相位成为主要变异来源。

papers.title: GeoContra: From Fluent GIS Code to Verifiable Spatial Analysis with Geography-Grounded Repair
papers.abstract: Reliable spatial analysis in GIScience requires preserving coordinate semantics, topology, units, and geographic plausibility. Current LLM-based GIS systems generate fluent scripts but rarely enforce these geographic rules at scale. We present GeoContra, a verification and repair framework for LLM-driven Python GIS workflows. It represents each task as an executable geospatial contract-including natural-language questions, schemas, CRS metadata, expected outputs, spatial predicates, topology, metrics, required operations, and forbidden shortcuts. Generated programs undergo static rule inspection, runtime validation, and semantic verification, with violations fed back into a bounded repair loop. Evaluated on 7,079 real geospatial tasks across 15 Boston-area zones, 9 task families, and 11 open-source models (600 runs each), GeoContra improves spatial correctness on closed models from 47.6% to 77.5% for DeepSeek-V4 and from 57.7% to 81.5% for Kimi-K2.5. Across 11 open models, average correctness rises by 26.6%. GeoContra turns fluent code production into verifiable spatial analysis, catching negative travel times, CRS/field-schema violations, missing predicates, and brittle output casts that otherwise yield executable but geographically invalid results.

analysis.tldr: GeoContra 通过地理约束验证与修复，将 LLM 生成的 GIS 代码从流畅但不可靠转变为可验证的空间分析。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 LLM 驱动的 GIS 系统能生成流畅代码，但缺乏对坐标语义、拓扑、单位等地理规则的强制执行，导致输出可执行但地理上无效。
analysis.problem: 如何确保 LLM 生成的 GIS 代码在空间分析中保持地理正确性，避免如负旅行时间、CRS 违规等错误。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出 LLM 生成的代码常出现负旅行时间、CRS/字段模式违规、缺失谓词和脆弱的输出转换，这些错误虽可执行但地理上无效。
analysis.method: GeoContra 框架将每个任务表示为可执行的地理空间契约，包含自然语言问题、模式、CRS 元数据、预期输出、空间谓词、拓扑、度量、所需操作和禁止捷径；通过静态规则检查、运行时验证和语义验证，将违规反馈到有界修复循环中。
contributions: 提出地理空间契约概念，将 GIS 任务形式化为可验证的规范。
实现包含静态检查、运行时验证和语义验证的多层验证与修复框架。
在 7,079 个真实地理空间任务上评估，显著提升多种模型的空间正确性。
analysis.experiments: 在 15 个波士顿区域、9 个任务族、11 个开源模型（每个 600 次运行）共 7,079 个真实地理空间任务上评估，闭源模型 DeepSeek-V4 正确率从 47.6% 提升至 77.5%，Kimi-K2.5 从 57.7% 提升至 81.5%，11 个开源模型平均正确率提升 26.6%。
limitations: 可能依赖预定义的地理空间契约，对新任务类型需手动构建。
修复循环可能增加计算开销，实时性要求高的场景需优化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新（地理空间契约+多层验证），实验充分且效果显著，但属于 GIS 特定应用，与核心 VLM/LLM 方向距离稍远。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GeoContra 通过地理约束验证与修复，将 LLM 生成的 GIS 代码从流畅但不可靠转变为可验证的空间分析。

papers.title: Map2World: Segment Map Conditioned Text to 3D World Generation
papers.abstract: 3D world generation is essential for applications such as immersive content creation or autonomous driving simulation. Recent advances in 3D world generation have shown promising results; however, these methods are constrained by grid layouts and suffer from inconsistencies in object scale throughout the entire world. In this work, we introduce a novel framework, Map2World, that first enables 3D world generation conditioned on user-defined segment maps of arbitrary shapes and scales, ensuring global-scale consistency and flexibility across expansive environments. To further enhance the quality, we propose a detail enhancer network that generates fine details of the world. The detail enhancer enables the addition of fine-grained details without compromising overall scene coherence by incorporating global structure information. We design the entire pipeline to leverage strong priors from asset generators, achieving robust generalization across diverse domains, even under limited training data for scene generation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms existing approaches in user-controllability, scale consistency, and content coherence, enabling users to generate 3D worlds under more complex conditions.

analysis.tldr: Map2World 通过用户定义的任意形状和尺度的分割图实现全局尺度一致的 3D 世界生成，并引入细节增强网络提升质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D 世界生成在沉浸式内容创建和自动驾驶仿真中至关重要，但现有方法受限于网格布局且存在物体尺度不一致的问题。
analysis.problem: 如何实现基于用户定义分割图、具有全局尺度一致性和灵活性的 3D 世界生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法受限于网格布局，导致物体尺度在整个世界中不一致。
analysis.method: 提出 Map2World 框架，以用户定义的分割图为条件生成 3D 世界，并设计细节增强网络在保持全局结构的同时添加细粒度细节。
contributions: 首次实现基于任意形状和尺度分割图的 3D 世界生成，确保全局尺度一致性。
提出细节增强网络，在不破坏场景连贯性的前提下提升生成质量。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅说明方法在用户可控性、尺度一致性和内容连贯性上显著优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖资产生成器的先验知识，在未见过的领域泛化能力有限。
细节增强网络可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，解决了尺度一致性问题，但实验细节不足，适合精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Map2World 通过用户定义的任意形状和尺度的分割图实现全局尺度一致的 3D 世界生成，并引入细节增强网络提升质量。

papers.title: Directed Social Regard: Surfacing Targeted Advocacy, Opposition, Aid, Harms, and Victimization in Online Media
papers.abstract: The language in online platforms, influence operations, and political rhetoric frequently directs a mix of pro-social sentiment (e.g., advocacy, helpfulness, compassion) and anti-social sentiment (e.g., threats, opposition, blame) at different topics, all in the same message. While many natural language processing (NLP) tools classify or score a text's overall sentiment as positive, neutral, or negative, these tools cannot report that positive and negative sentiments coexist, and they cannot report the target of those sentiments. This paper presents the Directed Social Regard (DSR) approach to multi-dimensional, multi-valence sentiment analysis, comprised of a pair of transformer-based models that (1) detects span-level targets of sentiment in a message and then (2) scores all spans within the message context along three (-1, 1) axes of regard that are motivated by social science theories of moral disengagement and moral framing. We present a data collection and annotation strategy for DSR dataset construction, a transformer-based architecture for span-level scoring, and a validation study with promising results. We apply the validated DSR model on six third-party datasets of online media and report meaningful correlations between DSR outputs and the labels and topics in these pre-existing social science datasets.

analysis.tldr: 提出定向社会关注（DSR）方法，通过双Transformer模型检测文本中情感的目标跨度并沿三个道德维度评分，揭示在线媒体中同时存在的亲社会与反社会情感。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有NLP情感分析工具只能对文本整体情感进行正/负/中性分类，无法捕捉同一消息中同时存在的正负情感及其具体目标，限制了细粒度社会情感分析。
analysis.problem: 如何同时检测文本中多个情感目标并沿多维度（道德脱离与道德框架）量化正负情感强度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在线平台、影响操作和政治修辞中常在同一消息内对不同主题混合表达亲社会（如倡导、帮助）和反社会（如威胁、指责）情感，现有工具无法区分。
analysis.method: 构建DSR方法，包含两个Transformer模型：第一个检测消息中情感目标的跨度，第二个在上下文内沿三个(-1,1)轴（基于道德脱离和道德框架理论）对所有跨度进行评分。同时提出数据集构建与标注策略。
contributions: 提出DSR方法，实现多维度、多效价的情感分析，可同时报告正负情感及其目标。
构建DSR数据集及标注策略，并设计基于Transformer的跨度级评分架构。
在六个第三方在线媒体数据集上验证，DSR输出与现有标签和主题存在有意义的相关性。
analysis.experiments: 在六个第三方在线媒体数据集上进行验证研究，报告DSR输出与预存在的社会科学数据集标签和主题之间的有意义相关性。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量标注数据，扩展性受限。
模型对复杂隐喻或隐含情感的检测能力未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖但实验信息有限，与重点方向中等相关，适合阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出定向社会关注（DSR）方法，通过双Transformer模型检测文本中情感的目标跨度并沿三个道德维度评分，揭示在线媒体中同时存在的亲社会与反社会情感。

papers.title: AsymTalker: Identity-Consistent Long-Term Talking Head Generation via Asymmetric Distillation
papers.abstract: Diffusion-based talking head generation has achieved remarkable visual quality, yet scaling it to long-term videos remains challenging. The widely adopted chunk-wise paradigm introduces two fundamental failures: (1) temporal-spatial misalignment between static identity references and dynamic audio streams, and (2) cascading identity drift propagated through self-generated continuity references across chunks. To address both issues, we propose AsymTalker, a novel diffusion-based talking head generation method comprising Temporal Reference Encoding (TRE) and Asymmetric Knowledge Distillation (AKD). First, TRE mitigates temporal-spatial misalignment by transforming the static identity image into a temporally coherent latent representation through encoding of a temporally replicated pseudo-video, without introducing additional parameters. Second, AKD resolves the inherent conditioning dilemma in chunk-wise training: using ground-truth references causes train-inference mismatch, while self-generated references entangle supervision with identity drift. Our asymmetric design circumvents this by anchoring the teacher model with ground-truth continuity references to provide drift-free, chunk-level supervision, thereby avoiding the teacher bottleneck. Meanwhile, the student model learns under inference-aligned conditions, conditioned only on self-generated references, and is trained via distribution matching to preserve identity over long horizons. Extensive experiments show AsymTalker achieves state-of-the-art results on HDTF and VFHQ. It guarantees high-fidelity, identity-consistent synthesis over 600-second videos and reaches a real-time inference speed of 66 FPS.

analysis.tldr: AsymTalker通过非对称蒸馏和时序参考编码，实现长视频中身份一致的高保真说话人脸生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型在说话人脸生成中视觉质量高，但扩展到长视频时，分块范式会导致时序-空间错位和身份漂移，现有方法难以解决。
analysis.problem: 长视频说话人脸生成中的时序-空间错位和级联身份漂移问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 分块生成中，静态身份参考与动态音频流错位，且自生成连续参考会传播身份漂移。
analysis.method: 提出AsymTalker，包含时序参考编码（TRE）将静态图像转为时序一致潜表征，以及非对称知识蒸馏（AKD）用教师模型提供无漂移的块级监督，学生模型在推理对齐条件下学习。
contributions: 提出TRE模块，无需额外参数解决时序-空间错位。
提出AKD框架，通过非对称蒸馏解决分块训练中的条件困境，实现长视频身份保持。
analysis.experiments: 在HDTF和VFHQ数据集上达到SOTA，支持600秒视频合成，推理速度66 FPS。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量训练数据，对极端姿态或遮挡鲁棒性未知。
非对称蒸馏增加了训练复杂度。

papers.title: Modeling Subjective Urban Perception with Human Gaze
papers.abstract: Urban perception describes how people subjectively evaluate urban environments, shaping how cities are experienced and understood. Existing computational approaches primarily model urban perception directly from street view images, but largely ignore the human perceptual process through which such judgments are formed. In this paper, we introduce Place Pulse-Gaze, an urban perception dataset that augments street view images with synchronized eye-tracking recordings and individual perception labels. Based on this dataset, we propose a Gaze-Guided Urban Perception Framework to study how gaze behavior contributes to the modeling of subjective urban perception. The framework systematically investigates three complementary settings: gaze-only modeling, gaze fusion with explicit semantic scene representations, and gaze fusion with implicit richer visual representations. Experiments show that gaze alone already carries useful predictive signals for subjective urban perception, and that integrating gaze with scene representations further improves prediction under both semantic and richer visual representations. Overall, our findings highlight the importance of incorporating human perceptual processes into urban scene understanding and open a direction for gaze-guided multimodal urban computing.

analysis.tldr: 引入人类注视信号可显著提升主观城市感知建模的准确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有城市感知模型直接使用街景图像，忽略了人类形成主观判断时的注视过程，缺乏对感知机制的建模。
analysis.problem: 如何利用人类注视行为数据来改进主观城市感知的预测模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Gaze-Guided Urban Perception Framework，包含三种设置：仅注视建模、注视与显式语义场景表示融合、注视与隐式丰富视觉表示融合。
contributions: 构建了Place Pulse-Gaze数据集，包含街景图像、同步眼动追踪记录和个体感知标签。
系统验证了注视信号对主观城市感知的预测能力，并展示了融合场景表示后的性能提升。
analysis.experiments: 在Place Pulse-Gaze数据集上进行了实验，结果表明仅注视即可提供有用预测信号，融合场景表示后性能进一步提升。
limitations: 数据集规模可能有限，泛化性需进一步验证。
注视融合方法可能依赖高质量眼动数据，实际部署成本较高。

papers.title: Meritocratic Fairness in Budgeted Combinatorial Multi-armed Bandits via Shapley Values
papers.abstract: We propose a new framework for meritocratic fairness in budgeted combinatorial multi-armed bandits with full-bandit feedback (BCMAB-FBF). Unlike semi-bandit feedback, the contribution of individual arms is not received in full-bandit feedback, making the setting significantly more challenging. To compute arm contributions in BCMAB-FBF, we first extend the Shapley value, a classical solution concept from cooperative game theory, to the $K$-Shapley value, which captures the marginal contribution of an agent restricted to a set of size at most $K$. We show that $K$-Shapley value is a unique solution concept that satisfies Symmetry, Linearity, Null player, and efficiency properties. We next propose K-SVFair-FBF, a fairness-aware bandit algorithm that adaptively estimates $K$-Shapley value with unknown valuation function. Unlike standard bandit literature on full bandit feedback, K-SVFair-FBF not only learns the valuation function under full feedback setting but also mitigates the noise arising from Monte Carlo approximations. Theoretically, we prove that K-SVFair-FBF achieves $O(T^{3/4})$ regret bound on fairness regret. Through experiments on federated learning and social influence maximization datasets, we demonstrate that our approach achieves fairness and performs more effectively than existing baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于K-Shapley值的公平性算法，在预算组合多臂老虎机中实现功绩公平。
analysis.research_motivation: 全带反馈下无法直接观测单个臂的贡献，导致公平性难以保障，现有方法多依赖半带反馈，不适用于更一般的全带反馈场景。
analysis.problem: 在全带反馈的预算组合多臂老虎机中，如何公平地分配资源并最小化公平性遗憾。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 全带反馈下臂贡献不可直接观测，且蒙特卡洛近似引入噪声，增加了公平性估计的难度。
analysis.method: 提出K-Shapley值作为臂贡献度量，并设计K-SVFair-FBF算法，自适应估计K-Shapley值，同时处理估值函数学习和蒙特卡洛噪声。
contributions: 将Shapley值扩展为K-Shapley值，并证明其满足对称性、线性性、零玩家和效率性质。
提出K-SVFair-FBF算法，在全带反馈下实现O(T^{3/4})的公平性遗憾界。
analysis.experiments: 在联邦学习和社会影响力最大化数据集上验证，方法比现有基线更公平且更有效。
limitations: 遗憾界为O(T^{3/4})，可能不是最优。
K-Shapley值的计算复杂度可能较高。

papers.title: MedMosaic: A Challenging Large Scale Benchmark of Diverse Medical Audio
papers.abstract: We present MedMosaic, a medical audio question-answering dataset designed to benchmark language and audio reasoning models under realistic clinical constraints. Medical audio data is difficult to collect due to privacy regulations and high annotation costs arising from domain expertise. Thus, existing benchmarks tend to underrepresent complex medical audio scenarios. To address these challenges, MedMosaic features a diverse range of medical audio types, including condition-related physiological sounds, carefully constructed synthetic voices to mimic speech with artifacts as well as real short and long length clinical conversations to model varying context lengths. The dataset also features a total of 46,701 question-answer pairs, spanning categories such as multiple-choice, sequential multi-turn, and open-ended question-answers, enabling systematic evaluation of multi-hop reasoning and answer generation capabilities. Benchmarking 13 audio and multimodal reasoning models reveals that reasoning remains challenging for all evaluated systems, with substantial performance variation across question types. In particular, even state-of-the-art model like Gemini-2.5-pro can only achieve 68.1% accuracy approximately. These findings underscore persistent limitations in medical reasoning and highlight the need for more robust, domain-specific multimodal reasoning models.

analysis.tldr: MedMosaic是一个大规模、多样化的医学音频问答基准，揭示了现有模型在临床推理中的显著局限。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学音频数据因隐私法规和领域专家标注成本高而难以收集，现有基准未能充分覆盖复杂的医学音频场景，亟需一个更具挑战性的基准来推动模型发展。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个涵盖多种医学音频类型和复杂问答格式的大规模基准，以系统评估语言和音频推理模型在真实临床约束下的表现。

contributions: 提出了MedMosaic，一个大规模、多样化的医学音频问答基准，包含多种音频类型和问答格式。

papers.title: Adaptive 3D-RoPE: Physics-Aligned Rotary Positional Encoding for Wireless Foundation Models
papers.abstract: Positional encoding plays a pivotal role in determin?ing the extrapolation and generalization performance of wireless foundation models for channel state information (CSI) modeling, latent characterization, and task-specific prediction. However, existing CSI models inherit static or one-dimensional positional priors from natural language and vision architectures, which fundamentally misalign with the intrinsic physics of wireless channels by lacking explicit relative decay, collapsing the 3D spatio-temporal-frequency structure, and remaining scenario?rigid. This paper proposes Adaptive 3D-RoPE, a physics-aligned rotary positional encoding that establishes the structural corner?stone for wireless foundation models. The framework integrates a learnable, axis-decoupled 3D frequency bank to explicitly disentangle multi-dimensional phase dependencies, coupled with a lightweight channel-conditioned controller that dynamically modulates the prior via compact global CSI descriptors. This sample-adaptive mechanism transforms positional encoding from a static transformer component into a dynamic, coherence-aware inductive bias to resolve heterogeneous channel physics. Extensive experiments across 100 datasets demonstrate the superiority of the proposed scheme in both scale extrapolation and zero-shot generalization. Compared to the state-of-the-art, our method achieves up to a 10.7 dB reduction in normalized mean square error (NMSE) under 8 times antenna scale extrapolation. Given the same CSI input scales, our method can also improve zero-shot NMSE by 1.07 dB across unseen mobility scenarios and 0.90 dB in low-frequency-to-millimeter-wave tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应3D-RoPE，一种物理对齐的旋转位置编码，用于无线基础模型，显著提升CSI建模的外推和零样本泛化性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有无线信道模型继承自然语言和视觉架构中的静态或一维位置先验，与无线信道的三维空-时-频物理结构不匹配，导致缺乏显式相对衰减、结构坍塌和场景刚性，限制了外推和泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种与无线信道物理特性对齐的位置编码方法，以显式建模三维空-时-频依赖关系并实现动态场景自适应。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Adaptive 3D-RoPE，包含可学习的轴解耦三维频率库以显式分离多维相位依赖，以及轻量级信道条件控制器，通过紧凑全局CSI描述子动态调制先验，实现样本自适应的位置编码。
contributions: 提出物理对齐的3D旋转位置编码框架，显式解耦三维空-时-频相位依赖。

analysis.experiments: 在100个数据集上进行实验，包括天线尺度外推和零样本泛化测试，与SOTA对比。
limitations: 可能依赖特定CSI数据格式，泛化到其他无线任务需验证。

papers.title: Quantum Gradient-Based Approach for Edge and Corner Detection Using Sobel Kernels
papers.abstract: Edge detection refers to identifying points in a digital image where intensity changes sharply, indicating object boundaries or structural features. Corners are locations where gray-level intensity changes abruptly in multiple directions and are widely used in feature extraction, object tracking, and 3D modeling. In this study, we present a quantum implementation of Sobel-based edge detection and Harris-style corner detection. Two quantum image encoding methods - Flexible Representation of Quantum Images (FRQI) and Quantum Probability Image Encoding (QPIE) - are used to encode the input data and are comparatively analyzed. The proposed approach introduces a quantum gradient computation scheme based on lag-2 differences, enabling the evaluation of gradient-like features in superposition. To improve detection quality and reduce false positives, a classical post-processing step is applied to candidate corner points identified by the quantum circuit. Results show that the proposed quantum circuits produce outputs consistent with classical Sobel and Harris operators. Furthermore, the QPIE-based configuration yields more stable and coherent results than FRQI, especially under limited measurement shots. While gradient computation can be performed efficiently at the circuit level, the overall cost remains dominated by state preparation, measurement, and classical post-processing. All experiments are conducted under noiseless simulation, and performance on NISQ hardware may be affected by noise and measurement limitations. Therefore, this work demonstrates a functional and scalable quantum realization of classical edge and corner detection methods rather than an end-to-end speedup.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于量子梯度计算的Sobel边缘检测和Harris角点检测方法，使用FRQI和QPIE两种量子图像编码，在无噪声模拟中验证了与经典方法一致的结果。
analysis.research_motivation: 经典边缘和角点检测在图像处理中至关重要，但计算成本高；量子计算有望提供加速，但如何高效实现经典检测算子的量子版本仍是一个挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何用量子电路实现Sobel边缘检测和Harris角点检测，并比较不同量子图像编码方案的效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: QPIE编码比FRQI在有限测量次数下更稳定和一致；梯度计算在电路层面高效，但整体成本仍由状态制备、测量和经典后处理主导。
analysis.method: 采用FRQI和QPIE两种量子图像编码，设计基于lag-2差分的量子梯度计算方案，在量子电路中实现Sobel梯度幅值和Harris角点响应，最后通过经典后处理减少假阳性。
contributions: 首次提出基于量子梯度计算的Sobel边缘检测和Harris角点检测的完整量子实现。
比较了FRQI和QPIE两种编码方案，发现QPIE在有限测量下更稳定。
在无噪声模拟中验证了量子输出与经典Sobel/Harris算子的一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在无噪声模拟器上进行实验，比较量子输出与经典Sobel和Harris算子的结果，并分析不同编码方案和测量次数的影响。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅在无噪声模拟下验证，未在真实NISQ硬件上测试。
整体计算成本仍受状态制备、测量和经典后处理主导，未实现端到端加速。

papers.title: Position: agentic AI orchestration should be Bayes-consistent
papers.abstract: LLMs excel at predictive tasks and complex reasoning tasks, but many high-value deployments rely on decisions under uncertainty, for example, which tool to call, which expert to consult, or how many resources to invest. While the usefulness and feasibility of Bayesian approaches remain unclear for LLM inference, this position paper argues that the control layer of an agentic AI system (that orchestrates LLMs and tools) is a clear case where Bayesian principles should shine. Bayesian decision theory provides a framework for agentic systems that can help to maintain beliefs over task-relevant latent quantities, to update these beliefs from observed agentic and human-AI interactions, and to choose actions. Making LLMs themselves explicitly Bayesian belief-updating engines remains computationally intensive and conceptually nontrivial as a general modeling target. In contrast, this paper argues that coherent decision-making requires Bayesian principles at the orchestration level of the agentic system, not necessarily the LLM agent parameters. This paper articulates practical properties for Bayesian control that fit modern agentic AI systems and human-AI collaboration, and provides concrete examples and design patterns to illustrate how calibrated beliefs and utility-aware policies can improve agentic AI orchestration.

analysis.tldr: 本文主张智能体AI编排层应遵循贝叶斯一致性原则，以提升不确定性下的决策质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前LLM在预测和推理任务上表现优异，但许多高价值应用需要在不确定性下做出决策（如选择工具、专家或资源投入），而现有方法缺乏系统性的贝叶斯框架来管理信念和决策。
analysis.problem: 如何将贝叶斯决策理论应用于智能体AI系统的编排层，以实现不确定性下的连贯决策。

contributions: 论证了贝叶斯原则应应用于智能体AI编排层而非LLM参数本身。
给出了贝叶斯控制的实际属性、具体示例和设计模式。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文主张智能体AI编排层应遵循贝叶斯一致性原则，以提升不确定性下的决策质量。

papers.title: To Call or Not to Call: A Framework to Assess and Optimize LLM Tool Calling
papers.abstract: Agentic AI architectures augment LLMs with external tools, unlocking strong capabilities. However, tool use is not always beneficial; some calls may be redundant or even harmful. Effective tool use, therefore, hinges on a core LLM decision: whether to call or not call a tool, when performing a task. This decision is particularly challenging for web search tools, where the benefits of external information depend on the model's internal knowledge and its ability to integrate potentially noisy tool responses. We introduce a principled framework inspired by decision-making theory to evaluate web search tool-use decisions along three key factors: necessity, utility, and affordability. Our analysis combines two complementary lenses: a normative perspective that infers true need and utility from an optimal allocation of tool calls, and a descriptive perspective that infers the model's self-perceived need and utility from their observed behaviors. We find that models' perceived need and utility of tool calls are often misaligned with their true need and utility. Building on this framework, we train lightweight estimators of need and utility based on models' hidden states. Our estimators enable simple controllers that can improve decision quality and lead to stronger task performance than the self-perceived set up across three tasks and six models.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个决策理论框架来评估和优化LLM是否调用工具（特别是网络搜索），并基于模型隐藏状态训练轻量级估计器来改善决策质量。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM使用外部工具时，并非所有工具调用都有益，有些可能冗余甚至有害，因此需要系统评估和优化工具调用决策。
analysis.problem: 如何评估和优化LLM在任务中是否调用网络搜索工具，以平衡外部信息的收益与潜在噪声和成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型对工具调用的感知需求与效用往往与真实需求与效用不一致，存在错位。
analysis.method: 基于决策理论，从规范视角（推断真实需求与效用）和描述视角（推断模型自感知需求与效用）分析工具调用决策，并利用模型隐藏状态训练轻量级估计器来预测需求与效用，进而控制工具调用。
contributions: 提出了一个评估LLM工具调用决策的框架，涵盖必要性、效用和可负担性三个关键因素。
通过规范与描述两种视角揭示了模型感知与真实需求效用的错位。
训练了基于隐藏状态的轻量级估计器，能够改善决策质量并提升任务性能。
analysis.experiments: 在三个任务和六个模型上进行了实验，结果显示所提方法优于模型自感知的基线设置。
limitations: 框架主要针对网络搜索工具，可能不适用于其他类型工具。
轻量级估计器的泛化能力可能受限于训练数据分布。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 论文针对LLM工具调用决策这一重要问题提出了系统框架和实用方法，实验验证有效，与Agent方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个决策理论框架来评估和优化LLM是否调用工具（特别是网络搜索），并基于模型隐藏状态训练轻量级估计器来改善决策质量。

papers.title: EASE: Federated Multimodal Unlearning via Entanglement-Aware Anchor Closure
papers.abstract: Federated Multimodal Learning (FML) trains multimodal models across decentralized clients while keeping their image-text pairs private. However, joint embedding training entangles forgotten knowledge across both modalities and client gradient subspaces, hindering federated unlearning. Previous federated unlearning approaches neither sever the cross-modal reconstruction channel mediated by bilinear coupling nor separate forget-exclusive update directions from those shared with retained clients. We identify an Anchor Principle for federated multimodal contrastive unlearning: forgotten alignments persist through three residual anchors arising from bilinear cross-modal coupling, principal-angle subspace entanglement, and continued federated updates. At the modality level, we show that bilateral displacement of both visual and language branches closes the cross-modal reconstruction channel. Correspondingly, our method addresses subspace entanglement through Cosine--Sine decomposition of client-update subspaces, isolating forget-exclusive directions from retain support. Moreover, we propose a direction-selective Forget Lock that bounds residual drift across rounds. Combining these strategies, we present EASE, an Entanglement-Aware Subspace Excision framework that closes all three anchor channels under a unified design. EASE demonstrates consistent superiority across multiple datasets and unlearning scenarios, for instance, matching the retrain reference to within 0.2 and 4.2 R@1 points on the forget and retain sides under client unlearning on Flickr30K with CLIP-B/32.

analysis.tldr: 提出EASE框架，通过解耦跨模态和子空间纠缠实现联邦多模态遗忘。
analysis.research_motivation: 联邦多模态学习中，联合嵌入训练导致遗忘知识在模态和客户端梯度子空间纠缠，现有方法无法有效切断跨模态重建通道或分离遗忘专属更新方向。
analysis.problem: 如何实现联邦多模态学习中的有效遗忘，同时保持保留数据的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出遗忘对齐通过三个残差锚点持续存在：双线性跨模态耦合、主角度子空间纠缠和持续联邦更新。
analysis.method: 提出EASE框架，包括：1) 双模态分支的双边位移关闭跨模态重建通道；2) 通过余弦-正弦分解隔离遗忘专属方向；3) 方向选择性遗忘锁限制跨轮残差漂移。
contributions: 识别了联邦多模态对比遗忘中的锚点原则，揭示三个残差锚点。
提出EASE框架，统一关闭所有锚点通道，实现有效遗忘。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集和遗忘场景下验证，例如在Flickr30K上使用CLIP-B/32进行客户端遗忘时，遗忘侧和保留侧的R@1分别与重训练参考相差0.2和4.2以内。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模型架构（如CLIP）。
遗忘锁的阈值选择可能需要调参。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验效果显著，与隐私遗忘方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EASE框架，通过解耦跨模态和子空间纠缠实现联邦多模态遗忘。

papers.title: Empowering Heterogeneous Graph Foundation Models via Decoupled Relation Alignment
papers.abstract: While Graph Foundation Models (GFMs) have achieved remarkable success in homogeneous graphs, extending them to multi-domain heterogeneous graphs (MDHGs) remains a formidable challenge due to cross-type feature shifts and intra-domain relation gaps. Existing global feature alignment methods (PCA or SVD) enforce a shared feature space blindly, which distorts type-specific semantics and disrupts original topologies, inevitably leading to "Type Collapse" and "Relation Confusion". To address these fundamental limitations, we propose Decoupled relation Subspace Alignment (DRSA), a novel, plug-and-play relation-driven alignment framework. DRSA fundamentally shifts the paradigm by decoupling feature semantics from relation structures. Specifically, it introduces a dual-relation subspace projection mechanism to coordinate cross-type interactions within a shared low-rank relation subspace explicitly. Furthermore, a feature-structure decoupled representation is designed to decompose aligned features into a semantic projection component and a structural residual term, adaptively absorbing intra-domain variations. Optimized via a stable alternating minimization strategy based on Block Coordinate Descent, DRSA constructs a well-calibrated, structure-aware latent space. Extensive experiments on multiple real-world benchmark datasets demonstrate that DRSA can be seamlessly integrated as a universal preprocessing module, significantly and consistently enhancing the cross-domain and few-shot knowledge transfer capabilities of state-of-the-art GFMs. The code is available at: https://github.com/zhengziyu77/DSRA.

analysis.tldr: 提出解耦关系子空间对齐方法DRSA，解决异构图基础模型中的类型坍缩和关系混淆问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图基础模型在异构图多域场景中面临跨类型特征偏移和域内关系鸿沟，全局特征对齐方法会扭曲类型语义并破坏拓扑结构。
analysis.problem: 如何在不破坏类型语义和拓扑结构的前提下，实现多域异构图的有效对齐与知识迁移。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 全局对齐方法（如PCA、SVD）会导致类型坍缩和关系混淆，即特征空间共享后类型特异性语义丢失，原始拓扑关系被破坏。
analysis.method: 提出解耦关系子空间对齐（DRSA），通过双关系子空间投影机制协调跨类型交互，并设计特征-结构解耦表示，将对齐特征分解为语义投影分量和结构残差项，采用块坐标下降交替优化。
contributions: 提出DRSA框架，首次将特征语义与关系结构解耦进行异构图对齐。
设计双关系子空间投影和特征-结构解耦表示，有效避免类型坍缩和关系混淆。
实验证明DRSA作为通用预处理模块能显著提升跨域和少样本知识迁移能力。
analysis.experiments: 在多个真实世界基准数据集上进行了实验，DRSA可无缝集成到现有GFM中，显著且一致地提升跨域和少样本知识迁移性能。代码已开源。
limitations: 可能依赖关系子空间的低秩假设，对高度非低秩的图结构效果有限。
交替优化策略可能增加计算开销，大规模图上的效率需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高，实验验证充分，但属于图学习领域，与当前重点方向相关性中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出解耦关系子空间对齐方法DRSA，解决异构图基础模型中的类型坍缩和关系混淆问题。

papers.title: Seeking Information with RAG-Assistants: Does Model Size Matter in Human-AI Collaborations?
papers.abstract: Much research on LLMs has focused on increasing benchmark performance. However, the evaluation of such models in real-world collaborative human-AI workflows has stayed behind. This work evaluates a chatbot-style assistant based on Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) in a realistic multi-turn information-seeking scenario inspired by workplace settings where compliance with local legislation and secure handling of sensitive data are often key. Specifically, we examine the performance of humans (N=112) assisted by RAG-assistants compared to LLM-only or LLM+RAG baselines. In this setting, we investigate how underlying model size (3B, 8B, and 70B) shapes the human-AI collaborative dynamic and how it influences perceived usability and satisfaction. Results show that the performance gain of human-AI collaboration over the model-only baselines is significant, irrespective of model size, suggesting that hybrid systems are beneficial in information-seeking scenarios. Interestingly, however, perceived usability and satisfaction among participants showed little difference across model sizes. This demonstrates a nuanced trade-off between model size, performance, and user perception. Our work highlights the added value of evaluating AI applications in actual multi-turn interactions with human users, looking at usability and satisfaction besides accuracy, rather than focusing on benchmark performance only.

analysis.tldr: 在RAG辅助的信息检索场景中，模型大小对协作性能影响显著，但对用户感知影响不大。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM研究多聚焦于基准性能，缺乏对真实人机协作场景中模型大小影响的评估。
analysis.problem: 评估RAG辅助的聊天机器人在多轮信息检索任务中，模型大小如何影响人机协作性能及用户感知。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，无论模型大小，人机协作性能均显著优于纯模型基线；但用户感知的可用性和满意度在不同模型大小间差异很小。
analysis.method: 构建基于RAG的聊天助手，在模拟工作场景的多轮信息检索任务中，比较3B、8B、70B三种模型大小下的人机协作表现，并与纯LLM和LLM+RAG基线对比。
contributions: 揭示了RAG辅助下模型大小对人机协作性能有显著影响，但对用户感知影响有限。
强调了在真实多轮交互中评估AI应用的重要性，而非仅依赖基准性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定信息检索场景，泛化性未知。
用户感知测量可能受任务复杂度影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 研究关注人机协作中模型大小的影响，有一定实际意义，但方法较常规，实验细节不足。
