papers.title: Predicting Euler Characteristics and Constructing Topological Structure Using Machine Learning Techniques
papers.abstract: This study proposes a novel approach to extract topological properties, specifically the Euler characteristic, from input images using neural networks without relying on large pre-existing datasets but with a single geometric image. Inspired by solid-state physics, where topological properties of magnetic structures are derived from spin field analysis, our model generates a unit vector field from an image, interpreted as a spin configuration. The Euler characteristic is then predicted by computing the skyrmion number of this generated spin configuration. Remarkably, the network learns to construct chiral magnetic textures without access to ground-truth chiral spin configurations, relying instead on only a single, simple geometric image and the straightforward skyrmion number computation. Furthermore, spin configurations generated by independently trained networks can be non-unique due to inherent degrees of freedom. To constrain these degrees of freedom and further refine the spin configuration, we incorporate a magnetic Hamiltonian, comprising exchange interaction, Dzyaloshinskii-Moriya (DM) interaction, and anisotropy, as an additional, physics-informed loss function. We validate the model's efficacy on complex geometrical shapes and demonstrate its applicability to practical tasks.

analysis.tldr: 用神经网络从单张几何图像预测欧拉示性数，并借助物理损失生成手性磁纹理。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统拓扑性质提取依赖大规模数据集或复杂计算，而固体物理中拓扑性质源于自旋场分析，启发我们探索从单张图像直接预测拓扑不变量。
analysis.problem: 如何仅用单张几何图像，通过神经网络预测欧拉示性数并构建对应的拓扑结构（手性磁纹理）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 网络能仅从单张简单几何图像和斯格明子数计算学习生成手性磁纹理，且独立训练的网络因内在自由度会产生非唯一自旋构型。
analysis.method: 神经网络从输入图像生成单位矢量场（自旋构型），计算斯格明子数作为欧拉示性数预测；引入磁哈密顿量（交换、DM相互作用、各向异性）作为物理损失约束自由度。
contributions: 提出无需大规模数据集、仅用单张几何图像预测欧拉示性数的新方法。
通过物理损失函数约束生成的自旋构型，使其更符合实际磁结构。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅验证了简单几何形状，复杂场景泛化性未知。
非唯一解问题可能仍需更严格的约束。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.reason: 方法新颖但应用领域较窄，实验细节不足，适合对拓扑物理与ML交叉感兴趣的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用神经网络从单张几何图像预测欧拉示性数，并借助物理损失生成手性磁纹理。

papers.title: Exploring the Limits of End-to-End Feature-Affinity Propagation for Single-Point Supervised Infrared Small Target Detection
papers.abstract: Single-point supervised infrared small target detection (IRSTD) drastically reduces dense annotation costs. Current state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods achieve high precision by recovering mask supervision through explicit, offline pseudo-label construction, such as multi-stage active learning and physics-driven mask generation. In this paper, we study a minimalist alternative: generating point-to-mask supervision online through in-batch, point-anchored feature-affinity propagation. We instantiate this paradigm as GSACP, an end-to-end testbed that directly supervises the detector using hard-margin feature affinity gated by local image priors, entirely eliminating external label-evolution loops. This compact design, however, exposes an optimization bottleneck. Because the affinity target is generated from the same feature representation being optimized, training forms a self-referential loop. We theoretically formalize this as \emph{Self-Referential Propagation Drift}, a representation-supervision entanglement that can sharpen true boundaries or distort the feature space to satisfy its own targets. To systematically isolate these failure modes, we apply a protocolized single-variable ablation procedure spanning local EMA teacher decoupling, hard-background contrastive separation, and adaptive support geometry. On the SIRST3 dataset, GSACP-Final establishes a new ultra-low false-alarm operating regime, achieving a highly competitive $0.6674$ mIoU while demonstrating a $38\% relative reduction in false-positive artifacts ($\mathrm{Fa}$) compared with PAL. By systematically deconstructing the end-to-end paradigm, we map its performance boundaries and show that in-batch feature propagation provides a compact alternative for deployment scenarios where false-alarm suppression is paramount.

analysis.tldr: 提出端到端特征亲和传播方法GSACP用于单点监督红外小目标检测，揭示自参考传播漂移瓶颈，并通过消融实验实现低虚警率。
analysis.research_motivation: 单点监督红外小目标检测可大幅降低密集标注成本，但现有SOTA方法依赖显式离线伪标签构建（如多阶段主动学习），流程复杂。探索更简洁的在线点对掩码监督生成方案具有实际部署价值。
analysis.problem: 如何通过端到端特征亲和传播实现单点监督到掩码的在线生成，并解决训练中因自参考循环导致的表示-监督纠缠问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要揭示了自参考传播漂移现象：由于亲和目标与优化特征来自同一表示，训练形成自参考循环，可能导致边界锐化或特征空间扭曲以满足自身目标。
analysis.method: 提出GSACP，一种端到端测试平台，通过硬间隔特征亲和与局部图像先验门控直接监督检测器，消除外部标签演化循环；并通过协议化单变量消融（局部EMA教师解耦、硬背景对比分离、自适应支持几何）系统隔离失败模式。
contributions: 首次形式化单点监督红外小目标检测中的自参考传播漂移问题。
提出GSACP端到端框架，实现无外部伪标签演化的在线点对掩码传播。
在SIRST3数据集上实现超低虚警率，mIoU达0.6674，虚警伪影相对降低38%。
analysis.experiments: 在SIRST3数据集上评估，GSACP-Final达到0.6674 mIoU，虚警伪影（Fa）相比PAL降低38%。摘要未提供更多实验细节。
limitations: 方法仅在单一数据集SIRST3上验证，泛化性未知。
自参考传播漂移的理论分析可能依赖特定假设，实际场景中其他失败模式未覆盖。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，理论分析深入，实验效果显著，但仅单数据集验证，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出端到端特征亲和传播方法GSACP用于单点监督红外小目标检测，揭示自参考传播漂移瓶颈，并通过消融实验实现低虚警率。

papers.title: Towards Improving Speaker Distance Estimation through Generative Impulse Response Augmentation
papers.abstract: The Room Acoustics and Speaker Distance Estimation (SDE) Challenge at ICASSP 2025 explores the effectiveness of augmented room impulse response (RIR) data for improving SDE model performance. This challenge at GenDARA involves generating RIRs to supplement sparse datasets and fine-tuning SDE models with the augmented data. We employ the open-source fast diffuse room impulse response generator (FastRIR) conditioned only on speaker and listener locations. We design a quality filter to ensure generated RIR alignment with challenge RIRs, and hyperparameter optimization is employed for model fine-tuning. Our approach reduces the mean absolute error (MAE) of the five positions from 1.66m to 0.6m for GWA rooms and from 2.18m to 0.69m for Treble rooms, with results demonstrating that the augmentation approach significantly improves estimation accuracy, particularly at medium to long distances.

analysis.tldr: 通过生成式房间脉冲响应数据增强，显著提升扬声器距离估计精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 房间声学和扬声器距离估计（SDE）任务中，真实房间脉冲响应（RIR）数据稀疏且采集成本高，限制了模型性能。
analysis.problem: 如何利用生成式RIR数据增强来提升SDE模型在稀疏数据下的估计精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用开源FastRIR生成器基于扬声器和听者位置生成RIR，设计质量过滤器筛选与挑战数据对齐的样本，并通过超参数优化微调SDE模型。
contributions: 提出一种基于生成式RIR数据增强的SDE方法，仅需位置条件即可生成数据。
设计质量过滤器确保生成RIR与真实数据对齐，并通过超参数优化提升微调效果。
analysis.experiments: 在GWA和Treble房间的五个位置上，MAE分别从1.66m降至0.6m和从2.18m降至0.69m，表明方法在中远距离上显著提升精度。
limitations: 仅依赖位置条件，可能忽略其他声学因素。
质量过滤器的设计可能依赖特定挑战数据，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法简单有效，但创新性一般，适合音频相关研究者阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过生成式房间脉冲响应数据增强，显著提升扬声器距离估计精度。

papers.title: Unpaired Image Deraining Using Reward-Guided Self-Reinforcement Strategy
papers.abstract: Unsupervised deraining has attracted attention for its ability to learn the real-world distribution of rain without paired supervision. However, the lack of strong constraints makes it difficult for the network to converge, especially with the complex diversity of rain degradation. A key motivation is that high-quality deraining results occasionally emerge during training, which can be leveraged to guide the optimization process. To overcome these challenges, we introduce RGSUD (Reward-Guided Self-Reinforcement Unsupervised Image Deraining), comprising two key stages: reward recycling and self-reinforcement (SR) training. For the former stage, we propose an Image Quality Assessment (IQA)-based dynamic reward recycling mechanism that selects optimal derained outputs during training and continuously collects high-quality deraining images. In latter stage, we incorporate these rewards into the model's optimization process, constraining the optimization space and improving alignment between derained outputs and clean images. By leveraging IQA-based self-reinforced loss and dynamically updated rewards, we enhance the quality of synthesized pseudo-paired data and stabilize the optimization. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves SOTA performance across multiple datasets, including paired synthetic, paired real, and unpaired real images, outperforming existing unsupervised deraining approaches in both subjective and objective IQA metrics. Additionally, we show that the self-reinforcement strategy is adaptable to other unsupervised deraining methods and our deraining framework demonstrates strong generalization across existing supervised deraining networks.

analysis.tldr: 提出奖励引导的自强化无监督去雨方法，利用训练中偶现的高质量结果作为奖励指导优化，实现SOTA性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 无监督去雨因缺乏强约束导致网络难以收敛，尤其是面对复杂多样的雨退化时，而训练中偶现的高质量去雨结果可被利用来引导优化。
analysis.problem: 无监督去雨任务中网络收敛困难，缺乏有效约束来对齐去雨输出与干净图像。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 训练过程中偶尔会出现高质量去雨结果，这些结果可作为奖励信号来指导后续优化。
analysis.method: 提出RGSUD，包含奖励回收和自强化训练两阶段：前者基于图像质量评估动态选择高质量去雨结果并回收为奖励；后者将奖励融入优化过程，通过自强化损失约束优化空间。
contributions: 提出基于IQA的动态奖励回收机制，从训练过程中收集高质量去雨图像。
设计自强化训练策略，利用回收奖励稳定优化并提升去雨质量。
在多个数据集上达到SOTA，且自强化策略可迁移至其他无监督去雨方法。
analysis.experiments: 在配对合成、配对真实和未配对真实图像等多个数据集上进行实验，主观和客观IQA指标均优于现有无监督去雨方法。
limitations: 依赖IQA指标的质量，可能受限于IQA的准确性。
自强化策略的收敛性分析尚不充分。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，利用训练中偶现高质量结果作为奖励，实验充分且SOTA，但技术深度中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出奖励引导的自强化无监督去雨方法，利用训练中偶现的高质量结果作为奖励指导优化，实现SOTA性能。

papers.title: Learning Coarse-to-Fine Osteoarthritis Representations under Noisy Hierarchical Labels
papers.abstract: Knee osteoarthritis (OA) assessment involves a natural but often underused label hierarchy: a coarse binary OA decision and a fine-grained Kellgren--Lawrence (KL) severity grade. Existing deep learning studies commonly treat these targets as separate classification problems, either reducing OA assessment to disease presence or directly optimizing noisy ordinal KL labels. In this work, we ask whether this clinical hierarchy can serve as a representation-level supervisory prior. Rather than introducing a complex architecture, we use a deliberately simple dual-head model with a shared encoder and two task-specific heads as a probe of hierarchical supervision. We compare single-OA, single-KL, and dual-head training across multiple 3D backbones under the same test protocol. Beyond standard classification metrics, we perform paired statistical comparisons, analyze latent severity-axis geometry, and examine saliency overlap with cartilage regions. The results show that dual-head supervision produces backbone-dependent gains, with clear improvements in KL-related metrics for selected backbones. More importantly, the gains are accompanied by a more ordered coarse-to-fine latent organization and, for responsive backbones, stronger anatomical alignment of saliency with cartilage. These findings suggest that even simple hierarchical dual-head supervision can reshape disease representations under noisy coarse/fine labels, providing a useful inductive bias for OA diagnosis and severity grading.

analysis.tldr: 简单双头模型利用层级标签监督可改善膝骨关节炎表征，使潜在空间更有序且注意力更对齐软骨。
analysis.research_motivation: 膝骨关节炎评估存在天然的层级标签（粗粒度二元诊断和细粒度KL分级），但现有深度学习方法通常将其视为独立分类问题，未利用层级结构作为监督先验。
analysis.problem: 如何利用层级标签结构作为表征级监督先验，以提升OA诊断和严重程度分级的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 双头监督在部分骨干网络上带来KL相关指标的提升，同时伴随更有序的粗到细潜在组织，以及注意力与软骨区域的更强解剖对齐。
analysis.method: 采用简单双头模型（共享编码器+两个任务特定头），在多个3D骨干网络上比较单OA、单KL和双头训练。
contributions: 提出利用层级标签作为表征级监督先验的简单双头训练框架
通过统计比较、潜在空间分析和注意力对齐分析揭示了双头监督带来的表征改善
analysis.experiments: 在多个3D骨干网络上进行实验，使用标准分类指标、配对统计比较、潜在严重度轴几何分析和注意力与软骨区域重叠分析。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 双头监督的效果依赖于骨干网络，并非所有骨干都受益
仅在OA数据集上验证，泛化性未知

papers.title: Ablation Study of Multimodal Perception, Language Grounding, and Control for Human-Robot Interaction in an Object Detection and Grasping Task
papers.abstract: This manuscript extends our previous multimodal human-robot interaction system by introducing a controlled ablation study of the three modules that most strongly influence end-to-end performance: the large language model used for action extraction, the perception system used for visual grounding, and the controller used for motion execution. The goal is not to redesign the full pipeline, but to isolate the contribution of each component under a common experimental protocol and then evaluate the best combinations end-to-end. We therefore compare three language models, five perception configurations, and three controllers, followed by a second-stage factorial study over the best candidates. The resulting analysis is intended to clarify which choices primarily affect execution time, which primarily affect success rate, and where the largest engineering gains are likely to come from in future revisions of the system.

analysis.tldr: 通过消融实验分析多模态人机交互系统中语言模型、感知系统和控制器对端到端性能的影响。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态人机交互系统性能受多个模块影响，但各模块的独立贡献尚不明确，需要系统性的消融研究来指导未来优化。

contributions: 提出一种系统性的消融实验协议，用于评估多模态HRI系统中各模块的贡献。
通过比较多种语言模型、感知配置和控制器，识别影响执行时间和成功率的关键因素。

papers.title: PhysEdit: Physically-Consistent Region-Aware Image Editing via Adaptive Spatio-Temporal Reasoning
papers.abstract: Image editing instructions are heterogeneous: a color swap, an object insertion, and a physical-action edit all demand different spatial coverage and different reasoning depth, yet existing reasoning-based editors apply a single fixed inference recipe to every instruction. We argue that adaptivity along both the spatial and temporal axes is the missing degree of freedom, and we present PhysEdit, an editing framework built around this principle. PhysEdit introduces two inference-time modules that compose without retraining the backbone. At its core, (1) Complexity-Adaptive Reasoning Depth (CARD) predicts edit complexity directly from the instruction and reference image and allocates the reasoning step count N_r and reasoning-token length r per sample -- turning a previously fixed inference schedule into a conditional-computation problem. CARD is supported by (2) a Spatial Reasoning Mask (SRM) that extracts an instruction-conditioned spatial prior from cross-attention to confine reasoning to regions that semantically require it. On the full 737-case ImgEdit Basic-Edit Suite, PhysEdit delivers a 1.18x wall-clock speedup (64.3s vs. 76.1s per sample) over a strong reasoning baseline while slightly improving instruction adherence (CLIP-T 0.2283 vs. 0.2266, +0.7%) and matching identity preservation within noise (CLIP-I 0.8246 vs. 0.8280). The speedup is category-dependent and reaches 1.52x on appearance-level edits, validating CARD's adaptive allocation as the principal source of efficiency gain. A 30-sample pilot with full ablations isolates the contribution of each module.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应时空推理的图像编辑框架PhysEdit，通过复杂度感知推理深度和空间推理掩码实现高效编辑。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于推理的图像编辑器对所有指令使用固定推理流程，忽略了不同编辑指令在空间覆盖和推理深度上的异构需求，导致效率低下。
analysis.problem: 如何根据编辑指令的复杂度自适应调整推理步数和推理token长度，并限制推理区域，以提升编辑效率和指令遵循度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同编辑指令（如颜色替换、物体插入、物理动作编辑）需要不同的空间覆盖和推理深度，固定推理流程无法最优适配。
analysis.method: 提出PhysEdit框架，包含两个无需重训练骨干的推理时模块：(1) 复杂度自适应推理深度(CARD)，根据指令和参考图像预测编辑复杂度，动态分配推理步数N_r和推理token长度r；(2) 空间推理掩码(SRM)，从交叉注意力中提取指令条件空间先验，将推理限制在语义相关区域。
contributions: 提出自适应时空推理的图像编辑框架PhysEdit，首次将推理调度转化为条件计算问题。
设计CARD和SRM两个模块，无需重训练即可提升效率和指令遵循度。
在ImgEdit Basic-Edit Suite上验证，实现1.18倍加速并略微提升指令遵循度。
analysis.experiments: 在包含737个样本的ImgEdit Basic-Edit Suite上评估，与强推理基线相比，PhysEdit实现1.18倍加速（每样本64.3s vs 76.1s），指令遵循度（CLIP-T 0.2283 vs 0.2266，+0.7%），身份保持（CLIP-I 0.8246 vs 0.8280）基本持平。外观级编辑加速达1.52倍。30样本消融实验验证各模块贡献。
limitations: 摘要未提及对复杂场景或长指令的泛化能力。
可能依赖特定骨干模型，迁移性未验证。

papers.title: Static and Dynamic Graph Alignment Network for Temporal Video Grounding
papers.abstract: Temporal Video Grounding (TVG) aims to localize temporal moments in an untrimmed video that semantically correspond to given natural language queries. Recently, Graph Convolutional Networks (GCN) have been widely adopted in TVG to model temporal relations among video clips and enhance contextual reasoning by constructing clip-level graphs. Despite their effectiveness, existing GCN-based TVG methods encounter three critical bottlenecks: 1) Most methods construct graph nodes using either static or dynamic features alone, resulting in incomplete visual representation and overlooking complementary semantics, 2) Most methods construct temporal graphs in a query-agnostic manner, leading to inefficient feature interaction within the temporal graph representation, and 3) Most methods often suffer from a single-granularity semantic matching, while direct training on complex temporal localization task may lead to slow convergence and suboptimal precision. To address these challenges, we propose Static and Dynamic Graph Alignment Network (SDGAN). First, SDGAN jointly exploits static and dynamic visual features to construct two complementary temporal graphs and performs Position-wise Nodes Alignment, enabling more expressive and robust visual representation. Second, SDGAN introduces Query-Clip Contrastive Learning and Adaptive Graph Modeling to explicitly align visual clips with their corresponding textual queries, yielding query-aware visual representations. Third, SDGAN incorporates multi-granularity temporal proposals within Progressive Easy-to-Hard Training Strategy, effectively bridging coarse-grained semantic localization and fine-grained temporal boundary refinement. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate that SDGAN achieves superior performance across complex TVG scenarios. Codes and datasets are available at https://github.com/ZhanJieHu/SDGAN.

analysis.tldr: 提出静态与动态图对齐网络（SDGAN），通过联合利用静态和动态特征、查询-片段对比学习及渐进式训练策略，提升时序视频定位性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于GCN的时序视频定位方法存在三个瓶颈：仅使用静态或动态特征导致视觉表示不完整、查询无关的图构建导致特征交互低效、单粒度语义匹配导致收敛慢和精度次优。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合静态与动态视觉特征、实现查询感知的图建模以及多粒度语义对齐，以提升时序视频定位的准确性和鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有GCN方法在TVG中因特征单一、查询无关和单粒度匹配而性能受限。
analysis.method: 提出SDGAN，包含位置节点对齐联合利用静态与动态特征构建互补时序图；查询-片段对比学习与自适应图建模实现查询感知表示；渐进式难易训练策略融合多粒度时序提案。
contributions: 提出SDGAN，通过位置节点对齐联合静态与动态特征，增强视觉表示的表达力和鲁棒性。
引入查询-片段对比学习和自适应图建模，实现查询感知的视觉表示。
设计渐进式难易训练策略，结合多粒度时序提案，提升粗粒度定位和细粒度边界细化。
analysis.experiments: 在三个基准数据集上进行了大量实验，SDGAN在复杂TVG场景中取得了优越性能。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能对长视频或极细粒度边界定位仍有挑战。
渐进式训练策略可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高，针对TVG的三个瓶颈提出系统解决方案，实验充分，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出静态与动态图对齐网络（SDGAN），通过联合利用静态和动态特征、查询-片段对比学习及渐进式训练策略，提升时序视频定位性能。

papers.title: Foundation AI Models for Aerosol Optical Depth Estimation from PACE Satellite Data
papers.abstract: Aerosol Optical Depth (AOD) retrieval is essential for Earth observation, supporting applications from air quality monitoring to climate studies. Conventional physics-based AOD retrieval methods formulate the problem as a pixel-wise inversion, relying on radiative transfer modeling, memory-intensive look-up tables, and auxiliary meteorological data. While recent data-driven approaches have shown promise, many fail to exploit the spatial-spectral coherence of hyperspectral imagery, leading to spatially inconsistent and noise-sensitive retrievals. We present the first study exploring Foundation AI models for AOD retrieval and propose ViTCG, a Vision Transformer with Channel-wise Grouping-based spatial regression framework that reduces retrieval bias and error. ViTCG uses hyperspectral top-of-atmosphere radiance as input and jointly models spatial context and spectral information. Validation with PACE radiance observations demonstrates a 62% reduction in mean squared error compared to state-of-the-art foundation models, including Prithvi, and produces spatially coherent AOD fields.

analysis.tldr: 提出ViTCG，首个用于AOD反演的基础AI模型，利用Vision Transformer和通道分组回归，在PACE卫星数据上MSE降低62%。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统AOD反演依赖物理模型和查找表，计算成本高且难以利用高光谱图像的空间-光谱一致性；现有数据驱动方法对噪声敏感且空间不一致。
analysis.problem: 如何利用基础AI模型从高光谱卫星数据中准确、空间一致地反演气溶胶光学厚度（AOD）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ViTCG，使用Vision Transformer架构，通过通道分组（Channel-wise Grouping）进行空间回归，以高光谱大气顶辐亮度为输入，联合建模空间上下文和光谱信息。
contributions: 首次将基础AI模型应用于AOD反演任务。
提出ViTCG框架，利用通道分组和空间回归提升反演精度和空间一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在PACE卫星辐射观测数据上验证，与Prithvi等基础模型相比，均方误差降低62%。
limitations: 仅针对AOD单一参数，未扩展到其他气溶胶或大气参数。
依赖PACE卫星数据，泛化到其他传感器需进一步验证。

analysis.reason: 首次将基础模型用于AOD反演，方法创新且效果显著，但应用领域较专。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ViTCG，首个用于AOD反演的基础AI模型，利用Vision Transformer和通道分组回归，在PACE卫星数据上MSE降低62%。

papers.title: DMDSC: A Dynamic-Margin Deep Simplex Classifier for Open-Set Recognition on Medical Image Datasets
papers.abstract: Medical imaging datasets are often characterized by extreme class imbalances, where rare pathologies are significantly underrepresented compared to common conditions. This imbalance poses a dual challenge for Open-Set Recognition (OSR): models must maintain high classification accuracy on known classes while reliably rejecting unknown samples unseen during training in the clinical settings. While recently proposed Deep Simplex Classifier (DSC)~\cite{cevikalp2024reaching} and UnCertainty-aware Deep Simplex Classifier (UCDSC)~\cite{Aditya_2026_WACV} successfully leverage Neural Collapse to ensure maximal inter-class separation, they rely on a uniform margin that does not account for the varying densities of medical classes. In this paper, we propose DMDSC an enhanced framework featuring a dynamic margin approach. Our approach automatically adapts class-specific margins based on label frequency, enforcing a higher penalty and tighter feature clustering for rare pathologies to counteract the effects of data imbalance. Extensive experiments conducted on diverse medical benchmarks on BloodMNIST\cite{medmnistv2}, OCTMNIST\cite{medmnistv2}, DermaMNIST\cite{medmnistv2}, and BreaKHis~\cite{spanhol2015dataset} datasets, demonstrate that our framework outperforms state-of-the-art methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出动态边距深度单纯形分类器，通过自适应类特定边距提升医学图像开放集识别中罕见病理的检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学影像数据集常存在极端类别不平衡，罕见病理样本稀少，而现有开放集识别方法（如DSC、UCDSC）使用统一边距，无法适应不同类别密度，导致罕见类性能下降。
analysis.problem: 解决开放集识别中类别不平衡问题，即如何在保持已知类高分类精度的同时，可靠拒绝未知样本，并提升罕见病理的识别能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有深度单纯形分类器依赖统一边距，未考虑医学类别密度差异，导致罕见病理的特征聚类松散、分类边界不优。
analysis.method: 提出DMDSC框架，采用动态边距方法，根据标签频率自动调整类特定边距，对罕见病理施加更高惩罚并强制更紧致的特征聚类，以抵消数据不平衡的影响。
contributions: 提出动态边距机制，自适应调整类特定边距以应对类别不平衡。
在多个医学基准数据集上超越现有最先进方法。
analysis.experiments: 在BloodMNIST、OCTMNIST、DermaMNIST和BreaKHis四个医学数据集上进行实验，结果表明所提框架优于现有方法。
limitations: 动态边距的调整策略可能对噪声标签敏感。
方法在极端不平衡场景下的泛化性有待进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法针对医学图像开放集识别中的类别不平衡问题，创新性中等，实验在多个数据集上验证，但摘要未提供具体数值结果。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出动态边距深度单纯形分类器，通过自适应类特定边距提升医学图像开放集识别中罕见病理的检测性能。

papers.title: Augmented Lagrangian Multiplier Network for State-wise Safety in Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Safety is a primary challenge in real-world reinforcement learning (RL). Formulating safety requirements as state-wise constraints has become a prominent paradigm. Handling state-wise constraints with the Lagrangian method requires a distinct multiplier for every state, necessitating neural networks to approximate them as a multiplier network. However, applying standard dual gradient ascent to multiplier networks induces severe training oscillations. This is because the inherent instability of dual ascent is exacerbated by network generalization -- local overshoots and delayed updates propagate to adjacent states, further amplifying policy fluctuations. Existing stabilization techniques are designed for scalar multipliers, which are inadequate for state-dependent multiplier networks. To address this challenge, we propose an augmented Lagrangian multiplier network (ALaM) framework for stable learning of state-wise multipliers. ALaM consists of two key components. First, a quadratic penalty is introduced into the augmented Lagrangian to compensate for delayed multiplier updates and establish the local convexity near the optimum, thereby mitigating policy oscillations. Second, the multiplier network is trained via supervised regression toward a dual target, which stabilizes training and promotes convergence. Theoretically, we show that ALaM guarantees multiplier convergence and thus recovers the optimal policy of the constrained problem. Building on this framework, we integrate soft actor-critic (SAC) with ALaM to develop the SAC-ALaM algorithm. Experiments demonstrate that SAC-ALaM outperforms state-of-the-art safe RL baselines in both safety and return, while also stabilizing training dynamics and learning well-calibrated multipliers for risk identification.

analysis.tldr: 提出增广拉格朗日乘子网络（ALaM）框架，通过二次惩罚和回归目标稳定状态相关乘子网络训练，实现安全强化学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实世界强化学习面临安全挑战，状态级约束需要为每个状态分配独立乘子，但标准对偶梯度上升在乘子网络上导致严重训练振荡，现有稳定技术仅适用于标量乘子。
analysis.problem: 如何稳定训练状态相关的乘子网络，避免对偶上升的不稳定性和网络泛化导致的振荡，从而有效解决状态级约束安全强化学习问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准对偶梯度上升应用于乘子网络时，局部过冲和延迟更新会传播到相邻状态，加剧策略波动，导致训练振荡。
analysis.method: 提出增广拉格朗日乘子网络（ALaM），包含两个关键组件：1）在增广拉格朗日中引入二次惩罚项，补偿延迟乘子更新并建立局部凸性；2）通过监督回归训练乘子网络逼近对偶目标，稳定训练并促进收敛。
contributions: 提出ALaM框架，首次实现状态相关乘子网络的稳定学习，理论保证乘子收敛并恢复最优策略。
集成SAC开发SAC-ALaM算法，实验证明其在安全性和回报上超越现有方法，同时稳定训练动态并学习良好校准的乘子用于风险识别。
analysis.experiments: 在多个安全强化学习基准上，SAC-ALaM在安全性和回报方面均优于最先进的基线方法，并稳定了训练动态。
limitations: 可能依赖增广拉格朗日超参数选择。
理论分析可能限于特定假设条件。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，理论分析与实验验证充分，对安全RL领域有重要贡献。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出增广拉格朗日乘子网络（ALaM）框架，通过二次惩罚和回归目标稳定状态相关乘子网络训练，实现安全强化学习。

papers.title: Prediction of Alzheimer's Disease Risk Factors from Retinal Images via Deep Learning: Development and Validation of Biologically Relevant Morphological Associations in the UK Biobank
papers.abstract: The systemic, metabolic, lifestyle factors have established associations with Alzheimer's Disease (AD) through epidemiologic and AD-specific biomarker studies. Whether colored fundus photography (CFP) contains retinal structural signatures corresponding to these AD-related risk domains remains unclear. To determine whether deep learning (DL) models can predict 12 AD-related risk factors from CFP and to characterize the retinal structures underlying these predictions, thereby assessing whether CFP reflects pathways to AD vulnerability. Using UK Biobank CFPs, DL models were trained using 62,876 images from 44,501 unique participants to predict 12 factors linked to AD incidence: 6 categorical (sex, smoking, sleeplessness, economic status, alcohol use, depression) and 6 continuous (age, age at completing education, BMI, systolic, diastolic blood pressure, HbA1c). Model performance, model saliency, and saliency-derived scores (CAM-Score) were evaluated and compared to retinal morphometry. The scores were also compared between incident-AD cases (average 8.55 years before onset) and matched controls. Performance of DL ranged from AUROC= 0.5654-0.9480 for categorical and R2=-0.0291-0.7620 for continuous factors, outperforming most of the morphometry-machine learning models. Saliency-based score consistently highlighted biologically meaningful regions, particularly the optic nerve head and retinal vasculature. It also aligned with present morphometric variations. Several saliency-based scores differed significantly between incident AD and matched controls, suggesting potential overlap between retinal correlates of risk factors and preclinical AD-associated changes. CFP encodes retinal signatures linked to AD risk factors. Although not diagnostic, DL-derived retinal representations may uncover biologically meaningful risk-related structural changes mirroring the potential AD vulnerability.

analysis.tldr: 深度学习可从视网膜眼底照片预测阿尔茨海默病风险因素，并揭示与风险相关的视网膜结构特征。
analysis.research_motivation: 阿尔茨海默病（AD）与多种系统性、代谢性和生活方式风险因素相关，但彩色眼底摄影（CFP）是否包含对应这些风险因素的视网膜结构特征尚不清楚。探索CFP能否通过深度学习反映AD易感性通路，具有早期筛查和风险分层的重要应用价值。
analysis.problem: 确定深度学习模型能否从CFP预测12个AD相关风险因素（6个分类、6个连续），并表征预测所依据的视网膜结构，评估CFP是否反映AD易感性的视网膜通路。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用UK Biobank的62,876张CFP图像（44,501名参与者）训练深度学习模型，预测12个AD相关风险因素；通过模型显著性图和CAM-Score评估预测依据的视网膜区域，并与视网膜形态测量及AD发病病例进行对比。
contributions: 首次系统证明深度学习可从CFP预测多种AD风险因素，性能优于传统形态测量-机器学习模型。
基于显著性的评分揭示了与风险因素相关的生物学意义区域（如视神经头、视网膜血管），且这些评分在AD发病前8.55年与对照组存在显著差异，提示风险因素与AD前驱期变化的视网膜重叠。
analysis.experiments: 在UK Biobank数据集上训练和验证，分类因素AUROC为0.5654-0.9480，连续因素R²为-0.0291-0.7620；与形态测量-机器学习模型比较；在AD发病病例与匹配对照中比较显著性评分。
limitations: 模型性能对部分因素（如HbA1c）较低，R²为负值，预测能力有限。
研究基于UK Biobank人群，泛化性需在其他队列验证。
仅关联而非因果，视网膜变化与AD风险因素的关系需进一步机制研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高（首次系统预测多种AD风险因素并分析视网膜结构），应用价值强（AD早期筛查），但部分性能有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 深度学习可从视网膜眼底照片预测阿尔茨海默病风险因素，并揭示与风险相关的视网膜结构特征。

papers.title: InpaintSLat: Inpainting Structured 3D Latents via Initial Noise Optimization
papers.abstract: We present a training-free approach for controllable 3D inpainting based on initial noise optimization. In the structured 3D latent diffusion framework, we observe that the underlying geometric structure is established during the early stages of the diffusion process and exhibits high sensitivity to the initial noise. Such characteristics compromise stability in tasks like inpainting and editing, where the model must ensure strict alignment with the existing context while synthesizing a new structure. In this paper, we introduce a strategy to optimize the initial noise within the structured 3D latent diffusion framework, ensuring high-fidelity 3D inpainting. Specifically, we update the initial noise by leveraging a backpropagation approximation grounded in the rectified flow model, with the spectral parameterization specially designed for robust and efficient structured 3D latent optimization. Experiments demonstrate consistent improvements in contextual consistency and prompt alignment over representative training-free inpainting baselines, establishing initial noise control as an independent dimension for 3D inpainting, orthogonal to conventional sampling trajectory manipulation.

analysis.tldr: 通过优化初始噪声实现无需训练的3D修复，在结构化3D潜扩散框架中提升上下文一致性与提示对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D修复方法依赖训练或采样轨迹操控，但结构化3D潜扩散中几何结构在扩散早期建立且对初始噪声敏感，导致修复时上下文对齐不稳定。
analysis.problem: 如何在无需额外训练的条件下，在结构化3D潜扩散框架中实现高保真、上下文一致的3D修复。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到结构化3D潜扩散中底层几何结构在扩散早期建立，且对初始噪声高度敏感，这破坏了修复和编辑任务中严格对齐现有上下文的稳定性。
analysis.method: 基于初始噪声优化的无训练方法：在结构化3D潜扩散框架中，利用基于整流流模型的反向传播近似更新初始噪声，并采用频谱参数化实现鲁棒高效的优化。
contributions: 提出一种无需训练的3D修复方法，通过优化初始噪声实现高保真修复。
揭示了初始噪声控制作为3D修复独立维度的潜力，与常规采样轨迹操控正交。
analysis.experiments: 在代表性无训练修复基线上，方法在上下文一致性和提示对齐方面取得一致改进。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖特定结构化3D潜扩散框架，泛化性未验证。
优化初始噪声的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且无需训练，但实验细节有限，适合精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过优化初始噪声实现无需训练的3D修复，在结构化3D潜扩散框架中提升上下文一致性与提示对齐。

papers.title: Affordance Agent Harness: Verification-Gated Skill Orchestration
papers.abstract: Affordance grounding requires identifying where and how an agent should interact in open-world scenes, where actionable regions are often small, occluded, reflective, and visually ambiguous. Recent systems therefore combine multiple skills (e.g., detection, segmentation, interaction-imagination), yet most orchestrate them with fixed pipelines that are poorly matched to per-instance difficulty, offer limited targeted recovery from intermediate errors, and fail to reuse experience from recurring objects. These failures expose a systems problem: test-time grounding must acquire the right evidence, decide whether that evidence is reliable enough to commit, and do so under bounded inference cost without access to labels. We propose Affordance Agent Harness, a closed-loop runtime that unifies heterogeneous skills with an evidence store and cost control, retrieves episodic memories to provide priors for recurring categories, and employs a Router to adaptively select and parameterize skills. An affordance-specific Verifier then gates commitments using self-consistency, cross-scale stability, and evidence sufficiency, triggering targeted retries before a final judge fuses accumulated evidence and trajectories into the prediction. Experiments on multiple affordance benchmarks and difficulty-controlled subsets show a stronger accuracy-cost Pareto frontier than fixed-pipeline baselines, improving grounding quality while reducing average skill calls and latency. Project page: https://tenplusgood.github.io/a-harness-page/.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种验证门控技能编排框架，通过闭环运行、记忆检索和自适应路由提升开放世界可操作区域定位的准确性与效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有可操作区域定位系统在开放世界场景中面临小、遮挡、反射等视觉挑战，固定流水线无法适应实例难度差异，中间错误难以恢复，且无法复用经验。
analysis.problem: 如何在有限推理成本下，自适应地编排多种技能（检测、分割、交互想象）以准确可靠地定位可操作区域。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 固定流水线在困难实例上表现不佳，中间错误缺乏针对性恢复，且无法利用重复物体的经验。
analysis.method: 提出Affordance Agent Harness，包含证据存储与成本控制、情景记忆检索、路由器自适应选择技能、可操作区域专用验证器（基于自一致性、跨尺度稳定性和证据充分性）门控提交，以及最终判断器融合证据与轨迹。
contributions: 提出验证门控技能编排框架，实现自适应技能选择与错误恢复
引入情景记忆检索为重复类别提供先验
设计可操作区域专用验证器，基于自一致性、跨尺度稳定性和证据充分性进行门控决策
analysis.experiments: 在多个可操作区域基准和难度控制子集上，相比固定流水线基线，实现了更强的准确率-成本帕累托前沿，提高了定位质量并减少了平均技能调用和延迟。
limitations: 可能依赖预定义技能集，对新技能扩展需额外设计
验证器阈值可能需针对不同场景调整

analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验显示效率与质量提升，但应用场景较专，推荐精读。

papers.title: UniVidX: A Unified Multimodal Framework for Versatile Video Generation via Diffusion Priors
papers.abstract: Recent progress has shown that video diffusion models (VDMs) can be repurposed for diverse multimodal graphics tasks. However, existing methods often train separate models for each problem setting, which fixes the input-output mapping and limits the modeling of correlations across modalities. We present UniVidX, a unified multimodal framework that leverages VDM priors for versatile video generation. UniVidX formulates pixel-aligned tasks as conditional generation in a shared multimodal space, adapts to modality-specific distributions while preserving the backbone's native priors, and promotes cross-modal consistency during synthesis. It is built on three key designs. Stochastic Condition Masking (SCM) randomly partitions modalities into clean conditions and noisy targets during training, enabling omni-directional conditional generation instead of fixed mappings. Decoupled Gated LoRA (DGL) introduces per-modality LoRAs that are activated when a modality serves as the generation target, preserving the strong priors of the VDM. Cross-Modal Self-Attention (CMSA) shares keys and values across modalities while keeping modality-specific queries, facilitating information exchange and inter-modal alignment. We instantiate UniVidX in two domains: UniVid-Intrinsic, for RGB videos and intrinsic maps including albedo, irradiance, and normal; and UniVid-Alpha, for blended RGB videos and their constituent RGBA layers. Experiments show that both models achieve performance competitive with state-of-the-art methods across distinct tasks and generalize robustly to in-the-wild scenarios, even when trained on fewer than 1,000 videos. Project page: https://houyuanchen111.github.io/UniVidX.github.io/

analysis.tldr: UniVidX 是一个统一的视频生成框架，利用扩散先验实现跨模态条件生成，在不到1000个视频上训练即达到SOTA性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频扩散模型通常为每个任务训练独立模型，固定了输入输出映射，限制了跨模态相关性建模，缺乏统一框架。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个统一的视频生成框架，使其能够灵活处理多种像素对齐的多模态任务，同时保持跨模态一致性并利用预训练VDM的先验知识。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出UniVidX框架，包含三个关键设计：随机条件掩码（SCM）实现全向条件生成；解耦门控LoRA（DGL）为每个模态保留独立先验；跨模态自注意力（CMSA）促进模态间信息交换。
contributions: 提出UniVidX，一个统一的视频生成框架，利用VDM先验处理多种像素对齐任务。
设计SCM、DGL和CMSA三个模块，分别实现灵活条件生成、先验保持和跨模态对齐。
在RGB-内在图（UniVid-Intrinsic）和RGBA图层（UniVid-Alpha）两个领域实例化，在少于1000个视频上训练即达到SOTA性能。
analysis.experiments: 在RGB-内在图和RGBA图层两个领域进行实验，与SOTA方法比较，并在野外场景中测试泛化能力。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅适用于像素对齐任务，对非对齐任务效果未知。
训练数据量较小（<1000视频），在更大规模数据上的表现未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，统一框架解决多任务，实验显示高效且泛化好，但摘要未提供详细数值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: UniVidX 是一个统一的视频生成框架，利用扩散先验实现跨模态条件生成，在不到1000个视频上训练即达到SOTA性能。

papers.title: Reinforcement Learning with Markov Risk Measures and Multipattern Risk Approximation
papers.abstract: For a risk-averse finite-horizon Markov Decision Problem, we introduce a special class of Markov coherent risk measures, called mini-batch measures. We also define the class of multipattern risk-averse problems that generalizes the class of linear systems. We use both concepts in a feature-based $Q$-learning method with multipattern $Q$-factor approximation and we prove a high-probability regret bound of $\mathcal{O}\big(H^2 N^H \sqrt{ K}\big)$, where $H$ is the horizon, $N$ is the mini-batch size, and $K$ is the number of episodes. We also propose an economical version of the $Q$-learning method that streamlines the policy evaluation (backward) step. The theoretical results are illustrated on a stochastic assignment problem and a short-horizon multi-armed bandit problem.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于马尔可夫风险度量的多模式风险近似Q学习方法，并给出遗憾界。
analysis.research_motivation: 风险敏感的马尔可夫决策问题在金融、机器人等领域有重要应用，但现有方法在处理复杂风险度量时计算成本高，且缺乏理论保证。
analysis.problem: 如何高效求解有限时域风险厌恶马尔可夫决策问题，并保证学习算法的收敛性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 定义mini-batch马尔可夫相干风险度量，提出多模式风险厌恶问题类，并设计基于特征的多模式Q因子近似Q学习方法，同时给出经济版本简化策略评估步骤。
contributions: 引入mini-batch马尔可夫相干风险度量类，扩展了风险度量工具。
定义多模式风险厌恶问题类，推广了线性系统。
提出带多模式Q因子近似的Q学习方法，并证明高概率遗憾界O(H^2 N^H √K)。
提出经济版Q学习方法，简化策略评估步骤。
analysis.experiments: 在随机分配问题和短视多臂老虎机问题上验证理论结果。
limitations: 遗憾界中因子N^H可能随H指数增长，实际应用受限。
方法依赖特征设计，特征选择可能影响性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.reason: 理论贡献扎实，但实验规模较小，适合对风险敏感RL理论感兴趣的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于马尔可夫风险度量的多模式风险近似Q学习方法，并给出遗憾界。

papers.title: AdaMeZO: Adam-style Zeroth-Order Optimizer for LLM Fine-tuning Without Maintaining the Moments
papers.abstract: Fine-tuning LLMs is necessary for various dedicated downstream tasks, but classic backpropagation-based fine-tuning methods require substantial GPU memory. To this end, a recent work, MeZO, which relies solely on forward passes to fine-tune LLMs, significantly reduces GPU requirements at the cost of slower convergence due to its indifference to loss landscapes. Standard solutions, such as Adam, explore loss landscapes by estimating the first- and second-order moments and storing them in memory to guide the model's movement through dimensions with lower curvature and vice versa. However, directly applying Adam negates MeZO's advantage as it will triple the memory requirement. In light of this, we propose AdaMeZO, a zeroth-order optimizer that leverages Adam-style first- and second-moment estimates without maintaining them in memory. We present a theoretical analysis of AdaMeZO, corroborated by extensive experiments demonstrating AdaMeZO's performance, showing that AdaMeZO can outperform MeZO while requiring up to $70\%$ fewer forward passes. Trajectory visualizations affirm AdaMeZO's ability to adapt to diverse loss landscapes.

analysis.tldr: AdaMeZO 是一种无需维护动量的 Adam 式零阶优化器，在 LLM 微调中比 MeZO 快 70% 且收敛更好。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM 微调需要大量 GPU 内存，现有零阶优化器 MeZO 虽省内存但收敛慢，而 Adam 类方法虽能适应损失曲面却需额外存储动量，抵消了内存优势。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持零阶优化器低内存优势的同时，引入 Adam 式的自适应步长来加速 LLM 微调收敛？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: MeZO 对损失曲面不敏感导致收敛慢；Adam 需存储一阶和二阶矩，直接应用会三倍内存开销。
analysis.method: 提出 AdaMeZO，一种零阶优化器，通过随机梯度估计和指数移动平均在线计算 Adam 风格的一阶和二阶矩，但不显式存储这些矩，从而在几乎不增加内存的情况下实现自适应步长。
contributions: 提出 AdaMeZO，首个无需维护矩的 Adam 式零阶优化器，用于 LLM 微调。
理论分析证明 AdaMeZO 的收敛性，实验表明其比 MeZO 减少高达 70% 的前向传播次数，且性能更优。
analysis.experiments: 在多个 LLM 微调任务上进行了广泛实验，包括轨迹可视化，验证了 AdaMeZO 对多样损失曲面的适应能力和效率提升。
limitations: 可能仍需要较多前向传播次数才能达到高精度。
理论分析可能依赖于特定假设，实际泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实用，针对 LLM 微调内存瓶颈提出有效方案，实验充分，推荐精读。

papers.title: Learning Multimodal Energy-Based Model with Multimodal Variational Auto-Encoder via MCMC Revision
papers.abstract: Energy-based models (EBMs) are a flexible class of deep generative models and are well-suited to capture complex dependencies in multimodal data. However, learning multimodal EBM by maximum likelihood requires Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) sampling in the joint data space, where noise-initialized Langevin dynamics often mixes poorly and fails to discover coherent inter-modal relationships. Multimodal VAEs have made progress in capturing such inter-modal dependencies by introducing a shared latent generator and a joint inference model. However, both the shared latent generator and joint inference model are parameterized as unimodal Gaussian (or Laplace), which severely limits their ability to approximate the complex structure induced by multimodal data. In this work, we study the learning problem of the multimodal EBM, shared latent generator, and joint inference model. We present a learning framework that effectively interweaves their MLE updates with corresponding MCMC refinements in both the data and latent spaces. Specifically, the generator is learned to produce coherent multimodal samples that serve as strong initial states for EBM sampling, while the inference model is learned to provide informative latent initializations for generator posterior sampling. Together, these two models serve as complementary models that enable effective EBM sampling and learning, yielding realistic and coherent multimodal EBM samples. Extensive experiments demonstrate superior performance for multimodal synthesis quality and coherence compared to various baselines. We conduct various analyses and ablation studies to validate the effectiveness and scalability of the proposed multimodal framework.

analysis.tldr: 提出MCMC修正框架，联合学习多模态EBM、VAE生成器和推理模型，提升多模态合成质量与一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态EBM的最大似然学习需要MCMC采样，但噪声初始化的Langevin动力学混合差，难以发现模态间一致关系；多模态VAE虽能捕获依赖，但其高斯/拉普拉斯参数化限制了复杂结构近似能力。
analysis.problem: 如何有效学习多模态EBM、共享潜在生成器和联合推理模型，以生成真实且一致的多模态样本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一个学习框架，在数据和潜在空间中交替进行MLE更新和MCMC修正：生成器学习生成一致的多模态样本作为EBM采样的强初始状态；推理模型为生成器后验采样提供信息性潜在初始化。
contributions: 提出联合学习多模态EBM、生成器和推理模型的框架，通过MCMC修正提升采样效率。
在多个数据集上验证了多模态合成质量和一致性的显著提升。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上进行了实验，与多种基线对比，展示了多模态合成质量和一致性的优越性能，并进行了分析和消融研究。
limitations: 可能依赖特定MCMC修正策略，泛化性需进一步验证。

papers.title: Learn where to Click from Yourself: On-Policy Self-Distillation for GUI Grounding
papers.abstract: Graphical User Interface (GUI) grounding maps natural language instructions to the visual coordinates of target elements and serves as a core capability for autonomous GUI agents. Recent reinforcement learning methods (e.g., GRPO) have achieved strong performance, but they rely on expensive multiple rollouts and suffer from sparse signals on hard samples. These limitations make on-policy self-distillation (OPSD), which provides dense token-level supervision from a single rollout, a promising alternative. However, its applicability to GUI grounding remains unexplored. In this paper, we present GUI-SD, the first OPSD framework tailored for GUI grounding. First, it constructs a visually enriched privileged context for the teacher using a target bounding box and a Gaussian soft mask, providing informative guidance without leaking exact coordinates. Second, it employs entropy-guided distillation, which adaptively weights tokens based on digit significance and teacher confidence, concentrating optimization on the most impactful and reliable positions. Extensive experiments on six representative GUI grounding benchmarks show that GUI-SD consistently outperforms GRPO-based methods and naive OPSD in both accuracy and training efficiency. Code and training data are available at https://zhangyan-ucas.github.io/GUI-SD/.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个面向GUI定位的在线策略自蒸馏框架GUI-SD，通过视觉增强特权上下文和熵引导蒸馏提升性能与效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有强化学习方法（如GRPO）在GUI定位中依赖多次采样且对困难样本信号稀疏，而在线策略自蒸馏（OPSD）虽能提供密集监督但尚未被应用于GUI定位，因此探索OPSD在该任务中的潜力具有价值。
analysis.problem: 如何设计适用于GUI定位的在线策略自蒸馏方法，以克服强化学习方法的高成本和稀疏奖励问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出GUI-SD框架，包含两个核心组件：1）视觉增强特权上下文：利用目标边界框和高斯软掩码为教师模型构建信息丰富的视觉上下文，但不泄露精确坐标；2）熵引导蒸馏：根据数字重要性和教师置信度自适应加权token，聚焦于最影响和可靠的位置进行优化。
contributions: 首次将在线策略自蒸馏（OPSD）应用于GUI定位任务，提出GUI-SD框架。

在六个GUI定位基准上验证了GUI-SD相比GRPO方法和朴素OPSD在准确率和训练效率上的优势。
analysis.experiments: 在六个代表性GUI定位基准上进行实验，结果显示GUI-SD在准确率和训练效率上一致优于基于GRPO的方法和朴素OPSD。
limitations: 可能依赖教师模型的质量，若教师模型不准确则蒸馏效果受限。

papers.title: Born-Qualified: An Autonomous Framework for Deploying Advanced Energy and Electronic Materials
papers.abstract: Autonomous science is transforming how we discover materials and chemical systems for advanced energy technologies. However, many initially promising systems never reach deployment. This "valley of death" stems from optimization that prioritizes laboratory metrics over industrial viability. We propose a new strategy: "born-qualified" autonomous development, which embeds manufacturability, cost, and durability constraints from the outset. This approach is enabled by four pillars, including the development of multi-objective metrics, causal models, a modular infrastructure, and embedding manufacturing in the discovery loop. Realizing this vision will require sustained, community-wide commitment, but the potential return on that investment is commensurate with the scale of the challenge.

analysis.tldr: 提出“天生合格”自主框架，将制造性、成本和耐久性约束嵌入材料发现流程，以跨越实验室到部署的“死亡之谷”。

papers.title: Paired-CSLiDAR: Height-Stratified Registration for Cross-Source Aerial-Ground LiDAR Pose Refinement
papers.abstract: We introduce Paired-CSLiDAR (CSLiDAR), a cross-source aerial-ground LiDAR benchmark for single-scan pose refinement: refining a ground-scan pose within a 50 m-radius aerial crop. The benchmark contains 12,683 ground-aerial pairs across 6 evaluation sites and per-scan reference 6-DoF alignments for sub-meter root-mean-square error (RMSE) evaluation. Because aerial scans capture rooftops and canopy while ground scans capture facades and under-canopy, the two modalities share only a fraction of their geometry, primarily the terrain surface, causing standard registration methods and learned correspondence models to converge to metrically incorrect local minima. We propose Residual-Guided Stratified Registration (RGSR), a training-free, geometry-only refinement pipeline that exploits the shared ground plane through height-stratified ICP, reversed registration directions, and confidence-gated accept-if-better selection. RGSR achieves 86.0% S@0.75 m and 99.8% S@1.0 m on the primary benchmark of 9,012 scans, outperforming both the confidence-gated cascade at 83.7% and GeoTransformer at 76.3%. We validate RMSE-based pose selection with independent survey control and trajectory consistency, and show that added Fourier-Mellin BEV proposals can reduce RMSE while increasing actual pose error under extreme partial overlap. The dataset and code are being prepared for public release.

analysis.tldr: 提出跨源空地LiDAR配准基准和无需训练的高度分层配准方法，显著提升地面扫描在航空点云中的位姿精化精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 跨源空地LiDAR数据因扫描视角差异（航空捕获屋顶和冠层，地面捕获立面和冠下）导致几何重叠极小（仅地形面），标准配准方法和学习型对应模型易收敛到度量错误局部极小值，亟需针对该场景的专用基准和配准策略。
analysis.problem: 解决单次扫描位姿精化中，跨源空地LiDAR点云因模态差异大、重叠区域有限（主要为地形面）导致的配准失败问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出航空与地面扫描仅共享地形面，标准配准方法（如GeoTransformer）和级联方法在极端部分重叠下易陷入错误局部极小值；此外，添加傅里叶-梅林BEV提议虽能降低RMSE，但在极端部分重叠下实际位姿误差反而增大。
analysis.method: 提出Residual-Guided Stratified Registration (RGSR)，一种无需训练、仅基于几何的精化流程，通过高度分层ICP、反向配准方向和置信门控的接受-若-更好选择策略，利用共享地面平面。
contributions: 构建Paired-CSLiDAR基准，包含12,683对地面-航空扫描及6自由度参考对齐，用于亚米级RMSE评估。
提出RGSR方法，无需训练，在9,012扫描主基准上达到86.0% S@0.75 m和99.8% S@1.0 m，优于置信门控级联（83.7%）和GeoTransformer（76.3%）。
验证了基于RMSE的位姿选择与独立测量控制及轨迹一致性，并揭示了极端部分重叠下傅里叶-梅林BEV提议的局限性。
analysis.experiments: 在Paired-CSLiDAR基准的9,012扫描主集上评估，RGSR达到86.0% S@0.75 m和99.8% S@1.0 m；对比方法包括置信门控级联（83.7%）和GeoTransformer（76.3%）。额外验证了RMSE位姿选择与独立测量控制及轨迹一致性。
limitations: 方法依赖共享地面平面假设，在无地面或地形剧烈变化场景可能失效。
仅基于几何，未利用语义或强度信息，可能限制在纹理丰富但几何相似场景的性能。

papers.title: Energy-Based Constraint Networks: Learning Structural Coherence Across Modalities
papers.abstract: We introduce energy-based constraint networks -- a modality-agnostic architecture that learns structural coherence from contrastive pairs. The system processes frozen encoder embeddings through a state-space model with dual-head attention, producing a scalar energy measuring structural consistency alongside per-position energy scores that localize violations. Multiple independently trained branches detect different violation types and compose at inference without interference. We demonstrate the framework in two domains. In text, the system achieves 93.4% accuracy on trained corruption types and 87.2% on 9 unseen types, using frozen BERT and 7.4M trainable parameters. In vision, the same architecture achieves competitive deepfake detection: 0.959 AUC on FaceForensics++ Deepfakes and 0.870 on Celeb-DF without any Celeb-DF training data, using frozen DINOv2 and 3.6M parameters per branch. The framework supports flexible training: branches learn from designer-specified corruptions, real-world paired data, or both. Composable branches require representation compatibility -- a finding validated through extensive experimentation where five incompatible approaches failed before the compatible one succeeded. The architecture is encoder-agnostic and domain-agnostic: changing the domain requires only new corruption strategies; changing the encoder requires only a new input projection layer. To our knowledge, this is the first architecture to learn within-modality structural coherence as an explicit energy landscape with per-position decomposition, and to demonstrate that the same architecture transfers across modalities via corruption respecification alone.

analysis.tldr: 提出能量约束网络，通过对比学习跨模态结构一致性，在文本和视觉任务上均取得优异检测性能。

papers.title: BlenderRAG: High-Fidelity 3D Object Generation via Retrieval-Augmented Code Synthesis
papers.abstract: Automatic generation of executable Blender code from natural language remains challenging, with state-of-the-art LLMs producing frequent syntactic errors and geometrically inconsistent objects. We present BlenderRAG, a retrieval-augmented generation system that operates on a curated multimodal dataset of 500 expert-validated examples (text, code, image) across 50 object categories. By retrieving semantically similar examples during generation, BlenderRAG improves compilation success rates from 40.8% to 70.0% and semantic normalized alignment from 0.41 to 0.77 (CLIP similarity) across four state-of-the-art LLMs, without requiring fine-tuning or specialized hardware, making it immediately accessible for deployment. The dataset and code will be available at https://github.com/MaxRondelli/BlenderRAG.

analysis.tldr: 通过检索增强代码合成，无需微调即可大幅提升LLM生成Blender代码的成功率和几何一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 从自然语言自动生成可执行的Blender代码具有挑战性，现有LLM常产生语法错误和几何不一致的对象，限制了3D内容创建的效率。

contributions: 提出BlenderRAG系统，通过检索增强生成提升LLM生成Blender代码的性能。

analysis.experiments: 在四个SOTA LLM上评估，编译成功率从40.8%提升至70.0%，语义归一化对齐（CLIP相似度）从0.41提升至0.77。
limitations: 数据集规模较小（500个示例），可能限制泛化能力。

papers.title: CMTA: Leveraging Cross-Modal Temporal Artifacts for Generalizable AI-Generated Video Detection
papers.abstract: The proliferation of advanced AI video synthesis techniques poses an unprecedented challenge to digital video authenticity. Existing AI-generated video (AIGV) detection methods primarily focus on uni-modal or spatiotemporal artifacts, but they overlook the rich cues within the visual-textual cross-modal space, especially the temporal stability of semantic alignment. In this work, we identify a distinctive fingerprint in AIGVs, termed cross-modal temporal artifact (CMTA). Unlike real videos that exhibit natural temporal fluctuations in cross-modal alignment due to semantic variations, AIGVs display unnaturally stable semantic trajectories governed by given input prompts. To bridge this gap, we propose the CMTA framework, a cross-modal detection approach that captures these unique temporal artifacts through joint cross-modal embedding and multi-grained temporal modeling. Specifically, CMTA leverages BLIP to generate frame-level image captions and utilizes CLIP to extract corresponding visual-textual representations. A coarse-grained temporal modeling branch is then designed to characterize temporal fluctuations in cross-modal alignment with a GRU. In parallel, a fine-grained branch is constructed to capture intricate inter-frame variations from integrated visual-textual features with a Transformer encoder. Extensive experiments on 40 subsets across four large-scale datasets, including GenVideo, EvalCrafter, VideoPhy, and VidProM, validate that our approach sets a new state-of-the-art while exhibiting superior cross-generator generalization. Code and models of CMTA will be released at https://github.com/hwang-cs-ime/CMTA

analysis.tldr: 提出跨模态时间伪影（CMTA）框架，利用视觉-文本对齐的时间稳定性差异检测AI生成视频。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AIGV检测方法主要关注单模态或时空伪影，忽略了视觉-文本跨模态空间中丰富的线索，尤其是语义对齐的时间稳定性。
analysis.problem: 如何利用跨模态时间伪影（CMTA）实现通用且可泛化的AI生成视频检测。

analysis.method: CMTA框架：使用BLIP生成帧级图像描述，CLIP提取视觉-文本表示；粗粒度分支用GRU建模跨模态对齐的时间波动，细粒度分支用Transformer编码器捕捉帧间变化。
contributions: 首次识别并利用跨模态时间伪影（CMTA）作为AIGV检测的通用指纹。

analysis.experiments: 在GenVideo、EvalCrafter、VideoPhy和VidProM四个数据集共40个子集上评估，达到新SOTA并展现跨生成器泛化性。
limitations: 依赖BLIP和CLIP等预训练模型，可能受限于其能力。

papers.title: "I Don't Know" -- Towards Appropriate Trust with Certainty-Aware Retrieval Augmented Generation
papers.abstract: Achieving the right amount of trust in AI systems is important, but challenging. The problem is exacerbated with the rise of Large Language Models (LLMs) as they provide human-level communication capabilities, but potentially hallucinate in the content that they generate. Moreover, they express over-confidence in their answers, making it difficult for users to judge their truthfulness. An important human value that users seek is benevolence, which can be met by LLM's self-reflection leading to reliable and honest answers. Accordingly, this paper proposes conveying appropriate levels of self-reflected certainty to build appropriate trust. Our contributions are twofold: 1) We develop CERTA (Certainty Enhanced RAG for Trustworthy Answers), a specialized Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) system that incorporates the relevance between question, context, and answer to reflect its uncertainty in answering questions; 2) We create the Certainty Benchmark with 90 question-context pairs of non-objective questions, divided over four categories (factuality, preference, sycophancy, morality) and three types of contexts (relevant, incomplete, irrelevant). We run experiments with a baseline RAG system and three CERTA settings using two LLMs. Our evaluations indicate that CERTA helps identify answers that are uncertain, decreases the cases of over-agreeing, and provides cautious behavior when prompted for moral judgments.

analysis.tldr: 提出 CERTA 系统，通过感知不确定性的检索增强生成来校准用户对 LLM 的信任。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM 虽然具备人类级沟通能力，但可能产生幻觉且过度自信，导致用户难以判断回答的真实性，需要建立恰当的信任。
analysis.problem: 如何让 LLM 在回答中表达适当的自我反思确定性，以帮助用户建立恰当的信任。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM 存在过度自信和幻觉问题，用户难以判断回答的真实性；现有 RAG 系统未充分表达不确定性。
analysis.method: 开发 CERTA 系统，在 RAG 中融入问题、上下文和答案之间的相关性来反映不确定性；并构建包含 90 个非客观问题-上下文对的确定性基准。
contributions: 提出 CERTA，一种专门的不确定性感知 RAG 系统，通过相关性建模表达不确定性。
创建确定性基准，包含事实性、偏好、谄媚、道德四类非客观问题及三种上下文类型。
analysis.experiments: 使用两个 LLM 在基线 RAG 和三种 CERTA 设置下进行实验，评估表明 CERTA 有助于识别不确定答案、减少过度同意，并在道德判断时提供谨慎行为。
limitations: 基准规模较小（90 对），可能不足以全面评估。
仅针对非客观问题，客观问题场景未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法有创新性，但实验规模较小，与安全对齐方向相关，建议阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 CERTA 系统，通过感知不确定性的检索增强生成来校准用户对 LLM 的信任。

papers.title: E-MIA: Exam-Style Black-Box Membership Inference Attacks against RAG Systems
papers.abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) equips large language models (LLMs) with external evidence by retrieving documents at inference time, but it also turns the retrieval corpusinto a sensitive asset. Under a black-box setting, an adversary given a candidate document can infer whether it has been ingested into the RAG knowledge base (i.e., document-level membership inference) solely from query response interactions, thereby leaking corpus coverage and the existence of sensitive topics. Existing RAG MIA methods either rely on soft signals such as semantic similarity, which often yield overlapping member/non-member score distributions and unstable thresholds, or employ explicit confirmation probes whose intent is conspicuous and thus prone to refusal and detection. We propose E-MIA, which converts verifiable hard evidence in the target document (e.g., fine-grained details, proper nouns/technical terms, definitional statements, metadata cues, and causal/constraint relations) into an exam with four objectively gradable question types (FB/SC/MC/T/F), and uses the aggregated exam score across multiple evidence targeted questions as the membership signal. Experiments across multiple datasets and diverse RAG configurations demonstrate that E-MIA improves member/non-member separability in stringent settings while preserving natural, stealthy queries, and we further analyze the impact of question composition and exam length on attack effectiveness.

analysis.tldr: 提出E-MIA，将目标文档中的硬证据转化为考试题，通过聚合得分实现黑盒成员推断攻击，提升RAG系统成员/非成员可分性。
analysis.research_motivation: RAG系统将检索语料库作为敏感资产，现有成员推断攻击方法存在软信号分布重叠、阈值不稳定或显式探测易被拒绝检测的问题，亟需更隐蔽且有效的攻击方法。
analysis.problem: 在黑盒设置下，仅通过查询响应交互推断候选文档是否被纳入RAG知识库（文档级成员推断）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法依赖语义相似度等软信号导致成员/非成员得分分布重叠，显式探测意图明显易被拒绝。
analysis.method: 将目标文档中的可验证硬证据（如细粒度细节、专有名词、定义性陈述、元数据线索、因果/约束关系）转化为四种客观可评分题型（填空/简答/选择/判断），聚合多道证据导向问题的考试得分作为成员信号。
contributions: 提出E-MIA，将文档硬证据转化为考试题进行黑盒成员推断，提升攻击的隐蔽性和有效性。
在多种数据集和RAG配置下验证了E-MIA在严格设置下改善成员/非成员可分性，并分析了问题组成和考试长度的影响。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集和不同RAG配置下进行实验，表明E-MIA在严格设置下提升了成员/非成员可分性，并分析了问题组成和考试长度的影响。
limitations: 可能依赖文档中硬证据的丰富程度，对缺乏细粒度细节的文档效果有限。
考试题生成质量可能影响攻击效果，未讨论自动生成问题的可靠性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，将考试机制引入MIA，实验充分，与隐私安全方向强相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出E-MIA，将目标文档中的硬证据转化为考试题，通过聚合得分实现黑盒成员推断攻击，提升RAG系统成员/非成员可分性。

papers.title: Faithful Extreme Image Rescaling with Learnable Reversible Transformation and Semantic Priors
papers.abstract: Most recent extreme rescaling methods struggle to preserve semantically consistent structures and produce realistic details, due to the severely ill-posed nature of low- to high-resolution mapping under scaling factors of $16\times$ or higher. To alleviate the above problems, we propose FaithEIR, a diffusion-based framework for extreme image rescaling. Inspired by singular value decomposition, we develop learnable reversible transformation that enables invertible downscaling and upscaling in the latent space. To compensate for information loss due to quantization, we propose an adaptive detail prior, a high-frequency dictionary that captures the empirical average of commonly occurring structures in the training data. Finally, we design a lightweight pixel semantic embedder to provide semantic conditioning for the pretrained diffusion model. We present extensive experimental results demonstrating that our FaithEIR consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, achieving superior reconstruction fidelity and perceptual quality. Our code, model weights, and detailed results are released at https://github.com/cshw2021/FaithEIR.

analysis.tldr: 提出FaithEIR，一种基于扩散模型的极端图像缩放框架，通过学习可逆变换和语义先验实现高保真重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有极端缩放方法在16倍以上缩放因子下难以保持语义一致的结构和生成逼真细节，因为低分辨率到高分辨率的映射严重病态。
analysis.problem: 解决极端图像缩放（16倍以上）中信息丢失和语义结构保持问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于扩散模型，结合可学习可逆变换（受SVD启发）、自适应细节先验（高频字典）和轻量级像素语义嵌入器。
contributions: 提出可学习可逆变换实现潜在空间的可逆下采样和上采样
设计自适应细节先验和高频字典补偿量化信息损失
引入轻量级像素语义嵌入器为预训练扩散模型提供语义条件
analysis.experiments: 在极端缩放任务上，FaithEIR一致优于现有方法，重建保真度和感知质量更优。代码和模型已开源。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练扩散模型的计算资源
语义先验可能对罕见结构泛化不足
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，结合可逆变换和语义先验，实验充分，但应用场景较窄。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FaithEIR，一种基于扩散模型的极端图像缩放框架，通过学习可逆变换和语义先验实现高保真重建。

papers.title: Possibilistic Predictive Uncertainty for Deep Learning
papers.abstract: Deep neural networks achieve impressive results across diverse applications, yet their overconfidence on unseen inputs necessitates reliable epistemic uncertainty modelling. Existing methods for uncertainty modelling face a fundamental dilemma: Bayesian approaches provide principled estimates but remain computationally prohibitive, while efficient second-order predictors lack rigorous derivations connecting their specific objectives to epistemic uncertainty quantification. To resolve this dilemma, we introduce Dirichlet-approximated possibilistic posterior predictions (DAPPr), a principled framework leveraging possibility theory. We define a possibilistic posterior over parameters, projects this posterior to the prediction space via supremum operators, and approximates the projected posterior using learnable Dirichlet possibility functions. This projection-and-approximation strategy yields a simple training objective with closed-form solutions. Extensive experiments across diverse benchmarks demonstrate that our approach achieves competitive or superior uncertainty quantification performance compared to state-of-the-art evidential deep learning methods while maintaining both principled derivation and computational efficiency. Code will be available at https://github.com/MaxwellYaoNi/DAPPr.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于可能性理论的深度学习不确定性量化框架，兼顾原理严谨性与计算效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度神经网络在未见输入上过度自信，需要可靠的认知不确定性建模；现有贝叶斯方法计算昂贵，而高效二阶预测器缺乏严格推导。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种既原理严谨又计算高效的不确定性量化方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Dirichlet-近似可能性后验预测（DAPPr），利用可能性理论定义参数的可能性后验，通过上确界算子投影到预测空间，并用可学习的Dirichlet可能性函数近似投影后验，得到简单训练目标与闭式解。
contributions: 提出DAPPr框架，将可能性理论用于深度学习不确定性量化，兼具原理严谨性与计算效率。
通过投影-近似策略导出简单训练目标与闭式解，实验表明在多个基准上达到竞争或更优的不确定性量化性能。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上对比最先进的证据深度学习，DAPPr取得竞争或更优的不确定性量化性能。
limitations: 可能仅适用于分类任务，未讨论回归或序列任务。
可能性后验的近似精度可能受限于Dirichlet分布的表达能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: probabilistic methods (Bayesian methods, variational inference, sampling, UQ, etc.)
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且原理严谨，实验验证有效，但应用范围可能有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于可能性理论的深度学习不确定性量化框架，兼顾原理严谨性与计算效率。

papers.title: Robust Fusion of Object-Level V2X for Learned 3D Object Detection
papers.abstract: Perception for automated driving is largely based on onboard environmental sensors, such as cameras and radar, which are cost-effective but limited by line-of-sight and field-of-view constraints. These inherent limitations may cause onboard perception to fail under occlusions or poor visibility conditions. In parallel, cooperative awareness via vehicle-to-everything (V2X) communication is becoming increasingly available, enabling vehicles and infrastructure to share their own state as object-level information that complements onboard perception. In this work, we study how such V2X information can be integrated into 3D object detection and how robust the resulting system is to realistic V2X imperfections. Using the nuScenes dataset, we emulate object-level cooperative awareness messages from ground truth, injecting controlled noise and object dropout to mimic real-world conditions such as latency, localization errors, and low V2X penetration rates. We convert these messages into a dedicated bird's-eye view (BEV) input and fuse them into a BEVFusion-style detector. Our results demonstrate that while object-level cooperative information can substantially improve detection performance, achieving an NDS of 0.80 under favorable conditions, models trained on idealized data become fragile and over-reliant on V2X. Conversely, our proposed noise-aware training strategy, coupled with explicit confidence encoding, enhances robustness, maintaining performance gains even under severe noise and reduced V2X penetration.

analysis.tldr: 提出噪声感知训练策略，将物体级V2X信息融合到3D目标检测中，提升在现实V2X不完美条件下的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 车载感知受视线和视野限制，在遮挡或能见度差时易失效；V2X通信可提供互补信息，但现实中的延迟、定位误差和低渗透率等不完美因素会降低融合效果。
analysis.problem: 如何鲁棒地将物体级V2X信息集成到3D目标检测中，以应对现实V2X通信的不完美性（噪声、物体丢失等）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在理想数据上训练的模型会过度依赖V2X信息，变得脆弱；而噪声感知训练和显式置信度编码可增强鲁棒性，即使在严重噪声和低V2X渗透率下仍能保持性能增益。
analysis.method: 利用nuScenes数据集，从地面真值模拟物体级V2X消息并注入可控噪声和物体丢失；将消息转换为专用BEV输入，融合到BEVFusion风格检测器中；提出噪声感知训练策略，结合显式置信度编码。
contributions: 研究了物体级V2X信息在3D目标检测中的融合及其对现实不完美条件的鲁棒性
提出噪声感知训练策略和显式置信度编码，显著提升在噪声和低V2X渗透率下的检测性能
analysis.experiments: 在nuScenes数据集上模拟V2X消息，注入噪声和物体丢失；在有利条件下NDS达0.80，噪声感知训练在严重噪声下仍保持性能。
limitations: 仅在模拟V2X消息上评估，未在真实V2X数据上验证
未考虑通信延迟的动态变化等更复杂的不完美因素
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性中等，实验基于模拟数据，但针对自动驾驶实际痛点，有一定应用价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出噪声感知训练策略，将物体级V2X信息融合到3D目标检测中，提升在现实V2X不完美条件下的鲁棒性。

papers.title: Fairness of Classifiers in the Presence of Constraints between Features
papers.abstract: In Machine Learning, an accepted definition of fairness of a decision taken by a classifier is that it should not depend on protected features, such as gender. Unfortunately, when constraints exist between features, such dependencies can be obscured by the constraints. To avoid this problem, we propose that a decision be considered fair if it has a fair explanation. We define a fair explanation as a prime-implicant reason for the decision that does not contain any protected feature (where the constraints are taken into account in the definition of prime-implicant). Surprisingly, ignoring constraints can completely change the fairness of a decision (according to this definition) even in the absence of constraints between protected and unprotected features. Three possible definitions of fairness of a classifier are that for all its decisions (1) there are only fair explanations, (2) there is at least one fair explanation, or (3) changing protected features does not change the outcome. We identify the relationships between these different definitions of fairness and study the computational complexity of testing fairness of classifiers.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于prime-implicant解释的公平性定义，并研究特征约束下分类器公平性的计算复杂性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有公平性定义要求决策不依赖受保护特征，但特征间的约束可能掩盖这种依赖，导致不公平决策被误判为公平。
analysis.problem: 如何在特征存在约束的情况下，正确定义和检验分类器决策的公平性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，忽略约束会完全改变决策的公平性判断，即使受保护与非受保护特征之间没有直接约束。
analysis.method: 将公平性定义为决策存在公平的解释（prime-implicant reason），该解释不包含任何受保护特征，并考虑特征约束。提出三种分类器公平性定义：所有决策仅有公平解释、至少有一个公平解释、改变受保护特征不改变结果。
contributions: 提出基于prime-implicant解释的公平性定义，显式考虑特征约束。
识别三种公平性定义之间的关系，并研究测试分类器公平性的计算复杂性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于可解释性强的分类器（如决策树、布尔公式）。
计算复杂性可能较高，实际应用受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 理论贡献明确，但缺乏实验验证，适合关注公平性理论的研究者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于prime-implicant解释的公平性定义，并研究特征约束下分类器公平性的计算复杂性。

papers.title: Intrinsic Gradient Suppression for Label-Noise Prompt Tuning in Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Contrastive vision-language models like CLIP exhibit remarkable zero-shot generalization. However, prompt tuning remains highly sensitive to label noise, as mislabeled samples generate disproportionately large gradients that can overwhelm pre-trained priors. We argue that because CLIP already provides a near-optimal initialization, adaptation should be inherently conservative, particularly against the extreme gradient updates common in noisy settings. To this end, we propose Double-Softmax Prompt Tuning (DSPT), a hyperparameter-free method for intrinsic gradient suppression. By applying a sequential probabilistic normalization, DSPT induces a self-adaptive saturation zone that suppresses gradients from high-error noisy samples while maintaining informative updates. We also provide both theoretical analysis and empirical evidence about how this mechanism achieves adaptive suppression. This design transforms ``gradient vanishing'', traditionally a training bottleneck, into a principled noise-filtering shield for label-noise prompt tuning. Extensive experiments confirm that this simple, drop-in design achieves state-of-the-art robustness across various noisy benchmarks, outperforming methods with complex architectures and handcrafted hyperparameters.

analysis.tldr: 提出双Softmax提示调优（DSPT），通过内在梯度抑制机制增强视觉语言模型在标签噪声下的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉语言模型（如CLIP）的提示调优对标签噪声高度敏感，错误标注样本会产生过大梯度，破坏预训练先验知识。现有方法依赖复杂架构或手工超参数，缺乏简洁有效的解决方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在不引入额外超参数和复杂结构的前提下，抑制标签噪声导致的极端梯度更新，同时保留有效信息更新。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，在噪声环境下，误标注样本会产生不成比例的大梯度，而CLIP的初始化已接近最优，因此适应过程应保持保守。
analysis.method: 提出双Softmax提示调优（DSPT），通过顺序概率归一化引入自适应饱和区，自动抑制高误差噪声样本的梯度，同时保持信息性更新。
contributions: 提出一种无超参数的梯度抑制方法DSPT，将梯度消失转化为噪声过滤机制。
提供理论分析和实验证据，证明DSPT在多种噪声基准上达到最先进鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在多种噪声基准上进行广泛实验，DSPT优于具有复杂架构和手工超参数的方法。
limitations: 可能仅在特定噪声类型（如对称噪声）上有效，对非对称噪声效果未知。
未探讨在更大规模模型或不同架构上的泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法简洁有效，针对VLM提示调优的噪声问题提出创新性梯度抑制机制，实验充分，与重点方向强相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双Softmax提示调优（DSPT），通过内在梯度抑制机制增强视觉语言模型在标签噪声下的鲁棒性。

papers.title: RouteHijack: Routing-Aware Attack on Mixture-of-Experts LLMs
papers.abstract: Safety alignment is critical for the responsible deployment of large language models (LLMs). As Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures are increasingly adopted to scale model capacity, understanding their safety robustness becomes essential. Existing adversarial attacks, however, have notable limitations. Prompt-based jailbreaks rely on heuristic search and transfer poorly, model intervention methods require privileged access to internal representations, and optimization-based input attacks remain output-centric and are fundamentally limited to MoE models due to the non-differentiable routing mechanism. In this paper, we present RouteHijack, a routing-aware jailbreak for MoE LLMs. Our key insight is that safety behavior is concentrated in a small subset of experts, creating an opportunity to steer model behavior by influencing routing decisions through input optimization. Building on this observation, RouteHijack first performs response-driven expert localization to identify safety-critical and harmful experts by contrasting activations under safe refusals and harmful completions. It then constructs adversarial suffixes with a routing-aware objective that suppresses safety experts, promotes harmful experts, and prevents early-stage refusal during generation. At inference time, the optimized suffix is appended to a malicious prompt, requiring only input access. Across seven MoE LLMs, RouteHijack achieves a 69.3\% average attack success rate (ASR), outperforming prior optimization-based attack by $3.2\times$. RouteHijack also transfers zero-shot across five sibling MoE variants, raising average ASR from 27.7\% to 61.2\%, and further generalizes to three MoE-based VLMs, increasing average ASR from 2.47\% to 38.7\%. These findings expose a fundamental vulnerability in sparse expert architectures and highlight the need for defenses beyond output-level alignment.

analysis.tldr: RouteHijack通过路由感知的对抗攻击，在MoE LLMs上实现高效越狱，揭示稀疏专家架构的安全脆弱性。
analysis.research_motivation: MoE架构在LLMs中广泛应用，但其安全鲁棒性尚未充分研究；现有攻击方法（如基于提示的越狱、模型干预、优化攻击）存在迁移性差、需要内部访问或受限于不可微路由机制等局限。
analysis.problem: 如何利用MoE模型的路由机制，仅通过输入访问实现高效、可迁移的越狱攻击。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 安全行为集中在少数专家上，通过影响路由决策可操纵模型行为。
analysis.method: RouteHijack：先通过响应驱动的专家定位识别安全关键专家和有害专家，再构建路由感知的对抗后缀，抑制安全专家、促进有害专家并防止早期拒绝。
contributions: 提出路由感知的越狱攻击方法RouteHijack，仅需输入访问。
在7个MoE LLM上平均ASR达69.3%，比现有优化攻击高3.2倍。
零样本迁移到5个同源MoE变体（ASR从27.7%升至61.2%）和3个MoE VLM（ASR从2.47%升至38.7%）。
analysis.experiments: 在7个MoE LLM、5个同源MoE变体和3个MoE VLM上评估攻击成功率（ASR），并对比基线方法。
limitations: 仅针对MoE架构，不适用于密集模型。
对抗后缀可能被检测或过滤。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实验充分，对MoE安全有重要启示，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RouteHijack通过路由感知的对抗攻击，在MoE LLMs上实现高效越狱，揭示稀疏专家架构的安全脆弱性。

papers.title: Jailbreaking Vision-Language Models Through the Visual Modality
papers.abstract: The visual modality of vision-language models (VLMs) is an underexplored attack surface for bypassing safety alignment. We introduce four jailbreak attacks exploiting the vision component: (1) encoding harmful instructions as visual symbol sequences with a decoding legend, (2) replacing harmful objects with benign substitutes (e.g., bomb -> banana) then prompting for harmful actions using the substitute term, (3) replacing harmful text in images (e.g., on book covers) with benign words while visual context preserves the original meaning, and (4) visual analogy puzzles whose solution requires inferring a prohibited concept. Evaluating across six frontier VLMs, our visual attacks bypass safety alignment and expose a cross-modality alignment gap: text-based safety training does not automatically generalize to harmful intent conveyed visually. For example, our visual cipher achieves 40.9% attack success on Claude-Haiku-4.5 versus 10.7% for an equivalent textual cipher. To further our insight into the attack mechanism, we present preliminary interpretability and mitigation results. These findings highlight that robust VLM alignment requires treating vision as a first-class target for safety post-training.

analysis.tldr: 通过视觉模态绕过VLM安全对齐的四种越狱攻击，揭示跨模态对齐漏洞。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉-语言模型（VLM）的安全对齐主要针对文本模态，视觉模态作为攻击面尚未被充分探索，存在安全隐患。
analysis.problem: 现有VLM安全对齐无法泛化到视觉传达的有害意图，需要研究视觉模态下的越狱攻击及其机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 文本安全训练不能自动泛化到视觉模态，存在跨模态对齐差距；视觉密码攻击成功率（40.9%）远高于等效文本密码（10.7%）。
analysis.method: 提出四种视觉越狱攻击：视觉符号编码、有害对象替换、图像文本替换、视觉类比谜题。
contributions: 系统探索了VLM视觉模态的越狱攻击面，提出四种有效攻击方法。
揭示了跨模态对齐差距，强调视觉应作为安全后训练的一等目标。
analysis.experiments: 在六个前沿VLM上评估，视觉密码攻击在Claude-Haiku-4.5上成功率达40.9%，并提供了初步的可解释性和缓解结果。
limitations: 缓解结果仅为初步，未提供完整防御方案。
攻击方法可能依赖特定模型架构或训练数据。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 针对VLM视觉模态的越狱攻击具有创新性和实际威胁，实验充分，但缓解部分较初步。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过视觉模态绕过VLM安全对齐的四种越狱攻击，揭示跨模态对齐漏洞。

papers.title: AI Washing Inflates Expected Performance but Not Interaction Outcomes: An AI Placebo Study Using Fitts' Law
papers.abstract: Expectations about the support of artificial intelligence (AI) may influence interaction outcomes similar to placebos. Such expectations may result from AI washing, a practice of overstating a system's AI capabilities when actual functionality is limited. For example, some computer mice are marketed as "AI-assisted" despite lacking AI in core functions. In a within-subjects study, 28 participants completed Fitts' Law tasks with a computer mouse under three conditions: no support, supposed predictive AI support, and supposed biosignal-enhanced AI support. Objective Fitts' Law performance indicators and subjective performance expectations, perceived workload, and perceived usability were measured. Compared to baseline, participants expected significantly improved performance in placebo conditions. However, these expectations did not translate into differences in objective or subjective assessments. This paper contributes evidence that AI washing inflates user expectations without altering actual interaction outcomes, highlighting a critical transparency issue. By exposing how deceptive AI marketing can shape user expectations, we underscore the need for accountability in AI product claims. Further, we establish Fitts' Law as a rigorous methodological lens for auditing AI-labelled input devices.

analysis.tldr: AI洗脑营销会提升用户对性能的预期，但不会改变实际交互结果。
analysis.research_motivation: AI洗脑（AI washing）现象普遍存在，即夸大系统AI能力而实际功能有限，可能误导用户预期并影响交互体验，但缺乏实证研究。
analysis.problem: 探究AI洗脑营销是否会导致类似安慰剂效应，即提升用户预期但实际交互表现无变化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在安慰剂条件下，用户对性能的预期显著高于基线，但客观Fitts' Law指标和主观评估（工作负荷、可用性）均无显著差异。
analysis.method: 采用Fitts' Law任务，在三种条件（无支持、声称预测性AI支持、声称生物信号增强AI支持）下进行被试内实验，测量客观性能指标和主观预期、工作负荷、可用性。
contributions: 提供证据表明AI洗脑会提升用户预期但不改变实际交互结果，揭示透明度问题。
建立Fitts' Law作为审计AI标签输入设备的严格方法论框架。
analysis.experiments: 28名被试完成Fitts' Law任务，三种条件，测量客观和主观指标。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 样本量较小（28人），可能影响统计效力。
仅针对计算机鼠标一种设备，泛化性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 研究主题有趣但实验规模小，与核心方向相关性一般，适合略读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AI洗脑营销会提升用户对性能的预期，但不会改变实际交互结果。

papers.title: Federated Distillation for Whole Slide Image via Gaussian-Mixture Feature Alignment and Curriculum Integration
papers.abstract: Federated learning (FL) offers a promising framework for collaborative digital pathology by enabling model training across institutions. However, real-world deployments face heterogeneity arising from diverse multiple instance learning (MIL) architectures and heterogeneous feature extractors across institutions. We propose FedHD, a novel FL framework that performs local Gaussian-mixture feature alignment tailored for WSI analysis. Instead of exchanging model parameters, each client independently distills semantically rich synthetic feature representations aligned with the distribution of real WSIs. To preserve diagnostic diversity, FedHD adopts a one-to-one distillation strategy, generating a synthetic counterpart for each real slide to avoid over-compression. During federation, a curriculum-based integration strategy progressively incorporates cross-site synthetic features into local training once performance plateaus. Furthermore, an optional interpretation module reconstructs pseudo-patches from synthetic embeddings, enhancing transparency. FedHD is architecture-agnostic, privacy-preserving, and supports personalized yet collaborative training across diverse institutions. Experiments on TCGA-IDH, CAMELYON16, and CAMELYON17 show that FedHD consistently outperforms state-of-the-art federated and distillation baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出FedHD框架，通过高斯混合特征对齐和课程式集成实现WSI的联邦蒸馏，性能优于现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 联邦学习在数字病理中面临多实例学习架构和特征提取器异构导致的异质性挑战，现有方法难以兼顾隐私、架构无关性和性能。
analysis.problem: 解决联邦学习中不同机构间MIL架构和特征提取器异构导致的特征分布不一致问题，实现高效、隐私保护的协作训练。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: FedHD框架：本地高斯混合特征对齐、一对一蒸馏策略生成合成特征、课程式集成逐步融合跨站点特征、可选解释模块重建伪补丁。
contributions: 提出架构无关的联邦蒸馏框架FedHD，支持异构MIL架构和特征提取器
设计高斯混合特征对齐和一对一蒸馏策略，保留诊断多样性
引入课程式集成策略，渐进式融合跨站点特征
可选解释模块增强透明度
analysis.experiments: 在TCGA-IDH、CAMELYON16和CAMELYON17数据集上，FedHD一致优于最先进的联邦和蒸馏基线。
limitations: 可能依赖合成特征的质量

papers.title: Graph Rewiring in GNNs to Mitigate Over-Squashing and Over-Smoothing: A Survey
papers.abstract: Graph Neural Networks are powerful models for learning from graph-structured data, yet their effectiveness is often limited by two critical challenges: over-squashing, where information from distant nodes is excessively compressed, and over-smoothing, where repeated propagation makes node representations indistinguishable. Both phenomena stem from the interaction between message passing and the input topology, ultimately degrading information flow and limiting the performance of GNNs. In this survey, we examine graph rewiring techniques, a class of methods designed to modify the graph topology to enhance information propagation in GNNs. We provide a comprehensive review of state-of-the-art rewiring approaches, delving into their theoretical underpinnings, practical implementations, and performance trade-offs.

analysis.tldr: 综述图神经网络中通过图重连缓解过压缩和过平滑问题的方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 图神经网络在信息传播中面临过压缩和过平滑两大瓶颈，严重限制其性能，亟需系统性的方法综述来指导拓扑优化。
analysis.problem: 如何通过修改图拓扑结构来增强GNN中的信息传播，缓解过压缩和过平滑问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 过压缩导致远端节点信息被过度压缩，过平滑使节点表示趋于不可区分，两者均源于消息传递与输入拓扑的交互。
analysis.method: 系统综述图重连技术，包括理论原理、实现方法和性能权衡。
contributions: 全面梳理了图重连技术的最新进展
深入分析了重连方法的理论基础和实际效果
