papers.title: Instance-Aware Parameter Configuration in Bilevel Late Acceptance Hill Climbing for the Electric Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problem
papers.abstract: Algorithm performance in combinatorial optimization is highly sensitive to parameter settings, while a single globally tuned configuration often fails to exploit the heterogeneity of instances. This limitation is particularly evident in the Electric Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problem, where instances differ in structure, demand patterns, and energy constraints. This paper investigates instance-aware parameter configuration for Bilevel Late Acceptance Hill Climbing, a state-of-the-art metaheuristic for the Electric Capacitated Vehicle Routing Problem. An offline tuning procedure is used to obtain instance-specific parameter labels, which are then mapped from instance features via a regression model to enable parameter prediction for unseen instances prior to execution. Experimental results on the IEEE WCCI 2020 benchmark and its extensions show that the proposed approach achieves an average objective value reduction of $0.28\%$ across eight held-out test instances relative to a globally tuned configuration. This corresponds to a significant cost reduction in multimillion-dollar transportation operations.

analysis.tldr: 针对电动汽车容量路径规划问题，提出实例感知参数配置方法，通过离线调优和回归模型预测参数，平均目标值降低0.28%。
analysis.research_motivation: 组合优化中算法性能对参数高度敏感，全局统一调参无法利用实例异质性，尤其在电动汽车容量路径规划问题中，实例结构、需求模式和能量约束差异大，需要实例感知的参数配置。
analysis.problem: 如何为双层晚接受爬山算法自动配置实例特定参数，以提升在电动汽车容量路径规划问题上的性能。

contributions: 提出实例感知参数配置框架，结合离线调优和回归模型。
在IEEE WCCI 2020基准及其扩展上验证，平均目标值降低0.28%，对应数百万美元运输成本节约。

papers.title: 2D-SuGaR: Surface-Aware Gaussian Splatting for Geometrically Accurate Mesh Reconstruction
papers.abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has emerged as a powerful technique for generating photorealistic renderings of a scene in real-time. However, the volumetric nature of 3DGS limits its ability to accurately capture surface geometry. To address this, 2D Gaussian Splatting (2DGS) was proposed to enable view-consistent and geometrically accurate surface reconstruction from multi-view images. However, 2DGS can be sensitive to the initialization of the Gaussian primitives. Reliance on Structure-from-Motion (SfM) initializations, which can produce poor estimates on challenging image sets, may lead to subpar results. In this work, we enhance 2DGS by incorporating monocular depth and normal priors to improve both geometric accuracy and robustness. We propose a depth-guided initialization strategy for Gaussians and introduce a clustering-based technique for pruning degenerate Gaussians. We evaluate our method on the DTU dataset, where it achieves state-of-the-art results in mesh reconstruction while preserving high-quality novel view synthesis.

analysis.tldr: 通过引入单目深度和法线先验，增强2DGS的几何精度与鲁棒性，在DTU数据集上实现SOTA网格重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 3DGS渲染真实感强但表面几何不准确，2DGS虽改进但依赖SfM初始化，在困难图像集上效果差。
analysis.problem: 2DGS对高斯原语初始化敏感，SfM初始化在挑战性场景下导致次优的几何重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出深度引导的初始化策略和基于聚类的退化高斯修剪技术，并融入单目深度和法线先验。
contributions: 提出深度引导的初始化策略，改善高斯原语的初始位置。
提出基于聚类的退化高斯修剪方法，提升几何精度。
在DTU数据集上实现网格重建SOTA，同时保持高质量新视角合成。
analysis.experiments: 在DTU数据集上评估，网格重建达到SOTA，新视角合成质量高。
limitations: 可能依赖单目深度和法线估计器的质量。

papers.title: Depth-Guided Privacy-Preserving Visual Localization Using 3D Sphere Clouds
papers.abstract: The emergence of deep neural networks capable of revealing high-fidelity scene details from sparse 3D point clouds has raised significant privacy concerns in visual localization involving private maps. Lifting map points to randomly oriented 3D lines is a well-known approach for obstructing undesired recovery of the scene images, but these lines are vulnerable to a density-based attack that can recover the point cloud geometry by observing the neighborhood statistics of lines. With the aim of nullifying this attack, we present a new privacy-preserving scene representation called \emph{sphere cloud}, which is constructed by lifting all points to 3D lines crossing the centroid of the map, resembling points on the unit sphere. Since lines are most dense at the map centroid, the sphere cloud mislead the density-based attack algorithm to incorrectly yield points at the centroid, effectively neutralizing the attack. Nevertheless, this advantage comes at the cost of i) a new type of attack that may directly recover images from this cloud representation and ii) unresolved translation scale for camera pose estimation. To address these issues, we introduce a simple yet effective cloud construction strategy to thwart new attack and propose an efficient localization framework to guide the translation scale by utilizing absolute depth maps acquired from on-device time-of-flight (ToF) sensors. Experimental results on public RGB-D datasets demonstrate sphere cloud achieves competitive privacy-preserving ability and localization runtime while not excessively compensating the pose estimation accuracy compared to other depth-guided localization methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出球云表示法，通过将点云提升为穿过地图质心的3D线来防御密度攻击，并结合深度图引导定位。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉定位中私有地图的3D点云可能被深度神经网络恢复出高保真场景细节，引发隐私担忧；现有方法（如随机方向3D线）易受密度攻击。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种隐私保护的场景表示，既能防御密度攻击，又能保持定位精度，并解决新攻击和尺度模糊问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出随机方向3D线表示易受密度攻击，攻击者可通过观察线的邻域统计恢复点云几何；球云表示使线在质心处最密集，误导攻击算法输出错误点。
analysis.method: 提出球云表示：将地图点提升为穿过质心的3D线（类似单位球上的点）；设计云构建策略防御新攻击；利用设备上ToF传感器获取的绝对深度图引导定位中的平移尺度。
contributions: 提出球云表示，有效防御密度攻击并误导攻击者输出质心点。
设计云构建策略和深度引导定位框架，解决新攻击和尺度模糊问题。
analysis.experiments: 在公开RGB-D数据集上实验，表明球云在隐私保护能力和定位运行时间上具有竞争力，且定位精度未过度牺牲。
limitations: 依赖ToF传感器获取绝对深度图，可能限制适用场景。
新攻击的具体威胁和防御效果需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有创新性，但依赖特定硬件且实验信息有限，适合关注隐私视觉定位的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出球云表示法，通过将点云提升为穿过地图质心的3D线来防御密度攻击，并结合深度图引导定位。

papers.title: Structure Liberates: How Constrained Sensemaking Produces More Novel Research Output
papers.abstract: Scientific discovery is an extended process of ideation--surveying prior work, forming hypotheses, and refining reasoning--yet existing approaches treat this phase as a brief preamble despite its central role in research. We introduce SCISENSE, a sensemaking-grounded framework that operationalizes ideation as a structured sequence of eight cognitive stages (Pirolli \& Card, 2005). We construct SCISENSE-Traj, a 100K-scale dataset of citation-conditioned research trajectories in two modes: Target, where an LLM reconstructs the ideation path leading to a known paper from its cited works, and Infer, where the LLM proposes novel directions from the same citations. We distill these into SCISENSE-LM, a family of sensemaking LLMs spanning 3B to 70B parameters. Contrary to the assumption that looser supervision promotes greater exploration, Target-trained models achieve a 2.0\% improvement in trajectory quality over Infer-trained models while also producing more novel and diverse outputs. This advantage propagates downstream: coding agents conditioned on Target trajectories produce research artifacts with higher executability and quality than those conditioned on Infer trajectories. This suggests that targeted ideation reduces cognitive burden on downstream agents, freeing them to explore more creatively. SCISENSE offers both a practical tool for augmenting LLM-driven research workflows and a principled testbed for studying how planning shapes scientific discovery.

analysis.tldr: 通过结构化认知阶段约束的思维过程，反而比自由探索产生更新颖的研究输出。
analysis.research_motivation: 科学发现中的构思阶段（文献调研、假设形成、推理细化）对研究质量至关重要，但现有方法往往将其视为简短的前奏，缺乏系统化框架。
analysis.problem: 如何将科学构思过程形式化为可操作的结构化序列，并验证结构化约束是否比自由探索更有利于产生新颖且多样化的研究输出。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要发现：与直觉相反，受目标约束（Target）的模型在轨迹质量和输出新颖性上均优于自由推断（Infer）的模型，且这种优势可传递至下游编码任务。
analysis.method: 提出SCISENSE框架，将构思操作化为八个认知阶段（Pirolli & Card, 2005）；构建100K规模的SCISENSE-Traj数据集（含Target和Infer两种模式）；蒸馏出SCISENSE-LM系列模型（3B-70B参数）。
contributions: 提出SCISENSE框架，将科学构思过程形式化为结构化认知阶段序列。
构建大规模数据集SCISENSE-Traj，包含两种模式的引用条件研究轨迹。

papers.title: Linking Behaviour and Perception to Evaluate Meaningful Human Control over Partially Automated Driving
papers.abstract: Partial driving automation creates a tension: drivers remain legally responsible for vehicle behaviour, yet their active control is significantly reduced. This reduction undermines the engagement and sense of agency needed to intervene safely. Meaningful human control (MHC) has been proposed as a normative framework to address this tension. However, empirical methods for evaluating whether existing systems actually provide MHC remain underdeveloped. In this study, we investigated the extent to which drivers experience MHC when interacting with partially automated driving systems. Twenty-four drivers completed a simulator study involving silent automation failures under two modes - haptic shared control (HSC) and traded control (TC). We derived behavioural metrics from telemetry data, subjective perception scores from post-trial surveys and used them to test hypothesised relations between them derived from the properties of systems under MHC. The confirmatory analysis showed a significant negative correlation between the perception of the automated vehicle (AV) understanding the driver and conflict in steering torques. An exploratory analysis also revealed a surprising positive correlation between reaction times and the perception of sufficient control. Qualitative feedback from open-ended post-experiment questionnaires revealed that mismatches in intentions between the driver and automation, lack of safety, and resistance to driver inputs contribute to the reduction of perceived MHC, while subtle haptic guidance aligned with driver intent had a positive effect. These findings suggest that future designs should prioritise effortless driver interventions, transparent communication of automation intent, and context-sensitive authority allocation to strengthen meaningful human control in partially automated driving.

papers.title: Co-Generative De Novo Functional Protein Design
papers.abstract: De novo functional protein design aims to generate protein sequences that realize specified biochemical functions without relying on evolutionary templates, enabling broad applications in biotechnology and medicine. Existing approaches adopt either direct function-to-sequence mapping or decoupled structure-sequence generation strategies but often fail to achieve functionality and foldability simultaneously. To address this, we propose CodeFP, a Co-generative protein language model for de novo Functional Protein design that simultaneously decodes sequence and structure tokens, thereby enabling superior simultaneous realization of functionality and foldability. CodeFP utilizes functional local structures to enrich functional semantic encodings, overcoming the suboptimal translation of flat encodings into structure tokens, while introducing auxiliary functional supervision to alleviate training ambiguity stemming from the one-to-many structure-to-token mapping. Extensive experiments show that CodeFP consistently achieves average improvements of 6.1% in functional consistency and 3.2% in foldability over the strongest baseline.

papers.title: Exploring Pass-Rate Reward in Reinforcement Learning for Code Generation
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) from unit-test feedback has become a standard post-training recipe for improving large language models (LLMs) on code generation. However, the pass-all-tests binary reward can be sparse, yielding no learning signal on challenging problems where none of the sampled solutions passes all tests. A common remedy is to use the test-case pass rate as a surrogate reward. In this work, we study pass-rate rewards in critic-free RL for code generation (e.g., GRPO and RLOO) and report a consistent pattern across base models and algorithms: despite alleviating reward sparsity, pass-rate rewards do not reliably improve final performance over binary rewards in rigorous controlled experiments. To understand this discrepancy, we analyze reward density and the resulting gradient directions. We find that pass-rate rewards are denser, but the induced gradient updates do not consistently move probability mass toward full-pass solutions. This arises because test-case pass rate is a miscalibrated surrogate for progress toward full correctness, and partial-pass solutions within the same group can induce conflicting gradient directions that cancel out. Overall, our results suggest that, in critic-free RL, pass-rate rewards are insufficient to improve code generation and motivate reward designs that better align optimization with the goal of full correctness.

analysis.tldr: 在无评论家强化学习（如GRPO/RLOO）中，通过率奖励虽缓解稀疏性，但并未比二元奖励更可靠地提升代码生成性能，原因在于其梯度更新方向与完全正确目标不一致。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于单元测试反馈的强化学习已成为提升大语言模型代码生成能力的标准后训练方法，但全通过二元奖励在难题上稀疏，导致学习信号不足；通过率奖励被用作替代，但其有效性缺乏系统研究。
analysis.problem: 探究在无评论家强化学习（如GRPO/RLOO）中，通过率奖励是否比二元奖励更有效地提升代码生成性能，并分析其失效原因。

analysis.method: 在无评论家强化学习框架（GRPO和RLOO）中，对比二元奖励（全通过/不通过）与通过率奖励（测试用例通过比例）对代码生成模型微调的影响，并通过奖励密度和梯度方向分析解释性能差异。
contributions: 通过严格对照实验，揭示通过率奖励在无评论家强化学习中并不比二元奖励更可靠地提升代码生成性能。

papers.title: A11y-Compressor: A Framework for Enhancing the Efficiency of GUI Agent Observations through Visual Context Reconstruction and Redundancy Reduction
papers.abstract: AI agents that interact with graphical user interfaces (GUIs) require effective observation representations for reliable grounding. The accessibility tree is a commonly used text-based format that encodes UI element attributes, but it suffers from redundancy and lacks structural information such as spatial relationships among elements. We propose A11y-Compressor, a framework that transforms linearized accessibility trees into compact and structured representations. Our implementation, Compressed-a11y, applies a lightweight and structured transformation pipeline with modal detection, redundancy reduction, and semantic structuring. Experiments on the OSWorld benchmark show that Compressed-a11y reduces input tokens to 22% of the original while improving task success rates by 5.1 percentage points on average.

analysis.tldr: 通过视觉上下文重构和冗余缩减，将GUI可访问性树压缩为紧凑结构化表示，提升Agent效率。

papers.title: Healthcare AI GYM for Medical Agents
papers.abstract: Clinical reasoning demands multi-step interactions -- gathering patient history, ordering tests, interpreting results, and making safe treatment decisions -- yet a unified training environment provides the breadth of clinical domains and specialized tools to train generalizable medical AI agents through reinforcement learning remains elusive. We present a comprehensive empirical study of multi-turn agentic RL for medical AI, built on \gym{}, a gymnasium-compatible environment spanning 10 clinical domains with 3.6K+ tasks, 135 domain-specific tools, and a knowledge base of 828K medical passages. Our analysis reveals that agentic multi-turn structure degrades into verbose single-turn monologues, characterized by monotonic length explosion and a simultaneous erosion of tool-use frequency. We characterize how this collapse, alongside distillation instability, stems from the misalignment of sparse terminal rewards with sequential clinical trajectories. We find that vanilla GRPO achieves strong final accuracy on some benchmarks but suffers from training instability, evidenced by significant oscillations in response length and prolonged convergence periods. To improve training efficiency and stability, we propose Turn-level Truncated On-Policy Distillation (TT-OPD), a self-distillation framework where a gradient-free EMA teacher leverages outcome-privileged information to provide dense, outcome-aware KL regularization at every conversation turn. TT-OPD achieves the best performance on 10 of 18 benchmarks with an average +3.9~pp improvement over the non-RL baseline with faster early convergence, controlled response length, and sustained multi-turn tool use.

analysis.tldr: 提出TT-OPD方法解决医疗AI智能体多轮强化学习中的训练不稳定和工具使用退化问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床推理需要多步交互，但缺乏统一的训练环境来训练可泛化的医疗AI智能体，现有方法在多轮交互中容易退化为冗长的单轮对话，工具使用频率下降。

analysis.method: 提出Turn-level Truncated On-Policy Distillation (TT-OPD)，一种自蒸馏框架，使用无梯度的EMA教师利用结果特权信息在每个对话轮次提供密集的、结果感知的KL正则化。
contributions: 构建了GYM环境，覆盖10个临床领域、3600+任务、135个领域特定工具和82.8万医疗段落知识库。

limitations: 环境覆盖的临床领域可能仍有局限，泛化性需进一步验证。

papers.title: A Framework for Exploring and Disentangling Intersectional Bias: A Case Study in Fetal Ultrasound
papers.abstract: Bias in medical AI is often framed as a problem of representation. However, in image-based tasks such as fetal ultrasound, performance disparities can arise even when representation is adequate, because predictive accuracy depends strongly on image quality. Image quality is shaped by acquisition conditions and operator expertise, as well as patient-dependent factors such as maternal body mass index (BMI), all of which may correlate with sensitive demographic features. Consequently, observed disparities may reflect the combined influence of demographic, clinical, and acquisition-related factors rather than data imbalance alone, and may obscure underlying interaction or confounding effects. We propose a structured framework to explore and detect intersectional bias, combining unsupervised slice discovery, systematic factor-wise analysis, and targeted intersectional evaluation. In a case study of over 94{,}000 ultrasound images for fetal weight estimation, we analyze bias in a state-of-the-art deep learning (DL) model and the clinical standard Hadlock, a regression formula using biometric measurements. Pixel spacing (PS) -- a parameter considered suboptimal in current acquisition protocols -- emerged as a consistent driver of performance differences, with higher PS associated with improvements of up to 24\% in selected subgroups for both models. Because PS is often adapted in cases of high BMI or low gestational age (GA), this effect carries a substantial risk of confounding. Our intersectional analysis revealed that part of the PS-associated signal is explained by GA, while PS-related improvements persist across BMI strata, highlighting the importance of acquisition-aware and interaction-aware evaluation in medical AI fairness research.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个框架用于探索和分离胎儿超声中的交叉偏见，发现像素间距是性能差异的关键驱动因素。

papers.title: Colorful-Noise: Training-Free Low-Frequency Noise Manipulation for Color-Based Conditional Image Generation
papers.abstract: Text-to-image diffusion models generate images by gradually converting white Gaussian noise into a natural image. White Gaussian noise is well suited for producing diverse outputs from a single text prompt due to its absence of structure. However, this very property limits control over, and predictability of, specific visual attributes, as the noise is not human-interpretable. In this work, we investigate the characteristics of the input noise in diffusion models. We show that, although all frequencies in white Gaussian noise have comparable statistical energy, low-frequency components primarily determine the images global structure and color composition, while high-frequency components control finer details. Building on this observation, we demonstrate that simple manipulations of the low-frequency noise using low-frequency image priors can effectively condition the generation process to reconstruct these low-frequency visual cues. This allows us to define a simple, training-free method with minimal overhead that steers overall image structure and color, while letting high-frequency components freely emerge as fine details, enabling variability across generated outputs.

analysis.tldr: 通过操作扩散模型输入噪声的低频分量，无需训练即可控制生成图像的颜色和全局结构。
analysis.research_motivation: 文本到图像扩散模型使用白高斯噪声作为输入，虽然能产生多样输出，但缺乏对特定视觉属性（如颜色）的控制，因为噪声不可解释。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重新训练模型的情况下，通过输入噪声操作来控制生成图像的全局结构和颜色组成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 白高斯噪声中低频分量主要决定图像的全局结构和颜色，高频分量控制细节。

contributions: 揭示了扩散模型输入噪声中低频分量对图像全局结构和颜色的决定性作用。

papers.title: Beyond Continuity: Simulation-free Reconstruction of Discrete Branching Dynamics from Single-cell Snapshots
papers.abstract: Inferring cellular trajectories from destructive snapshots is complicated by the challenges of stochasticity and non-conservative mass dynamics such as cell proliferation and apoptosis. Existing unbalanced Optimal Transport (OT) methods treat mass as a continuous fluid, performing inference at the population level. However, this macroscopic view often fails to capture the discrete, jump-like nature of birth-death events at single-cell resolution, which is essential for understanding lineage branching and fate decisions. We present Unbalanced Schrödinger Bridge (USB), a simulation-free framework for learning underlying dynamics that effectively integrates both stochastic and unbalanced effects which also models the discrete, jump-like birth-death dynamics at single-cell resolution. Theoretically, USB provides a tractable solution to the Branching Schrödinger Bridge (BSB) problem, offering a rigorous microscopic interpretation where individual cells undergo both Brownian motion and discrete birth-death jumps. Technically, the method implements an efficient solver by introducing a simulation-free training objective that effectively scales to high-dimensional omics data. Empirically, we demonstrate on both simulated and real-world datasets that USB not only achieves trajectory reconstruction performance better than or comparable to deterministic baselines but also uniquely enables realistic discrete simulation of birth-death dynamics at single-cell resolution.

analysis.tldr: 提出无模拟框架USB，从单细胞快照数据重建离散分支动力学。
analysis.research_motivation: 单细胞测序破坏细胞，无法直接观测动态；现有最优传输方法将细胞视为连续流体，忽略细胞增殖/凋亡的离散跳跃特性，难以捕捉谱系分支和命运决定。
analysis.problem: 从破坏性单细胞快照数据中，同时考虑随机性和非保守质量（细胞增殖/凋亡）的离散分支动力学重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出无模拟框架Unbalanced Schrödinger Bridge (USB)，通过引入无模拟训练目标，将分支薛定谔桥问题转化为可求解形式，同时建模布朗运动和离散生灭跳跃。
contributions: 提出USB框架，首次在单细胞分辨率下同时处理随机性和离散生灭动力学。
理论贡献：为分支薛定谔桥问题提供可解方案，给出微观解释。
技术贡献：高效无模拟训练目标，可扩展至高维组学数据。
analysis.experiments: 在模拟和真实数据集上，USB轨迹重建性能优于或可比于确定性基线，并能实现单细胞分辨率的离散生灭动力学模拟。
limitations: 可能依赖数据质量，对噪声敏感。
计算复杂度可能随细胞数量增加而上升。

papers.title: Vesselpose: Vessel Graph Reconstruction from Learned Voxel-wise Direction Vectors in 3D Vascular Images
papers.abstract: Blood vessel segmentation and -tracing are essential tasks in many medical imaging applications. Although numerous methods exist, the prevailing segment-then-fix paradigm is fundamentally limited regarding its suitability for modeling the task of complete and topologically accurate vascular network reconstruction. Here, we propose an approach to extract topologically more accurate vascular graphs from 3D image data, building upon highly successful ideas from the related biomedical tasks of cell segmentation and -tracking. Our approach first predicts voxel-wise vessel direction vectors joint with standard vessel segmentation masks. Second, to extract the vascular graph from these predictions, we introduce a direction-vector-guided extension of the TEASAR algorithm. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on three benchmark datasets, spanning both synthetic and real imagery. We further demonstrate the applicability of our approach to challenging 3D micro-CT scans of rat heart vasculature. Finally, we propose meaningful and interpretable measures of topological error, namely false splits and false merges for graphs. Overall, our approach substantially improves the topological accuracy of reconstructed vascular graphs, being able to separate closely apposed vessel segments and handle multiple vascular trees within a single volume.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种结合体素方向向量预测与改进TEASAR算法的血管图重建方法，显著提升拓扑准确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有血管分割与追踪方法多采用‘先分割后修复’范式，难以完整且拓扑准确地重建血管网络，尤其在处理紧密相邻的血管段和多血管树时存在瓶颈。

papers.title: Hierarchical Abstract Tree for Cross-Document Retrieval-Augmented Generation
papers.abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) enhances large language models with external knowledge, and tree-based RAG organizes documents into hierarchical indexes to support queries at multiple granularities. However, existing Tree-RAG methods designed for single-document retrieval face critical challenges in scaling to cross-document multi-hop questions: (1) poor distribution adaptability, where $k$-means clustering introduces noise due to rigid distribution assumptions; (2) structural isolation, as tree indexes lack explicit cross-document connections; and (3) coarse abstraction, which obscures fine-grained details. To address these limitations, we propose $Ψ$-RAG, a tree-RAG framework with two key components. First, a hierarchical abstract tree index built through an iterative "merging and collapse" process that adapts to data distributions without a priori assumption. Second, a multi-granular retrieval agent that intelligently interacts with the knowledge base with reorganized queries and an agent-powered hybrid retriever. $Ψ$-RAG supports diverse tasks from token-level question answering to document-level summarization. On cross-document multi-hop QA benchmarks, it outperforms RAPTOR by 25.9% and HippoRAG 2 by 7.4% in average F1 score. Code is available at https://github.com/Newiz430/Psi-RAG.

analysis.tldr: 提出Ψ-RAG，通过层次抽象树索引和智能检索代理，显著提升跨文档多跳问答性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有树状RAG方法针对单文档检索设计，在跨文档多跳问题上存在分布适应性差、结构孤立和抽象粗糙等挑战。
analysis.problem: 解决树状RAG在跨文档多跳问答中的分布适应性、结构连接和细粒度抽象问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有Tree-RAG方法在跨文档场景下存在三个关键瓶颈：k-means聚类因刚性分布假设引入噪声、树索引缺乏跨文档连接、粗粒度抽象丢失细节。
analysis.method: 提出Ψ-RAG框架，包含两个核心组件：通过迭代“合并-折叠”过程构建自适应数据分布的层次抽象树索引，以及多粒度检索代理，该代理利用重组查询和混合检索器智能交互知识库。
contributions: 提出Ψ-RAG框架，通过层次抽象树索引和智能检索代理解决跨文档多跳RAG的三大挑战。
在跨文档多跳QA基准上，Ψ-RAG在平均F1分数上分别超越RAPTOR 25.9%和HippoRAG 2 7.4%。
analysis.experiments: 在跨文档多跳问答基准上评估，Ψ-RAG在平均F1分数上比RAPTOR提升25.9%，比HippoRAG 2提升7.4%。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量文档分块和摘要生成。

papers.title: SAGA: Workflow-Atomic Scheduling for AI Agent Inference on GPU Clusters
papers.abstract: AI agents execute tens to hundreds of chained LLM calls per task, yet GPU schedulers treat each call as independent, discarding gigabytes of intermediate state between steps and inflating end-to-end latency by 3-8x. We argue that this request-level abstraction is fundamentally mismatched to compound AI workloads, and propose a shift to program-level scheduling: treating the entire agent workflow (not individual inference calls) as the first-class schedulable unit. We present SAGA, a distributed scheduler that implements this abstraction through three mechanisms: (1) Agent Execution Graphs that capture workflow structure to predict KV cache reuse across tool-call boundaries, achieving within 1.31x of Bélády's optimal offline policy; (2) session-affinity batching with work stealing that co-locates correlated requests while maintaining global load balance; and (3) Agent Fair Share, a task-completion-time fairness metric with provable bounded-deviation guarantees. On a 64-GPU cluster serving SWE-bench coding agents and WebArena browser tasks, SAGA reduces task completion time by 1.64x (geometric mean, p < 0.001) over vLLM v0.15.1 with prefix caching and affinity routing, while improving GPU memory utilization by 1.22x and achieving 99.2% SLO attainment under multi-tenant interference. These latency gains come at a quantified cost: approximately 30% lower peak throughput than throughput-optimal batch scheduling, a tradeoff appropriate for the latency-sensitive interactive deployments that dominate compound AI usage. Our results demonstrate that workflow-aware scheduling is essential for efficient compound AI serving.

analysis.tldr: 提出工作流原子调度器SAGA，将AI Agent的整个工作流作为调度单元，显著降低端到端延迟。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有GPU调度器将LLM调用视为独立请求，丢弃中间状态导致3-8x延迟膨胀，无法匹配复合AI工作负载的链式调用特性。
analysis.problem: 如何将AI Agent工作流（而非单个推理调用）作为调度单元，以减少中间状态丢弃和端到端延迟。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 请求级抽象导致KV缓存等中间状态在步骤间被丢弃，造成3-8x延迟膨胀；工作流感知调度可预测KV缓存重用。
analysis.method: SAGA分布式调度器，包含Agent执行图（预测KV缓存重用）、会话亲和批处理与工作窃取、Agent公平份额（任务完成时间公平性指标）。
contributions: 提出程序级调度抽象，将整个Agent工作流作为调度单元
设计Agent执行图实现接近最优的KV缓存重用（1.31x Bélády最优）
实现会话亲和批处理与工作窃取，平衡局部性与负载

analysis.experiments: 在64-GPU集群上，使用SWE-bench编码Agent和WebArena浏览器任务，与vLLM v0.15.1（前缀缓存+亲和路由）相比，任务完成时间降低1.64x（几何平均，p<0.001），GPU内存利用率提升1.22x，多租户干扰下SLO达标率99.2%。峰值吞吐量降低约30%。
limitations: 峰值吞吐量低于吞吐最优批处理约30%

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出工作流原子调度器SAGA，将AI Agent的整个工作流作为调度单元，显著降低端到端延迟。

papers.title: Multi-frame Restoration for High-rate Lissajous Confocal Laser Endomicroscopy
papers.abstract: Lissajous confocal laser endomicroscopy (CLE) is a promising solution for high speed in vivo optical biopsy for handheld scenarios. However, Lissajous scanning traces a resonant trajectory and samples only the visited pixels per frame; at high frame rates, many pixels remain unvisited, creating structured holes. In this work, we introduce the first benchmark for high-rate Lissajous CLE, consisting of low-quality video clips paired with high-quality reference images. The reference images are wide-FOV mosaics obtained by stitching stabilized, slow-scan frames of the same tissue, enabling temporally aligned supervision. Using this dataset, we propose MIRA, a lightweight recurrent framework for Lissajous CLE restoration that iteratively aggregates temporal context through feature reuse and displacement alignment. Our experiments demonstrate that MIRA outperforms both lightweight and high-complexity baselines in restoration quality while maintaining a favorable computational efficiency suitable for clinical deployment.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个高帧率Lissajous共聚焦激光内窥镜视频恢复基准和轻量级循环框架MIRA。
analysis.research_motivation: Lissajous CLE在手持高速活体光学活检中具有潜力，但高帧率下每帧存在大量未访问像素形成结构空洞，现有方法缺乏针对该场景的基准和高效恢复方案。

analysis.method: 提出MIRA，一种轻量级循环框架，通过特征复用和位移对齐迭代聚合时间上下文进行恢复。
contributions: 首个高帧率Lissajous CLE恢复基准，包含低质视频与高质量参考图像对。
提出MIRA框架，在恢复质量和计算效率上优于轻量级和高复杂度基线。

papers.title: IdentiFace: Multi-Modal Iterative Diffusion Framework for Identifiable Suspect Face Generation in Crime Investigations
papers.abstract: Suspect face generation remains a technical challenge in crime investigations. Traditional sketch-drawing workflows suffer from low efficiency and quality, while diffusion-based approaches still face intrinsic limitations on conditional ambiguity for text-to-image models and sampling variance for one-shot generation. We proposed IdentiFace, a novel diffusion-based framework for identifiable suspect face generation, which addressed these issues through (1) multi-modal input design to strengthen conditional control, and (2) an iterative generation pipeline enabling identifiable feature adjustment. We additionally contributed a facial identity loss and two task-specific datasets. Comprehensive experiments on synthetic datasets and in real-world scenarios indicate that IdentiFace achieves superior performance over existing methods, especially in terms of identity retrieval, and shows strong potential for practical applications.

analysis.tldr: 提出多模态迭代扩散框架IdentiFace，用于犯罪调查中可识别嫌疑人面部生成，通过多模态输入和迭代生成提升身份检索性能。

analysis.problem: 解决嫌疑人面部生成中条件控制模糊和单次生成采样方差导致的身份不可识别问题。

贡献面部身份损失和两个任务特定数据集，提升身份可识别性。

papers.title: Silicon Showdown: Performance, Efficiency, and Ecosystem Barriers in Consumer-Grade LLM Inference
papers.abstract: The operational landscape of local Large Language Model (LLM) inference has shifted from lightweight models to datacenter-class weights exceeding 70B parameters, creating profound systems challenges for consumer hardware. This paper presents a systematic empirical analysis of the Nvidia and Apple Silicon ecosystems, specifically characterizing the distinct intra-architecture trade-offs required to deploy these massive models. On the Nvidia Blackwell architecture, we identify a critical "Backend Dichotomy" within the TensorRT-LLM stack: while the new NVFP4 quantization format delivers a 1.6x throughput advantage over optimized BF16 baselines (151 tokens/s vs. 92 tokens/s), realizing this performance requires navigating complex runtime constraints that trade startup latency for generation speed. Furthermore, we characterize the "VRAM Wall" for 70B+ models: on discrete GPUs, users face a destructive choice between aggressive quantization (e.g., Q2) that degrades model intelligence to fit in VRAM, or PCIe-bottlenecked CPU offloading, which reduces throughput by over 90% compared to full-GPU execution. Conversely, Apple's Unified Memory Architecture (UMA) circumvents these bottlenecks, enabling linear scaling for 80B parameter models at practical 4-bit precisions. This architectural divergence extends to operational sustainability, where Apple's SoC design demonstrates up to a 23x advantage in energy efficiency (tokens/joule). We conclude that for consumer-grade inference, the optimal hardware is defined by a complex interplay between compute density (Nvidia) and memory capacity (Apple), moderated by the significant "ecosystem friction" of proprietary quantization workflows.

analysis.tldr: 系统对比Nvidia和Apple Silicon在消费级70B+大模型推理上的性能、效率和生态壁垒，揭示架构差异带来的权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 消费级硬件运行70B+大模型面临严峻的系统挑战，现有研究缺乏对Nvidia和Apple Silicon两大生态系统的系统性实证对比，用户难以根据自身需求选择最优硬件和部署策略。
analysis.problem: 量化分析Nvidia Blackwell架构（TensorRT-LLM）和Apple Silicon（UMA）在消费级LLM推理中的性能、效率及生态障碍，揭示不同架构下的关键权衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Nvidia Blackwell存在'后端二分法'：NVFP4量化相比BF16吞吐量提升1.6倍（151 vs 92 tokens/s），但需在启动延迟和生成速度间权衡；70B+模型遭遇'VRAM墙'：要么激进量化（如Q2）降低模型智能，要么CPU卸载导致吞吐量下降超90%。Apple UMA可规避这些瓶颈，支持80B模型以4-bit精度线性扩展，且能效优势达23倍。
analysis.method: 系统实证分析：在Nvidia Blackwell和Apple Silicon上部署70B+模型，测量吞吐量、延迟、能效（tokens/joule），并分析TensorRT-LLM的量化格式（NVFP4 vs BF16）及CPU卸载影响。
contributions: 首次系统对比Nvidia Blackwell和Apple Silicon在消费级70B+ LLM推理中的性能、效率和生态壁垒。
识别并量化了Nvidia架构的'后端二分法'和'VRAM墙'现象，以及Apple UMA的线性扩展和能效优势。
揭示了计算密度（Nvidia）与内存容量（Apple）之间的根本权衡，并指出专有量化工作流带来的生态摩擦。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及了NVFP4 vs BF16的吞吐量对比（151 vs 92 tokens/s）和Apple能效优势（23倍）。
limitations: 仅针对Nvidia Blackwell和Apple Silicon，未覆盖其他消费级硬件（如AMD、Intel）。
未深入评估不同量化精度对模型智能的具体影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统对比Nvidia和Apple Silicon在消费级70B+大模型推理上的性能、效率和生态壁垒，揭示架构差异带来的权衡。

papers.title: PhysiGen: Integrating Collision-Aware Physical Constraints for High-Fidelity Human-Human Interaction Generation
papers.abstract: Despite substantial progress in text-driven 3D human motion synthesis, generating realistic multi-person interaction sequences remains challenging. Notably, body inter-penetration is a pervasive issue from both data acquisition to the generated results, which significantly undermines the realism and usability. Previous generative models either ignored this issue or introduced computationally expensive mesh-level loss functions to alleviate inter-body collisions. In this paper, we propose a general-purpose and computationally efficient optimization strategy named PhysiGen to explicitly integrate collision-aware physical constraints for human-human interaction generation. Specifically, we simplify the high-resolution human body mesh into geometric primitives to greatly reduce the cost of inter-person collision detection. Moreover, we identify the collision regions as the guidance of the optimization directions. PhysiGen is plug-and-play and can be readily integrated into existing human interaction generation models. Extensive cross-dataset and cross-model experiments show that our method can effectively reduce interpenetration and significantly improve visual coherence and physical plausibility compared to the state-of-the-art methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种轻量级碰撞感知物理约束优化策略，有效减少多人交互生成中的身体穿插问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本驱动3D人体运动合成方法在生成多人交互时普遍存在身体穿插问题，严重影响真实感和可用性，而此前方法要么忽略该问题，要么引入计算昂贵的网格级损失函数。
analysis.problem: 如何高效且通用地减少多人交互生成中的身体穿插，提升视觉一致性和物理合理性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 身体穿插是多人交互生成中从数据采集到生成结果普遍存在的关键问题，现有方法难以兼顾效果与效率。
analysis.method: 将高分辨率人体网格简化为几何基元以降低碰撞检测成本，并识别碰撞区域作为优化方向指导，提出即插即用的优化策略PhysiGen。
contributions: 提出一种通用且计算高效的优化策略PhysiGen，显式集成碰撞感知物理约束。
通过简化人体为几何基元和碰撞区域引导优化，大幅降低计算开销并提升效果。
跨数据集和跨模型实验验证了该方法在减少穿插、提升视觉和物理合理性上的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集和模型上进行跨数据集和跨模型实验，与最先进方法比较，显示有效减少穿插并提升视觉连贯性和物理合理性。
limitations: 几何基元简化可能丢失部分细节，极端姿态下效果可能受限。
优化策略依赖碰撞检测精度，复杂场景下可能仍有残留穿插。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法简洁有效，实验充分，对多人交互生成有实用价值，但属于增量优化。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种轻量级碰撞感知物理约束优化策略，有效减少多人交互生成中的身体穿插问题。

papers.title: Space Network of Experts: Architecture and Expert Placement
papers.abstract: Leveraging continuous solar energy harvesting at high efficiency, space data centers are envisioned as a promising platform for executing energy-intensive large language models (LLMs). Recognizing this advantage, space and AI conglomerates (e.g., SpaceX, Google) are actively investing in this vision. One key challenge, however, is the efficient distributed deployment of a large-scale LLM in a satellite network due to the limited onboard computing and communication resources. This gives rise to a placement problem that involves partitioning and mapping model components to satellites such that the fundamentally different model architecture and network topology can be reconciled to ensure low-latency token generation. To address this problem, we present the Space Network of Experts (Space-XNet) framework targeting the distributed execution of a popular mixture-of-experts (MoE) model in space. The proposed placement strategies are two-level: (1) layer placement, which assigns MoE layers to satellite subnets; and (2) intra-layer expert placement, which assigns individual experts to satellites associated with the same layer/subnet. For layer placement, we exploit the ring-like communication pattern of autoregressive inference to partition the satellite constellation along the orbiting direction into subnets arranged on a ring, each hosting one MoE layer. Based on this architecture, we formulate and solve an optimization problem for intra-layer expert placement to map experts with heterogeneous activation probabilities onto satellites. The derived strategy reveals an intuitive principle: a frequently activated expert should be mapped to a satellite on a routing path with low expected latency. Experiments over a thousand-satellite constellation show that Space-XNet achieves at least a threefold latency reduction compared with conventional random and ablation-based placement strategies.

analysis.tldr: 提出Space-XNet框架，通过两层专家放置策略优化卫星网络中MoE模型的分布式推理延迟。
analysis.research_motivation: 空间数据中心利用太阳能高效执行大语言模型，但卫星网络计算和通信资源有限，需要高效分布式部署以降低延迟。
analysis.problem: 如何将大规模MoE模型分区并映射到卫星网络，以协调模型架构与网络拓扑，实现低延迟令牌生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Space-XNet框架，包含两层放置策略：层放置将MoE层分配到卫星子网（利用自回归推理的环状通信模式）；层内专家放置将专家映射到卫星，优化问题以最小化期望延迟，原则是高频专家应放在低延迟路径上。
contributions: 提出Space-XNet框架，针对卫星网络分布式执行MoE模型。
设计两层专家放置策略，包括层放置和层内专家放置，并推导出直观的放置原则。
analysis.experiments: 在千颗卫星星座上实验，Space-XNet相比随机和消融基线实现至少三倍延迟降低。
limitations: 可能仅适用于环状通信拓扑的卫星网络。
未考虑动态网络条件（如卫星移动、链路变化）。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验验证有效，但应用场景较特定，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Space-XNet框架，通过两层专家放置策略优化卫星网络中MoE模型的分布式推理延迟。

papers.title: Scale-Aware Adversarial Analysis: A Diagnostic for Generative AI in Multiscale Complex Systems
papers.abstract: Complex physical systems, from supersonic turbulence to the macroscopic structure of the universe, are governed by continuous multiscale dynamics. While modern machine learning architectures excel at mapping the high-dimensional observables of these systems, it remains unclear whether they internalize the governing physical laws or merely interpolate discrete statistical correlations. Standard Explainable AI (XAI) architectures, particularly perturbation-based and gradient-saliency methods, rely on pixel-wise perturbations, which generate unphysical artifacts and push inputs off the valid empirical distribution. To resolve this, we introduce a diagnostic framework driven by Constrained Diffusion Decomposition (CDD), a diffusion-based multiscale data decomposition algorithm that enables physically constrained data generation and model evaluation via scale-aware modifications. Applying this framework to a Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model (DDPM), we execute deterministic interventions directly within the continuous, CDD-based scale space. We demonstrate that under moderate physical perturbations, the unconstrained generative model exhibits localized structural freezing and non-linear instability rather than continuous PDE-like responses. The network fails to maintain cross-scale continuity, causing the generative trajectory to diverge when pushed into unseen physical states. By synthesizing a continuum of physically coherent states, this scale-informed methodology establishes a controlled test ground to evaluate algorithmic vulnerabilities, providing the rigorous physical constraints necessary for future architectures to respect the multiscale causality of the natural universe.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于约束扩散分解的尺度感知对抗分析框架，诊断生成模型在多尺度复杂系统中的物理一致性缺陷。
analysis.research_motivation: 复杂物理系统具有连续多尺度动力学，但现有生成模型可能仅插值统计相关性而非内化物理规律，标准XAI方法因像素级扰动产生非物理伪影，无法有效评估模型对物理定律的遵循程度。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种物理约束的诊断框架，通过尺度感知的对抗性干预来检测生成模型在多尺度复杂系统中的物理一致性和鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在中等物理扰动下，无约束扩散模型表现出局部结构冻结和非线性不稳定性，而非连续的PDE式响应；网络无法维持跨尺度连续性，导致生成轨迹在未见物理状态下发散。
analysis.method: 提出约束扩散分解（CDD）算法，基于扩散过程实现多尺度数据分解，并利用尺度感知修改进行物理约束的数据生成和模型评估；应用于DDPM，在CDD尺度空间内执行确定性干预。
contributions: 提出CDD框架，实现物理约束的多尺度数据生成和模型评估
通过尺度感知对抗分析揭示生成模型在跨尺度连续性上的根本缺陷
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对DDPM模型进行测试，未推广到其他生成架构
CDD算法的计算开销和可扩展性未讨论
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，针对生成模型物理一致性诊断有重要价值，但摘要缺乏实验细节，影响评分。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于约束扩散分解的尺度感知对抗分析框架，诊断生成模型在多尺度复杂系统中的物理一致性缺陷。

papers.title: PrismAgent: Illuminating Harm in Memes via a Zero-Shot Interpretable Multi-Agent Framework
papers.abstract: The rapid spread of memes makes harmful content detection increasingly crucial, as effective identification can curb the circulation of misinformation. However, existing methods rely heavily on high-volume annotated data, which leads to substantial training costs and limited generalization. To address these challenges, we propose PrismAgent, a zero-shot, multi-agent, interpretable framework. PrismAgent conceptualizes this task as a criminal case investigation, employing four specialized agents responsible for the analysis, investigation, prosecution, and judgment stages within a structured collaborative workflow. In the first stage, the analyst agent paraphrases each meme under benevolent and malicious assumptions to probe its underlying intent. The investigator agent then retrieves supporting evidence from an unannotated dataset and constructs contextual interpretations for the meme and its variants. Next, the prosecutor agent performs three independent preliminary judgments by pairing the original meme with each of the three interpretations. Finally, the judge agent deliberates across all evidence to render a final verdict. Moreover, PrismAgent's explicit multi-stage reasoning chain makes the model inherently interpretable, as every intermediate step is explicitly explained rather than only producing a final detection result. Extensive experiments on three public datasets show that PrismAgent significantly outperforms existing zero-shot detection methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出零样本多智能体框架PrismAgent，通过模拟刑事案件调查流程实现有害模因的可解释检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有有害模因检测方法依赖大量标注数据，训练成本高且泛化能力有限，亟需零样本且可解释的检测方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在零样本条件下实现有害模因的准确检测，并保证检测过程可解释。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将有害模因检测建模为刑事案件调查，设计四个智能体（分析、调查、起诉、审判）协作：分析智能体从善意和恶意假设解读模因；调查智能体从未标注数据中检索证据并构建上下文解释；起诉智能体进行三次独立初步判断；审判智能体综合所有证据做出最终裁决。
contributions: 提出零样本多智能体框架PrismAgent，无需标注数据即可检测有害模因。
通过显式的多阶段推理链实现模型内在可解释性。
analysis.experiments: 在三个公开数据集上，PrismAgent显著优于现有零样本检测方法。
limitations: 可能依赖外部知识库或未标注数据集的质量。

analysis.reason: 零样本多智能体框架设计新颖，可解释性强，实验验证有效，但技术细节和局限性需进一步阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出零样本多智能体框架PrismAgent，通过模拟刑事案件调查流程实现有害模因的可解释检测。

papers.title: LLM-Oriented Information Retrieval: A Denoising-First Perspective
papers.abstract: Modern information retrieval (IR) is no longer consumed primarily by humans but increasingly by large language models (LLMs) via retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and agentic search. Unlike human users, LLMs are constrained by limited attention budgets and are uniquely vulnerable to noise; misleading or irrelevant information is no longer just a nuisance, but a direct cause of hallucinations and reasoning failures. In this perspective paper, we argue that denoising-maximizing usable evidence density and verifiability within a context window-is becoming the primary bottleneck across the full information access pipeline. We conceptualize this paradigm shift through a four-stage framework of IR challenges: from inaccessible to undiscoverable, to misaligned, and finally to unverifiable. Furthermore, we provide a pipeline-organized taxonomy of signal-to-noise optimization techniques, spanning indexing, retrieval, context engineering, verification, and agentic workflow. We also present research works on information denoising in domains that rely heavily on retrieval such as lifelong assistant, coding agent, deep research, and multimodal understanding.

analysis.tldr: 本文从去噪优先视角重新审视面向LLM的信息检索，指出噪声是导致幻觉和推理失败的核心瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代IR系统越来越多地为LLM服务，但LLM对噪声高度敏感，现有IR方法未充分针对LLM的注意力预算和噪声脆弱性进行优化。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地解决面向LLM的IR中噪声问题，提高上下文窗口内的可用证据密度和可验证性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出噪声是LLM幻觉和推理失败的直接原因，并提出了从不可访问到不可验证的四阶段挑战框架。
analysis.method: 提出一个四阶段框架（不可访问→不可发现→不对齐→不可验证）和管道组织的信噪比优化技术分类法，涵盖索引、检索、上下文工程、验证和智能体工作流。
contributions: 从去噪优先视角重新定义面向LLM的IR核心瓶颈。
提出四阶段挑战框架和系统化的去噪技术分类法。

papers.title: End-to-End Autoregressive Image Generation with 1D Semantic Tokenizer
papers.abstract: Autoregressive image modeling relies on visual tokenizers to compress images into compact latent representations. We design an end-to-end training pipeline that jointly optimizes reconstruction and generation, enabling direct supervision from generation results to the tokenizer. This contrasts with prior two-stage approaches that train tokenizers and generative models separately. We further investigate leveraging vision foundation models to improve 1D tokenizers for autoregressive modeling. Our autoregressive generative model achieves strong empirical results, including a state-of-the-art FID score of 1.48 without guidance on ImageNet 256x256 generation.

analysis.tldr: 提出端到端联合训练1D语义分词器和自回归图像生成模型，在ImageNet 256x256上达到1.48 FID。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自回归图像生成方法通常分两阶段训练分词器和生成模型，导致生成结果无法直接反馈优化分词器，限制了生成质量。
analysis.problem: 如何设计端到端训练流程，使分词器能从生成任务中直接获得监督信号，并利用视觉基础模型提升1D分词器性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建端到端训练管线，联合优化图像重建和自回归生成损失；引入视觉基础模型改进1D语义分词器。
contributions: 提出端到端联合训练范式，使分词器直接受益于生成监督
利用视觉基础模型提升1D分词器在自回归建模中的效果
在ImageNet 256x256上取得1.48 FID的SOTA结果（无引导）

limitations: 仅验证了图像生成任务，未扩展到其他模态

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出端到端联合训练1D语义分词器和自回归图像生成模型，在ImageNet 256x256上达到1.48 FID。

papers.title: GOR-IS: 3D Gaussian Object Removal in the Intrinsic Space
papers.abstract: Recent advances in Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) and 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) have made it standard practice to reconstruct 3D scenes from multi-view images. Removing objects from such 3D representations is a fundamental editing task that requires complete and seamless inpainting of occluded regions, ensuring consistency in geometry and appearance. Although existing methods have made notable progress in improving inpainting consistency, they often neglect global lighting effects, leading to physically implausible results. Moreover, these methods struggle with view-dependent non-Lambertian surfaces, where appearance varies across viewpoints, leading to unreliable inpainting. In this paper, we present 3D Gaussian Object Removal in the Intrinsic Space (GOR-IS), a novel framework for physically consistent and visually coherent 3D object removal. Our approach decomposes the scene into intrinsic components and explicitly models light transport to maintain global lighting effects consistency. Furthermore, we introduce an intrinsic-space inpainting module that operates directly in the material and lighting domains, effectively addressing the challenges posed by non-Lambertian surfaces. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that our framework substantially improves the physical consistency and visual coherence of object removal, outperforming existing methods by 13% in perceptual similarity (LPIPS) and 2dB in peak signal-to-noise ratio (PSNR). Code is publicly available at https://applezyh.github.io/GOR-IS-project-page/

analysis.tldr: 提出GOR-IS框架，在内在空间分解场景并显式建模光照传输，实现物理一致且视觉连贯的3D物体移除。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D物体移除方法常忽略全局光照效应，导致结果物理不真实，且难以处理视点依赖的非朗伯表面，需要更一致的几何与外观修复。
analysis.problem: 如何从3D高斯表示中移除物体并实现物理一致、视觉连贯的修复，同时保持全局光照效果和处理非朗伯表面。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有方法忽略全局光照效应，导致物理不真实；且对非朗伯表面（外观随视角变化）修复不可靠。
analysis.method: 将场景分解为内在组件（材质与光照），显式建模光传输以保持全局光照一致性；在材质和光照域直接进行内在空间修复。
contributions: 提出GOR-IS框架，首次在内在空间进行3D高斯物体移除，显式建模光照传输。
引入内在空间修复模块，直接在材质和光照域操作，有效处理非朗伯表面。
在合成和真实数据集上显著提升物理一致性和视觉连贯性，LPIPS提升13%，PSNR提升2dB。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实数据集上评估，与现有方法相比，LPIPS提升13%，PSNR提升2dB。
limitations: 可能依赖多视角输入，单视角场景适用性未知。
内在分解的准确性可能影响最终修复质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验效果显著，与3D视觉场景编辑方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GOR-IS框架，在内在空间分解场景并显式建模光照传输，实现物理一致且视觉连贯的3D物体移除。

papers.title: "What Are You Really Trying to Do?": Co-Creating Life Goals from Everyday Computer Use
papers.abstract: Recent advances in user modeling make it feasible to conduct open-ended inference over a person's everyday computer use. Despite longstanding visions of systems that deeply understand our actions and the purposes they serve in our lives, existing systems only capture what a person is doing in the moment -- not why they are doing it -- limiting these systems to surface-level support. We introduce striving co-creation, a process for inferring broader life goals from unstructured observations of computer use. Grounded in Activity Theory and Emmons' personal strivings framework, our system progressively constructs a hierarchical representation of a person's activities. Crucially, strivings are difficult to fully resolve from observation alone, as the same action can be driven by many different goals. Our system therefore supports an editing interface that gives people agency over how they are understood by the system, feeding their corrections back into subsequent rounds of striving induction. In a week-long field deployment (N=14), we find that our co-creation process produces strivings that are representative of participants' long-term goals and gives them greater agency than baseline methods.

analysis.tldr: 通过日常计算机使用行为推断人生目标，并引入用户协同编辑机制提升目标表征的准确性与用户掌控感。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有用户建模系统仅能捕捉用户当前行为（what），无法理解行为背后的深层动机（why），导致支持停留在表面层面。
analysis.problem: 如何从非结构化的计算机使用观察中推断用户的人生目标，并解决单一行为对应多目标的不确定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 同一行为可能由多种不同目标驱动，仅靠观察难以完全解析个人追求。
analysis.method: 基于活动理论与个人追求框架，构建层次化活动表征，并通过编辑界面让用户修正推断结果，形成协同创作循环。
contributions: 提出“追求协同创作”过程，从日常计算机使用中推断人生目标。
设计编辑界面赋予用户对系统理解的掌控权，并利用用户反馈迭代优化目标推断。
analysis.experiments: 在为期一周的实地部署（N=14）中，协同创作过程产生的追求能代表参与者的长期目标，且比基线方法赋予用户更大掌控感。
limitations: 样本量较小（N=14），可能限制泛化性。
仅依赖计算机使用数据，未考虑线下活动。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖但应用场景较窄，与核心方向弱相关，适合保存后续参考。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过日常计算机使用行为推断人生目标，并引入用户协同编辑机制提升目标表征的准确性与用户掌控感。

papers.title: High-Speed Vision Improves Zero-Shot Semantic Understanding of Human Actions
papers.abstract: Understanding human actions from visual observations is essential for human--robot interaction, particularly when semantic interpretation of unfamiliar or hard-to-annotate actions is required. In scenarios such as rapid and less common activities, collecting sufficient labeled data for supervised learning is challenging, making zero-shot approaches a practical alternative for semantic understanding without task-specific training. While recent advances in large-scale pretrained models enable such zero-shot reasoning, the impact of temporal resolution, especially for rapid and fine-grained motions, remains underexplored. In this study, we investigate how temporal resolution affects zero-shot semantic understanding of high-speed human actions. Using kendo as a representative case of rapid and subtle motion patterns, we propose a training-free pipeline that combines a pre-trained video-language model for semantic representation with large language model-based reasoning for pairwise action comparison. Through controlled experiments across multiple frame rates (120 Hz, 60 Hz, and 30 Hz), we show that higher temporal resolution significantly improves semantic separability in zero-shot settings. We further analyze the role of tracking-based human joint information under both full and partial observation scenarios. Quantitative evaluation using a nearest-class prototype strategy demonstrates that high-speed video provides more stable and interpretable semantic representations for fast actions. These findings highlight the importance of temporal resolution in training-free action recognition and suggest that high-speed perception can enhance semantic understanding capabilities.

analysis.tldr: 高帧率视频显著提升零样本动作理解的语义可分性。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解人类动作对人机交互至关重要，但快速、罕见动作难以收集标注数据，零样本方法成为实用替代；然而时间分辨率对零样本语义理解的影响尚未被充分探索。
analysis.problem: 探究时间分辨率（帧率）如何影响零样本条件下对高速人类动作的语义理解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一种免训练流程，结合预训练视频-语言模型进行语义表示，并利用大语言模型进行成对动作比较；通过控制帧率（120Hz、60Hz、30Hz）进行实验。
contributions: 首次系统研究时间分辨率对零样本动作语义理解的影响。
提出免训练流水线，结合视频-语言模型和LLM推理实现零样本动作比较。
通过剑道动作实验证明高帧率显著提升语义可分性。
analysis.experiments: 在剑道动作数据集上，使用最近类原型策略进行定量评估，比较不同帧率下的语义表示稳定性。
limitations: 仅针对剑道这一特定领域，泛化性待验证。
未提供与其他零样本方法的对比结果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 研究角度新颖但方法简单，实验规模有限，适合关注零样本动作识别的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 高帧率视频显著提升零样本动作理解的语义可分性。

papers.title: SCARV: Structure-Constrained Aggregation for Stable Sample Ranking in Redundant NLP Datasets
papers.abstract: Sample-level rankings are increasingly used in data-centric NLP for analysis, filtering, debugging, and curation, yet existing pipelines typically score training examples pointwise and rank them as if they were independent. This assumption is fragile in the presence of exact duplicates, near-duplicates, paraphrases, and other redundant structure common in NLP corpora, where stochastic training can make highly similar examples receive unstable relative orderings across random seeds. We study stable sample-level ranking under redundancy and propose \textsc{SCARV}, a modular aggregation framework that operates on top of an existing scoring proxy. \textsc{SCARV} combines robust multi-seed aggregation with a structure-aware aggregation/allocation step over redundancy clusters. Across synthetic redundancy, naturally mined QQP redundancy, multiple proxy families, several NLP tasks, and end-to-end DistilBERT fine-tuning, \textsc{SCARV} substantially improves over bare proxy rankings in global and local stability and yields more reproducible ranking-based decisions such as subset selection and suspicious-example retrieval. Our decomposition and compute-aware frontier sharpen the mechanism: robust multi-seed aggregation is the dominant generic stabilizer, while the structure-aware component adds value mainly under low aggregation budgets or when redundancy clusters are informative, naturally occurring, or sufficiently covered. These results position \textsc{SCARV} not as a universal data selector or a universally dominant replacement for seed-only aggregation, but as a stability-oriented aggregation layer for proxy-induced rankings in redundant NLP datasets.

analysis.tldr: 提出SCARV框架，通过结构约束聚合提升冗余NLP数据集中样本排序的稳定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有样本排序方法假设样本独立，忽略NLP语料中的重复、近重复、同义改写等冗余结构，导致随机种子下排序不稳定，影响数据筛选、调试等下游决策的可重复性。
analysis.problem: 在存在冗余结构的NLP数据集中，如何实现稳定且可重复的样本级排序。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 随机训练使高度相似的样本在不同随机种子下获得不稳定的相对排序；冗余结构（如重复、近重复、同义改写）加剧了这种不稳定性。
analysis.method: SCARV是一个模块化聚合框架，在现有评分代理之上运行，结合鲁棒的多种子聚合与结构感知的聚合/分配步骤（在冗余簇上操作）。
contributions: 提出SCARV框架，通过多种子聚合与结构感知聚合提升排序稳定性。
在合成冗余、QQP自然冗余、多种代理族、多个NLP任务及端到端DistilBERT微调中验证了稳定性的显著提升。
揭示了鲁棒多种子聚合是主要通用稳定器，结构感知组件在低聚合预算或冗余簇信息丰富时更有价值。
analysis.experiments: 在合成冗余、自然冗余（QQP）、多种评分代理、多个NLP任务及DistilBERT微调中评估，SCARV在全局和局部稳定性上优于裸代理排序，并提升了子集选择和可疑样本检索等排序决策的可重复性。
limitations: SCARV并非通用数据选择器，也不是种子聚合的通用替代品。
结构感知组件的收益依赖于冗余簇的信息量和覆盖度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法针对NLP数据冗余排序稳定性问题，有明确创新和实验验证，但属于特定场景改进，影响范围有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SCARV框架，通过结构约束聚合提升冗余NLP数据集中样本排序的稳定性。

papers.title: MMAudio-LABEL: Audio Event Labeling via Audio Generation for Silent Video
papers.abstract: Recent advances in multimodal generation have enabled high-quality audio generation from silent videos. Practical applications, such as sound production, demand not only the generated audio but also explicit sound event labels detailing the type and timing of sounds. One straightforward approach involves applying a standard sound event detection to the generated audio. However, this post-hoc pipeline is inherently limited, as it is prone to error accumulation. To address this limitation, we propose MMAudio-LABEL (LAtent-Based Event Labeling), an event-aware audio generation framework built on a foundational audio generation model as its backbone that jointly generates audio and frame-aligned sound event predictions from silent videos. We evaluate our method on the Greatest Hits dataset for onset detection and 17-class material classification. Our approach improves onset-detection accuracy from 46.7% to 75.0% and material-classification accuracy from 40.6% to 61.0% over baselines. These results suggest that jointly learning audio generation and event prediction enables a more interpretable and practical video-to-audio synthesis.

analysis.tldr: 提出MMAudio-LABEL框架，在生成音频的同时预测声音事件标签，显著提升事件检测精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有无声视频生成音频的方法仅输出音频，但实际应用（如音效制作）还需要明确的声音事件标签（类型和时间），而先生成音频再检测事件的流水线方法容易累积误差。
analysis.problem: 如何从无声视频中同时生成高质量音频和帧对齐的声音事件标签，避免后处理流水线的误差累积。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于基础音频生成模型，构建事件感知的音频生成框架MMAudio-LABEL，在生成音频的同时联合预测帧对齐的声音事件标签。
contributions: 提出MMAudio-LABEL框架，实现音频生成与事件标签的联合学习。
在Greatest Hits数据集上，onset检测准确率从46.7%提升至75.0%，材料分类准确率从40.6%提升至61.0%。
analysis.experiments: 在Greatest Hits数据集上评估onset检测和17类材料分类任务，与基线方法对比。
limitations: 可能仅在特定数据集（Greatest Hits）上验证，泛化性未知。
未讨论事件标签的细粒度（如多标签或重叠事件）处理能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法有创新性，实验提升显著，但属于特定应用方向，与核心关注点中等相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MMAudio-LABEL框架，在生成音频的同时预测声音事件标签，显著提升事件检测精度。

papers.title: From Static Analysis to Audience Dissemination: A Training-Free Multimodal Controversy Detection Multi-Agent Framework
papers.abstract: Multimodal controversy detection (MCD) identifies controversial content in videos and their associated user comments, to support risk management for social video platforms.Prior research frames MCD as a static representation learning task, where features are directly extracted from videos and their accompanying comments. However, these methods fail to capture the diverse perspectives and evaluations from different audience groups. Inspired by the real-world process of content dissemination among audiences, we propose AuDisAgent, a training-free multi-agent framework that reformulates MCD as a dynamic propagation process.Our framework explicitly models audience dissemination through a structured multi-agent system. First, three specialized Screening Agents (Video Agent, Comment Agent, and Interaction Agent) conduct initial assessments from visual, textual, and cross-modal perspectives, respectively. For samples where the three agents cannot reach a consensus, a Viewing Panel Agent is activated to simulate post-screening discussions among audiences with diverse backgrounds and stances. This mechanism models how different audience groups interpret and react to the same content, uncovering latent controversial content that may emerge during the dissemination process. Finally, an Arbitration Agent renders the final judgment based on the complete reasoning chain from the preceding steps.In addition, to address the "cold-start" scenario where newly released videos have few or no comments, we design a Comment Bootstrapping Strategy that leverages historical public comments from semantically similar videos as the initial comment context. Extensive experiments on a public dataset demonstrate that our framework significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods in both rich-comment and limited-comment scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出无需训练的多智能体框架AuDisAgent，将多模态争议检测从静态表征学习重构为动态传播过程，显著提升视频争议检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有多模态争议检测方法将任务视为静态表征学习，直接从视频和评论中提取特征，无法捕捉不同观众群体的多样化视角和评价，导致对争议内容识别不足。
analysis.problem: 如何建模视频内容在观众群体中的动态传播过程，以更准确地检测多模态争议内容，尤其是在评论稀疏的冷启动场景下。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出AuDisAgent，一个无需训练的多智能体框架，包含三个筛选智能体（视频、评论、交互）进行初步评估，当不一致时激活观众小组智能体模拟不同背景观众的讨论，最后由仲裁智能体基于完整推理链做出判断；并设计评论引导策略利用历史评论解决冷启动问题。
contributions: 提出将多模态争议检测重构为动态传播过程，并设计多智能体框架AuDisAgent模拟观众讨论。
设计评论引导策略解决冷启动场景下评论稀疏的问题。
在公开数据集上显著超越现有方法，尤其在评论丰富和稀疏场景下均表现优异。
analysis.experiments: 在公开数据集上进行实验，结果表明框架在评论丰富和评论有限场景下均显著优于现有最先进方法。
limitations: 依赖预定义智能体角色和交互规则，可能无法覆盖所有真实传播场景。
评论引导策略依赖语义相似视频的历史评论，可能引入偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，将争议检测重构为动态传播过程，实验效果显著，但技术细节未完全展开。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需训练的多智能体框架AuDisAgent，将多模态争议检测从静态表征学习重构为动态传播过程，显著提升视频争议检测性能。

papers.title: Scalable Context-Aware Graph Attention for Unsupervised Anomaly Detection in Large-Scale Mobile Networks
papers.abstract: Mobile network operators must monitor thousands of heterogeneous network elements across the radio access network and the packet core, each exposing high-dimensional KPI time series. The scale and cost of incident labelling make supervised approaches impractical, motivating unsupervised anomaly detection robust to context shifts and nonstationarity. We propose \textbf{C-MTAD-GAT} (\emph{Context-aware Multivariate Time-series Anomaly Detection with Graph Attention}), an anomaly detection framework designed to operate as a single shared model across large populations of network elements. The model combines temporal and feature-wise graph attention with lightweight static and dynamic context conditioning and a dual-head decoder for reconstruction and multi-step forecasting. It produces per-element, per-feature anomaly scores, converted to alerts via fully unsupervised thresholds calibrated from validation residuals. On the TELCO dataset released with DC-VAE \cite{garcia2023onemodel}, C-MTAD-GAT improves event-level affiliation and pointwise F1 while generating fewer alarms than prior graph-attention and VAE-based baselines. We then apply the same system to nation-scale radio access and evolved packet core control-plane counter data from a mobile network operator, where it is deployed. Operator feedback indicates the alerts are actionable and support daily monitoring, showing scalability across domains without relying on labelled incidents.

analysis.tldr: 提出C-MTAD-GAT，一种结合图注意力与上下文条件的无监督异常检测框架，在移动网络大规模KPI时间序列上实现跨域部署。
analysis.research_motivation: 移动网络运营商需监控大量异构网元的高维KPI时间序列，但标注成本高、数据非平稳，现有监督方法不可行，亟需可扩展的无监督异常检测方法。
analysis.problem: 在大规模移动网络中，如何设计一个单一共享模型，对大量网元进行无监督、上下文感知的异常检测，并生成可操作的告警。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合时间维和特征维的图注意力机制，加入轻量级静态和动态上下文条件，使用双头解码器（重构+多步预测）生成逐元素、逐特征的异常分数，并通过无监督阈值校准产生告警。
contributions: 提出C-MTAD-GAT框架，融合图注意力与上下文条件，实现跨网元的共享模型无监督异常检测。
在TELCO数据集上相比基线（图注意力、VAE）提升事件级和点级F1，同时减少告警数量。
在真实全国规模移动网络（无线接入网和分组核心网）中部署，运营商反馈告警可操作且支持日常监控。
analysis.experiments: 在TELCO数据集上评估事件级和点级F1，并与DC-VAE等基线比较；在真实全国规模移动网络数据上部署并获取运营商反馈。
limitations: 可能依赖验证残差的无监督阈值校准，在不同网络场景下阈值泛化性未知。
仅针对KPI时间序列，未验证对其他类型数据（如日志）的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.reason: 方法结合图注意力和上下文条件，在真实大规模网络部署，但创新点增量，实验信息有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出C-MTAD-GAT，一种结合图注意力与上下文条件的无监督异常检测框架，在移动网络大规模KPI时间序列上实现跨域部署。

papers.title: Leveraging Vision-Language Models as Weak Annotators in Active Learning
papers.abstract: Active learning aims to reduce annotation cost by selectively querying informative samples for supervision under a limited labeling budget. In this work, we investigate how vision-language models (VLMs) can be leveraged to further reduce the reliance on costly human annotation within the active learning paradigm. To this end, we find that the reliability of VLMs varies significantly with label granularity in fine-grained recognition tasks: they perform poorly on fine-grained labels but can provide accurate coarse-grained labels. Leveraging this property, we propose an active learning framework that combines fine-grained human annotations with coarse-grained VLM-generated weak labels through instance-wise label assignment. We further model the systematic noise in VLM-generated labels using a small set of trusted full labels. Experiments on CUB200 and FGVC-Aircraft show that the proposed framework consistently outperforms existing active learning methods under the same annotation budget.

analysis.tldr: 利用VLM生成粗粒度弱标签，结合细粒度人工标注，在主动学习中降低标注成本。
analysis.research_motivation: 主动学习旨在减少标注成本，但传统方法仍依赖大量人工标注；VLM可提供弱标签但细粒度任务上可靠性差，需探索如何有效结合两者。
analysis.problem: 如何在主动学习框架中利用VLM的粗粒度弱标签来进一步降低对细粒度人工标注的依赖。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: VLM在细粒度识别任务中，粗粒度标签准确率高，细粒度标签准确率低。
analysis.method: 提出主动学习框架，结合细粒度人工标注和VLM生成的粗粒度弱标签，通过实例级标签分配融合，并用少量可信全标签建模VLM标签的系统噪声。
contributions: 发现VLM在细粒度任务中标签可靠性随粒度变化的现象。
提出结合粗粒度VLM弱标签和细粒度人工标注的主动学习框架。
在CUB200和FGVC-Aircraft上验证了方法优于现有主动学习方法。
analysis.experiments: 在CUB200和FGVC-Aircraft数据集上实验，所提框架在相同标注预算下持续优于现有主动学习方法。
limitations: 仅验证了细粒度图像分类任务，其他模态或任务未测试。
依赖VLM的粗粒度标签质量，若VLM粗粒度也不准确则可能失效。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有创新但实验规模有限，与VLM应用相关，推荐阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用VLM生成粗粒度弱标签，结合细粒度人工标注，在主动学习中降低标注成本。

papers.title: MSACT: Multistage Spatial Alignment for Stable Low-Latency Fine Manipulation
papers.abstract: Real-world fine manipulation, particularly in bimanual manipulation, typically requires low-latency control and stable visual localization, while collecting large-scale data is costly and limited demonstrations may lead to localization drift. Existing approaches make different trade-offs: action-chunking policies such as ACT enable low-latency execution and data efficiency but rely on dense visual features without explicit spatial consistency, generative methods such as Diffusion Policy improve expressiveness but can incur iterative sampling latency, vision-language-action and voxel-based methods enhance generalization and geometric grounding but require higher computational cost and system complexity. We introduce a multistage spatial attention module that extracts stable 2D attention points and jointly predicts future attention sequences with a temporal alignment loss. Built upon ACT with a pretrained ResNet visual prior, a multistage attention module extracts task-relevant 2D attention points as a local spatial modality for action prediction. To maintain consistent object tracking, we introduce a self-supervised objective that aligns predicted attention sequences with visual features from future frames, suppressing drift without keypoint annotations and improving stability of the vision-to-action mapping under limited data. Experiments on simulated and real-world fine manipulation tasks, conducted on the ALOHA bimanual platform, evaluate task success, attention drift, inference latency, and robustness to visual disturbances. Results indicate improvements in localization stability and task performance while maintaining low-latency inference under the tested conditions.

analysis.tldr: 提出多阶段空间注意力模块，在ACT框架上增强视觉定位稳定性，实现低延迟精细操作。
analysis.research_motivation: 真实世界精细操作（特别是双臂操作）需要低延迟控制和稳定视觉定位，但大规模数据收集成本高，有限演示可能导致定位漂移。现有方法在延迟、数据效率和空间一致性之间存在权衡。
analysis.problem: 如何在有限演示数据下，实现低延迟、高稳定性的视觉定位，避免动作预测中的漂移。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于ACT框架，引入多阶段空间注意力模块提取稳定的2D注意力点，并联合预测未来注意力序列，通过时间对齐损失（自监督）抑制漂移。
contributions: 提出多阶段空间注意力模块，提取任务相关的2D注意力点作为局部空间模态用于动作预测。
引入自监督时间对齐损失，对齐预测注意力序列与未来帧视觉特征，无需关键点标注即可抑制漂移。
analysis.experiments: 在模拟和真实精细操作任务（ALOHA双臂平台）上评估任务成功率、注意力漂移、推理延迟和对视觉干扰的鲁棒性。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练ResNet视觉先验，泛化到其他视觉骨干需验证。
自监督对齐损失在极端视觉干扰下可能失效。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法针对精细操作中的定位漂移问题，结合ACT和自监督对齐，有一定创新性，但实验规模有限，适合关注机器人操作的研究者阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多阶段空间注意力模块，在ACT框架上增强视觉定位稳定性，实现低延迟精细操作。

papers.title: From Local to Global to Mechanistic: An iERF-Centered Unified Framework for Interpreting Vision Models
papers.abstract: Modern vision models achieve remarkable accuracy, but explaining where evidence arises, what the model encodes, and how internal computations assemble that evidence remains fragmented. We introduce an iERF-centric framework that unifies local, global, and mechanistic interpretability around a single analysis unit: the pointwise feature vector (PFV) paired with its instance-specific Effective Receptive Field (iERF). On the local side, Sharing Ratio Decomposition (SRD) expresses each PFV as a mixture of upstream PFVs via sharing ratios and propagates iERFs to construct class-discriminative saliency maps. SRD yields high-resolution, activation-faithful explanations, is robust to targeted manipulation and noise, and remains activation-agnostic across common nonlinearities. For the global view, we introduce Concept-Anchored Feature Explanation (CAFE), which utilizes the iERF as a semantic label, grounding abstract latent vectors in verifiable pixel-level evidence. With CAFE, we address the challenge of non-localized sparse autoencoder latents--especially in Transformers, where early self-attention mixes distant context. To answer how representations are composed through depth, we propose the Interlayer Concept Graph with Interlayer Concept Attribution (ICAT), which quantifies concept-to-concept influence while isolating layer pairs; an interlayer insertion, deletion protocol identifies Integrated Gradients as the most faithful instantiation. Empirically, across ResNet50, VGG16, and ViTs, our framework outperforms baselines in both fidelity and robustness, successfully interprets dispersed SAE features, and exposes dominant concept routes in correct, misclassified, and adversarial cases. Grounded in iERFs, our approach provides a coherent, evidence-backed map from pixels to concepts to decisions.

analysis.tldr: 提出以实例有效感受野（iERF）为核心的统一框架，融合局部、全局和机制可解释性，用于解释视觉模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉模型可解释性方法在局部、全局和机制层面相互割裂，缺乏统一分析单元，难以全面解释证据来源、模型编码和内部计算过程。
analysis.problem: 如何统一局部、全局和机制可解释性，构建从像素到概念再到决策的连贯解释框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 以点状特征向量（PFV）及其实例有效感受野（iERF）为核心，提出共享比率分解（SRD）用于局部解释、概念锚定特征解释（CAFE）用于全局解释、层间概念图与层间概念归因（ICAT）用于机制解释。
contributions: 提出iERF中心的统一可解释性框架，整合局部、全局和机制分析。
引入SRD方法生成高分辨率、激活忠实且鲁棒的解释。
提出CAFE方法，利用iERF作为语义标签解决稀疏自编码器潜在变量非局部化问题。
提出ICAT方法量化概念间影响，并验证集成梯度为最忠实的归因方法。
analysis.experiments: 在ResNet50、VGG16和ViT上，框架在忠实性和鲁棒性上优于基线，成功解释分散的SAE特征，并揭示正确、错误和对抗样本中的主导概念路径。
limitations: 框架依赖iERF计算，可能增加计算开销。
CAFE方法可能受限于iERF的语义标签质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出以实例有效感受野（iERF）为核心的统一框架，融合局部、全局和机制可解释性，用于解释视觉模型。

papers.title: PAMod: Modeling Cyclical Shifts via Phase-Amplitude Modulation for Non-stationary Time Series Forecasting
papers.abstract: Real-world time series forecasting faces the fundamental challenge of non-stationary statistical properties, including shifts in mean and variance over time. While reversible instance normalization (RevIN) has shown promise by stationarizing inputs and denormalizing outputs, it relies on the strong assumption that historical and future distributions remain identical. We observe that in many practical applications, distribution shifts follow cyclical patterns that correlate with periodic positions (e.g., seasonal and holiday volatility). To this end, we propose PAMod, a lightweight yet powerful framework that models cyclical distribution shifts via Phase-Amplitude Modulation in the normalized feature space. PAMod learns periodic embeddings to modulate representations: phase modulation captures mean shifts, while amplitude modulation adapts to variance changes. Crucially, we prove mathematically that modulating in normalized space is equivalent to applying dynamic denormalization, offering an elegant unification of distribution adaptation and representation learning. Extensive experiments on twelve real-world benchmarks demonstrate that PAMod achieves state-of-the-art performance with fewer computational resources. Furthermore, our modulation mechanism, as a novel plug-and-play technique, can improve existing time-series forecasting methods with simple integration.

analysis.tldr: 提出相位-幅度调制模块PAMod，在归一化特征空间中建模周期性分布偏移，提升非平稳时间序列预测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实时间序列存在非平稳统计特性（均值和方差偏移），现有RevIN方法假设历史与未来分布相同，忽略了实际中分布偏移常呈现与周期位置相关的循环模式。
analysis.problem: 如何有效建模非平稳时间序列中与周期位置相关的循环分布偏移（均值和方差变化）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到实际应用中分布偏移遵循与周期位置（如季节、节假日波动）相关的循环模式。
analysis.method: 提出PAMod框架，在归一化特征空间中学习周期嵌入，通过相位调制捕获均值偏移、幅度调制适应方差变化；数学上证明归一化空间中的调制等价于动态反归一化。
contributions: 提出PAMod，一种轻量级框架，通过相位-幅度调制建模循环分布偏移。
数学证明归一化空间中的调制等价于动态反归一化，统一分布适应与表示学习。
在12个真实基准上实现SOTA性能且计算资源更少，作为即插即用技术可提升现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在12个真实世界基准上进行了广泛实验，结果表明PAMod以更少计算资源达到SOTA性能，且作为即插即用模块可提升现有时间序列预测方法。
limitations: 可能对周期模式不明显的序列效果有限。
需要预设周期长度，对非周期性偏移适应性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且理论扎实，实验充分，对时间序列预测领域有显著贡献。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出相位-幅度调制模块PAMod，在归一化特征空间中建模周期性分布偏移，提升非平稳时间序列预测性能。

papers.title: PAMNet: Cycle-aware Phase-Amplitude Modulation Network for Multivariate Time Series Forecasting
papers.abstract: Reliable periodic patterns serve as a fundamental basis for accurate multivariate time series forecasting. However, existing methods either implicitly extract periodicity through complex model architectures (e.g., Transformers) with high computational overhead or overlook the intrinsic phase-amplitude coupling when modeling periodic components explicitly. To address these issues, we propose a novel Cycle-aware Phase-Amplitude Modulation Network (PAMNet) that explicitly decomposes periodic patterns into complementary phase and amplitude components. The core innovation lies in its dual-branch modulator, featuring dedicated learnable embeddings for phase positioning and amplitude modulation. The phase branch employs cyclical embeddings to capture phase-dependent mean shifts, while the amplitude branch models intensity variations to adapt to changes in variance. A lightweight modulator with element-wise fusion efficiently combines these components, enabling explicit modeling of their interactions without complex attention mechanisms. Extensive experiments on twelve real-world datasets demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance through its novel phase-amplitude decoupling mechanism, offering a new perspective for cyclical modeling in time series forecasting.

analysis.tldr: 提出PAMNet，通过显式分解周期模式为相位和振幅分量，实现高效多变量时间序列预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法要么通过复杂架构隐式提取周期性导致高计算开销，要么在显式建模周期性时忽略相位-振幅耦合，亟需一种高效且能捕捉耦合关系的周期建模方法。
analysis.problem: 如何高效且显式地建模多变量时间序列中的周期性模式，同时捕捉相位与振幅之间的内在耦合关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PAMNet，包含双分支调制器：相位分支使用循环嵌入捕获相位依赖的均值偏移，振幅分支建模强度变化；通过轻量级调制器进行元素级融合，显式建模相位与振幅的交互。
contributions: 提出一种新颖的相位-振幅解耦机制，用于显式建模周期性模式。
设计双分支调制器，通过循环嵌入和元素级融合高效捕捉相位-振幅耦合。
在12个真实数据集上取得最先进性能，为时间序列预测中的周期建模提供新视角。
analysis.experiments: 在12个真实数据集上进行实验，结果表明方法达到最先进性能。
limitations: 可能对非平稳或复杂周期模式适应性有限。
双分支设计可能增加超参数调优难度。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实验充分，与时间序列预测方向高度相关，值得精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PAMNet，通过显式分解周期模式为相位和振幅分量，实现高效多变量时间序列预测。

papers.title: Adaptation of AI-accelerated CFD Simulations to the IPU platform
papers.abstract: Intelligence Processing Units (IPU) have proven useful for many AI applications. In this paper, we evaluate them within the emerging field of \emph{AI for simulation}, where traditional numerical simulations are supported by artificial intelligence approaches. We focus specifically on a program for training machine learning models supporting a \emph{computational fluid dynamics} application. We use custom TensorFlow provided by the Poplar SDK to adapt the program for the IPU-POD16 platform and investigate its ease of use and performance scalability. Training a model on data from OpenFOAM simulations allows us to get accurate simulation state predictions in test time. We show how to utilize the \emph{popdist} library to overcome a performance bottleneck in feeding training data to the IPU on the host side, achieving up to 34\% speedup. Due to communication overheads, using data parallelism to utilize two IPUs instead of one does not improve the throughput. However, once the intra-IPU costs have been paid, the hardware capabilities for inter-IPU communication allow for good scalability. Increasing the number of IPUs from 2 to 16 improves the throughput from 560.8 to 2805.8 samples/s.

analysis.tldr: 将AI加速的CFD模拟适配到IPU平台，利用popdist库实现34%加速，并分析多IPU扩展性。
analysis.research_motivation: IPU在AI应用中表现优异，但在新兴的AI for simulation领域（如CFD）中的适用性和性能尚待探索。
analysis.problem: 如何将基于TensorFlow的CFD机器学习模型高效适配到IPU-POD16平台，并解决数据加载瓶颈和多IPU扩展性问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 数据加载是主机侧的性能瓶颈；数据并行在2个IPU时因通信开销无法提升吞吐量，但2到16个IPU时扩展性良好。
analysis.method: 使用Poplar SDK的定制TensorFlow，并利用popdist库优化数据加载，实现数据并行训练。
contributions: 首次将AI加速的CFD模拟适配到IPU平台并评估性能。
利用popdist库解决数据加载瓶颈，实现34%加速。
分析了多IPU扩展性，发现2到16个IPU时吞吐量从560.8提升至2805.8样本/秒。
analysis.experiments: 在IPU-POD16平台上训练CFD模型，使用OpenFOAM模拟数据，测试了单IPU、双IPU及多IPU（2-16）的吞吐量。
limitations: 数据并行在少量IPU（如2个）时因通信开销无性能提升。
仅评估了特定CFD应用和IPU平台，泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
