analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将AI加速的CFD模拟适配到IPU平台，利用popdist库实现34%加速，并分析多IPU扩展性。

papers.title: Combined Dictionary Unfolding Network with Gradient-Adaptive Fidelity for Transferable Multi-Source Fusion
papers.abstract: Deep Unfolding Network-based methods have emerged as effective solutions for multi-source image fusion by combining model-driven iterative optimization with data-driven deep learning. However, most existing deep unfolding image fusion methods are derived from alternating minimization, which updates the features of different modalities separately. This design introduces considerable computational and memory overhead, limiting deployment on resource-constrained edge devices. To address this issue, we propose CDNet, a lightweight Combined Dictionary Unfolding Network for multi-source image fusion. Rather than introducing a new sparse coding prior or empirically compressing an existing fusion network, CDNet translates the unique-common decomposition prior of coupled dictionary learning into a structurally constrained joint unfolding architecture. The resulting CDBlock follows a block-sparse interaction topology and performs a model-derived joint update of common and modality-specific representations, thereby streamlining feature learning and improving efficiency.In addition, we design a compact High- and Low-frequency Image Fidelity loss for unsupervised training without ground-truth images. We evaluate CDNet on four tasks, including multi-exposure image fusion, infrared and visible image fusion, medical image fusion, and infrared and visible image fusion for semantic segmentation. Experimental results show that CDNet achieves competitive or superior fusion performance with high efficiency. For infrared and visible image fusion, CDNet outperforms competing methods on four of six metrics on the TNO dataset and five of six metrics on the RoadScene dataset. In particular, it surpasses the second-best method by 1.23 dB and 1.59 dB in PSNR on TNO and RoadScene, respectively.

analysis.tldr: 提出轻量级联合字典展开网络CDNet，通过结构约束联合更新实现高效多源图像融合。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度展开融合网络基于交替最小化，分别更新不同模态特征，导致计算和内存开销大，难以部署在资源受限的边缘设备上。
analysis.problem: 如何设计轻量级且高效的深度展开网络用于多源图像融合，避免交替更新的高开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将耦合字典学习的独特-公共分解先验转化为结构约束的联合展开架构，设计CDBlock实现块稀疏交互拓扑下的联合更新，并采用高低频图像保真损失进行无监督训练。
contributions: 提出CDNet，一种轻量级联合字典展开网络，通过结构约束联合更新提高效率。
设计紧凑的高低频图像保真损失，实现无监督训练。
analysis.experiments: 在四个任务（多曝光、红外可见光、医学图像融合及语义分割）上评估，CDNet在TNO和RoadScene数据集上分别有4/6和5/6指标优于对比方法，PSNR提升1.23 dB和1.59 dB。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的多源图像融合任务。
未讨论在更复杂场景下的泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有创新性，实验充分且性能提升显著，但属于特定应用方向。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轻量级联合字典展开网络CDNet，通过结构约束联合更新实现高效多源图像融合。

papers.title: Proteo-R1: Reasoning Foundation Models for De Novo Protein Design
papers.abstract: Deep learning in \emph{de novo} protein design has achieved atomic-level fidelity. However, existing models remain largely non-deliberative: they directly synthesize molecular geometries without explicitly reasoning about which residues or interactions are functionally essential. As a result, design decisions are entangled with continuous sampling dynamics, limiting interpretability, controllability, and systematic reuse of biochemical knowledge. We introduce \textbf{Proteo-R1}, a reasoning-guided protein design framework that explicitly decouples \emph{molecular understanding} from \emph{geometric generation}. Proteo-R1 adopts a dual-expert architecture in which a multimodal large language model (MLLM) serves as an \emph{understanding expert}, analyzing protein sequences, structures, and textual context to identify key functional residues that govern binding and specificity. These residue-level decisions are then passed as hard constraints to a separate diffusion-based \emph{generation expert}, which performs conditional co-design while respecting the fixed interaction anchors. This factorization mirrors how human experts approach molecular engineering: first, reasoning about critical interactions, then optimizing geometry subject to those constraints. By operationalizing reasoning as explicit residue-level commitments rather than latent textual guidance, Proteo-R1 achieves stable, interpretable, and modular integration of LLM reasoning with state-of-the-art geometric generative models. Code, data, and demos are available at https://smiles724.github.io/r1/.

analysis.tldr: Proteo-R1 将多模态大语言模型的推理能力与扩散生成模型结合，实现可解释、可控的蛋白质从头设计。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有蛋白质设计模型缺乏显式推理能力，设计决策与连续采样动力学纠缠，导致可解释性、可控性和生化知识复用受限。
analysis.problem: 如何将分子理解与几何生成解耦，使蛋白质设计过程具备显式推理和模块化集成能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出双专家架构：MLLM 作为理解专家分析序列、结构和文本以识别关键功能残基，扩散模型作为生成专家在固定锚点约束下进行条件共设计。
contributions: 提出推理引导的蛋白质设计框架 Proteo-R1，显式解耦分子理解与几何生成。
实现 LLM 推理与扩散生成模型的稳定、可解释、模块化集成。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖 MLLM 的推理质量，对复杂蛋白质设计任务泛化性待验证。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: Proteo-R1 将多模态大语言模型的推理能力与扩散生成模型结合，实现可解释、可控的蛋白质从头设计。

papers.title: Learning from Compressed CT: Feature Attention Style Transfer and Structured Factorized Projections for Resource-Efficient Medical Image Analysis
papers.abstract: The deployment of artificial intelligence in medical imaging is hindered by high computational complexity and resource-intensive processing of volumetric data. Although chest computed tomography (CT) volumes offer richer diagnostic information than projection radiography, their use in AI-based diagnosis remains limited due to the computational burden of processing uncompressed volumetric images (typically stored in NIfTI or DICOM format). Addressing the growing need for low-resource deployment and efficient electronic data transfer, we investigate the utilization of JPEG-compressed chest CT volumes for thoracic abnormality detection. We propose Feature Attention Style Transfer (FAST), a novel distillation framework that transfers both activation patterns and structural relationships from high-fidelity CT representations to a spatiotemporal visual encoder operating on compressed inputs. By combining Gram-matrix-based attention style preservation with dual-attention feature alignment, FAST enables robust feature extraction from degraded volumes. Furthermore, we introduce Structured Factorized Projection (SFP), leveraging Block Tensor Train decomposition as a parameter-efficient alternative to dense projection layers, reducing projection-head parameters by almost half. Our contrastive learning pipeline, CT-Lite, integrates these components with a SigLIP-based multimodal alignment objective. Experiments on CT-RATE, NIDCH, and Rad-ChestCT demonstrate that CT-Lite achieves AUROC within 5-7\% of the uncompressed-input baseline across all three datasets, despite operating on compressed inputs with significantly fewer parameters, paving the way for AI-based clinical evaluation under resource constraints.

analysis.tldr: 提出CT-Lite框架，通过特征注意力风格迁移和结构化因子化投影，在压缩CT图像上实现接近无损的诊断性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学影像AI部署受限于高计算复杂度和资源消耗，压缩CT可降低存储和传输成本，但现有方法在压缩输入上性能下降严重。
analysis.problem: 如何在JPEG压缩的胸部CT体积上实现高效的异常检测，同时保持与未压缩输入相近的诊断精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CT-Lite框架，包含特征注意力风格迁移（FAST）和结构化因子化投影（SFP）。FAST通过Gram矩阵注意力风格保持和双注意力特征对齐，从高保真CT表示向压缩输入编码器迁移知识；SFP利用块张量训练分解替代密集投影层，减少近一半参数。结合SigLIP多模态对齐目标进行对比学习。
contributions: 提出FAST蒸馏框架，有效从高保真CT向压缩输入迁移激活模式和结构关系。
提出SFP方法，基于块张量训练分解实现参数高效的投影层。
构建CT-Lite对比学习流水线，在三个数据集上压缩输入AUROC仅比未压缩基线低5-7%。
analysis.experiments: 在CT-RATE、NIDCH和Rad-ChestCT三个数据集上评估，CT-Lite在压缩输入下AUROC达到未压缩基线的93-95%。
limitations: 仅针对JPEG压缩格式，未探索其他压缩方式。
性能仍有5-7%差距，可能不适用于对精度要求极高的场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities

papers.title: A Universal Space of Brain Dynamics for Unveiling Cognitive Transitions and Individual Differences
papers.abstract: Representing dynamical systems through data-driven universal spaces has proven effective; however, achieving this universality for human brain activity remains a significant challenge, further aggravated by diverse cognitive states and individual subjects. Recognizing that spatial properties reflect physical wiring while temporal properties reflect brain function, we develop Universal Brain Dynamics (UBD) to construct a universal space tailored to brain activity and quantify corresponding dynamics using a model-derived Jacobian matrix. Crucially, we validate UBD's universality by accurately predicting functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) signals (Pearson's r > 0.9) across eight states and 963 subjects in the Human Connectome Project (HCP). Through evaluating resting-state fMRI represented within UBD, we gain insight into how infra-slow fluctuation (ISF) underpins brain activity. Furthermore, we reveal a new perspective on structure-function coupling (SFC) by analyzing the temporal sequence of brain dynamics. Extending UBD to task-evoked states, we derive brain dynamics across various cognitive conditions, elucidating the neural mechanisms driving cognitive transitions at a finer granularity. For individual differences, we compare brain dynamics across subjects to identify the neural underpinnings of these variations. Our findings suggest that synergistically integrating spatial and temporal properties of brain activity establishes a universal space for its unfolding, enabling the precise numerical analysis of underlying neural mechanisms across varying conditions.

analysis.tldr: 提出通用脑动力学空间UBD，通过空间与时间属性融合实现跨状态、跨被试的fMRI信号高精度预测，揭示认知转换与个体差异的神经机制。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有数据驱动通用空间方法在脑活动建模中面临挑战，难以同时处理多样认知状态和个体差异，且缺乏对脑动力学时空属性的统一量化框架。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个通用脑动力学空间，使其能够统一表征不同认知状态和个体下的脑活动，并量化其动力学特性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Universal Brain Dynamics (UBD)，通过模型导出的雅可比矩阵量化脑动力学，融合空间（物理连接）和时间（功能）属性构建通用空间。
contributions: 提出UBD框架，实现跨8种状态、963名被试的fMRI信号高精度预测（Pearson's r > 0.9）。
揭示静息态下超慢波动（ISF）对脑活动的支撑作用，以及结构-功能耦合（SFC）的时间序列新视角。
将UBD扩展至任务态，以更细粒度揭示认知转换的神经机制，并识别个体差异的神经基础。
analysis.experiments: 在Human Connectome Project (HCP)数据集上，使用8种状态、963名被试的fMRI数据验证，预测精度Pearson's r > 0.9。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量fMRI数据，对低信噪比数据泛化性未知。
雅可比矩阵的计算复杂度可能限制大规模应用。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验验证充分，对脑科学领域有重要应用价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出通用脑动力学空间UBD，通过空间与时间属性融合实现跨状态、跨被试的fMRI信号高精度预测，揭示认知转换与个体差异的神经机制。

papers.title: Scaling Video Understanding via Compact Latent Multi-Agent Collaboration
papers.abstract: Multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) advance vision language understanding but face inherent limitations in long-video tasks due to bounded perception context budgets. Existing agentic methods mitigate this via rule-based preprocessing, yet often suffer from information loss, high cost, and reliance on textual intermediates. We propose MACF, an end-to-end Multi-Agent Collaboration Framework that decouples per-agent perception budgets from global video complexity, enabling scalable video understanding while preserving visual fidelity. MACF partitions videos into segments for locally budgeted agents and enables holistic reasoning via an agent-native latent communication protocol. Each agent encodes partial observations into compact, task-sufficient tokens in a shared embedding space, allowing efficient and information-preserving collaboration by a central coordinator. We introduce a curriculum training strategy that progressively enforces semantic alignment, evidence summarization, and cross-agent coordination. Extensive experiments on diverse video understanding benchmarks show that MACF consistently outperforms state-of-the-art MLLMs and multi-agent systems under identical budget constraints, demonstrating the effectiveness of our latent collaboration for scalable video understanding.

analysis.tldr: 提出MACF框架，通过紧凑潜在多智能体协作实现可扩展的视频理解。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MLLM在长视频任务中受限于感知上下文预算，基于规则的多智能体方法存在信息丢失、成本高和依赖文本中间表示的问题。
analysis.problem: 如何在有限感知预算下实现长视频的高效、可扩展理解，同时保持视觉保真度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MACF框架，将视频分段分配给局部预算智能体，通过智能体原生潜在通信协议实现全局推理，每个智能体将局部观察编码为紧凑任务相关令牌，由中央协调器进行信息保留协作。
contributions: 提出端到端多智能体协作框架MACF，解耦智能体感知预算与全局视频复杂度。
设计智能体原生潜在通信协议，实现高效、信息保留的协作。
引入课程训练策略，逐步增强语义对齐、证据总结和跨智能体协调。
analysis.experiments: 在多种视频理解基准上，MACF在相同预算约束下持续优于最先进的MLLM和多智能体系统。
limitations: 可能依赖视频分段策略的合理性。
潜在通信协议的可解释性可能有限。

analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分，与视频理解方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MACF框架，通过紧凑潜在多智能体协作实现可扩展的视频理解。

papers.title: Adaptive Equilibrium: Dynamic Weighting Framework for Generalized Interruption of DeepFake Models
papers.abstract: The advancement of generalized deepfake disruption is constrained by the interruption imbalance, a fundamental bottleneck inherent to the generation of universal perturbations. We reveal that conventional static gradient normalization fundamentally struggles to resolve architectural conflicts, causing the optimization to bias towards susceptible models while neglecting resistant ones. We argue that achieving high and uniform effectiveness requires resolving this imbalance by reaching an adaptive equilibrium. We propose the Adaptive Equilibrium Framework (AEF), which employs a dynamic weighting mechanism that utilizes real-time loss feedback to adaptively assign greater interruption weights to the most resistant models. This approach shifts the optimization from an average-case problem to finding a dynamic balance, driving the perturbation to a uniformly effective equilibrium state. Comprehensive experiments validate that AEF achieves a more balanced interruption performance, maintaining a consistent interruption success rate across the evaluated diverse architectures.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应均衡框架（AEF），通过动态加权机制解决深度伪造模型通用扰动生成中的中断不平衡问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 通用深度伪造中断方法受限于中断不平衡，即优化偏向易受影响模型而忽略抵抗模型，导致整体效果不均。
analysis.problem: 解决通用扰动生成中因静态梯度归一化无法处理架构冲突而导致的优化不平衡问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要揭示静态梯度归一化无法解决架构冲突，导致优化偏向易受影响模型，对抵抗模型效果差。
analysis.method: 提出自适应均衡框架（AEF），利用实时损失反馈动态分配中断权重，使优化从平均情况转向动态平衡，达到均匀有效的均衡状态。
contributions: 揭示了通用深度伪造中断中的中断不平衡瓶颈及其根源（静态梯度归一化的架构冲突）。
提出自适应均衡框架（AEF），通过动态加权机制实现均匀有效的中断性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖实时损失反馈，计算开销较大。
动态权重调整策略的收敛性未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法有创新性，但摘要未提供实验细节，影响评估保守。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应均衡框架（AEF），通过动态加权机制解决深度伪造模型通用扰动生成中的中断不平衡问题。

papers.title: On the Role of Artificial Intelligence in Human-Machine Symbiosis
papers.abstract: The evolution of artificial intelligence (AI) has rendered the boundary between humanity and computational machinery increasingly ambiguous. In the presence of more interwoven relationships within human-machine symbiosis, the very notion of AI-generated information becomes difficult to define, as such information arises not from either humans or machines in isolation, but from their mutual shaping. Therefore, a more pertinent question lies not merely in whether AI has participated, but in how it has participated. In general, the role assumed by AI is often specified, either implicitly or explicitly, in the input prompt, yet becomes less apparent or altogether unobservable when the generated content alone is available. Once detached from the dialogue context, the functional role may no longer be traceable. This study considers the problem of tracing the functional role played by AI in natural language generation. A methodology is proposed to infer the latent role specified by the prompt, embed this role into the content during the probabilistic generation process and subsequently recover the nature of AI participation from the resulting text. Experimentation is conducted under a representative scenario in which AI acts either as an assistive agent that edits human-written content or as a creative agent that generates new content from a brief concept. The experimental results support the validity of the proposed methodology in terms of discrimination between roles, robustness against perturbations and preservation of linguistic quality. We envision that this study may contribute to future research on the ethics of AI with regard to whether AI has been used fairly, transparently and appropriately.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种追踪AI在自然语言生成中扮演角色（辅助或创造）的方法，通过隐式角色嵌入与恢复实现。
analysis.research_motivation: 人机共生中AI的角色难以从生成内容中追溯，影响AI使用的公平性、透明度和适当性评估。
analysis.problem: 如何从生成的文本中推断并恢复AI在自然语言生成过程中扮演的功能角色（如辅助编辑或创造性生成）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: AI的角色通常在提示中指定，但脱离对话上下文后变得不可追踪。
analysis.method: 提出一种方法，在概率生成过程中将提示指定的潜在角色嵌入内容，随后从文本中恢复该角色。
contributions: 提出一种追踪AI在自然语言生成中功能角色的方法论
在辅助编辑和创造性生成场景下验证了方法的有效性
analysis.experiments: 在AI作为辅助代理（编辑人类内容）和创造性代理（从简短概念生成新内容）的代表性场景下进行实验，结果支持方法在角色区分、鲁棒性和语言质量保持方面的有效性。
limitations: 仅考虑了两种角色（辅助与创造），可能无法覆盖所有AI参与形式
实验场景有限，未在更广泛的任务上验证
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法有一定创新性，但实验规模有限，与核心方向中等相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种追踪AI在自然语言生成中扮演角色（辅助或创造）的方法，通过隐式角色嵌入与恢复实现。

papers.title: Thinking in Text and Images: Interleaved Vision--Language Reasoning Traces for Long-Horizon Robot Manipulation
papers.abstract: Long-horizon robotic manipulation requires plans that are both logically coherent and geometrically grounded. Existing Vision-Language-Action policies usually hide planning in latent states or expose only one modality: text-only chain-of-thought encodes causal order but misses spatial constraints, while visual prediction provides geometric cues but often remains local and semantically underconstrained. We introduce Interleaved Vision--Language Reasoning (IVLR), a policy framework built around \trace{}, an explicit intermediate representation that alternates textual subgoals with visual keyframes over the full task horizon. At test time, a single native multimodal transformer self-generates this global semantic-geometric trace from the initial observation and instruction, caches it, and conditions a closed-loop action decoder on the trace, original instruction, and current observation. Because standard robot datasets lack such traces, we construct pseudo-supervision by temporally segmenting demonstrations and captioning each stage with a vision-language model. Across simulated benchmarks for long-horizon manipulation and visual distribution shift, \method{} reaches 95.5\% average success on LIBERO, including 92.4\% on LIBERO-Long, and 59.4\% overall success on SimplerEnv-WidowX. Ablations show that both modalities are necessary: without traces, LIBERO-Long success drops to 37.7\%; text-only and vision-only traces reach 62.0\% and 68.4\%, while the full interleaved trace reaches 92.4\%. Stress tests with execution perturbations and masked trace content show moderate degradation, suggesting that the trace can tolerate local corruption and moderate execution drift, but remains limited under stale or incorrect global plans.

analysis.tldr: 提出交错视觉-语言推理轨迹（IVLR）框架，通过显式交替文本子目标和视觉关键帧提升长程机器人操作的成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 长程机器人操作需要逻辑连贯且几何可落地的规划，现有方法要么将规划隐藏在隐状态中，要么仅暴露单一模态（纯文本链式推理缺失空间约束，视觉预测局部且语义约束不足），导致规划质量受限。
analysis.problem: 如何为长程机器人操作生成同时包含因果顺序和空间约束的显式中间表示，并利用该表示进行闭环动作决策。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过消融实验表明，交错轨迹（文本+视觉）显著优于无轨迹、纯文本轨迹和纯视觉轨迹，且轨迹对局部扰动和中等执行漂移具有鲁棒性，但在全局计划过时或错误时性能受限。
analysis.method: 提出IVLR框架，核心是trace——一种交替文本子目标和视觉关键帧的显式中间表示。测试时，原生多模态Transformer从初始观测和指令自生成全局语义-几何轨迹并缓存，然后闭环动作解码器基于轨迹、原始指令和当前观测输出动作。训练时，通过时间分割演示并用VLM标注每个阶段构建伪监督。
contributions: 提出交错视觉-语言推理轨迹（IVLR）框架，显式结合文本和视觉模态进行长程操作规划。
设计伪监督构建方法，利用时间分割和VLM标注从标准机器人数据集生成轨迹。
在LIBERO和SimplerEnv-WidowX基准上取得显著提升，消融实验验证了交错轨迹的必要性。
analysis.experiments: 在LIBERO（含LIBERO-Long）和SimplerEnv-WidowX模拟基准上评估，LIBERO平均成功率95.5%，LIBERO-Long 92.4%，SimplerEnv-WidowX 59.4%。消融实验显示无轨迹时LIBERO-Long成功率降至37.7%，纯文本和纯视觉轨迹分别为62.0%和68.4%，交错轨迹达92.4%。
limitations: 轨迹在全局计划过时或错误时性能受限，对长期执行漂移的鲁棒性可能不足。
伪监督依赖VLM标注质量，可能引入噪声或偏差。
仅在模拟环境中验证，真实机器人部署效果未知。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出交错视觉-语言推理轨迹（IVLR）框架，通过显式交替文本子目标和视觉关键帧提升长程机器人操作的成功率。

papers.title: Impact of Task Phrasing on Presumptions in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Concerns with the safety and reliability of applying large-language models (LLMs) in unpredictable real-world applications motivate this study, which examines how task phrasing can lead to presumptions in LLMs, making it difficult for them to adapt when the task deviates from these assumptions. We investigated the impact of these presumptions on the performance of LLMs using the iterated prisoner's dilemma as a case study. Our experiments reveal that LLMs are susceptible to presumptions when making decisions even with reasoning steps. However, when the task phrasing was neutral, the models demonstrated logical reasoning without much presumptions. These findings highlight the importance of proper task phrasing to reduce the risk of presumptions in LLMs.

analysis.tldr: 任务措辞会影响大语言模型中的预设假设，中性措辞可减少预设并提升逻辑推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型在不可预测的真实世界应用中存在安全性和可靠性问题，任务措辞可能导致模型产生预设假设，难以适应任务偏离这些假设的情况。
analysis.problem: 研究任务措辞如何导致大语言模型产生预设假设，并影响其性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现，即使有推理步骤，大语言模型在决策时也容易受到预设假设的影响；而中性措辞下模型能进行逻辑推理，预设较少。
analysis.method: 以迭代囚徒困境为案例，通过不同任务措辞（如带有预设的措辞 vs 中性措辞）测试大语言模型的决策表现。
contributions: 揭示了任务措辞对大语言模型预设假设的影响机制
证明了中性措辞能减少预设并提升逻辑推理能力
analysis.experiments: 使用迭代囚徒困境任务，对比不同措辞下大语言模型的决策表现，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅以囚徒困境为案例，可能不适用于其他任务类型
未深入分析预设假设产生的具体机制
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 研究动机明确，但方法简单，实验信息有限，贡献偏增量，适合关注LLM安全对齐的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 任务措辞会影响大语言模型中的预设假设，中性措辞可减少预设并提升逻辑推理。

papers.title: Escaping Mode Collapse in LLM Generation via Geometric Regulation
papers.abstract: Mode collapse is a persistent challenge in generative modeling and appears in autoregressive text generation as behaviors ranging from explicit looping to gradual loss of diversity and premature trajectory convergence. We take a dynamical-systems view and reinterpret mode collapse as reduced state-space accessibility caused by *geometric collapse*: during generation, the model's internal trajectory becomes confined to a low-dimensional region of its representation space. This implies mode collapse is not purely a token-level phenomenon and cannot be reliably solved by symbolic constraints or probability-only decoding heuristics. Guided by this perspective, we propose *Reinforced Mode Regulation* (RMR), a lightweight, online state-space intervention that regulates dominant self-reinforcing directions in the Transformer value cache (implemented as low-rank damping). Across multiple large language models, RMR substantially reduces mode collapse and enables stable, high-quality generation at extremely low entropy rates (down to 0.8 nats/step), whereas standard decoding typically collapses near 2.0 nats/step.

analysis.tldr: 从动力系统视角将LLM生成中的模式崩溃归因于几何坍缩，并提出轻量级在线干预方法RMR。
analysis.research_motivation: 模式崩溃是生成建模的长期挑战，在自回归文本生成中表现为显式循环、多样性丧失和轨迹过早收敛，现有符号约束或概率解码启发式方法无法可靠解决。
analysis.problem: LLM生成中的模式崩溃问题，特别是其几何本质导致的低维状态空间限制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模式崩溃被重新解释为几何坍缩：生成过程中模型内部轨迹被限制在表示空间的低维区域，表明这不是纯token级现象。
analysis.method: 提出Reinforced Mode Regulation (RMR)，一种轻量级在线状态空间干预方法，通过低秩阻尼调节Transformer值缓存中的主导自强化方向。
contributions: 从动力系统视角将模式崩溃归因于几何坍缩，揭示其状态空间本质。
提出RMR方法，在极低熵率下实现稳定高质量生成，显著优于标准解码。
analysis.experiments: 在多个大型语言模型上验证，RMR在低至0.8 nats/step的熵率下仍能保持稳定生成，而标准解码通常在2.0 nats/step附近崩溃。
limitations: 可能仅适用于Transformer架构的LLM。
低秩阻尼的具体实现可能需要针对不同模型调参。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实验效果显著，但摘要未提供详细对比和消融，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从动力系统视角将LLM生成中的模式崩溃归因于几何坍缩，并提出轻量级在线干预方法RMR。

papers.title: LIMSSR: LLM-Driven Sequence-to-Score Reasoning under Training-Time Incomplete Multimodal Observations
papers.abstract: Real-world multimodal learning is often hindered by missing modalities. While Incomplete Multimodal Learning (IML) has gained traction, existing methods typically rely on the unrealistic assumption of full-modal availability during training to provide reconstruction supervision or cross-modal priors. This paper tackles the more challenging setting of IML under training-time incomplete observations, which precludes reliance on a ``God's eye view'' of complete data. We propose LIMSSR (LLM-Driven Incomplete Multimodal Sequence-to-Score Reasoning), a framework that reformulates this challenge as a conditional sequence reasoning task. LIMSSR leverages the semantic reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models via Prompt-Guided Context-Aware Modality Imputation and Multidimensional Representation Fusion to infer latent semantics from available contexts without direct reconstruction. To mitigate hallucinations, we introduce a Mask-Aware Dual-Path Aggregation to dynamically calibrate inference uncertainty. Extensive experiments on three Action Quality Assessment datasets demonstrate that LIMSSR significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines without relying on complete training data, establishing a new paradigm for data-efficient multimodal learning. Code is available at https://github.com/XuHuangbiao/LIMSSR.

analysis.tldr: 提出LIMSSR框架，利用LLM在训练时缺失模态下进行序列到分数推理，无需完整数据。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实多模态学习中常缺失模态，现有方法依赖训练时完整模态假设，不切实际。
analysis.problem: 训练时多模态观测不完整，无法依赖完整数据提供重构监督或跨模态先验。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用LLM的语义推理能力，通过提示引导的上下文感知模态插补和多维表示融合推断潜在语义，并引入掩码感知双路径聚合校准不确定性。
contributions: 提出LIMSSR框架，解决训练时缺失模态的多模态学习问题。
利用LLM进行条件序列推理，无需完整数据。
引入Mask-Aware Dual-Path Aggregation缓解幻觉。
analysis.experiments: 在三个动作质量评估数据集上显著优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM的推理能力，计算成本较高。
仅针对动作质量评估任务，泛化性待验证。

papers.title: Improving LLM Code Generation via Requirement-Aware Curriculum Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Code generation, which aims to automatically generate source code from given programming requirements, has the potential to substantially improve software development efficiency. With the rapid advancement of large language models (LLMs), LLM-based code generation has attracted widespread attention from both academia and industry. However, as programming requirements become increasingly complex, existing LLMs still exhibit notable performance limitations. To address this challenge, recent studies have proposed training-based curriculum reinforcement learning (CRL) strategies to improve LLM code generation performance. Despite their effectiveness, existing CRL approaches suffer from several limitations, including misaligned requirement difficulty perception, the absence of requirement difficulty optimization, and suboptimal curriculum sampling strategies. In CRL-based code generation, programming requirements serve as the sole input to the model, making their quality and difficulty critical to training effectiveness. Motivated by insights from software requirements engineering, we propose RECRL, a novel requirement-aware curriculum reinforcement learning framework for enhancing LLM-based code generation. RECRL automatically perceives model-specific requirement difficulty, optimizes challenging requirements to improve training data utilization, and employs an adaptive curriculum sampling strategy to construct training batches with smoothly varying difficulty. Extensive experiments on five state-of-the-art LLMs across five widely-used code generation benchmarks by comparing with five state-of-the-art baselines, demonstrate the significant effectiveness of RECRL. For example, RECRL achieves an average Pass@1 improvement of 1.23%-5.62% over all state-of-the-art baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出需求感知课程强化学习框架RECRL，通过自动感知需求难度、优化困难需求并自适应采样，显著提升LLM代码生成性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM在复杂编程需求下性能有限，而基于课程的强化学习方法存在需求难度感知不准、缺乏难度优化及采样策略次优等问题，亟需更有效的训练框架。
analysis.problem: 如何设计需求感知的课程强化学习框架，以提升LLM在代码生成任务中的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有CRL方法存在需求难度感知与模型能力不匹配、未对困难需求进行优化、课程采样策略非自适应等瓶颈。
analysis.method: 提出RECRL框架，包含三个模块：自动感知模型特定需求难度、优化困难需求以提高数据利用率、采用自适应课程采样策略构建难度平滑变化的训练批次。
contributions: 提出需求感知的课程强化学习框架RECRL，首次将软件需求工程洞察融入代码生成训练。
在5个LLM和5个基准上验证，平均Pass@1提升1.23%-5.62%，超越所有基线。
analysis.experiments: 在5个先进LLM和5个广泛使用的代码生成基准上，与5个基线对比，平均Pass@1提升1.23%-5.62%。
limitations: 可能依赖需求难度标注的准确性，未讨论自动感知的误差影响。
实验仅在代码生成任务上验证，泛化到其他序列生成任务需进一步探索。

papers.title: Topology-Driven Anti-Entanglement Control for Soft Robots
papers.abstract: In the field of precision manufacturing in complex constrained environments, the role of soft robots is increasingly prominent, and the realization of anti-winding control based on multi-intelligent body reinforcement learning has become a research hotspot. One of the core problems at present is to coordinate multiple robots to complete the unwinding operation in a highly constrained environment. The existing distributed training framework faces some observability challenges in high-density barrier and unstable environments, resulting in poor learning results. This paper proposes a topology-driven Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (TD-MARL) framework to coordinate multi-robot systems to avoid entanglement. Specifically, the critical network adopts centralized learning, so that each intelligent body can perceive the strategies of other intelligent bodies by sharing the topological state, thus alleviating the training instability caused by complex interactions; eliminating the demand for communication resources between robots through distributed execution, Upgrade system reliability; the integrated topological security layer uses topological invariants to accurately assess and mitigate the risk of entanglement to avoid the strategy from falling into local difficulties. Finally, the full simulation experiments carried out in the real simulation environment show that the method is better than the current advanced deep reinforcement learning (DRL) method in terms of convergence and anti-winding effect.

analysis.tldr: 提出拓扑驱动的多智能体强化学习框架，解决软机器人在复杂约束环境中的防缠绕控制问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 软机器人在精密制造中作用日益重要，但现有分布式训练框架在高密度障碍和不稳定环境中面临可观测性挑战，导致学习效果差。
analysis.problem: 如何协调多个软机器人在高度约束环境中完成防缠绕操作。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有分布式训练框架在复杂环境中可观测性不足，训练不稳定，且需要大量通信资源。
analysis.method: 提出拓扑驱动的多智能体强化学习（TD-MARL）框架，包括集中式训练的批评网络（共享拓扑状态）、分布式执行（消除通信需求）和拓扑安全层（利用拓扑不变量评估缠绕风险）。
contributions: 提出TD-MARL框架，通过拓扑状态共享缓解复杂交互导致的训练不稳定。
分布式执行消除机器人间通信需求，提升系统可靠性。
集成拓扑安全层，利用拓扑不变量评估和降低缠绕风险。
analysis.experiments: 在真实仿真环境中进行全仿真实验，结果表明该方法在收敛性和防缠绕效果上优于当前先进的深度强化学习方法。
limitations: 仅进行了仿真实验，未提及真实机器人验证。
拓扑安全层的计算开销可能较大。

papers.title: MMAudioReverbs: Video-Guided Acoustic Modeling for Dereverberation and Room Impulse Response Estimation
papers.abstract: Although recent video-to-audio (V2A) models excelled at synthesizing semantically plausible sounds from visual inputs, they do not explicitly model room-acoustic effects such as reverberation or room impulse responses (RIRs), and thus offer limited controllability over these effects. However, we hypothesize that such V2A models implicitly have semantic knowledge of the relationship between spatial audio and the corresponding vision cues. In this paper, we revisit a V2A model for the sake of the above, and propose the way to utilize the pretrained model as prior for physically grounded room-acoustic processing. Based on one of the state-of-the-art V2A models, MMAudio, we propose MMAudioReverbs that is a unified framework dealing with i) dereverberation and ii) room impulse response (RIR) estimation without network architectural modification, and fine-tuned on a small dataset. Experimental results showed that audio and visual cues respectively have advantage depending on the type of physical room acoustics. It implies that foundation V2A models can be used for physically grounded room-acoustic analysis.

analysis.tldr: 利用预训练视频到音频模型作为先验，实现去混响和房间脉冲响应估计的统一框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频到音频模型虽能合成语义合理的声音，但未显式建模混响等房间声学效应，缺乏可控性；而预训练模型可能隐含空间音频与视觉线索的语义知识，值得挖掘。
analysis.problem: 如何利用预训练视频到音频模型实现去混响和房间脉冲响应估计，且无需修改网络架构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验表明，音频和视觉线索在不同物理房间声学类型下各有优势，说明基础V2A模型可用于物理声学分析。
analysis.method: 基于预训练V2A模型MMAudio，通过小数据集微调，构建统一框架处理去混响和RIR估计，不修改网络架构。
contributions: 提出MMAudioReverbs，首个利用预训练V2A模型进行去混响和RIR估计的统一框架。
验证了基础V2A模型可隐式编码房间声学知识，并可用于物理声学任务。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定预训练模型，泛化性未知。
小数据集微调可能限制复杂场景性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，利用预训练V2A模型解决声学任务，但实验细节不足，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用预训练视频到音频模型作为先验，实现去混响和房间脉冲响应估计的统一框架。

papers.title: AEM: Adaptive Entropy Modulation for Multi-Turn Agentic Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has substantially improved the ability of large language model (LLM) agents to interact with environments and solve multi-turn tasks. However, effective agentic RL remains challenging: sparse outcome-only rewards provide limited guidance for assigning credit to individual steps within long interaction trajectories. Existing approaches often introduce dense intermediate supervision, such as process reward models or auxiliary self-supervised signals, which increases supervision and tuning complexity and may limit generalization across tasks and domains. We present AEM, a supervision-free credit assignment method that adaptively modulates entropy dynamics during RL training to improve the exploration-exploitation trade-off. Since in agentic RL the environment is typically affected by a complete response, rather than an individual token, our analysis lifts entropy dynamics from the token level to the response level, aligning uncertainty estimation with the effective action granularity of LLM agents and reducing sensitivity to token-level sampling noise. We further show that entropy drift under natural-gradient updates is governed by the interaction between the sampled-response advantage and its relative surprisal. Motivated by this result, AEM derives a practical response-level uncertainty proxy and uses it to rescale advantages, leveraging the evolving balance between positive and negative samples to naturally transition from exploration to exploitation. Extensive experiments on ALFWorld, WebShop, and SWE-bench-Verified with models ranging from 1.5B to 32B demonstrate that AEM consistently improves strong RL baselines, including a +1.4\% gain when integrated into a state-of-the-art software-engineering RL training framework.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应熵调制方法AEM，无需额外监督即可在LLM智能体多轮强化学习中改善探索-利用平衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 多轮任务中稀疏结果奖励难以分配信用，现有方法依赖密集中间监督，增加复杂度且泛化受限。
analysis.problem: 如何在不引入额外监督信号的情况下，为LLM智能体多轮RL训练提供有效的信用分配和探索-利用平衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 自然梯度更新下熵漂移受采样响应优势与相对惊讶度的交互控制；响应级熵动态比token级更符合智能体动作粒度。
analysis.method: 将熵动态从token级提升至响应级，推导响应级不确定性代理，用于重新缩放优势函数，利用正负样本平衡自然过渡探索到利用。
contributions: 提出无监督信用分配方法AEM，自适应调制熵动态以改善探索-利用平衡。
将熵动态分析从token级提升至响应级，与LLM智能体动作粒度对齐。
在ALFWorld、WebShop、SWE-bench-Verified上验证，集成到SOTA软件工程RL框架中提升1.4%。
analysis.experiments: 在ALFWorld、WebShop、SWE-bench-Verified上使用1.5B至32B模型进行实验，AEM一致提升强RL基线。
limitations: 可能对超参数敏感，如熵调制强度。
响应级不确定性代理的准确性依赖于优势估计质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且提升显著，与LLM智能体RL方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应熵调制方法AEM，无需额外监督即可在LLM智能体多轮强化学习中改善探索-利用平衡。

papers.title: Skills as Verifiable Artifacts: A Trust Schema and a Biconditional Correctness Criterion for Human-in-the-Loop Agent Runtimes
papers.abstract: Agent skills -- structured packages of instructions, scripts, and references that augment a large language model (LLM) without modifying the model itself -- have moved from convenience to first-class deployment artifact. The runtime that loads them inherits the same problem package managers and operating systems have always faced: a piece of content claims a behavior; the runtime must decide whether to believe it. We argue this paper's central thesis up front: a skill is \emph{untrusted code} until it is verified, and the runtime that loads it must enforce that default rather than infer trust from a signature, a clearance, or a registry of origin. Without skill verification, a human-in-the-loop (HITL) gate must fire on every irreversible call -- which is operationally untenable and degrades into rubber-stamping at any non-trivial scale. With skill verification treated as a separate, gated process, HITL fires only for what is unverified, and the system becomes sustainable. We give a trust schema (§\ref{sec:schema}) that includes an explicit verification level on every skill manifest; a capability gate (§\ref{sec:gate}) whose HITL policy is a function of that verification level; a \emph{biconditional} correctness criterion (§\ref{sec:biconditional}) that any candidate verification procedure must satisfy on an adversarial-ensemble exercise (§\ref{sec:eval}); and a portable runtime profile (§\ref{sec:guidelines}) with ten normative guidelines abstracted from a working open-source reference implementation \cite{metere2026enclawed}. The contribution is harness- and model-agnostic; nothing here requires retraining, fine-tuning, or proprietary infrastructure.

analysis.tldr: 提出将技能视为可验证工件，通过信任模式与双条件正确性标准实现可持续的人机协同代理运行时。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前代理技能作为一等部署工件，运行时面临信任决策问题：内容声称行为，运行时必须决定是否相信。传统依赖签名、权限或来源注册表推断信任，但缺乏验证机制导致人机协同门控在每次不可逆调用时触发，操作上不可持续且退化为橡皮图章。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个系统化的技能验证框架，使运行时能够区分已验证和未验证的技能，从而让人机协同门控仅对未验证操作触发，实现可持续运行。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，没有技能验证时，人机协同门控必须在每次不可逆调用时触发，这在非平凡规模下操作上不可行，且退化为橡皮图章。
analysis.method: 提出一个信任模式，包含技能清单上的显式验证级别；一个能力门控，其策略依赖于验证级别；一个双条件正确性标准，任何候选验证过程必须在对抗集成练习中满足；以及一个可移植运行时概要，包含十条规范性指南。
contributions: 提出技能作为可验证工件的信任模式，包含显式验证级别。
设计基于验证级别的人机协同能力门控策略。
定义双条件正确性标准，确保验证过程在对抗性场景下的可靠性。
提供可移植运行时概要及十条规范性指南，基于开源参考实现。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未提供实验验证或定量评估。
可能依赖特定运行时环境或假设。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 提出新颖的技能验证框架，解决Agent运行时信任问题，但缺乏实验验证，适合精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出将技能视为可验证工件，通过信任模式与双条件正确性标准实现可持续的人机协同代理运行时。

papers.title: VLADriver-RAG: Retrieval-Augmented Vision-Language-Action Models for Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have emerged as a promising paradigm for end-to-end autonomous driving, yet their reliance on implicit parametric knowledge limits generalization in long-tail scenarios. While Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) offers a solution by accessing external expert priors, standard visual retrieval suffers from high latency and semantic ambiguity. To address these challenges, we propose \textbf{VLADriver-RAG}, a framework that grounds planning in explicit, structure-aware historical knowledge. Specifically, we abstract sensory inputs into spatiotemporal semantic graphs via a \textit{Visual-to-Scenario} mechanism, effectively filtering visual noise. To ensure retrieval relevance, we employ a \textit{Scenario-Aligned Embedding Model} that utilizes Graph-DTW metric alignment to prioritize intrinsic topological consistency over superficial visual similarity. These retrieved priors are then fused within a query-based VLA backbone to synthesize precise, disentangled trajectories. Extensive experiments on the Bench2Drive benchmark establish a new state-of-the-art, achieving a Driving Score of 89.12.

analysis.tldr: 提出VLADriver-RAG框架，通过检索增强的视觉-语言-动作模型提升自动驾驶长尾场景泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLA模型依赖隐式参数知识，在长尾场景中泛化能力有限；标准视觉检索存在高延迟和语义模糊问题。
analysis.problem: 如何利用结构化的历史知识进行高效、准确的检索增强，以提升自动驾驶规划的泛化性和鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将感官输入通过Visual-to-Scenario机制抽象为时空语义图，使用Scenario-Aligned Embedding Model结合Graph-DTW度量对齐进行检索，并将检索先验融合到基于查询的VLA骨干中生成轨迹。
contributions: 提出VLADriver-RAG框架，将规划建立在显式、结构感知的历史知识上。
设计Visual-to-Scenario机制和Scenario-Aligned Embedding Model，提升检索效率和相关性。
在Bench2Drive基准上取得新SOTA，驾驶得分为89.12。
analysis.experiments: 在Bench2Drive基准上进行实验，达到89.12的驾驶得分，实现新SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的历史场景图构建。
Graph-DTW度量对齐的计算开销可能较大。

analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验达到SOTA，与VLA和自动驾驶方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VLADriver-RAG框架，通过检索增强的视觉-语言-动作模型提升自动驾驶长尾场景泛化能力。

papers.title: BWLA: Breaking the Barrier of W1AX Post-Training Quantization for LLMs
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have driven major progress in NLP, yet their substantial memory and compute demands still hinder practical deployment. Binarization can compress weights to 1 bit, fundamentally lowering compute and bandwidth cost. However, existing methods cannot address activation heavy tails and thus must keep activations in high precision, preventing true end-to-end acceleration. To overcome this limitation, we propose BWLA (Binarized Weights and Low-bit Activations), the first post-training quantization framework that preserves high accuracy while achieving 1-bit weight quantization together with low-bit activations (e.g., 6 bits). The Orthogonal-Kronecker Transformation (OKT) learns an orthogonal mapping via EM minimization, converting unimodal weights into symmetric bimodal forms while suppressing activation tails and incoherence. The Proximal SVD Projection (PSP) then performs lightweight low-rank refinement through proximal SVD projection, further enhancing quantizability with minimal overhead. On Qwen3-32B, BWLA reaches a Wikitext2 perplexity of 11.92 under 6-bit activations (vs. 38 from SOTA), improves five zero-shot tasks by more than 70%, and delivers 3.26 times inference speedup, demonstrating strong potential for real-world LLM compression and acceleration.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个同时实现1-bit权重量化和低比特激活的LLM后训练量化框架BWLA，通过正交-克罗内克变换和近端SVD投影解决激活重尾问题，显著提升精度和推理速度。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM部署受限于高内存和计算需求，现有二值化方法无法处理激活重尾分布，导致激活必须保持高精度，阻碍端到端加速。
analysis.problem: 如何实现LLM的1-bit权重量化同时保持低比特激活（如6-bit）而不显著损失精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 激活值存在重尾分布，导致现有量化方法无法同时降低激活精度；权重分布非双峰也影响量化效果。
analysis.method: 提出BWLA框架，包含两个核心组件：正交-克罗内克变换（OKT）通过EM最小化学习正交映射，将单峰权重转换为对称双峰形式并抑制激活尾部和不相干性；近端SVD投影（PSP）通过近端SVD进行轻量低秩精炼，进一步提升可量化性。
contributions: 首个同时实现1-bit权重和低比特激活（如6-bit）的LLM后训练量化框架，保持高精度。
提出OKT和PSP两种轻量技术，有效解决激活重尾和权重分布问题，计算开销小。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen3-32B模型上，BWLA在6-bit激活下达到Wikitext2困惑度11.92（SOTA为38），五个零样本任务提升超过70%，推理加速3.26倍。
limitations: 仅验证了6-bit激活，更低比特（如4-bit）效果未知。
方法可能对模型架构敏感，需更多模型验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验效果显著，与LLM压缩方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个同时实现1-bit权重量化和低比特激活的LLM后训练量化框架BWLA，通过正交-克罗内克变换和近端SVD投影解决激活重尾问题，显著提升精度和推理速度。

papers.title: RadLite: Multi-Task LoRA Fine-Tuning of Small Language Models for CPU-Deployable Radiology AI
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) show promise in radiology but their deployment is limited by computational requirements that preclude use in resource-constrained clinical environments. We investigate whether small language models (SLMs) of 3-4 billion parameters can achieve strong multi-task radiology performance through LoRA fine-tuning, enabling deployment on consumer-grade CPUs. We train Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct and Qwen3-4B on 162K samples spanning 9 radiology tasks - RADS classification across 10 systems, impression generation, temporal comparison, radiology NLI, NER, abnormality detection, N/M staging, and radiology Q&A - compiled from 12 public datasets. Both models are evaluated on up to 500 held-out test samples per task with standardized metrics. Our key findings are: (1) LoRA fine-tuning dramatically improves performance over zero-shot baselines (RADS accuracy +53%, NLI +60%, N-staging +89%); (2) the two models exhibit complementary strengths - Qwen2.5 excels at structured generation tasks while Qwen3 dominates extractive tasks; (3) a task-outed oracle ensemble combining both models achieves the best performance across all tasks; (4) few-shot prompting with fine-tuned models hurts performance, demonstrating that LoRA adaptation is more effective than in-context learning for specialized domains; and (5) models can be quantized to GGUF format (~1.8-2.4GB) for CPU deployment at 4-8 tokens/second on consumer hardware. Our work demonstrates that small, efficiently fine-tuned models - which we collectively call RadLite - can serve as practical multi-task radiology AI assistants deployable entirely on consumer hardware without GPU requirements. Code and models are available at https://github.com/RadioX-Labs/RadLite

analysis.tldr: 通过LoRA微调3-4B小语言模型，实现CPU可部署的多任务放射学AI助手。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型语言模型在放射学中展现出潜力，但其部署受限于计算资源，无法在资源受限的临床环境中使用。
analysis.problem: 如何在资源受限的临床环境中，利用小语言模型实现多任务放射学AI的高效部署。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LoRA微调显著优于零样本基线；两个模型在结构化生成和抽取任务上互补；集成模型性能最佳；少样本提示会损害微调模型性能；量化后可在CPU上以4-8 tokens/s运行。
analysis.method: 使用LoRA微调Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct和Qwen3-4B，在162K样本上训练9个放射学任务，并采用任务级Oracle集成。
contributions: 证明小语言模型通过LoRA微调可在CPU上实现多任务放射学AI。
系统评估两个模型在9个任务上的表现，揭示互补优势。
提出RadLite框架，包括量化部署和集成策略。
analysis.experiments: 在最多500个保留测试样本上评估，使用标准化指标。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅使用公开数据集，可能未涵盖所有临床场景。
集成模型需要多个模型同时运行，增加部署复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性中等，但实用性强，适合资源受限场景，推荐阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过LoRA微调3-4B小语言模型，实现CPU可部署的多任务放射学AI助手。

papers.title: Trees to Flows and Back: Unifying Decision Trees and Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: Decision trees and diffusion models are ostensibly disparate model classes, one discrete and hierarchical, the other continuous and dynamic. This work unifies the two by establishing a crisp mathematical correspondence between hierarchical decision trees and diffusion processes in appropriate limiting regimes. Our unification reveals a shared optimization principle: \emph{Global Trajectory Score Matching (GTSM)}, for which gradient boosting (in an idealized version) is asymptotically optimal. We underscore the conceptual value of our work through two key practical instantiations: \treeflow, which achieves competitive generation quality on tabular data with higher fidelity and a 2\times computational speedup, and \dsmtree, a novel distillation method that transfers hierarchical decision logic into neural networks, matching teacher performance within 2\% on many benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 决策树与扩散模型通过全局轨迹分数匹配实现数学统一，并衍生出两种实用方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 决策树和扩散模型看似截然不同，但可能存在深层联系，统一它们有助于揭示共享的优化原理并推动实际应用。
analysis.problem: 建立决策树与扩散模型之间的数学对应关系，并利用该统一框架设计更高效的生成和蒸馏方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过建立层次决策树与扩散过程在极限情况下的数学对应，提出全局轨迹分数匹配（GTSM）作为共享优化原理，并基于此设计TreeFlow（用于表格数据生成）和DSMTree（用于知识蒸馏）。
contributions: 首次建立决策树与扩散模型之间的严格数学对应关系。
提出全局轨迹分数匹配（GTSM）统一优化框架，并证明梯度提升的渐近最优性。
提出TreeFlow方法，在表格数据生成上实现更高保真度和2倍计算加速。
提出DSMTree蒸馏方法，将层次决策逻辑迁移至神经网络，在多个基准上性能接近教师模型（2%以内）。
analysis.experiments: 在表格数据生成任务上，TreeFlow实现了更高保真度和2倍计算加速；DSMTree在多个基准上匹配教师模型性能（2%以内）。
limitations: 理论对应可能仅适用于特定极限情况，实际模型可能不完全符合。
TreeFlow和DSMTree仅在表格数据上验证，在图像、文本等其他模态上的适用性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 理论创新性强，统一了两个重要模型类，且衍生方法有实际加速效果，值得深入阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 决策树与扩散模型通过全局轨迹分数匹配实现数学统一，并衍生出两种实用方法。

papers.title: Physically Native World Models: A Hamiltonian Perspective on Generative World Modeling
papers.abstract: World models have recently re-emerged as a central paradigm for embodied intelligence, robotics, autonomous driving, and model-based reinforcement learning. However, current world model research is often dominated by three partially separated routes: 2D video-generative models that emphasize visual future synthesis, 3D scene-centric models that emphasize spatial reconstruction, and JEPA-like latent models that emphasize abstract predictive representations. While each route has made important progress, they still struggle to provide physically reliable, action-controllable, and long-horizon stable predictions for embodied decision making. In this paper, we argue that the bottleneck of world models is no longer only whether they can generate realistic futures, but whether those futures are physically meaningful and useful for action. We propose \emph{Hamiltonian World Models} as a physically grounded perspective on world modeling. The key idea is to encode observations into a structured latent phase space, evolve the latent state through Hamiltonian-inspired dynamics with control, dissipation, and residual terms, decode the predicted trajectory into future observations, and use the resulting rollouts for planning. We discuss how Hamiltonian structure may improve interpretability, data efficiency, and long-horizon stability, while also noting practical challenges in real-world robotic scenes involving friction, contact, non-conservative forces, and deformable objects.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于哈密顿力学的世界模型，通过结构化潜相空间和受控动力学提升物理可靠性与长期稳定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前世界模型在2D视频生成、3D场景重建和JEPA潜空间模型三条路线中各自取得进展，但普遍缺乏物理可靠性、动作可控性和长期稳定性，难以支撑具身决策。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个物理上有意义、动作可控且长期稳定的世界模型，以用于具身智能和规划。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有世界模型在物理可靠性、动作可控性和长期稳定性方面存在瓶颈，但未提供具体实验现象。
analysis.method: 提出哈密顿世界模型：将观测编码到结构化潜相空间，通过哈密顿动力学（含控制、耗散和残差项）演化潜状态，解码预测轨迹并用于规划。
contributions: 从哈密顿力学角度重新审视世界模型，提供物理可解释的生成框架
提出结构化潜相空间和受控动力学演化机制，有望提升数据效率和长期稳定性
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未在真实机器人场景中验证，实际应用面临摩擦、接触、非保守力等挑战
哈密顿结构对可变形物体等复杂场景的适用性尚不明确

analysis.reason: 方法新颖，结合物理先验，但缺乏实验验证，适合关注世界模型方向的读者精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于哈密顿力学的世界模型，通过结构化潜相空间和受控动力学提升物理可靠性与长期稳定性。

papers.title: Agent Capsules: Quality-Gated Granularity Control for Multi-Agent LLM Pipelines
papers.abstract: A multi-agent pipeline with N agents typically issues N LLM calls per run. Merging agents into fewer calls (compound execution) promises token savings, but naively merged calls silently degrade quality through tool loss and prompt compression. We present Agent Capsules, an adaptive execution runtime that treats multi-agent pipeline execution as an optimization problem with empirical quality constraints. The runtime instruments coordination overhead per group, scores composition opportunity, selects among three compound execution strategies, and gates every mode switch on rolling-mean output quality. A controlled negative result confirms that injecting more context into a merged call worsens compression rather than relieving it, so the framework's escalation ladder (standard, then two-phase, then sequential) recovers quality by moving toward per-agent dispatch rather than by rewriting merged prompts. On LLM-judged quality, the controller matches a hand-tuned oracle on every measured (model, group, mode) cell: routing compound whenever the oracle would, and reverting to fine whenever quality would fail the floor, without per-model configuration. Against a hand-crafted LangGraph implementation of a 14-agent competitive intelligence pipeline, Agent Capsules uses 51% fewer fine-mode input tokens and 42% fewer compound-mode input tokens, at +0.020 and +0.017 quality respectively. Against a DSPy implementation of a 5-agent due diligence pipeline, the framework uses 19% fewer tokens than uncompiled DSPy at quality parity, and 68% fewer tokens than MIPROv2 at +0.052 quality. Even before compound mode fires, the runtime delivers efficiency through automatic policy resolution, cache-aligned prompts, and topology-aware context injection, matching both hand-tuned and compile-time baselines without training data or per-pipeline engineering.

analysis.tldr: 提出Agent Capsules，一种自适应执行运行时，通过质量门控的粒度控制优化多智能体LLM管道的token效率与输出质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体管道中每个智能体独立调用LLM导致token消耗高，而简单合并调用虽能节省token但会因工具丢失和提示压缩而降低输出质量，缺乏自适应平衡效率与质量的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在多智能体LLM管道中自适应地选择执行粒度（合并或独立调用），在保证输出质量的前提下最小化token消耗。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出一个受控的负面结果：向合并调用中注入更多上下文会加剧压缩问题而非缓解，因此框架的升级阶梯（标准→两阶段→顺序）通过恢复逐智能体调度而非重写合并提示来恢复质量。
analysis.method: 提出Agent Capsules运行时，将多智能体管道执行建模为带经验质量约束的优化问题，通过仪器化协调开销、评分组合机会、选择三种复合执行策略，并基于滚动平均输出质量门控模式切换。
contributions: 提出一种自适应执行运行时，无需训练数据或逐管道工程即可优化多智能体LLM管道的token效率与质量。
在14智能体竞争情报管道和5智能体尽职调查管道上验证，分别减少51%和19%的token消耗，同时保持或提升质量。
analysis.experiments: 在14智能体竞争情报管道（对比LangGraph）和5智能体尽职调查管道（对比DSPy和MIPROv2）上评估，使用LLM评判质量，报告token节省和质量变化。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM评判质量，存在评判偏差风险。
实验仅覆盖两种管道，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，直接解决多智能体LLM管道的效率-质量权衡问题，与Agent方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Agent Capsules，一种自适应执行运行时，通过质量门控的粒度控制优化多智能体LLM管道的token效率与输出质量。

papers.title: Beyond Heuristics: Learnable Density Control for 3D Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: While 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has demonstrated impressive real-time rendering performance, its efficacy remains constrained by a reliance on heuristic density control. Despite numerous refinements to these handcrafted rules, such methods inherently lack the flexibility to adapt to diverse scenes with complex geometries. In this paper, we propose a paradigm shift for density control from rigid heuristics to fully learnable policies. Specifically, we introduce \textbf{LeGS}, a framework that reformulates density control as a parameterized policy network optimized via Reinforcement Learning (RL). Central to our approach is the tailored effective reward function grounded in sensitivity analysis, which precisely quantifies the marginal contribution of individual Gaussians to reconstruction quality. To maintain computational tractability, we derive a closed-form solution that reduces the complexity of reward calculation from $O(N^2)$ to $O(N)$. Extensive experiments on the Mip-NeRF 360, Tanks \& Temples, and Deep Blending datasets demonstrate that \textbf{LeGS} significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, striking a superior balance between reconstruction quality and efficiency. The code will be released at https://github.com/AaronNZH/LeGS

analysis.tldr: 将3D高斯泼溅的密度控制从启发式规则转变为可学习的强化学习策略，显著提升重建质量与效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D高斯泼溅依赖手工设计的启发式密度控制规则，缺乏对复杂场景的适应性，限制了其性能。
analysis.problem: 如何将3D高斯泼溅中的密度控制从固定启发式规则转变为可学习策略，以提升场景适应性和重建质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出LeGS框架，将密度控制建模为参数化策略网络，通过强化学习优化，并设计基于敏感性分析的奖励函数，同时推导出闭式解将奖励计算复杂度从O(N^2)降至O(N)。
contributions: 首次将3D高斯泼溅的密度控制从启发式规则转变为完全可学习的策略。
设计基于敏感性分析的奖励函数，并推导出闭式解实现高效计算。
analysis.experiments: 在Mip-NeRF 360、Tanks & Temples和Deep Blending数据集上，LeGS显著优于现有方法，在重建质量和效率之间取得更好平衡。
limitations: 可能对强化学习超参数敏感。
闭式解推导可能依赖特定假设。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，将强化学习引入3DGS密度控制，实验充分且效果显著，值得深入阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将3D高斯泼溅的密度控制从启发式规则转变为可学习的强化学习策略，显著提升重建质量与效率。

papers.title: BOLT: Online Lightweight Adaptation for Preparation-Free Heterogeneous Cooperative Perception
papers.abstract: Most existing heterogeneous cooperative perception methods depend on prior preparation like offline joint training or tailored collaborator-model adaptation. Such preprocessing is, however, generally impractical in real scenarios, as agents are usually independently trained by different developers and meet occasionally online. This work investigates \emph{preparation-free heterogeneous cooperative perception}, where agents use independently trained single-agent detectors without any pre-deployment coordination. We find direct cross-agent fusion under this setting greatly underperforms ego-only perception. We present BOLT, a lightweight plug-and-play module that adapts neighboring features online via ego-as-teacher distillation, requiring only ego predictions without ground-truth labels. BOLT leverages high-confidence ego perception features to guide cross-agent feature-domain alignment, while enabling neighbors to contribute features in the ego's low-confidence regions. With only 0.9M trainable parameters, BOLT improves AP@50 by up to 32.3 points over vanilla unadapted fusion in the preparation-free setting. It consistently outperforms ego-only results on DAIR-V2X and OPV2V, across different encoder pairs and fusion strategies. Code: https://github.com/sidiangongyuan/BOLT.

analysis.tldr: BOLT 提出一种无需预部署协调的轻量级在线适配模块，通过自车作为教师进行知识蒸馏，实现异构协同感知中的跨智能体特征对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有异构协同感知方法依赖离线联合训练或定制适配，这在真实场景中不现实，因为智能体通常由不同开发者独立训练并偶尔在线相遇。
analysis.problem: 解决无预部署协调下异构智能体直接融合感知特征性能严重下降的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 直接跨智能体融合在无准备设置下性能远低于单智能体感知。
analysis.method: 提出 BOLT 轻量级即插即用模块，利用自车高置信度感知特征作为教师，在线指导邻车特征进行域对齐，同时允许邻车在自车低置信度区域贡献特征。
contributions: 首次系统研究无准备异构协同感知问题，并揭示直接融合的失败现象。
提出 BOLT 在线适配方法，仅需 0.9M 参数，无需真值标签，显著提升融合性能。
analysis.experiments: 在 DAIR-V2X 和 OPV2V 数据集上，BOLT 在无准备设置下 AP@50 提升高达 32.3 点，且在不同编码器对和融合策略下均优于单智能体感知。
limitations: 可能依赖自车感知质量，若自车感知本身较差则教师信号不可靠。
仅适用于感知任务，未验证对其他协同任务（如规划）的泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实用，实验充分，与自动驾驶视觉理解方向相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: BOLT 提出一种无需预部署协调的轻量级在线适配模块，通过自车作为教师进行知识蒸馏，实现异构协同感知中的跨智能体特征对齐。

papers.title: Scalable Learning in Structured Recurrent Spiking Neural Networks without Backpropagation
papers.abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) provide a promising framework for energy-efficient and biologically grounded computation; however, scalable learning in deep recurrent architectures with sparse connectivity remains a major challenge. In this work, we propose a structured multi-layer recurrent SNN architecture composed of locally dense recurrent layers augmented with sparse small-world long-range projections to a readout population. The long-range connectivity is largely fixed, preserving routing efficiency and hardware scalability, while synaptic adaptation is performed using strictly local plasticity mechanisms. To enable supervised learning without backpropagation or surrogate gradients, we introduce a biologically motivated learning framework that combines: (i) population-based winner-take-all (WTA) teaching signals at the output layer, (ii) fixed random broadcast alignment feedback pathways, and (iii) low-dimensional modulatory neuron populations that gate synaptic updates through three-factor learning rules with eligibility traces. This design supports deep recurrent computation with sparse global communication and purely local synaptic updates. We analyze the algorithmic properties, computational complexity, and hardware feasibility of the proposed approach, and demonstrate stable learning and competitive performance on benchmark classification tasks. The results highlight the potential of structured recurrence and neuromodulatory learning to enable scalable, hardware-compatible SNN training beyond gradient-based methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需反向传播的结构化递归脉冲神经网络学习方法，通过局部可塑性和神经调节实现可扩展训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 脉冲神经网络（SNN）具有能效和生物合理性优势，但深度递归架构中的可扩展学习仍面临挑战，现有方法依赖反向传播或替代梯度，限制了硬件兼容性和生物合理性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用反向传播或替代梯度的情况下，实现深度递归稀疏连接SNN的可扩展监督学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出结构化多层递归SNN架构，包含局部密集递归层和稀疏小世界长程投射；采用局部可塑性机制，结合基于群体的胜者全取（WTA）教学信号、固定随机广播对齐反馈通路和低维调节神经元群体，通过三因子学习规则和资格痕迹实现突触更新。
contributions: 提出一种无需反向传播的SNN监督学习框架，结合局部可塑性和神经调节机制。
设计了结构化递归架构，支持稀疏全局通信和纯局部突触更新，具有硬件可扩展性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅在简单基准分类任务上验证，复杂任务性能未知。
长程投射固定可能限制表达能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，但摘要缺乏实验细节，影响评估。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需反向传播的结构化递归脉冲神经网络学习方法，通过局部可塑性和神经调节实现可扩展训练。

papers.title: SIMON: Saliency-aware Integrative Multi-view Object-centric Neural Decoding
papers.abstract: Recent EEG-to-image retrieval methods leverage pretrained vision encoders and foveation-inspired priors, but typically assume a fixed, center-focused view. This center bias conflicts with content-driven human attention, creating a geometric-semantic dissociation between visual features and EEG responses. We propose SIMON, a saliency-aware multi-view framework for zero-shot EEG-to-image retrieval. SIMON combines foreground segmentation and saliency prediction to select fixation centers via Saliency-Aware Sampling (SAS), then generates foveated views that emphasize informative object regions while suppressing background clutter. On THINGS-EEG, SIMON achieves state-of-the-art performance in both intra-subject and inter-subject settings, reaching an average Top-1 accuracy of 69.7% and 19.6%, respectively, consistently outperforming recent competitive baselines. Analyses across sampling granularity, EEG channel topology, and visual/brain encoder backbones further support the robustness of saliency-aware multi-view integration. Our code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/simonlink666/SIMON.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于显著性感知的多视图框架SIMON，通过模拟人眼注视机制提升EEG到图像检索的零样本性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有EEG-to-image检索方法假设固定中心视图，与人类注意力机制不符，导致视觉特征与EEG响应之间存在几何-语义分离，限制了检索精度。
analysis.problem: 解决EEG-to-image检索中固定中心视图带来的几何-语义分离问题，实现零样本检索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SIMON框架，结合前景分割和显著性预测，通过显著性感知采样（SAS）选择注视中心，生成强调目标区域并抑制背景的多视图特征，用于零样本EEG-to-image检索。
contributions: 提出显著性感知的多视图框架SIMON，缓解中心偏差问题。
在THINGS-EEG数据集上取得SOTA，内被试Top-1准确率69.7%，跨被试19.6%。
开源代码和模型。
analysis.experiments: 在THINGS-EEG数据集上进行内被试和跨被试实验，平均Top-1准确率分别为69.7%和19.6%，并分析了采样粒度、EEG通道拓扑和视觉/脑编码器骨干的影响。
limitations: 仅针对EEG-to-image检索任务，未验证其他脑信号模态。
依赖显著性预测和前景分割的准确性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高，实验充分且开源，与脑解码方向相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于显著性感知的多视图框架SIMON，通过模拟人眼注视机制提升EEG到图像检索的零样本性能。

papers.title: RTPrune: Reading-Twice Inspired Token Pruning for Efficient DeepSeek-OCR Inference
papers.abstract: DeepSeek-OCR leverages visual-text compression to reduce long-text processing costs and accelerate inference, yet visual tokens remain prone to redundant textual and structural information. Moreover, current token pruning methods for conventional vision-language models (VLMs) fail to preserve textual fidelity due to improper compression mechanisms. By analyzing the decoding process of DeepSeek-OCR, we find that a distinct two-stage reading trajectory: the model initially prioritizes the majority of high-norm tokens, then subsequently redistributes its attention to the remaining ones. Motivated by this insight, we propose RTPrune, a two-stage token pruning method tailored for DeepSeek-OCR. In the first stage, we prioritize high-norm visual tokens that capture salient textual and structural information. In the second stage, the remaining tokens are paired and merged based on optimal transport theory to achieve efficient feature aggregation. We further introduce a dynamic pruning ratio that adapts to token similarity and textual density for OCR tasks, enabling a better efficiency-accuracy trade-off. Extensive experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, as evidenced by 99.47% accuracy and 1.23$\times$ faster prefill on OmniDocBench, achieved with 84.25% token retention when applied to DeepSeek-OCR-Large.

analysis.tldr: RTPrune通过两阶段剪枝策略，在保持高精度的同时加速DeepSeek-OCR推理。
analysis.research_motivation: DeepSeek-OCR虽采用视觉-文本压缩减少长文本处理成本，但视觉令牌仍存在冗余；现有VLM令牌剪枝方法因压缩机制不当无法保持文本保真度。
analysis.problem: 如何针对DeepSeek-OCR设计高效的令牌剪枝方法，在减少冗余的同时保持文本保真度并加速推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 分析DeepSeek-OCR解码过程发现两阶段阅读轨迹：模型先关注高范数令牌，再重新分配注意力到剩余令牌。
analysis.method: 提出RTPrune两阶段剪枝方法：第一阶段优先保留高范数视觉令牌；第二阶段基于最优传输理论对剩余令牌进行配对合并；并引入动态剪枝比率适应令牌相似度和文本密度。
contributions: 发现DeepSeek-OCR解码中的两阶段阅读轨迹现象
提出RTPrune两阶段令牌剪枝方法，结合最优传输合并和动态剪枝比率
analysis.experiments: 在OmniDocBench上达到99.47%准确率和1.23倍prefill加速，令牌保留率84.25%。
limitations: 方法针对DeepSeek-OCR设计，可能不直接适用于其他VLM架构
动态剪枝比率依赖OCR任务特性，泛化性需进一步验证
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 针对特定模型提出创新剪枝方法，实验效果好，但泛化性待验证。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: RTPrune通过两阶段剪枝策略，在保持高精度的同时加速DeepSeek-OCR推理。

papers.title: Divergence is Uncertainty: A Closed-Form Posterior Covariance for Flow Matching
papers.abstract: Flow matching has become a leading framework for generative modeling, but quantifying the uncertainty of its samples remains an open problem. Existing approaches retrain the model with auxiliary variance heads, maintain costly ensembles, or propagate approximate covariance through many integration steps, trading off training cost, inference cost, or accuracy. We show that none of these trade-offs is necessary. We prove that, for any pre-trained flow matching velocity field, the trace of the posterior covariance over the clean data given the current state equals, in closed form, the divergence of the velocity field, up to a known time-dependent prefactor and an additive constant. We call this the \emph{divergence-uncertainty identity} for flow matching. The matrix-level form of the identity is similarly closed-form, depending solely on the velocity Jacobian. Because the identity is exact and post-hoc, it is computable on any pre-trained flow matching model, with no retraining and no architectural modification. For one-step generators such as MeanFlow, the same identity yields the exact end-to-end generation uncertainty in a single forward pass, eliminating the multi-step variance propagation required by all prior methods. Experiments on MNIST confirm that the resulting per-pixel uncertainty maps are semantically meaningful, concentrating on digit boundaries where inter-sample variation is highest, and that the scalar uncertainty score tracks actual prediction error, all at roughly 10,000$\times$ less total compute than ensembling or Monte Carlo dropout.

analysis.tldr: 流匹配的后验协方差可闭式表达为速度场散度，无需重训或集成即可获得生成不确定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 流匹配生成模型缺乏高效的样本不确定性量化方法，现有方法需重训、集成或近似传播协方差，在训练/推理成本与精度间权衡。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加训练或架构修改的前提下，精确且高效地计算预训练流匹配模型的后验协方差（不确定性）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 证明散度-不确定性恒等式：后验协方差的迹等于速度场散度（乘以时间相关因子加常数），矩阵形式仅依赖速度雅可比。该恒等式精确且事后可用，无需重训或修改架构。
contributions: 提出散度-不确定性恒等式，将流匹配的后验协方差闭式表达为速度场散度。
证明该恒等式精确、事后可用，适用于任意预训练流匹配模型，无需重训或集成。
对于一步生成器（如MeanFlow），单次前向传播即可获得端到端生成不确定性，消除多步方差传播。
analysis.experiments: 在MNIST上验证，逐像素不确定性图语义有意义（集中于数字边界），标量不确定性分数跟踪实际预测误差，计算量比集成或MC Dropout低约10000倍。
limitations: 仅适用于流匹配框架，不直接推广到其他生成模型。
矩阵级恒等式依赖速度雅可比，高维下计算可能昂贵。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 理论创新强（闭式恒等式），实验验证有效且效率极高，与生成模型核心方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 流匹配的后验协方差可闭式表达为速度场散度，无需重训或集成即可获得生成不确定性。

papers.title: Interpretable experiential learning based on state history and global feedback
papers.abstract: A new interpretable experiential learning model based on state history and global feedback is presented. It is capable of learning a behavioral model represented by a transition graph between sets of states, with transitions attributed with utility and evidence count. This model is expected to be suitable for solving reinforcement learning problem in resource-constrained environments. The model was thoroughly evaluated on the OpenAI Gym Atari Breakout benchmark, demonstrating performance comparable to some known neural network-based solutions.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于状态历史与全局反馈的可解释经验学习模型，在Atari Breakout上表现与神经网络方法相当。
analysis.research_motivation: 强化学习在资源受限环境中面临模型可解释性差和计算开销大的问题，现有方法难以兼顾性能与可解释性。
analysis.problem: 如何在资源受限环境下学习可解释的行为模型，同时保持与神经网络方法相当的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于状态历史与全局反馈，学习状态集之间的转移图，转移边附带效用和证据计数。
contributions: 提出一种可解释的经验学习模型，利用状态历史和全局反馈构建行为模型。
在Atari Breakout上验证了模型性能，与已知神经网络方法相当。

papers.title: From Flat Facts to Sharp Hallucinations: Detecting Stubborn Errors via Gradient Sensitivity
papers.abstract: Traditional hallucination detection fails on "Stubborn Hallucinations" -- errors where LLMs are confidently wrong. We propose a geometric solution: Embedding-Perturbed Gradient Sensitivity (EPGS). We hypothesize that while robust facts reside in flat minima, stubborn hallucinations sit in sharp minima, supported by brittle memorization. EPGS detects this sharpness by perturbing input embeddings with Gaussian noise and measuring the resulting spike in gradient magnitude. This acts as an efficient proxy for the Hessian spectrum, differentiating stable knowledge from unstable memorization. Our experiments show that EPGS significantly outperforms entropy-based and representation-based baselines, providing a robust signal for detecting high-confidence factual errors.

analysis.tldr: 提出嵌入扰动梯度敏感性（EPGS）方法，通过测量梯度尖峰检测LLM的顽固幻觉。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统幻觉检测方法无法识别LLM高置信度错误（顽固幻觉），需要更鲁棒的检测信号。
analysis.problem: 检测LLM中高置信度但事实错误的顽固幻觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 鲁棒事实位于平坦极小值，而顽固幻觉位于尖锐极小值，由脆弱记忆支持。
analysis.method: EPGS：对输入嵌入添加高斯噪声，测量梯度幅值的尖峰，作为Hessian谱的高效代理。
contributions: 提出EPGS方法，利用梯度敏感性检测顽固幻觉。
通过实验证明EPGS优于基于熵和表征的基线方法。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上，EPGS显著优于基于熵和表征的基线方法。
limitations: 可能对噪声幅度敏感，需要调参。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出嵌入扰动梯度敏感性（EPGS）方法，通过测量梯度尖峰检测LLM的顽固幻觉。

papers.title: Fusing Urban Structure and Semantics: A Conditional Diffusion Model for Cross-City OD Matrix Generation
papers.abstract: Accurate modeling of commuting flows is important for urban governance, traffic planning, and resource allocation. However, the combined influence of individual intentions, geographic constraints, and social dynamics leads to considerable heterogeneity in commuting patterns, making it difficult to develop generation models that generalize across cities. To address this issue, we propose SEDAN, a Structure-Enhanced Diffusion model conditioned on Attributed Nodes for generalizable OD matrix generation. SEDAN models a city as an attributed graph. Each region is treated as a node with demographic and point-of-interest features, and commuting flows are modeled as weighted edges. Adjacency and distance matrices are incorporated to characterize spatial structure. Based on this representation, we design a fusion mechanism within SEDAN to jointly model semantic information and spatial information. Regional semantic attributes are used to model latent travel demand through graph-transformer-based node interactions, while spatial structure is injected into the generation process as explicit constraints. The adjacency matrix guides attention weights to strengthen interactions between neighboring regions. Meanwhile, the distance matrix serves as a diffusion condition to capture spatial proximity and travel impedance. The fusion of urban semantics and spatial constraints enables SEDAN to generate OD matrices that are both behaviorally plausible and geographically coherent. Experiments on real-world OD datasets from U.S. cities show that SEDAN achieves a 7.38\% improvement in RMSE over the state-of-the-art baseline, WEDAN. It also remains robust across heterogeneous urban scenarios and varying structural patterns. Our work provides an effective and generalizable solution for commuting OD matrix generation. The code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/SEDAN.

analysis.tldr: 提出SEDAN，一种融合城市语义与空间结构的条件扩散模型，用于跨城市OD矩阵生成，在真实数据集上RMSE降低7.38%。
analysis.research_motivation: 通勤流建模对城市治理、交通规划和资源分配至关重要，但个体意图、地理约束和社会动态的联合影响导致通勤模式高度异质，现有生成模型难以跨城市泛化。
analysis.problem: 如何生成跨城市泛化的、行为合理且地理一致的OD矩阵。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将城市建模为属性图，区域为节点（含人口统计和POI特征），通勤流为加权边；设计融合机制，利用图Transformer建模节点交互以捕捉潜在出行需求，同时将邻接矩阵和距离矩阵作为扩散条件注入生成过程，分别引导注意力权重和约束空间邻近性。
contributions: 提出SEDAN，一种结构增强的条件扩散模型，用于跨城市OD矩阵生成。
设计融合机制，联合建模语义信息（节点属性）和空间结构（邻接和距离矩阵）。
在美国多个城市真实OD数据集上取得SOTA，RMSE降低7.38%，并验证了跨城市泛化鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在美国城市真实OD数据集上，与基线WEDAN相比，RMSE提升7.38%，并在不同城市结构和模式中保持鲁棒。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的城市属性数据（如POI特征），数据缺失时性能可能下降。
仅验证了美国城市，其他地区或国家的泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高（融合语义与空间结构的扩散模型），实验有明确提升，但应用领域较窄（城市交通），与核心方向中等相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SEDAN，一种融合城市语义与空间结构的条件扩散模型，用于跨城市OD矩阵生成，在真实数据集上RMSE降低7.38%。

papers.title: Social Bias in LLM-Generated Code: Benchmark and Mitigation
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed to generate code for human-centered applications where demographic fairness is critical. However, existing evaluations focus almost exclusively on functional correctness, leaving social bias in LLM-generated code largely unexamined. Extending our prior work on Solar, we conduct a comprehensive empirical study using SocialBias-Bench, a benchmark of 343 real-world coding tasks spanning seven demographic dimensions. We evaluate four prominent LLMs and find severe bias across all models, with Code Bias Scores reaching up to 60.58%. We further show that standard prompt-level interventions, such as Chain-of-Thought reasoning and fairness persona assignment, inadvertently amplify bias rather than reduce it. We then investigate whether structured multi-agent software process frameworks can improve fairness, finding that structured pipelines reduce bias when early roles correctly scope what the code should and should not consider. However, adding explicit fairness instructions to all agent roles produces worse outcomes than providing none, suggesting that diffused responsibility goes unaddressed. To address these limitations, we propose the Fairness Monitor Agent (FMA), a modular component that plugs into any existing code generation pipeline without modifying it. FMA analyzes the task description to determine which attributes should be considered or restricted, then detects and corrects violations through an iterative review process, without requiring an executable test suite. Evaluated on all 343 tasks, FMA reduces bias by 65.1% compared to a developer agent alone and improves functional correctness from 75.80% to 83.97%, outperforming all other studied approaches.

analysis.tldr: LLM生成代码存在严重社会偏见，标准提示干预反而加剧偏见，提出的公平性监控智能体（FMA）可有效降低偏见并提升功能正确性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM被广泛用于生成面向人类应用的代码，但现有评估仅关注功能正确性，忽略了代码中的社会偏见问题，而偏见可能在实际应用中造成不公平。
analysis.problem: LLM生成的代码中存在社会偏见，且标准提示级干预（如思维链、公平性角色分配）无法缓解甚至加剧偏见，需要有效的偏见检测与缓解方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准提示干预（如思维链、公平性角色分配）会无意中放大偏见；在多智能体流程中，对所有角色添加显式公平指令反而比不添加效果更差，表明责任分散问题未得到解决。
analysis.method: 提出公平性监控智能体（FMA），可插入任何现有代码生成流程而不修改原流程；FMA分析任务描述以确定哪些属性应被考虑或限制，然后通过迭代审查过程检测并纠正违规，无需可执行测试套件。
contributions: 构建了SocialBias-Bench基准，包含343个真实编码任务，覆盖7个人口统计维度，用于评估LLM生成代码中的社会偏见。
系统评估了四种主流LLM，发现所有模型均存在严重偏见，代码偏见分数高达60.58%。
揭示了标准提示干预（如思维链、公平性角色分配）会放大偏见，以及多智能体流程中责任分散的问题。
提出了公平性监控智能体（FMA），在343个任务上将偏见降低65.1%，并将功能正确性从75.80%提升至83.97%。
analysis.experiments: 在SocialBias-Bench的343个任务上评估了四种LLM，并测试了FMA的效果，结果显示FMA将偏见降低65.1%，功能正确性从75.80%提升至83.97%，优于所有其他方法。
limitations: FMA可能依赖于任务描述的准确性，若描述模糊可能影响效果。
FMA的迭代审查过程可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 论文针对LLM代码生成中的社会偏见问题，构建了基准并提出了有效的缓解方法，实验充分，具有实际应用价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM生成代码存在严重社会偏见，标准提示干预反而加剧偏见，提出的公平性监控智能体（FMA）可有效降低偏见并提升功能正确性。

papers.title: EventADL: Open-Box Anomaly Detection and Localization Framework for Events in Cloud-Based Service Systems
papers.abstract: Anomaly detection and localization (ADL) is critical for maintaining reliability and availability in cloud systems. Recent ADL developments focus on metric and log data, leaving event data unexplored. To address this gap, we propose EventADL, the first open-box event-based ADL framework for cloud-based service systems. To motivate the design of our framework, we conduct a systematic analysis on 520 real-world incidents, and provide insights into how anomalies and their root causes manifest through event data. EventADL has three phases: offline training, online anomaly detection, and root cause localization. During the training phase, EventADL first learns Event Semantic Patterns (ESPs), which capture normal interactions between system entities using historical event data, and then learns Event Frequency Patterns (EFPs), which capture the normal frequency of known ESPs. In the online anomaly detection phase, any data in the event stream that deviates significantly from either pattern is identified as anomalous. For localization, EventADL constructs an Intervention Graph that models the relationships between recent system interactions and the detected anomalies for automatic root cause localization. The framework is designed to operate efficiently with unlabeled data and to produce interpretable anomalies with their corresponding root causes. Our evaluation on three real cloud service systems and two real-world incidents demonstrates that EventADL outperforms existing methods, achieving F1-scores of at least 90% for anomaly detection and 100% top-3 accuracy in root cause localization.

analysis.tldr: 首个针对云服务系统事件数据的开箱式异常检测与定位框架，利用事件语义和频率模式实现高精度检测与根因定位。
analysis.research_motivation: 云服务系统中异常检测与定位（ADL）对可靠性至关重要，但现有方法主要关注指标和日志数据，忽略了事件数据这一重要来源。

analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过对520个真实事件的分析，揭示了异常及其根因在事件数据中的表现模式。
analysis.method: 提出EventADL框架，包含离线训练（学习事件语义模式ESP和事件频率模式EFP）、在线异常检测（检测偏离模式的事件）和根因定位（构建干预图进行自动定位）三个阶段。
contributions: 首次提出基于事件数据的开箱式异常检测与定位框架EventADL
系统分析了520个真实事件，揭示了异常在事件数据中的表现模式
在三个真实云服务系统上验证，F1分数≥90%，根因定位Top-3准确率100%

limitations: 可能依赖历史事件数据的完整性和代表性

analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实验充分，但属于特定领域应用，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个针对云服务系统事件数据的开箱式异常检测与定位框架，利用事件语义和频率模式实现高精度检测与根因定位。

papers.title: Watch Your Step: Information Injection in Diffusion Models via Shadow Timestep Embedding
papers.abstract: Diffusion models have become the foundation of modern generative systems, with most research focusing primarily on improving generation efficiency and output quality. The timestep embedding component is a crucial part of the diffusion pipeline, which provides a temporal conditioning signal to the denoising network, enabling it to adapt its predictions across different noise levels throughout the process. Despite their potential to contain substantial information, timestep embeddings remain underexplored in current research, especially for security risks and reliable provenance. To fill this gap, we introduce Shadow Timestep Embedding (STE), a novel mechanism that investigates the underutilized temporal space for malicious information injection into diffusion models. In particular, when zooming in on the timestep embedding space, we find that different timesteps exhibit distinct representational capabilities that can encode side-channel information. Moreover, such encoded information can be utilized for attack and defense purposes through the scheduler interface. We present a theoretical analysis of timestep embeddings as position-encoding mappings and derive a mutual coherence evaluation that explains the separability of disjoint timestep intervals. Our findings reveal the diffusion model's timestep as a powerful side channel for carrying dedicated information, motivating new directions for adversarial generative modeling by understanding the temporal dimension.

analysis.tldr: 提出Shadow Timestep Embedding (STE)机制，利用扩散模型时间步嵌入空间进行恶意信息注入，揭示时间步作为侧信道的安全风险。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型研究多聚焦于生成效率和质量，时间步嵌入作为关键组件，其安全风险和可靠溯源能力尚未被充分探索。

提出STE机制实现恶意信息注入，并提供理论分析解释时间步区间的可分离性。
