papers.title: GaMMA: Towards Joint Global-Temporal Music Understanding in Large Multimodal Models
papers.abstract: In this paper, we propose GaMMA, a state-of-the-art (SoTA) large multimodal model (LMM) designed to achieve comprehensive musical content understanding. GaMMA inherits the streamlined encoder-decoder design of LLaVA, enabling effective cross-modal learning between music and language. By incorporating audio encoders in a mixture-of-experts manner, GaMMA effectively unifies both time-series and non-time-series music understanding tasks within one set of parameters. Our approach combines carefully curated datasets at scale with a progressive training pipeline, effectively pushing the boundaries of music understanding via pretraining, supervised fine-tuning (SFT), and reinforcement learning (RL). To comprehensively assess both temporal and non-temporal capability of music LMMs, we introduce MusicBench, the largest music-oriented benchmark, comprising 3,739 human-curated multiple-choice questions covering diverse aspects of musical understanding. Extensive experiments demonstrate that GaMMA establishes new SoTA in the music domain, achieving 79.1% accuracy on MuchoMusic, 79.3% on MusicBench-Temporal, and 81.3% on MusicBench-Global, consistently outperforming previous methods.

analysis.tldr: GaMMA 提出统一全局-时间音乐理解的多模态大模型，在多个基准上达到新 SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有音乐理解模型难以同时处理时间序列（如旋律）和非时间序列（如风格）任务，且缺乏大规模高质量评测基准。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个能统一处理时间与非时间音乐理解任务的多模态大模型，并构建全面的评测基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于 LLaVA 的编码器-解码器架构，采用混合专家（MoE）方式融合音频编码器，通过预训练、监督微调和强化学习渐进训练。
contributions: 提出 GaMMA，首个在统一参数下同时处理时间与非时间音乐理解任务的 SoTA 多模态大模型。
构建 MusicBench，包含 3,739 道人工筛选多选题的最大音乐理解基准，覆盖时间与全局维度。
analysis.experiments: 在 MuchoMusic 上准确率 79.1%，MusicBench-Temporal 上 79.3%，MusicBench-Global 上 81.3%，均超越此前方法。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模高质量数据，数据收集成本高。

papers.title: Structured Analytic Coherent Point Drift for Non-Rigid Point Set Registration
papers.abstract: We introduce Analytic-CPD, a structured analytic variant of coherent point drift for non-rigid point set registration. The method retains the CPD posterior correspondence layer, but replaces the point-indexed Gaussian-kernel displacement-field M-step with a finite-dimensional structured analytic mapping estimator. Posterior probabilities from the Gaussian mixture model are condensed through a barycentric identity into weighted soft target points, converting the CPD pairwise soft-correspondence objective into a weighted analytic fitting problem. The deformation is represented by a truncated multivariate Taylor mapping of a vector-valued function, so the number of deformation parameters is controlled by the ambient dimension and the analytic order rather than by an M-by-M kernel system over the moving points. A degree-continuation strategy is further introduced to stabilize large-deformation registration by progressively activating higher-order analytic modes. Experiments on two-dimensional analytic deformations and three-dimensional smooth non-analytic deformations show that Analytic-CPD achieves lower final errors and faster convergence than standard CPD in representative large-deformation settings. The results suggest that CPD-style probabilistic correspondences and structured analytic mappings provide a compact and interpretable alternative to kernel-based non-rigid registration. Code is available at https://github.com/monge-ampere/Analytic-CPD.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种结构化解析变体Analytic-CPD，用截断多元泰勒映射替代高斯核位移场，实现更紧凑、可解释的非刚性点集配准。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统CPD使用点索引高斯核位移场，参数数量随点集规模增长，在大变形场景下收敛慢且误差大，缺乏紧凑性和可解释性。
analysis.problem: 非刚性点集配准中，如何用低维解析映射替代高维核映射，同时保持概率对应框架的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 保留CPD后验对应层，通过重心恒等式将后验概率聚合成加权软目标点，将软对应目标转化为加权解析拟合问题；用截断多元泰勒映射表示形变，参数由环境维度和解析阶数控制；引入度延续策略逐步激活高阶解析模式以稳定大形变配准。
contributions: 提出Analytic-CPD，用结构化解析映射替代高斯核位移场，参数数量与点集规模解耦。
引入度延续策略，通过渐进激活高阶解析模式稳定大形变配准。
在二维解析形变和三维非解析形变上验证，相比标准CPD降低最终误差并加快收敛。
analysis.experiments: 在二维解析形变和三维平滑非解析形变数据集上实验，显示Analytic-CPD在大形变场景下比标准CPD误差更低、收敛更快。
limitations: 解析映射的阶数选择可能影响配准精度与计算效率的平衡。
方法在高度非平滑或拓扑变化剧烈的形变上可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 方法有创新但应用领域较窄，实验规模有限，适合对配准方向感兴趣的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种结构化解析变体Analytic-CPD，用截断多元泰勒映射替代高斯核位移场，实现更紧凑、可解释的非刚性点集配准。

papers.title: InvEvolve: Evolving White-Box Inventory Policies via Large Language Models with Performance Guarantees
papers.abstract: We study how large language models can be used to evolve inventory policies in online, non-stationary environments. Our work is motivated by recent advances in LLM-based evolutionary search, such as AlphaEvolve, which demonstrates strong performance for static and highly structured problems such as mathematical discovery, but is not directly suited to online dynamic inventory settings. To this end, we propose InvEvolve, an end-to-end inventory policy evolution and inference framework grounded in confidence-interval-based certification. Built on a large language model trained via reinforcement learning, InvEvolve can process demand data together with additional numerical and textual features, and generates white-box inventory policies with statistical safety guarantees for deployment in future periods. We further introduce a unified theoretical model that connects training, inference, and deployment. This allows us to drive a lower bound on the probability that InvEvolve evolves a statistically safe and improved policy, and to characterize the multi-period performance gap relative to the oracle-safe benchmark. Tested on both synthetic data and real-world retail data, InvEvolve outperforms classical inventory policies and deep learning based methods. In canonical inventory settings, it evolves new policies that improve upon existing benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: InvEvolve利用LLM进化库存策略，在非平稳环境中提供统计安全保证并超越经典方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM进化搜索方法（如AlphaEvolve）适用于静态结构化问题，但无法直接处理在线动态库存环境，需要一种能适应非平稳需求并保证性能的进化框架。
analysis.problem: 如何在非平稳在线环境中利用LLM进化出具有统计安全保证的白盒库存策略。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出InvEvolve框架，基于置信区间认证，使用强化学习训练的LLM处理需求数据及数值/文本特征，生成具有统计安全保证的白盒库存策略，并建立统一理论模型连接训练、推理和部署。
contributions: 提出InvEvolve，首个端到端库存策略进化与推理框架，结合LLM和置信区间认证。
建立统一理论模型，推导策略安全改进的概率下界及多周期性能差距。
analysis.experiments: 在合成数据和真实零售数据上测试，InvEvolve优于经典库存策略和深度学习方法，在标准库存设置中进化出新策略并改进现有基准。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量文本特征输入。
理论保证可能受限于模型假设。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，结合LLM与库存管理，有理论保证和实验验证，但应用领域较窄。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: InvEvolve利用LLM进化库存策略，在非平稳环境中提供统计安全保证并超越经典方法。

papers.title: Flow matching for Sentinel-2 super-resolution: implementation, application, and implications
papers.abstract: Developing robust techniques for super-resolution of satellite imagery involves navigating commonly observed trade-offs between spectral fidelity and perceptual quality. In this work, we introduce a flow matching model for 4x super-resolution of 10-m Sentinel-2 visible and near-infrared bands over the conterminous United States (CONUS) using a dataset of 120,851 10-m Sentinel-2 and 2.5-m resampled NAIP imagery pairs acquired on the same day. Our results showed that the flow matching model outperformed diffusion and Real-ESRGAN models in pixel-wise accuracy in a single sampling step using the Euler method. When evaluated with a second-order Midpoint solver, our model generated perceptually realistic super-resolved imagery in only 20 sampling steps, effectively navigating the perception-distortion trade-off at inference time without retraining. We used this model to produce a super-resolved 2.5-m 4-band CONUS imagery product derived from 2025 10-m Sentinel-2 annual composites, consisting of over 1.58 trillion pixels. We further evaluated the use of super-resolved data on a land cover classification task using semantic segmentation models. Finally, we generated a yearly 2.5-m land cover product for the Chesapeake Bay watershed for 2020-2025. An accuracy assessment against 25,000 ground truth points revealed an overall accuracy of 89.11% for the annual land cover product. We conclude that flow matching is an effective generative modeling approach for super-resolution of Sentinel-2 imagery compared to diffusion and Generative Adversarial Network-based methods, and has strong implications for expanding access to high-resolution imagery for geospatial applications that demand fine spatial detail.

analysis.tldr: Flow matching 在 Sentinel-2 卫星图像 4 倍超分辨率中优于扩散和 GAN 方法，并在土地覆盖分类任务中验证了实用性。
analysis.research_motivation: 卫星图像超分辨率需要在光谱保真度和感知质量之间权衡，现有方法（如扩散模型和 GAN）难以同时兼顾两者，且计算成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何实现 Sentinel-2 卫星图像的高质量 4 倍超分辨率，同时平衡像素精度和感知质量，并验证其在土地覆盖分类等下游任务中的有效性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出基于 flow matching 的生成模型，使用 120,851 对 Sentinel-2 (10m) 和 NAIP (2.5m) 图像对训练，通过欧拉方法单步采样实现高像素精度，或通过中点求解器 20 步采样实现感知真实感。
contributions: 首次将 flow matching 应用于 Sentinel-2 卫星图像超分辨率，并证明其在像素精度和感知质量上优于扩散和 Real-ESRGAN 模型。
生成了覆盖美国本土的 2.5 米分辨率 4 波段超分辨率产品（1.58 万亿像素），并基于此生成了切萨皮克湾流域 2020-2025 年年度土地覆盖产品，精度达 89.11%。
analysis.experiments: 在 120,851 对 Sentinel-2/NAIP 图像上训练，与扩散和 Real-ESRGAN 对比，使用欧拉单步和中点求解器评估；在土地覆盖分类任务中验证超分辨率数据的有效性，并基于 25,000 个地面真值点评估年度土地覆盖产品精度（89.11%）。
limitations: 仅针对 Sentinel-2 的可见光和近红外波段，未涉及其他波段或卫星。
超分辨率产品可能仍存在感知-失真权衡，需要根据下游任务选择采样步数。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新（flow matching 应用于卫星超分）且实验充分，但遥感方向与核心关注点中等相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Flow matching 在 Sentinel-2 卫星图像 4 倍超分辨率中优于扩散和 GAN 方法，并在土地覆盖分类任务中验证了实用性。

papers.title: Are Multimodal LLMs Ready for Clinical Dermatology? A Real-World Evaluation in Dermatology
papers.abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have demonstrated promise on publicly available dermatology benchmarks. However, benchmark performance may not generalize to real-world dermatologic decision-making. To quantify this benchmark-to-bedside gap, we evaluated four open-weight MLLMs (InternVL-Chat v1.5, LLaVA-Med v1.5, SkinGPT4 and MedGemma-4B-Instruct) and one commercial MLLM (GPT-4.1) across three publicly available dermatology datasets and a retrospective multi-site hospital-based dermatology consultation cohort comprising 5,811 cases and 46,405 clinical images. Models were evaluated on two clinically relevant tasks: differential diagnosis generation and severity-based triage. Diagnostic performance was modest on public datasets and declined substantially in the real-world cohort. On public benchmarks, top-3 diagnostic accuracy reached 26.55% for the best open-weight model and 42.25% for GPT-4.1. On real-world consultation cases using images alone, top-3 diagnostic accuracy fell to 1.50%-13.35% among open-weight models and 24.65% for GPT-4.1. Incorporating clinical context improved performance across all models, increasing top-3 diagnostic accuracy up to 28.75% among open-weight models and 38.93% for GPT-4.1. However, model outputs were highly sensitive to incomplete or erroneous consultation context. For severity-based triage, models achieved moderate sensitivity (above 60%), suggesting potential utility for screening but insufficient reliability for clinical deployment. These findings demonstrate that benchmark performance substantially overestimates the real-world clinical capability of current dermatology MLLMs.

analysis.tldr: 多模态大模型在皮肤科公开基准上表现尚可，但在真实临床场景中诊断准确率大幅下降，存在显著的基准到临床差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有皮肤科多模态大模型（MLLM）在公开基准上表现良好，但基准性能可能无法泛化到真实临床决策，需要量化这种差距以评估其实际临床可用性。
analysis.problem: 评估当前MLLM在真实世界皮肤科临床场景中的诊断和分诊能力，并量化基准性能与临床性能之间的差距。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：1）模型在真实临床队列中的诊断准确率远低于公开基准（如GPT-4.1 top-3准确率从42.25%降至24.65%）；2）加入临床上下文可提升性能，但模型对不完整或错误的上下文高度敏感；3）分诊任务敏感性中等（>60%），但不足以可靠部署。
analysis.method: 在三个公开皮肤科数据集和一个包含5811例病例、46405张临床图像的多中心回顾性医院队列上，评估五个MLLM（InternVL-Chat v1.5、LLaVA-Med v1.5、SkinGPT4、MedGemma-4B-Instruct和GPT-4.1）在鉴别诊断生成和严重程度分诊两个临床任务上的表现。
contributions: 构建了大规模多中心真实世界皮肤科会诊队列（5811例，46405张图像），用于评估MLLM的临床性能。
系统量化了公开基准与真实临床场景之间的性能差距，揭示了当前MLLM在皮肤科临床部署中的不足。
analysis.experiments: 在三个公开数据集和一个真实世界医院队列上评估了五个MLLM，报告了top-3诊断准确率、分诊敏感性等指标，并分析了临床上下文的影响。
limitations: 仅评估了有限数量的模型，可能不涵盖所有最新MLLM。

analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities

papers.title: Time-series Meets Complex Motion Modeling: Robust and Computational-effective Motion Predictor for Multi-object Tracking
papers.abstract: Multi-object tracking (MOT) is critical in numerous real-world applications, including surveillance, autonomous driving, and robotics. Accurately predicting object motion is fundamental to MOT, but current methods struggle with the complexities of real-world, non-linear motion (e.g., sudden stops, sharp turns). While recent research has gravitated towards increasingly complex and computationally expensive generative models to tackle this problem, their practical utility is often constrained. This paper challenges that paradigm, arguing that such complexity is not only unnecessary but can be outperformed by a more efficient, purpose-built approach. We introduce the Temporal Convolutional Motion Predictor (TCMP), a novel framework for MOT that leverages a modified Temporal Convolutional Network (TCN) featuring dilated convolutions and a regression head. This design allows for effective motion prediction across arbitrary temporal context lengths. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance, specifically improves upon the previous best method in several key metrics: HOTA (a measure of overall tracking accuracy) increases from 62.3% to 63.4%, IDF1 (a measure of identity preservation) rises from 63.0% to 65.0%, and AssA (a measure of association accuracy) improves from 47.2% to 49.1%. Significantly, TCMP achieves this performance while being highly efficient; it has only 0.014 times the parameters and requires only 0.05 times the computational cost (FLOPs) compared to the SOTA method. while is only 0.014 times the size (in terms of parameters) and requires only 0.05 times the computational cost (in terms of FLOPs). These findings highlight the robustness of our method to advance MOT systems by ensuring adaptability, accuracy, and efficiency in complex tracking environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出TCMP，用时间卷积网络高效鲁棒地预测多目标跟踪中的复杂运动，性能超越SOTA且计算量极低。
analysis.research_motivation: 多目标跟踪中运动预测面临真实世界非线性运动（如急停、急转）的挑战，现有方法依赖复杂昂贵的生成模型，实用性受限。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个既鲁棒又计算高效的运动预测器，以处理多目标跟踪中的复杂非线性运动。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前方法倾向于使用复杂生成模型，但复杂并非必要，更高效、针对性设计的方法可以超越它们。
analysis.method: 提出时间卷积运动预测器（TCMP），基于改进的时间卷积网络（TCN），采用扩张卷积和回归头，支持任意时间上下文长度的运动预测。
contributions: 挑战了多目标跟踪中运动预测必须依赖复杂生成模型的范式，证明高效专用方法可超越复杂模型。
提出TCMP框架，在多个MOT基准上取得SOTA性能，同时参数量仅为SOTA方法的0.014倍，计算量仅为0.05倍。
analysis.experiments: 在多个MOT基准上评估，HOTA从62.3%提升至63.4%，IDF1从63.0%提升至65.0%，AssA从47.2%提升至49.1%。
limitations: 可能对极端非线性运动或遮挡场景的鲁棒性有待进一步验证。
仅在特定数据集上验证，泛化性需更多实验支持。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法简洁高效，性能SOTA且计算量极低，对MOT领域有实际价值，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TCMP，用时间卷积网络高效鲁棒地预测多目标跟踪中的复杂运动，性能超越SOTA且计算量极低。

papers.title: CGM-JEPA: Learning Consistent Continuous Glucose Monitor Representations via Predictive Self-Supervised Pretraining
papers.abstract: Continuous Glucose Monitoring (CGM) can detect early metabolic subphenotypes (insulin resistance, IR; $β$-cell dysfunction), but population-scale deployment faces two coupled problems. First, the same physiological state appears through multiple views (CGM time series, venous OGTT, Glucodensity summaries), so single-view representations fail to transfer when deployment shifts the modality or setting. Second, baselines perform inconsistently across these shifts. Both problems point to one remedy: representations that abstract away from any single view to capture higher-level temporal and distributional structure. We propose CGM-JEPA, a self-supervised pretraining framework which predicts masked latent representations rather than raw values, yielding abstraction that transfers across modalities. X-CGM-JEPA adds a masked Glucodensity cross-view objective for complementary distributional information. We pretrain on $\sim$389k unlabeled CGM readings from 228 subjects and evaluate on two clinical cohorts ($N=27$ and $N=17$ public-release subsets) across three regimes (cohort generalization, venous-to-CGM transfer, home CGM) under 20-iteration $\times$ 2-fold cross-validation. X-CGM-JEPA ranks first or second on AUROC for both endpoints across all three regimes while no baseline does, exceeding the strongest baseline by up to $+6.5$ pp in cohort generalization and $+3.6$ pp in venous-to-CGM transfer (paired Wilcoxon, $p<0.001$). Under modality shift, it matches mean AUROC while redistributing toward weaker subgroups (ethnicity AUROC gap shrinks 25-54%); on sparse in-domain venous data, the distributional view lifts label-aware clustering (ARI $+39\%$, NMI $+40\%$). Code and weights: https://github.com/cruiseresearchgroup/CGM-JEPA

analysis.tldr: 提出CGM-JEPA自监督框架，通过预测掩码潜在表征实现跨模态CGM表示学习，在临床泛化与模态迁移中优于基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 连续血糖监测（CGM）在人群规模部署中面临两个问题：同一生理状态存在多种视图（CGM时间序列、静脉OGTT、Glucodensity摘要），单视图表示在模态或场景迁移时失效；基线方法在不同迁移场景下表现不一致。需要一种能抽象出跨视图高层时序与分布结构的表示。
analysis.problem: 如何学习跨模态一致的CGM表示，使其在模态迁移（如静脉到CGM）和人群泛化中保持鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出基线方法在不同迁移场景下表现不一致，且单视图表示在模态迁移时失效。
analysis.method: 提出CGM-JEPA，一种自监督预训练框架，通过预测掩码的潜在表征（而非原始值）来学习抽象表示；X-CGM-JEPA进一步加入掩码Glucodensity跨视图目标以捕获互补分布信息。
contributions: 提出CGM-JEPA，首个利用JEPA范式进行CGM表示学习的自监督框架，实现跨模态抽象。
扩展为X-CGM-JEPA，引入跨视图Glucodensity目标，提升分布信息捕获能力。
在三个迁移场景（队列泛化、静脉到CGM迁移、家庭CGM）中验证，X-CGM-JEPA在AUROC上排名第一或第二，显著优于基线。
analysis.experiments: 在约389k未标记CGM读数（228名受试者）上预训练，并在两个临床队列（N=27和N=17）的公开子集上评估，涵盖三个迁移场景，采用20次迭代×2折交叉验证。X-CGM-JEPA在队列泛化中超过最强基线最多+6.5个百分点，在静脉到CGM迁移中+3.6个百分点（配对Wilcoxon检验，p<0.001）。在模态迁移下，匹配平均AUROC同时向弱势亚组重新分配（种族AUROC差距缩小25-54%）；在稀疏静脉数据上，分布视图提升标签感知聚类（ARI +39%，NMI +40%）。
limitations: 临床队列规模较小（N=27和N=17），可能限制统计效力。
仅针对CGM相关模态，未验证在其他时间序列或生物医学信号上的泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新（JEPA用于CGM）且实验充分，但应用领域较专，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CGM-JEPA自监督框架，通过预测掩码潜在表征实现跨模态CGM表示学习，在临床泛化与模态迁移中优于基线。

papers.title: Pedagogical Promise and Peril of AI: A Text Mining Analysis of ChatGPT Research Discussions in Programming Education
papers.abstract: GenAI systems such as ChatGPT are increasingly discussed in programming education, but the ways in which the research literature conceptualizes and frames their role remain unclear. This chapter applies text mining to publications indexed in a leading academic database to map scholarly discourse on ChatGPT in programming education. Term frequency analysis, phrase pattern extraction, and topic modeling reveal four dominant themes: pedagogical implementation, student-centered learning and engagement, AI infrastructure and human-AI collaboration, and assessment, prompting, and model evaluation. The literature prioritizes classroom practice and learner interaction, with comparatively limited attention to assessment design and institutional governance. Across studies, ChatGPT is positioned both as a learning aid that supports explanation, feedback, and efficiency and as a pedagogical risk linked to overreliance, unreliable outputs, and academic integrity concerns. These findings support responsible integration and highlight the need for stronger assessment and governance mechanisms.

analysis.tldr: 通过文本挖掘分析编程教育中ChatGPT研究的四大主题：教学实施、学生中心学习、AI基础设施与协作、评估与治理，揭示其双重角色。
analysis.research_motivation: ChatGPT等生成式AI在编程教育中应用广泛，但学术界对其角色的概念化和框架化尚不清晰，缺乏系统性文献分析。
analysis.problem: 如何通过文本挖掘方法系统梳理编程教育领域ChatGPT研究的话语主题和框架？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 文献优先关注课堂实践和学习者互动，对评估设计和制度治理关注不足；ChatGPT被同时视为学习辅助工具（解释、反馈、效率）和教学风险（过度依赖、不可靠输出、学术诚信问题）。
analysis.method: 对学术数据库中的出版物进行文本挖掘，包括词频分析、短语模式提取和主题建模。
contributions: 识别出编程教育中ChatGPT研究的四个主导主题：教学实施、学生中心学习与参与、AI基础设施与人机协作、评估与提示及模型评估。
揭示文献中ChatGPT的双重角色（学习辅助与教学风险），并指出评估和治理机制需要加强。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅基于单一学术数据库，可能遗漏其他来源文献。
文本挖掘方法可能无法捕捉深层语义和定性见解。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 方法常规（文本挖掘），贡献为文献综述性质，与核心ML方向距离较远，适合快速浏览。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过文本挖掘分析编程教育中ChatGPT研究的四大主题：教学实施、学生中心学习、AI基础设施与协作、评估与治理，揭示其双重角色。

papers.title: From Backward Spreading to Forward Replay: Revisiting Target Construction in LLM Parameter Editing
papers.abstract: LLM parameter editing methods commonly rely on computing an ideal target hidden-state at a target layer (referred as anchor point) and distributing the target vector to multiple preceding layers (commonly known as backward spreading) for cooperative editing. Although widely used for a long time, its underlying basis have not been systematically investigated. In this paper, we first conduct a systematic study of its foundations, which helps clarify its capability boundaries, practical considerations, and potential failure modes. Then, we propose a simple and elegant alternative that replaces backward spreading with forward-propagation. Instead of optimizing the target at the last editing layer, we optimize the anchor point at the first editing layer, and then propagate it forward to obtain accurate and mutually compatible target hidden-states for all subsequent editing layers. This approach achieves the same computational complexity as existing methods while producing more accurate layer-wise targets. Our method is simple, without interfering with either the computation of the initial target hidden state or any other components of the subsequent editing pipeline, and thus constituting a benefit for a wide range of LLM parameter editing methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出前向传播替代反向扩散构建LLM参数编辑目标，提升层间目标准确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM参数编辑方法依赖反向扩散构建目标隐藏状态，但其理论基础未被系统研究，存在能力边界和潜在失败模式。
analysis.problem: 如何更准确地构建LLM参数编辑中多层协同编辑的目标隐藏状态。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 反向扩散方法虽广泛使用，但缺乏系统性基础研究，其目标向量在多层间传播时可能不准确或不兼容。
analysis.method: 将锚点优化从最后一层改为第一层，通过前向传播为后续编辑层生成准确且兼容的目标隐藏状态。
contributions: 系统研究了LLM参数编辑中目标构建的基础，澄清了能力边界和失败模式。
提出前向传播替代反向扩散，在相同计算复杂度下获得更准确的层间目标。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定编辑层选择，泛化性需验证。
未讨论与不同编辑管线的兼容性细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法简洁有创新，但摘要未提供实验证据，适合精读验证。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出前向传播替代反向扩散构建LLM参数编辑目标，提升层间目标准确性。

papers.title: MemRouter: Memory-as-Embedding Routing for Long-Term Conversational Agents
papers.abstract: Long-term conversational agents must decide which turns to store in external memory, yet recent systems rely on autoregressive LLM generation at every turn to make that decision. We present MemRouter, a write-side memory router that decouples memory admission from the downstream answer backbone and replaces per-turn memory-management decoding with an embedding-based routing policy. MemRouter encodes each turn together with recent context, projects the resulting embeddings through a frozen LLM backbone, and predicts whether the turn should be stored using lightweight classification heads while training only 12M parameters. Under a controlled matched-harness comparison on LoCoMo, where the retrieval pipeline, answer prompts, and QA backbone (Qwen2.5-7B) are held identical, MemRouter outperforms an LLM-based memory manager on every question category (overall F1 52.0 vs 45.6, non-overlapping 95% CIs) while reducing memory-management p50 latency from 970ms to 58ms. Descriptive factorial averaging further shows that learned admission improves mean F1 by +10.3 over random storage, category-specific prompting adds +5.2 over a generic prompt, and retrieval contributes +0.7. These results suggest that write-side memory admission can be learned by a small supervised router, while answer generation remains a separate downstream component in long-horizon conversational QA.

analysis.tldr: 提出MemRouter，用轻量级嵌入路由替代LLM逐轮解码，实现高效长期对话记忆管理。
analysis.research_motivation: 长期对话代理需决定哪些轮次存入外部记忆，但现有系统每轮依赖自回归LLM生成来决策，导致高延迟和计算开销。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖LLM逐轮解码的情况下，高效且准确地决定对话历史中哪些轮次应存入外部记忆。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将每轮对话与近期上下文编码，通过冻结的LLM骨干投影嵌入，再用轻量分类头预测是否存储，仅训练12M参数。
contributions: 提出MemRouter，一种写端记忆路由方法，将记忆准入与下游回答生成解耦。
在LoCoMo上，MemRouter在保持检索管道、回答提示和QA骨干不变的情况下，F1达52.0 vs 45.6，延迟从970ms降至58ms。
analysis.experiments: 在LoCoMo数据集上，与基于LLM的记忆管理器对比，所有问题类别均更优（总体F1 52.0 vs 45.6，95%置信区间不重叠），p50延迟从970ms降至58ms。消融实验显示学习准入比随机存储平均F1高+10.3，类别特定提示比通用提示高+5.2，检索贡献+0.7。
limitations: 仅验证了LoCoMo单一数据集，泛化性未知。
方法依赖冻结的LLM骨干，可能限制对复杂上下文的适应能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，显著降低延迟并提升性能，与LLM Agent方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MemRouter，用轻量级嵌入路由替代LLM逐轮解码，实现高效长期对话记忆管理。

papers.title: VQ-SAD: Vector Quantized Structure Aware Diffusion For Molecule Generation
papers.abstract: Many diffusion based molecule generation methods ignore the symbolic information of molecules and represent the atom and bond type as one hot representation. Methods based on Morgan fingerprints produce hash collisions and are hard to embed into a continuous space without information loss and random fingerprints correspond to no valid molecule. To circumvent this issue we use another paradigm and consider atom and bond codes as latent variables of VQ-VAE. We introduce VQ-SAD which first trains a VQ-VAE and uses the frozen pretrained VQ-VAE model and considers the codebooks for both atom and bond types as tokenizers for the downstream diffusion process. VQ-SAD is a neuro-symbolic model that utilizes both symbolic and neural structural information for a diffusion based model with learnable forward process. The large discrete code space provides a more balanced atom and bond types which enhances the denoising process. VQ-VAE slightly outperforms SOTA models for diffusion based molecule generation on QM9 and ZINC250k datasets.

analysis.tldr: 提出VQ-SAD，将VQ-VAE的离散码本作为分子原子和键类型的符号化表示，用于扩散生成，在QM9和ZINC250k上略优于SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有扩散分子生成方法忽略符号信息，使用one-hot表示或Morgan指纹存在哈希碰撞、信息丢失等问题，需要一种既能保留符号信息又能连续嵌入的表示方法。
analysis.problem: 如何将分子的符号信息（原子和键类型）有效融入扩散生成模型，避免信息损失和哈希碰撞。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 先训练VQ-VAE，冻结其编码器，将原子和键类型的码本作为离散符号化表示，用于下游扩散过程；扩散模型具有可学习的前向过程，结合符号和神经结构信息。
contributions: 提出VQ-SAD，一种神经符号模型，利用VQ-VAE的离散码本作为分子符号的tokenizer，用于扩散生成。
在QM9和ZINC250k数据集上，VQ-SAD略优于现有扩散分子生成SOTA方法。
analysis.experiments: 在QM9和ZINC250k数据集上评估分子生成性能，与SOTA扩散方法比较，VQ-SAD略优。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 仅略优于SOTA，提升幅度可能有限。
依赖VQ-VAE预训练，可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法有一定创新性，但实验提升有限，与核心关注方向（VLM/视频生成等）距离较远。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VQ-SAD，将VQ-VAE的离散码本作为分子原子和键类型的符号化表示，用于扩散生成，在QM9和ZINC250k上略优于SOTA。

papers.title: Hypergraph and Latent ODE Learning for Multimodal Root Cause Localization in Microservices
papers.abstract: Root cause localization in cloud native microservice systems requires modeling complex service dependencies, irregular temporal dynamics, and heterogeneous observability data. We present HyperODE RCA, a unified framework that combines hypergraph attention learning, latent ordinary differential equations, and multimodal cross attention fusion for fine grained root cause analysis. The method learns higher order service interactions through differentiable hyperedge construction, captures continuous anomaly evolution from irregular observations with an ODE RNN encoder, and adaptively fuses logs, traces, metrics, entities, and events using context aware modality routing. We further improve robustness with a variational information bottleneck, temporal causal regularization, and invariant risk constraints. Experiments on the Tianchi AIOps benchmark show clear gains over strong baselines in ranking and classification performance, while preserving interpretability through learned hypergraph attention.

analysis.tldr: 提出HyperODE RCA框架，结合超图注意力、潜变量ODE和多模态融合，用于微服务根因定位。
analysis.research_motivation: 云原生微服务系统中根因定位面临服务依赖复杂、时序动态不规则、观测数据异构等挑战，现有方法难以有效建模高阶交互和连续异常演化。
analysis.problem: 如何从多模态观测数据（日志、追踪、指标等）中准确且可解释地定位微服务系统的根因。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出HyperODE RCA框架，包含可微超边构建的超图注意力学习、ODE-RNN编码器捕捉连续异常演化、上下文感知模态路由融合多模态数据，并引入变分信息瓶颈、时序因果正则化和不变风险约束提升鲁棒性。
contributions: 提出结合超图学习和潜变量ODE的统一框架，用于建模高阶服务交互和连续时序动态。
设计上下文感知的多模态融合机制，自适应整合日志、追踪、指标等异构数据。
引入变分信息瓶颈和因果正则化增强鲁棒性和可解释性。
analysis.experiments: 在天池AIOps基准上，该方法在排序和分类性能上优于强基线。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的多模态数据，实际部署中数据缺失或噪声可能影响性能。
超图构建和ODE求解的计算开销可能较大，需进一步优化效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较强，结合超图和ODE，实验有提升，但应用领域较窄，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HyperODE RCA框架，结合超图注意力、潜变量ODE和多模态融合，用于微服务根因定位。

papers.title: CURE-OOD: Benchmarking Out-of-Distribution Detection for Survival Prediction
papers.abstract: ``How long can I live and remain free of cancer?'' is often the first question a patient asks after receiving a cancer diagnosis and treatment. Accurate survival prediction helps alleviate psychological distress and supports risk stratification and personalized treatment planning. Recent survival prediction frameworks have shown strong performance using computed tomography (CT) images. However, variations in imaging acquisition introduce out-of-distribution (OOD) samples caused by covariate shifts that undermine model reliability. Despite this challenge, to our knowledge, no existing benchmark systematically studies OOD detection in cancer survival prediction. To address this gap, we introduce the Cancer sURvival bEnchmark for OOD Detection (CURE-OOD), the first benchmark for systematically evaluating OOD detection in survival prediction under controlled acquisition-induced distribution shifts. CURE-OOD defines scanner-parameter-based training, in-distribution (ID), and OOD test splits across four survival prediction tasks. Our experiments show that covariate shifts notably reduce survival prediction performance. It also shows that mainstream classification-oriented OOD detectors can fail in survival prediction. Finally, we include HazardDev as a simple survival-aware reference baseline for OOD detection. CURE-OOD enables systematic analysis of how distribution shifts affect both downstream survival performance and OOD detectability.

analysis.tldr: 首个针对癌症生存预测中分布外检测的系统性基准CURE-OOD，揭示了协变量偏移对预测性能的显著影响及现有OOD检测器的失效。
analysis.research_motivation: 生存预测对癌症患者至关重要，但CT图像采集差异导致的分布外样本会降低模型可靠性，而现有基准缺乏对此问题的系统研究。
analysis.problem: 缺乏针对癌症生存预测中分布外检测的标准化基准，无法系统评估协变量偏移对预测性能和OOD检测能力的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验表明协变量偏移显著降低生存预测性能，且主流分类导向的OOD检测器在生存预测任务中可能失效。
analysis.method: 构建CURE-OOD基准，基于扫描仪参数定义训练集、分布内和分布外测试集，覆盖四个生存预测任务，并引入HazardDev作为生存感知的参考基线。
contributions: 首次提出针对癌症生存预测中OOD检测的系统性基准CURE-OOD
揭示了协变量偏移对生存预测性能的负面影响及现有OOD检测器的局限性
提供了HazardDev作为简单有效的生存感知OOD检测基线
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及实验显示协变量偏移降低性能且分类OOD检测器可能失效。
limitations: 基准可能仅覆盖特定类型的协变量偏移（基于扫描仪参数）
HazardDev作为简单基线可能无法应对复杂OOD场景
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 首个系统性基准，填补空白，但方法细节有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个针对癌症生存预测中分布外检测的系统性基准CURE-OOD，揭示了协变量偏移对预测性能的显著影响及现有OOD检测器的失效。

papers.title: Odysseus: Scaling VLMs to 100+ Turn Decision-Making in Games via Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Given the rapidly growing capabilities of vision-language models (VLMs), extending them to interactive decision-making tasks such as video games has emerged as a promising frontier. However, existing approaches either rely on large-scale supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on human trajectories or apply reinforcement learning (RL) only in relatively short-horizon settings (typically around 20--30 turns). In this work, we study RL-based training of VLMs for long-horizon decision-making in Super Mario Land, a visually grounded environment requiring 100+ turns of interaction with coordinated perception, reasoning, and action. We begin with a systematic investigation of key algorithmic components and propose an adapted variant of PPO with a lightweight turn-level critic, which substantially improves training stability and sample efficiency over critic-free methods such as GRPO and Reinforce++. We further show that pretrained VLMs provide strong action priors, significantly improving sample efficiency during RL training and reducing the need for manual design choices such as action engineering, compared to classical deep RL trained from scratch. Building on these insights, we introduce Odysseus, an open training framework for VLM agents, achieving substantial gains across multiple levels of the game and at least 3 times average game progresses than frontier models. Moreover, the trained models exhibit consistent improvements under both in-game and cross-game generalization settings, while maintaining general-domain capabilities. Overall, our results identify key ingredients for making RL stable and effective in long-horizon, multi-modal settings, and provide practical guidance for developing VLMs as embodied agents.

analysis.tldr: 提出Odysseus框架，通过强化学习将VLM扩展到100+回合的游戏决策，显著提升长程任务表现。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLM在交互式决策任务中要么依赖大规模监督微调，要么仅在短程（20-30回合）场景应用强化学习，缺乏长程多模态决策的有效方法。
analysis.problem: 如何通过强化学习训练VLM在需要100+回合交互的视觉环境中实现稳定高效的决策。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Odysseus框架，采用改进的PPO算法并引入轻量级回合级critic，利用预训练VLM的动作先验提升样本效率。
contributions: 系统研究了长程决策中RL的关键算法组件，提出带回合级critic的PPO变体，显著提升训练稳定性和样本效率。
验证了预训练VLM的动作先验可减少手工设计需求，并开源Odysseus训练框架。
analysis.experiments: 在Super Mario Land多个关卡上测试，平均游戏进度比前沿模型提升至少3倍，并展示了游戏内和跨游戏泛化能力。
limitations: 可能仅在特定游戏环境中验证，泛化到其他复杂任务需进一步研究。
未详细讨论计算资源消耗和训练时间。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验效果显著，与VLM和RL方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Odysseus框架，通过强化学习将VLM扩展到100+回合的游戏决策，显著提升长程任务表现。

papers.title: Pose-Aware Diffusion for 3D Generation
papers.abstract: Generating pose-aligned 3D objects is challenging due to the spatial mismatches and transformation ambiguities inherent in decoupled canonical-then-rotate paradigms. To this end, we introduce Pose-Aware Diffusion (PAD), a novel end-to-end diffusion framework that synthesizes 3D geometry directly within the observation space. By unprojecting monocular depth into a partial point cloud and explicitly injecting it as a 3D geometric anchor, PAD abandons canonical assumptions to enforce rigorous spatial supervision. This native generation intrinsically resolves pose ambiguity, producing high-fidelity pose-aligned assets. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PAD achieves superior geometric alignment and image-to-3D correspondence compared to state-of-the-art methods. Additionally, PAD naturally extends to compositional 3D scene reconstruction via a simple union of independently generated objects, highlighting its robust ability to preserve precise spatial layouts.

analysis.tldr: 提出PAD框架，直接在观测空间生成3D物体，无需规范姿态假设，实现高保真姿态对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有解耦的规范-旋转范式存在空间错位和变换歧义，难以生成姿态对齐的3D物体。
analysis.problem: 解决3D生成中姿态对齐困难的问题，消除规范假设带来的空间歧义。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将单目深度反投影为部分点云作为3D几何锚点，显式注入扩散模型，在观测空间直接合成3D几何。
contributions: 提出PAD，一种端到端扩散框架，直接在观测空间生成3D物体，无需规范姿态假设。
通过将深度反投影为点云锚点，实现严格的几何监督，解决姿态歧义。
自然扩展到组合式3D场景重建，保持精确空间布局。
analysis.experiments: 在3D生成任务上实验，与SOTA方法相比，PAD在几何对齐和图像到3D对应上表现更优。
limitations: 依赖单目深度估计质量，可能影响点云锚点的准确性。
组合场景重建时物体间交互可能未被建模。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，直接解决姿态对齐痛点，实验验证有效，但依赖深度估计。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PAD框架，直接在观测空间生成3D物体，无需规范姿态假设，实现高保真姿态对齐。

papers.title: AI Adoption Among Teachers: Insights on Concerns, Support, Confidence, and Attitudes
papers.abstract: The study examines the adoption of artificial intelligence (AI) tools in education by analyzing the roles of institutional support, teacher confidence, and teacher concerns. It aims to determine whether teacher concerns moderate the relationship between institutional support and two outcomes: teacher confidence and attitudes toward AI adoption. The sample included 260 teachers from the Philippines. Composite scores were calculated for institutional support, confidence, concerns, and attitudes. Moderated multiple regression analysis showed that institutional support significantly predicted both teacher confidence and attitudes toward AI. However, teacher concerns did not significantly moderate these relationships. A follow-up mediation analysis tested whether confidence explains the effect of institutional support on attitudes. Results showed full mediation. The indirect effect was significant based on the Sobel test, and the direct effect became non-significant when confidence was included in the model. This shows that institutional support improves teacher attitudes by increasing their confidence. The study recommends that institutions provide structured and ongoing support to strengthen teacher confidence. Professional development, mentoring, and AI integration in teacher education programs can increase readiness and support effective AI adoption.

analysis.tldr: 研究教师对AI采纳的态度，发现机构支持通过提升教师信心间接改善态度，而教师担忧未起调节作用。
analysis.research_motivation: 教育领域AI工具推广中，教师采纳意愿是关键瓶颈，但机构支持、信心与担忧如何交互影响态度尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 探究机构支持、教师信心与担忧对AI采纳态度的影响机制，特别是担忧是否调节支持与信心/态度的关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 机构支持显著预测教师信心和态度，但教师担忧未显著调节这些关系；信心完全中介了支持对态度的影响。
analysis.method: 对260名菲律宾教师进行问卷调查，计算机构支持、信心、担忧和态度的复合分数，采用调节多重回归和中介分析（Sobel检验）。
contributions: 揭示机构支持通过提升教师信心间接改善AI采纳态度的完全中介路径
发现教师担忧并非调节机构支持与态度关系的关键因素
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅报告了回归和中介分析的统计显著性。
limitations: 样本仅来自菲律宾，可能限制跨文化推广性
横截面设计无法推断因果关系
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 研究聚焦教育领域AI采纳的社会学因素，与机器学习技术本身关联弱，方法常规，贡献有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 研究教师对AI采纳的态度，发现机构支持通过提升教师信心间接改善态度，而教师担忧未起调节作用。

papers.title: Towards Universal Gene Regulatory Network Inference: Unlocking Generalizable Regulatory Knowledge in Single-cell Foundation Models
papers.abstract: Gene Regulatory Network (GRN) inference is essential for understanding complex cellular mechanisms, rendered tractable through single-cell transcriptomic data. With the emergence of single-cell Foundation Models (scFMs), enhanced transcriptomic encoding is widely expected to revolutionize GRN inference. However, we observe that their performance remains far from satisfactory. The primary reason is that the standard reconstruction-based pre-training objectives often fail to explicitly capture latent regulatory signals. To bridge this gap, we first introduce a GRN generalization benchmark designed to evaluate regulatory predictions on unseen genes and datasets, which relies on the zero-shot capabilities of scFMs and is inherently challenging for traditional methods. Furthermore, to unlock the regulatory knowledge within the foundation models, we propose two novel methods, Virtual Value Perturbation and Gradient Trajectory, to distill implicit regulatory information from scFMs into highly generalizable inter-gene features. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach significantly outperforms existing methods, establishing a new paradigm for leveraging the potential of scFMs in universal GRN inference.

analysis.tldr: 提出从单细胞基础模型中蒸馏通用基因调控网络知识的新方法，显著提升零样本泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 基因调控网络推断对理解细胞机制至关重要，单细胞基础模型虽有望革新该领域，但标准预训练目标未能捕获潜在调控信号，导致性能不佳。
analysis.problem: 现有单细胞基础模型在基因调控网络推断中泛化能力不足，无法有效预测未见基因和数据集中的调控关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准重建式预训练目标未能显式捕获潜在调控信号，导致基础模型在GRN推断任务上表现远未达到预期。
analysis.method: 提出虚拟值扰动和梯度轨迹两种方法，从单细胞基础模型中蒸馏隐含的调控信息，转化为高度可泛化的基因间特征。
contributions: 构建了用于评估未见基因和数据集上调控预测的GRN泛化基准。
提出两种从单细胞基础模型中蒸馏调控知识的新方法，显著提升零样本GRN推断性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但声称方法显著优于现有方法。
limitations: 方法依赖预训练基础模型的质量，可能受限于模型本身。
泛化基准的构建可能未覆盖所有真实场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且针对重要问题，但摘要未提供实验细节，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出从单细胞基础模型中蒸馏通用基因调控网络知识的新方法，显著提升零样本泛化能力。

papers.title: Budget-Aware Routing for Long Clinical Text
papers.abstract: A key challenge for large language models is token cost per query and overall deployment cost. Clinical inputs are long, heterogeneous, and often redundant, while downstream tasks are short and high stakes. We study budgeted context selection, where a subset of document units is chosen under a strict token budget so an off-the-shelf generator can meet fixed cost and latency constraints. We cast this as a knapsack-constrained subset selection problem with two design choices, unitization that defines document segmentation and selection that determines which units are kept. We propose \textbf{RCD}, a monotone submodular objective that balances relevance, coverage, and diversity. We compare sentence, section, window, and cluster-based unitization, and introduce a routing heuristic that adapts to the budget regime. Experiments on MIMIC discharge notes, Cochrane abstracts, and L-Eval show that optimal strategies depend on the evaluation setting. Positional heuristics perform best at low budgets in extractive tasks, while diversity-aware methods such as MMR improve LLM generation. Selector choice matters more than unitization, with cluster-based grouping reducing performance and other schemes behaving similarly. ROUGE saturates for LLM summaries, while BERTScore better reflects quality differences. We release our code at https://github.com/stone-technologies/ACL_budget_paper.

analysis.tldr: 提出预算感知的临床长文本路由方法RCD，通过子模目标函数平衡相关性、覆盖度和多样性，在严格token预算下选择文档子集以降低LLM部署成本。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM的token成本高，临床文本长且冗余，而下游任务短且关键，现有方法未考虑预算约束下的上下文选择。
analysis.problem: 如何在严格token预算下，从长临床文本中选择最优子集，使生成器在固定成本和延迟约束下保持性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：位置启发式在低预算抽取任务中最佳，多样性方法（如MMR）提升LLM生成质量；选择器比单元化更重要，聚类分组降低性能；ROUGE在LLM摘要中饱和，BERTScore更好反映质量差异。
analysis.method: 将预算上下文选择建模为背包约束的子集选择问题，提出RCD（单调子模目标函数），结合相关性、覆盖度和多样性；比较句子、段落、窗口和聚类四种单元化策略，并引入适应预算的路由启发式。
contributions: 形式化预算感知的临床文本路由问题为背包约束子集选择。
提出RCD子模目标函数，平衡相关性、覆盖度和多样性。
系统比较不同单元化和选择策略，揭示预算与任务类型对最优策略的影响。
analysis.experiments: 在MIMIC出院记录、Cochrane摘要和L-Eval上实验，比较多种单元化和选择方法，使用ROUGE和BERTScore评估。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅针对临床文本，泛化性未验证。
未考虑生成器本身的预算自适应能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性中等，实验系统但未提供具体数值，与LLM部署成本相关，推荐阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出预算感知的临床长文本路由方法RCD，通过子模目标函数平衡相关性、覆盖度和多样性，在严格token预算下选择文档子集以降低LLM部署成本。

papers.title: AgentFloor: How Far Up the tool use Ladder Can Small Open-Weight Models Go?
papers.abstract: Production agentic systems make many model calls per user request, and most of those calls are short, structured, and routine. This raises a practical routing question that existing evaluations do not directly answer: which parts of an agent workflow truly require large frontier intelligence, and which can be handled by smaller models? We introduce AgentFloor, a deterministic 30-task benchmark organized as a six-tier capability ladder, spanning instruction following, tool use, multi-step coordination, and long-horizon planning under persistent constraints. We evaluate 16 open-weight models, from 0.27B to 32B parameters, alongside GPT-5 across 16,542 scored runs. Our results reveal a clear boundary of model necessity. Small and mid-sized open-weight models are already sufficient for much of the short-horizon, structured tool use work that dominates real agent pipelines, and in aggregate, the strongest open-weight model matches GPT-5 on our benchmark while being substantially cheaper and faster to run. The gap appears most clearly on long-horizon planning tasks that require sustained coordination and reliable constraint tracking over many steps, where frontier models still hold an advantage, though neither side reaches strong reliability. We also find that this boundary is not explained by scale alone: some failures respond to targeted interventions, but the effects are model-specific rather than universal. These findings suggest a practical design principle for agentic systems: use smaller open-weight models for the broad base of routine actions, and reserve large frontier models for the narrower class of tasks that truly demand deeper planning and control. We release the benchmark, harness, sweep configurations, and full run corpus.

analysis.tldr: AgentFloor 基准测试表明，小模型在短程工具调用上已足够，但长程规划仍需前沿模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有评估未直接回答智能体工作流中哪些任务需要大型前沿模型、哪些可由小模型处理，导致资源浪费。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个系统性的基准来划分智能体任务中模型能力的边界，以指导模型路由决策。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 小模型在短程、结构化工具调用上表现优异，甚至最强开源模型整体匹配 GPT-5；但长程规划任务中前沿模型仍有优势，且双方均未达到高可靠性；失败模式具有模型特异性。
analysis.method: 构建 AgentFloor 基准，包含 30 个确定性任务，按六层能力阶梯组织，评估 16 个开源模型和 GPT-5 在 16542 次运行上的表现。
contributions: 提出 AgentFloor 基准，系统划分智能体任务的能力层级。
揭示小模型在短程工具调用上已足够，为实际系统设计提供路由原则。
analysis.experiments: 在 16542 次评分运行中评估 16 个开源模型（0.27B-32B）和 GPT-5，开源模型整体匹配 GPT-5 且更便宜更快。
limitations: 基准任务为确定性，可能无法完全反映真实环境的随机性。
失败模式模型特异性，缺乏通用解决方案。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 基准设计新颖，实验充分，对实际系统设计有指导意义，但技术深度中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AgentFloor 基准测试表明，小模型在短程工具调用上已足够，但长程规划仍需前沿模型。

papers.title: DynamicPO: Dynamic Preference Optimization for Recommendation
papers.abstract: In large language model (LLM)-based recommendation systems, direct preference optimization (DPO) effectively aligns recommendations with user preferences, requiring multi-negative objective functions to leverage abundant implicit-feedback negatives and sharpen preference boundaries. However, our empirical analyses reveal a counterintuitive phenomenon, preference optimization collapse, where increasing the number of negative samples can lead to performance degradation despite a continuously decreasing training loss. We further theoretically demonstrate that this collapse arises from gradient suppression, caused by the dominance of easily discriminable negatives over boundary-critical negatives that truly define user preference boundaries. As a result, boundary-relevant signals are under-optimized, weakening the model's decision boundary. Motivated by these observations, we propose DynamicPO (Dynamic Preference Optimization), a lightweight and plug-and-play framework comprising two adaptive mechanisms: Dynamic Boundary Negative Selection, which identifies and prioritizes informative negatives near the model's decision boundary, and Dual-Margin Dynamic beta Adjustment, which calibrates optimization strength per sample according to boundary ambiguity. Extensive experiments on three public datasets show that DynamicPO effectively prevents optimization collapse and improves recommendation accuracy on multi-negative preference optimization methods, with negligible computational overhead. Our code and datasets are available at https://github.com/xingyuHuxingyu/DynamicPO.

analysis.tldr: 提出DynamicPO框架，通过动态边界负样本选择和双边界动态beta调整，解决推荐系统中偏好优化崩溃问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于LLM的推荐系统使用直接偏好优化（DPO）时，增加负样本数量会导致性能下降，即偏好优化崩溃现象，需要解决这一反直觉问题。
analysis.problem: 偏好优化崩溃：增加负样本数量导致性能下降，原因是梯度被易区分负样本抑制，边界关键负样本优化不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现增加负样本数量时训练损失持续下降但性能退化，理论分析表明这是由于梯度抑制，易区分负样本主导梯度，边界关键负样本被忽视。
analysis.method: DynamicPO框架包含两个自适应机制：动态边界负样本选择（识别并优先优化决策边界附近的负样本）和双边界动态beta调整（根据边界模糊度校准每个样本的优化强度）。
contributions: 发现并理论分析了偏好优化崩溃现象，归因于梯度抑制。
提出DynamicPO框架，轻量级即插即用，有效防止崩溃并提升推荐精度。
analysis.experiments: 在三个公开数据集上进行了实验，DynamicPO有效防止优化崩溃并提高多负样本偏好优化方法的推荐精度，计算开销可忽略。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于LLM的推荐系统，通用性待验证。
动态机制可能引入额外超参数调优成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且理论分析扎实，但应用领域为推荐系统，非核心方向，推荐阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DynamicPO框架，通过动态边界负样本选择和双边界动态beta调整，解决推荐系统中偏好优化崩溃问题。

papers.title: Prompt-Induced Score Variance in Zero-Shot Binary Vision-Language Safety Classification
papers.abstract: Single-prompt first-token probabilities from zero-shot vision-language model (VLM) safety classifiers are treated as decision scores, but we show they are unreliable under semantically equivalent prompt reformulation: even when the binary label is constrained to a fixed output position, equivalent prompts can induce materially different unsafe probabilities for the same sample. Across multimodal safety benchmarks and multiple VLM families, cross-prompt variance is strongly associated with prompt-level disagreement and higher error, making it a useful fragility diagnostic. A training-free mean ensemble improves NLL on all 14 dataset-model evaluation pairs and ECE on 12/14 relative to a train-selected single-prompt baseline, and wins more head-to-head NLL comparisons than labeled temperature scaling, Platt scaling, and isotonic regression applied to the same prompt. Ranking gains are consistent against the train-selected baseline on both AUROC and AUPRC, and against the full 15-prompt distribution remain consistent on AUPRC while softening on AUROC. Labeled calibration on top of the mean provides further gains when labels are available, identifying prompt averaging as a strong label-free first stage rather than a replacement for calibration. We frame this as a reliability stress test for zero-shot VLM first-token safety scores and recommend prompt-family evaluation with mean aggregation as a standard label-free reliability baseline.

analysis.tldr: 零样本VLM安全分类器对提示词敏感，平均集成可提升可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 零样本视觉语言模型安全分类器依赖单提示词的首词概率作为决策分数，但提示词微小变化可能导致分数不稳定，影响可靠性。
analysis.problem: 零样本VLM安全分类器在语义等价提示词下分数不可靠，需要诊断和缓解方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 跨提示方差与提示级分歧和更高错误率强相关，可作为脆弱性诊断指标。
analysis.method: 无训练的平均集成方法，对多个语义等价提示词的分数取平均，并可选进行标签校准。
contributions: 揭示零样本VLM安全分类器对提示词敏感，跨提示方差是可靠性诊断工具。
提出无训练的平均集成方法，在多个基准和模型上优于单提示词基线及多种校准方法。
analysis.experiments: 在14个数据集-模型评估对上，平均集成在NLL上全部提升，ECE上12/14提升；AUROC和AUPRC排名增益一致。
limitations: 仅针对零样本二分类安全任务，未扩展到多分类或微调场景。
平均集成可能无法完全消除提示偏差，标签校准仍需标签。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法简单但问题重要，实验充分，适合关注VLM安全性的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 零样本VLM安全分类器对提示词敏感，平均集成可提升可靠性。

papers.title: Online Self-Calibration Against Hallucination in Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) often suffer from hallucinations, generating descriptions that include visual details absent from the input image. Recent preference alignment methods typically rely on supervision distilled from stronger models such as GPT. However, this offline paradigm introduces a Supervision-Perception Mismatch: the student model is forced to align with fine-grained details beyond its perceptual capacity, learning to guess rather than to see. To obtain reliable self-supervision for online learning, we identify a Generative-Discriminative Gap within LVLMs, where models exhibit higher accuracy on discriminative verification than open-ended generation. Leveraging this capability, we propose \textbf{O}nline \textbf{S}elf-\textbf{CA}lib\textbf{R}ation (OSCAR), a framework that integrates Monte Carlo Tree Search with a Dual-Granularity Reward Mechanism to construct preference data and iteratively refines the model via Direct Preference Optimization. Extensive experiments demonstrate that OSCAR achieves state-of-the-art performance on hallucination benchmarks while improving general multimodal capabilities.

analysis.tldr: 提出在线自校准框架OSCAR，利用LVLM自身的判别能力生成偏好数据，通过MCTS和双粒度奖励机制迭代优化，有效缓解幻觉。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有偏好对齐方法依赖强模型（如GPT）的离线监督，导致学生模型被迫学习超出其感知能力的细节，产生'监督-感知不匹配'问题。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖外部强模型的情况下，利用LVLM自身能力进行在线自校准以减少幻觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现LVLM中存在生成-判别差距：模型在判别性验证任务上的准确率高于开放式生成任务。
analysis.method: 提出OSCAR框架，结合蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）与双粒度奖励机制构建偏好数据，并通过直接偏好优化（DPO）迭代微调模型。
contributions: 识别并利用LVLM中的生成-判别差距，实现无需外部强模型的在线自校准。
提出OSCAR框架，集成MCTS与双粒度奖励机制，在幻觉基准上达到SOTA并提升通用多模态能力。
analysis.experiments: 在多个幻觉基准上进行了实验，OSCAR达到SOTA性能，同时提升通用多模态能力。
limitations: 可能依赖MCTS的搜索效率，计算开销较大。
双粒度奖励机制的设计可能对特定任务敏感。

analysis.reason: 方法新颖，利用模型自身能力在线校准，实验充分且效果显著，与VLM方向高度相关。

papers.title: Code World Model Preparedness Report
papers.abstract: This report documents the preparedness assessment of Code World Model (CWM), a model for code generation and reasoning about code from Meta. We conducted pre-release testing across domains identified in our Frontier AI Framework as potentially presenting catastrophic risks, and also evaluated the model's misaligned propensities. Our assessment found that CWM does not pose additional frontier risks beyond those present in the current AI ecosystem. We therefore release it as an open-weight model.

analysis.tldr: Meta的Code World Model（CWM）在代码生成和推理方面的预发布评估显示，该模型未带来超出当前AI生态系统的额外前沿风险，因此以开放权重发布。
analysis.research_motivation: 评估前沿AI模型在代码生成领域的潜在灾难性风险，确保安全发布。

确认该模型未引入额外前沿风险，支持开放权重发布。

papers.title: Unbox Responsible GeoAI: Navigating Climate Extreme and Disaster Mapping
papers.abstract: As climate extreme and disaster events become more frequent and intense, Geospatial Artificial Intelligence (GeoAI) has emerged as a transformative approach for large-scale disaster mapping and risk reduction. However, the purely mechanical, performance-driven deployment of GeoAI models can result in amplifying inherent spatial inequalities, preventing effective emergency decision-making, and producing severe environmental carbon footprint. To unbox the concept of responsible GeoAI, this position paper examines its emerging role, e.g., in climate extreme and disaster mapping, from a critical GIS perspective. We address the nexus of responsible GeoAI into four interrelated theoretical dimensions, specifically Representativeness, Explainability, Sustainability, and Ethics, with examples from climate extreme and disaster mapping. Moreover, targeting at the operational practice, we then propose a conceptual governance Model of responsible GeoAI that categorizes its governance practices into Data, Application, and Society scopes. Last, this position paper aims to raise the attention in the broader GIS community that the future of climate resilience relies not just on building better algorithms, but on fostering a governance ecosystem where GeoAI is deployed responsibly, ethically, and sustainably.

analysis.tldr: 这篇立场论文从批判GIS视角审视负责任GeoAI在气候极端事件与灾害制图中的四个维度：代表性、可解释性、可持续性和伦理，并提出概念性治理模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着气候极端事件日益频繁，GeoAI在灾害制图中被广泛使用，但纯机械、性能驱动的部署可能放大空间不平等、阻碍应急决策并产生严重碳足迹，亟需从负责任角度进行审视。
analysis.problem: 如何系统定义和治理负责任GeoAI在气候极端与灾害制图中的关键维度与实践框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前GeoAI部署存在放大空间不平等、阻碍有效应急决策、产生严重环境碳足迹等失败模式。
analysis.method: 采用批判GIS视角，提出负责任GeoAI的四个理论维度（代表性、可解释性、可持续性、伦理），并构建涵盖数据、应用、社会三个范围的概念性治理模型。
contributions: 从批判GIS视角系统阐述了负责任GeoAI在气候极端与灾害制图中的四个理论维度。
提出了一个概念性的负责任GeoAI治理模型，将治理实践分为数据、应用和社会三个范围。

limitations: 作为立场论文，缺乏实证验证和定量评估。

papers.title: Semia: Auditing Agent Skills via Constraint-Guided Representation Synthesis
papers.abstract: An agent skill is a configuration package that equips an LLM-driven agent with a concrete capability, such as reading email, executing shell commands, or signing blockchain transactions. Each skill is a hybrid artifact-a structured half declares executable interfaces, while a prose half dictates when and how those interfaces fire-and the prose is reinterpreted probabilistically on every invocation. Conventional static analyzers parse the structured half but ignore the prose; LLM-based tools read the prose but cannot reproducibly prove that a tainted input reaches a high-impact sink. We present Semia, a static auditor for agent skills. Semia lifts each skill into the Skill Description Language (SDL), a Datalog fact base that captures LLM-triggered actions, prose-defined conditions, and human-in-the-loop checkpoints. Synthesizing a fact base that is both structurally sound and semantically faithful to the original prose is the central challenge; we address it with Constraint-Guided Representation Synthesis (CGRS), a propose-verify-evaluate loop that refines LLM candidates until convergence. Security properties (e.g., indirect injection, secret leakage, confused deputies, unguarded sinks, etc.) over an agent skill can then be reduced to Datalog reachability queries. We evaluate Semia on 13,728 real-world skills from public marketplaces. Semia renders all of them auditable and finds that more than half carry at least one critical semantic risk. On a stratified sample of 541 expert-labeled skills, Semia achieves 97.7% recall and an F1 of 90.6%, substantially outperforming signature-based scanners and LLM baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出Semia，一种通过约束引导表示合成将Agent技能转化为可审计Datalog事实库的静态审计器，在1.3万真实技能中发现过半存在语义风险。
analysis.research_motivation: Agent技能由结构化声明和自然语言散文混合构成，传统静态分析忽略散文部分，LLM工具无法可重复证明污染输入到达高风险汇点，缺乏有效的审计方法。
analysis.problem: 如何对Agent技能进行静态审计，使其结构化语义和散文条件都能被形式化分析，从而检测安全风险。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法要么忽略散文部分，要么无法提供可重复的证明，导致Agent技能中的语义风险难以被系统发现。
analysis.method: 提出Semia，将技能提升为Skill Description Language (SDL) Datalog事实库，通过约束引导表示合成（CGRS）循环迭代生成结构正确且语义忠实于原文的事实库，将安全属性归约为Datalog可达性查询。
contributions: 提出Semia，首个针对Agent技能的静态审计器，能够同时处理结构化声明和散文条件。
设计约束引导表示合成（CGRS）方法，确保合成的事实库在结构和语义上忠实于原始技能。
在13,728个真实技能上评估，发现过半存在至少一个关键语义风险，并在专家标注样本上达到97.7%召回率和90.6% F1分数。
analysis.experiments: 在13,728个真实世界技能上评估，所有技能均可审计；在541个专家标注技能上，Semia达到97.7%召回率和90.6% F1分数，优于签名扫描器和LLM基线。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM生成候选事实库的质量，存在不收敛风险。
仅针对安全属性中的特定类别（如间接注入、秘密泄露等），未覆盖所有风险类型。

analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实验充分，对Agent安全有重要价值，推荐精读。

papers.title: Beyond Structure: Revolutionising Materials Discovery via AI-Driven Synthesis Protocol-Property Relationships
papers.abstract: The current structure-centric paradigm in artificial intelligence (AI)-driven materials discovery, despite delivering thousands of candidate structures, is stalling at a critical barrier: the synthesizability gap. We argue that closing this gap demands a pivot to a synthesis-first paradigm in which executable synthesis protocols, not just atomic configurations, are treated as primary design variables. We outline a roadmap built on three pillars: (i) representing synthesis procedures as machine-readable protocols, (ii) deploying generative and inverse-design models to propose actionable reaction pathways and recipes, and (iii) integrating closed-loop optimisation to refine protocols against experimental realities and sustainability constraints. Framed in terms of the causal backbone P->X->y from protocol P to structure X and properties y, this perspective sets out methodological building blocks, standards needs and self-driving laboratory (SDL) integration strategies to accelerate reproducible, data-first materials discovery.

analysis.tldr: 提出从结构中心转向合成优先的范式，通过AI驱动合成协议-性质关系来突破材料发现中的可合成性瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前AI材料发现以结构为中心，虽能预测大量候选结构，但面临可合成性差距（synthesizability gap），即预测结构难以实际合成，阻碍了材料发现的落地。
analysis.problem: 如何将合成协议作为核心设计变量，建立从协议到结构再到性质的因果链路，从而弥合可合成性差距。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出结构中心范式导致大量候选结构无法合成，形成可合成性瓶颈。
analysis.method: 提出三支柱路线图：(i) 将合成过程表示为机器可读协议；(ii) 使用生成和逆向设计模型提出可执行的反应路径和配方；(iii) 集成闭环优化，根据实验现实和可持续性约束优化协议。
contributions: 提出从结构中心到合成优先的范式转变，将合成协议作为主要设计变量。
构建基于因果框架P->X->y（协议→结构→性质）的方法论蓝图，包括协议表示、生成模型和闭环优化。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 路线图尚处于概念阶段，缺乏实证验证。
机器可读协议的标准化和生成模型的可靠性仍需进一步研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.reason: 观点新颖，提出范式转变，但缺乏实验验证，适合关注材料AI的研究者阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出从结构中心转向合成优先的范式，通过AI驱动合成协议-性质关系来突破材料发现中的可合成性瓶颈。

papers.title: Beyond Visual Fidelity: Benchmarking Super-Resolution Models for Large-Scale Remote Sensing Imagery via Downstream Task Integration
papers.abstract: Super-resolution (SR) techniques have made major advances in reconstructing high-resolution images from low-resolution inputs. The increased resolution provides visual enhancement and utility for monitoring tasks. In particular, SR has been increasingly developed for satellite-based Earth observation, with applications in urban planning, agriculture, ecology, and disaster response. However, existing SR studies and benchmarks typically use fidelity metrics such as PSNR or SSIM, whereas the true utility of super-resolved images lies in supporting downstream tasks such as land cover classification, biomass estimation, and change detection. To bridge this gap, we introduce GeoSR-Bench, a downstream task-integrated SR benchmark dataset to evaluate SR models beyond fidelity metrics. GeoSR-Bench comprises spatially co-located, temporally aligned, and quality-controlled image pairs from about 36,000 locations across diverse land covers, spanning resolutions from 500m to 0.6m. To the best of our knowledge, GeoSR-Bench is the first SR benchmark that directly connects improved image resolution from SR models with downstream Earth monitoring tasks, including land cover segmentation, infrastructure mapping, and biophysical variable estimation. Using GeoSR-Bench, we benchmark GAN, transformer, neural operator, and diffusion-based SR models on perceptual quality and downstream task performance. We conduct experiments with 270 settings, covering 2 cross-platform SR tasks, 9 SR models, 3 downstream task models, and 5 downstream tasks for each SR task. The results show that improvements in traditional SR metrics often do not correlate with gains in task performance, and the correlations can be negative, indicating that these metrics provide limited guidance for selecting superior models for downstream tasks. This reveals the need to integrate downstream tasks into SR model development and evaluation.

analysis.tldr: 提出GeoSR-Bench基准，通过下游任务评估超分辨率模型，发现传统保真度指标与任务性能弱相关甚至负相关。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有超分辨率研究仅用PSNR/SSIM等保真度指标评估，但遥感图像的实际价值在于支持下游任务（如土地覆盖分类），缺乏任务导向的基准。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个集成下游任务的基准来评估超分辨率模型在遥感图像上的真实效用？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统SR指标（PSNR/SSIM）与下游任务性能的相关性弱甚至为负，表明这些指标无法有效指导模型选择。
analysis.method: 构建GeoSR-Bench基准，包含约36,000个地点的空间对齐、时间对齐、质量控制的图像对（分辨率从500m到0.6m），集成土地覆盖分割、基础设施映射、生物物理变量估计等下游任务，并评估GAN、Transformer、神经算子、扩散模型等9种SR模型。
contributions: 首个直接连接SR图像分辨率提升与下游地球监测任务的基准GeoSR-Bench
通过270组实验揭示传统SR指标与任务性能的弱/负相关性，强调下游任务集成的重要性
analysis.experiments: 在270组设置下评估9种SR模型、3种下游任务模型、5种下游任务，覆盖2种跨平台SR任务。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖遥感领域，可能不适用于其他领域
未提供具体下游任务性能数值，仅给出相关性结论
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 提出首个任务导向的遥感超分基准，实验规模大且结论有启发性，但方法创新性中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GeoSR-Bench基准，通过下游任务评估超分辨率模型，发现传统保真度指标与任务性能弱相关甚至负相关。

papers.title: A Model-based Visual Contact Localization and Force Sensing System for Compliant Robotic Grippers
papers.abstract: Grasp force estimation can help prevent robots from damaging delicate objects during manipulation and improve learning-based robotic control. Integrating force sensing into deformable grippers negotiates trade-offs in cost, complexity, mechanical robustness, and performance. With the growing integration of RGB-D wrist cameras into robotic systems for control purposes, camera-based techniques are a promising solution for indirect visual force estimation. Current approaches mostly utilize end-to-end deep learning, which can be brittle when generalizing to new scenarios, while existing model-based approaches are unsuited to grasping and modern grasper geometries. To address these challenges, we developed a model-based visual force sensing approach integrating an iterative contact localization with generalization to unseen objects. The system extracts structural key points from wrist camera RGB-D images of deforming fin-ray-shaped soft grippers, and uses these key points to define parameters of an inverse finite element analysis simulation in Simulation Open Framework Architecture. The iterative contact localization sub-system utilizes a deep learning-based online 3D reconstruction and pose estimation pipeline to dynamically update contact location, and is robust to visual occlusion and unseen objects. Our system demonstrated an average root mean square error of 0.23 N and normalized root mean square deviation of 2.11% during the load phase, and 0.48 N and 4.34% over the entire grasping process when interacting with different objects under various conditions, showcasing its potential for real-time model-based indirect force sensing of soft grippers.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于模型的视觉力传感方法，通过RGB-D图像和逆有限元分析实现软体夹爪的接触定位与力估计。
analysis.research_motivation: 抓取力估计有助于防止机器人损坏易碎物体并改进基于学习的控制，但将力传感集成到可变形夹爪中面临成本、复杂度、机械鲁棒性和性能之间的权衡。现有方法多采用端到端深度学习，泛化到新场景时脆弱，而基于模型的方法不适合抓取和现代夹爪几何形状。
analysis.problem: 开发一种基于模型的视觉力传感方法，实现软体夹爪的接触定位和力估计，且能泛化到未见物体。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 系统从腕部相机RGB-D图像中提取软体夹爪的结构关键点，用于定义逆有限元分析模拟的参数；迭代接触定位子系统利用基于深度学习的在线3D重建和姿态估计管道动态更新接触位置，对视觉遮挡和未见物体具有鲁棒性。
contributions: 提出一种基于模型的视觉力传感方法，结合迭代接触定位和逆有限元分析，适用于软体夹爪。
系统在多种条件下与不同物体交互时，实现了低力估计误差（负载阶段RMSE 0.23 N，整个抓取过程RMSE 0.48 N）。
analysis.experiments: 系统在负载阶段平均均方根误差为0.23 N，归一化均方根偏差为2.11%；整个抓取过程分别为0.48 N和4.34%。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的RGB-D图像和在线3D重建精度。
逆有限元分析的计算开销可能影响实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高，结合模型与深度学习，实验误差低，但应用场景较专，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于模型的视觉力传感方法，通过RGB-D图像和逆有限元分析实现软体夹爪的接触定位与力估计。

papers.title: Token Arena: A Continuous Benchmark Unifying Energy and Cognition in AI Inference
papers.abstract: Public inference benchmarks compare AI systems at the model and provider level, but the unit at which deployment decisions are actually made is the endpoint: the (provider, model, stock-keeping-unit) tuple at which a specific quantization, decoding strategy, region, and serving stack is exposed. We introduce TokenArena, a continuous benchmark that measures inference at endpoint granularity along five core axes (output speed, time to first token, workload-blended price, effective context, and quality on the live endpoint) and synthesizes them, together with a modeled energy estimate, into three headline composites: joules per correct answer, dollars per correct answer, and endpoint fidelity (output-distribution similarity to a first-party reference). The framework's novelty is empirical and methodological. Across 78 endpoints serving 12 model families, the same model on different endpoints differs in mean accuracy by up to 12.5 points on math and code, in fingerprint similarity to first party by up to 12 points, in tail latency by an order of magnitude, and in modeled joules per correct answer by a factor of 6.2. We further show that workload-aware blended pricing reorders the leaderboard substantially: 7 of 10 top-ranked endpoints under the chat preset (3:1 input:output) fall out of the top 10 under the retrieval-augmented preset (20:1), and the reasoning preset (1:5) elevates frontier closed models that the chat preset penalizes on price. We release the framework, schema, probe and eval harness, and a v1.0 leaderboard snapshot under CC BY 4.0. TokenArena is a methodology, not a single ranking; we publish full provenance and limitations and welcome external replication.

analysis.tldr: TokenArena 是一个持续基准，从端点粒度统一评估 AI 推理的能量与认知性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有公共推理基准仅在模型或提供商层面比较，而实际部署决策基于端点（提供商、模型、库存单位等组合），缺乏细粒度、多维度的统一评测。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个在端点粒度上同时衡量推理速度、成本、质量和能耗的持续基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 同一模型在不同端点上的准确率差异可达12.5分，指纹相似性差异12分，尾延迟差一个数量级，每正确回答能耗差6.2倍；工作负载感知的混合定价会显著改变排行榜排序。
analysis.method: 提出TokenArena框架，在端点粒度上测量输出速度、首令牌时间、工作负载混合价格、有效上下文和实时端点质量五个核心维度，并结合建模能耗综合为三个指标：每正确回答焦耳、每正确回答美元和端点保真度。
contributions: 提出端点粒度的持续推理基准TokenArena，统一评估能量与认知性能。
通过78个端点和12个模型家族的实验揭示端点间巨大差异，并展示工作负载感知定价对排行榜的显著影响。
开源框架、模式、探针和评估工具，以及v1.0排行榜快照。
analysis.experiments: 在78个端点、12个模型家族上评估，报告了准确率、指纹相似性、尾延迟和能耗差异，以及不同工作负载预设下的排行榜变化。
limitations: 能耗为建模估计，可能不完全准确。
基准持续更新，v1.0快照可能随时间过时。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，实验充分，开源框架有实用价值，但属于基准构建，技术深度中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TokenArena 是一个持续基准，从端点粒度统一评估 AI 推理的能量与认知性能。
